authors_text: Shakeel Ahmad Sheikh,Md Sahidullah,Fabrice Hirsch,Slim Ouni
title: End-to-End and Self-Supervised Learning for ComParE 2022 Stuttering Sub-Challenge
title_zh: ComParE 2022 口吃子挑战的端到端和自我监督学习
comment: Accepted in ACM MM 2022 Conference : Grand Challenges, "\c{opyright} {Owner/Author | ACM} {2022}. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution
comments: Accepted in ACM MM 2022 Conference : Grand Challenges, "\c{opyright} {Owner/Author | ACM} {2022}. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution
abstract: In this paper, we present end-to-end and speech embedding based systems trained in a self-supervised fashion to participate in the ACM Multimedia 2022 ComParE Challenge, specifically the stuttering sub-challenge. In particular, we exploit the embeddings from the pre-trained Wav2Vec2.0 model for stuttering detection (SD) on the KSoF dataset. After embedding extraction, we benchmark with several methods for SD. Our proposed self-supervised based SD system achieves a UAR of 36.9% and 41.0% on validation and test sets respectively, which is 31.32% (validation set) and 1.49% (test set) higher than the best (DeepSpectrum) challenge baseline (CBL). Moreover, we show that concatenating layer embeddings with Mel-frequency cepstral coefficients (MFCCs) features further improves the UAR of 33.81% and 5.45% on validation and test sets respectively over the CBL. Finally, we demonstrate that the summing information across all the layers of Wav2Vec2.0 surpasses the CBL by a relative margin of 45.91% and 5.69% on validation and test sets respectively. Grand-challenge: Computational Paralinguistics ChallengE
summary: In this paper, we present end-to-end and speech embedding based systems trained in a self-supervised fashion to participate in the ACM Multimedia 2022 ComParE Challenge, specifically the stuttering sub-challenge. In particular, we exploit the embeddings from the pre-trained Wav2Vec2.0 model for stuttering detection (SD) on the KSoF dataset. After embedding extraction, we benchmark with several methods for SD. Our proposed self-supervised based SD system achieves a UAR of 36.9% and 41.0% on validation and test sets respectively, which is 31.32% (validation set) and 1.49% (test set) higher than the best (DeepSpectrum) challenge baseline (CBL). Moreover, we show that concatenating layer embeddings with Mel-frequency cepstral coefficients (MFCCs) features further improves the UAR of 33.81% and 5.45% on validation and test sets respectively over the CBL. Finally, we demonstrate that the summing information across all the layers of Wav2Vec2.0 surpasses the CBL by a relative margin of 45.91% and 5.69% on validation and test sets respectively. Grand-challenge: Computational Paralinguistics ChallengE
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了以自监督方式训练的基于端到端和语音嵌入的系统，以参加 ACM Multimedia 2022 ComParE 挑战赛，特别是口吃子挑战赛。特别是，我们利用预训练的 Wav2Vec2.0 模型的嵌入在 KSoF 数据集上进行口吃检测 (SD)。嵌入提取后，我们使用几种 SD 方法进行基准测试。我们提出的基于自我监督的 SD 系统在验证集和测试集上分别实现了 36.9% 和 41.0% 的 UAR，比最佳 (DeepSpectrum) 挑战基线 (CBL) 高出 31.32%（验证集）和 1.49%（测试集）。此外，我们表明，将层嵌入与梅尔频率倒谱系数（MFCC）特征连接起来，在验证集和测试集上比 CBL 分别进一步提高了 33.81% 和 5.45% 的 UAR。最后，我们证明了 Wav2Vec2.0 所有层的求和信息在验证集和测试集上分别超过了 CBL 45.91% 和 5.69%。大挑战：计算副语言学挑战E

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于端到端和自监督学习的系统，用于ACM多媒体2022 ComParE挑战赛的口吃子挑战任务，利用预训练的Wav2Vec2.0模型进行口吃检测。
AI.motivation: 现有口吃检测方法（如DeepSpectrum）存在性能瓶颈，需探索更有效的自监督学习框架以提升检测准确率。
AI.method: 使用预训练Wav2Vec2.0模型提取语音嵌入，结合MFCC特征并采用多层嵌入融合策略进行口吃检测。
AI.result: 在验证集和测试集上分别达到36.9%和41.0%的UAR，较基线提升31.32%和1.49%；融合MFCC后进一步提升33.81%和5.45%；跨层信息求和使验证集相对提升45.91%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习框架结合多层特征融合显著优于传统方法，证明了预训练模型在口吃检测任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Thien-Nu Hoang,Daehee Kim
title: Supervised Contrastive ResNet and Transfer Learning for the In-vehicle Intrusion Detection System
title_zh: 用于车载入侵检测系统的监督对比 ResNet 和迁移学习
abstract: High-end vehicles have been furnished with a number of electronic control units (ECUs), which provide upgrading functions to enhance the driving experience. The controller area network (CAN) is a well-known protocol that connects these ECUs because of its modesty and efficiency. However, the CAN bus is vulnerable to various types of attacks. Although the intrusion detection system (IDS) is proposed to address the security problem of the CAN bus, most previous studies only provide alerts when attacks occur without knowing the specific type of attack. Moreover, an IDS is designed for a specific car model due to diverse car manufacturers. In this study, we proposed a novel deep learning model called supervised contrastive (SupCon) ResNet, which can handle multiple attack identification on the CAN bus. Furthermore, the model can be used to improve the performance of a limited-size dataset using a transfer learning technique. The capability of the proposed model is evaluated on two real car datasets. When tested with the car hacking dataset, the experiment results show that the SupCon ResNet model improves the overall false-negative rates of four types of attack by four times on average, compared to other models. In addition, the model achieves the highest F1 score at 0.9994 on the survival dataset by utilizing transfer learning. Finally, the model can adapt to hardware constraints in terms of memory size and running time.
summary: High-end vehicles have been furnished with a number of electronic control units (ECUs), which provide upgrading functions to enhance the driving experience. The controller area network (CAN) is a well-known protocol that connects these ECUs because of its modesty and efficiency. However, the CAN bus is vulnerable to various types of attacks. Although the intrusion detection system (IDS) is proposed to address the security problem of the CAN bus, most previous studies only provide alerts when attacks occur without knowing the specific type of attack. Moreover, an IDS is designed for a specific car model due to diverse car manufacturers. In this study, we proposed a novel deep learning model called supervised contrastive (SupCon) ResNet, which can handle multiple attack identification on the CAN bus. Furthermore, the model can be used to improve the performance of a limited-size dataset using a transfer learning technique. The capability of the proposed model is evaluated on two real car datasets. When tested with the car hacking dataset, the experiment results show that the SupCon ResNet model improves the overall false-negative rates of four types of attack by four times on average, compared to other models. In addition, the model achieves the highest F1 score at 0.9994 on the survival dataset by utilizing transfer learning. Finally, the model can adapt to hardware constraints in terms of memory size and running time.
abstract_zh: 高端车辆配备了多个电子控制单元（ECU），提供升级功能以增强驾驶体验。控制器局域网 (CAN) 是连接这些 ECU 的众所周知的协议，因为它简单且高效。然而，CAN 总线容易受到各种类型的攻击。虽然入侵检测系统（IDS）是为了解决CAN总线的安全问题而提出的，但之前的大多数研究只在攻击发生时提供警报，而不知道攻击的具体类型。此外，由于汽车制造商不同，IDS 是针对特定车型设计的。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种称为监督对比（SupCon）ResNet 的新型深度学习模型，它可以处理 CAN 总线上的多种攻击识别。此外，该模型可用于使用迁移学习技术来提高有限大小数据集的性能。所提出模型的能力在两个真车数据集上进行了评估。在汽车黑客数据集上进行测试时，实验结果表明，与其他模型相比，SupCon ResNet 模型将四种类型攻击的总体漏报率平均提高了四倍。此外，该模型利用迁移学习在生存数据集上获得了最高的 F1 分数 0.9994。最后，该模型可以适应内存大小和运行时间方面的硬件限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督对比学习的ResNet模型（SupCon ResNet）及迁移学习技术，用于车载CAN总线的入侵检测系统，以实现多类型攻击识别并提升小数据集性能。
AI.motivation: 现有车载入侵检测系统（IDS）无法识别具体攻击类型且局限于特定车型，需设计通用性强、能处理多类型攻击并适应小数据集的模型。
AI.method: 提出监督对比学习框架SupCon ResNet，结合迁移学习技术，通过对比学习增强特征表示，并利用迁移学习解决数据量不足问题。
AI.result: 在真实车辆数据集上，SupCon ResNet将四种攻击类型的平均漏报率降低至其他模型的四分之一，并通过迁移学习在生存数据集上达到0.9994的F1分数，同时满足硬件资源约束。
AI.conclusion: SupCon ResNet与迁移学习有效提升了车载入侵检测的准确性和泛化能力，为多类型攻击识别及跨车型适配提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Bharath Sudharsan,Peter Corcoran,Muhammad Intizar Ali
title: Smart speaker design and implementation with biometric authentication and advanced voice interaction capability
title_zh: 具有生物特征认证和先进语音交互能力的智能扬声器设计与实现
abstract: Advancements in semiconductor technology have reduced dimensions and cost while improving the performance and capacity of chipsets. In addition, advancement in the AI frameworks and libraries brings possibilities to accommodate more AI at the resource-constrained edge of consumer IoT devices. Sensors are nowadays an integral part of our environment which provide continuous data streams to build intelligent applications. An example could be a smart home scenario with multiple interconnected devices. In such smart environments, for convenience and quick access to web-based service and personal information such as calendars, notes, emails, reminders, banking, etc, users link third-party skills or skills from the Amazon store to their smart speakers. Also, in current smart home scenarios, several smart home products such as smart security cameras, video doorbells, smart plugs, smart carbon monoxide monitors, and smart door locks, etc. are interlinked to a modern smart speaker via means of custom skill addition. Since smart speakers are linked to such services and devices via the smart speaker user's account. They can be used by anyone with physical access to the smart speaker via voice commands. If done so, the data privacy, home security and other aspects of the user get compromised. Recently launched, Tensor Cam's AI Camera, Toshiba's Symbio, Facebook's Portal are camera-enabled smart speakers with AI functionalities. Although they are camera-enabled, yet they do not have an authentication scheme in addition to calling out the wake-word. This paper provides an overview of cybersecurity risks faced by smart speaker users due to lack of authentication scheme and discusses the development of a state-of-the-art camera-enabled, microphone array-based modern Alexa smart speaker prototype to address these risks.
summary: Advancements in semiconductor technology have reduced dimensions and cost while improving the performance and capacity of chipsets. In addition, advancement in the AI frameworks and libraries brings possibilities to accommodate more AI at the resource-constrained edge of consumer IoT devices. Sensors are nowadays an integral part of our environment which provide continuous data streams to build intelligent applications. An example could be a smart home scenario with multiple interconnected devices. In such smart environments, for convenience and quick access to web-based service and personal information such as calendars, notes, emails, reminders, banking, etc, users link third-party skills or skills from the Amazon store to their smart speakers. Also, in current smart home scenarios, several smart home products such as smart security cameras, video doorbells, smart plugs, smart carbon monoxide monitors, and smart door locks, etc. are interlinked to a modern smart speaker via means of custom skill addition. Since smart speakers are linked to such services and devices via the smart speaker user's account. They can be used by anyone with physical access to the smart speaker via voice commands. If done so, the data privacy, home security and other aspects of the user get compromised. Recently launched, Tensor Cam's AI Camera, Toshiba's Symbio, Facebook's Portal are camera-enabled smart speakers with AI functionalities. Although they are camera-enabled, yet they do not have an authentication scheme in addition to calling out the wake-word. This paper provides an overview of cybersecurity risks faced by smart speaker users due to lack of authentication scheme and discusses the development of a state-of-the-art camera-enabled, microphone array-based modern Alexa smart speaker prototype to address these risks.
abstract_zh: 半导体技术的进步减少了尺寸和成本，同时提高了芯片组的性能和容量。此外，人工智能框架和库的进步带来了在消费物联网设备资源有限的边缘容纳更多人工智能的可能性。如今，传感器已成为我们环境中不可或缺的一部分，它提供连续的数据流来构建智能应用程序。一个例子是具有多个互连设备的智能家居场景。在这样的智能环境中，为了方便快捷地访问基于网络的服务和个人信息（例如日历、笔记、电子邮件、提醒、银行业务等），用户将第三方技能或亚马逊商店的技能链接到他们的智能音箱。另外，在当前的智能家居场景中，智能安防摄像头、可视门铃、智能插头、智能一氧化碳监测器、智能门锁等多种智能家居产品都通过自定义技能添加的方式与现代智能音箱进行联动。由于智能扬声器通过智能扬声器用户的帐户链接到此类服务和设备。任何能够通过语音命令物理访问智能扬声器的人都可以使用它们。如果这样做，用户的数据隐私、家庭安全和其他方面都会受到损害。最近推出的Tensor Cam的AI Camera、东芝的Symbio、Facebook的Portal都是具有AI功能的摄像头智能音箱。尽管它们支持摄像头，但除了发出唤醒词之外，它们没有身份验证方案。本文概述了智能音箱用户因缺乏身份验证方案而面临的网络安全风险，并讨论了开发最先进的、支持摄像头、基于麦克风阵列的现代 Alexa 智能音箱原型来解决这些风险。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种集成生物特征认证和高级语音交互功能的智能音箱原型，以解决现有智能音箱在隐私和安全方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 当前智能音箱通过语音唤醒词实现访问控制，但缺乏额外的认证机制，导致用户隐私和家庭安全面临风险。
AI.method: 结合摄像头和麦克风阵列，开发支持生物特征认证的智能音箱原型，增强身份验证安全性。
AI.result: 提出了一种基于摄像头和生物特征认证的智能音箱方案，有效缓解了现有设备的隐私与安全问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过集成生物特征认证，本文提出的智能音箱原型显著提升了智能家居环境中的数据隐私保护水平。

authors_text: Hans Dermot Doran
title: Security and Safety Aspects of AI in Industry Applications
title_zh: 人工智能在行业应用中的安全问题
comment: As presented at the Embedded World Conference, Nuremberg, 2022
comments: As presented at the Embedded World Conference, Nuremberg, 2022
abstract: In this relatively informal discussion-paper we summarise issues in the domains of safety and security in machine learning that will affect industry sectors in the next five to ten years. Various products using neural network classification, most often in vision related applications but also in predictive maintenance, have been researched and applied in real-world applications in recent years. Nevertheless, reports of underlying problems in both safety and security related domains, for instance adversarial attacks have unsettled early adopters and are threatening to hinder wider scale adoption of this technology. The problem for real-world applicability lies in being able to assess the risk of applying these technologies. In this discussion-paper we describe the process of arriving at a machine-learnt neural network classifier pointing out safety and security vulnerabilities in that workflow, citing relevant research where appropriate.
summary: In this relatively informal discussion-paper we summarise issues in the domains of safety and security in machine learning that will affect industry sectors in the next five to ten years. Various products using neural network classification, most often in vision related applications but also in predictive maintenance, have been researched and applied in real-world applications in recent years. Nevertheless, reports of underlying problems in both safety and security related domains, for instance adversarial attacks have unsettled early adopters and are threatening to hinder wider scale adoption of this technology. The problem for real-world applicability lies in being able to assess the risk of applying these technologies. In this discussion-paper we describe the process of arriving at a machine-learnt neural network classifier pointing out safety and security vulnerabilities in that workflow, citing relevant research where appropriate.
abstract_zh: 在这篇相对非正式的讨论文件中，我们总结了机器学习安全领域的问题，这些问题将在未来五到十年内影响行业部门。近年来，各种使用神经网络分类的产品已在实际应用中得到研究和应用，最常见的是视觉相关应用，也包括预测性维护。然而，有关安全和安全相关领域潜在问题的报告（例如对抗性攻击）让早期采用者感到不安，并有可能阻碍该技术的更广泛采用。现实世界适用性的问题在于能够评估应用这些技术的风险。在这篇讨论论文中，我们描述了机器学习神经网络分类器的过程，指出了该工作流程中的安全漏洞，并在适当的情况下引用了相关研究。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了未来五到十年内机器学习在工业应用中的安全与安全隐患，分析神经网络分类技术在实际应用中的风险并提出应对方法。
AI.motivation: 当前AI技术在工业领域应用中因对抗性攻击等问题引发安全担忧，阻碍其大规模推广，亟需系统性风险评估框架。
AI.method: 通过梳理神经网络分类器的开发流程，结合案例分析与现有研究，识别安全漏洞并提出风险评估方法。
AI.result: 明确了工业AI应用中的关键安全挑战，提出了针对对抗攻击等风险的评估流程与改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更完善的安全评估体系与防护机制，以保障AI技术在工业场景中的可靠性和可接受性。

authors_text: Andrew Critch
title: WordSig: QR streams enabling platform-independent self-identification that's impossible to deepfake
title_zh: WordSig：QR 流可实现独立于平台的自我识别，且无法深度伪造
abstract: Deepfakes can degrade the fabric of society by limiting our ability to trust video content from leaders, authorities, and even friends. Cryptographically secure digital signatures may be used by video streaming platforms to endorse content, but these signatures are applied by the content distributor rather than the participants in the video. We introduce WordSig, a simple protocol allowing video participants to digitally sign the words they speak using a stream of QR codes, and allowing viewers to verify the consistency of signatures across videos. This allows establishing a trusted connection between the viewer and the participant that is not mediated by the content distributor. Given the widespread adoption of QR codes for distributing hyperlinks and vaccination records, and the increasing prevalence of celebrity deepfakes, 2022 or later may be a good time for public figures to begin using and promoting QR-based self-authentication tools.
summary: Deepfakes can degrade the fabric of society by limiting our ability to trust video content from leaders, authorities, and even friends. Cryptographically secure digital signatures may be used by video streaming platforms to endorse content, but these signatures are applied by the content distributor rather than the participants in the video. We introduce WordSig, a simple protocol allowing video participants to digitally sign the words they speak using a stream of QR codes, and allowing viewers to verify the consistency of signatures across videos. This allows establishing a trusted connection between the viewer and the participant that is not mediated by the content distributor. Given the widespread adoption of QR codes for distributing hyperlinks and vaccination records, and the increasing prevalence of celebrity deepfakes, 2022 or later may be a good time for public figures to begin using and promoting QR-based self-authentication tools.
abstract_zh: Deepfakes 会限制我们信任来自领导人、当局甚至朋友的视频内容的能力，从而破坏社会结构。视频流平台可以使用加密安全数字签名来认可内容，但这些签名是由内容分发者而不是视频参与者应用的。我们推出了 WordSig，这是一种简单的协议，允许视频参与者使用 QR 码流对他们所说的单词进行数字签名，并允许观看者验证视频中签名的一致性。这允许在观看者和参与者之间建立不受内容分发者中介的可信连接。鉴于二维码广泛用于分发超链接和疫苗接种记录，以及名人深度造假的日益普遍，2022 年或以后可能是公众人物开始使用和推广基于二维码的自我身份验证工具的好时机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WordSig协议，通过QR码流实现平台无关的自我身份验证，防止深度伪造视频。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造技术破坏社会信任，现有数字签名依赖内容分发方而非视频参与者，无法有效防止伪造。
AI.method: 利用QR码流对视频参与者发言进行数字签名，观众可跨视频验证签名一致性，建立去中心化的信任连接。
AI.result: 实现观众与参与者直接的信任验证机制，无需依赖内容分发平台，利用QR码普及性增强防伪能力。
AI.conclusion: 2022年后公众人物应推广基于QR码的自认证工具，以应对深度伪造威胁并建立可信身份验证体系。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出WordSig协议，通过QR码流实现平台无关的自我身份验证，防止深度伪造视频。
ai_content.motivation: 深度伪造技术破坏社会信任，现有数字签名依赖内容分发方而非视频参与者，无法有效防止伪造。
ai_content.method: 利用QR码流对视频参与者发言进行数字签名，观众可跨视频验证签名一致性，建立去中心化的信任连接。

search_text: WordSig: QR streams enabling platform-independent self-identification that's impossible to deepfake WordSig：QR 流可实现独立于平台的自我识别，且无法深度伪造 Deepfakes can degrade the fabric of society by limiting our ability to trust video content from leaders, authorities, and even friends. Cryptographically secure digital signatures may be used by video streaming platforms to endorse content, but these signatures are applied by the content distributor rather than the participants in the video. We introduce WordSig, a simple protocol allowing video participants to digitally sign the words they speak using a stream of QR codes, and allowing viewers to verify the consistency of signatures across videos. This allows establishing a trusted connection between the viewer and the participant that is not mediated by the content distributor. Given the widespread adoption of QR codes for distributing hyperlinks and vaccination records, and the increasing prevalence of celebrity deepfakes, 2022 or later may be a good time for public figures to begin using and promoting QR-based self-authentication tools. Deepfakes 会限制我们信任来自领导人、当局甚至朋友的视频内容的能力，从而破坏社会结构。视频流平台可以使用加密安全数字签名来认可内容，但这些签名是由内容分发者而不是视频参与者应用的。我们推出了 WordSig，这是一种简单的协议，允许视频参与者使用 QR 码流对他们所说的单词进行数字签名，并允许观看者验证视频中签名的一致性。这允许在观看者和参与者之间建立不受内容分发者中介的可信连接。鉴于二维码广泛用于分发超链接和疫苗接种记录，以及名人深度造假的日益普遍，2022 年或以后可能是公众人物开始使用和推广基于二维码的自我身份验证工具的好时机。 本文提出WordSig协议，通过QR码流实现平台无关的自我身份验证，防止深度伪造视频。 Andrew Critch cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Xuefei Yin,Yanming Zhu,Yi Xie,Jiankun Hu
title: PowerFDNet: Deep Learning-Based Stealthy False Data Injection Attack Detection for AC-model Transmission Systems
title_zh: PowerFDNet：基于深度学习的交流模型传输系统隐形虚假数据注入攻击检测
comment: ef:IEEE Open Journal of the Computer Society, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Open Journal of the Computer Society, 2022
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated that smart grids are vulnerable to stealthy false data injection attacks (SFDIAs), as SFDIAs can bypass residual-based bad data detection mechanisms. The SFDIA detection has become one of the focuses of smart grid research. Methods based on deep learning technology have shown promising accuracy in the detection of SFDIAs. However, most existing methods rely on the temporal structure of a sequence of measurements but do not take account of the spatial structure between buses and transmission lines. To address this issue, we propose a spatiotemporal deep network, PowerFDNet, for the SFDIA detection in AC-model power grids. The PowerFDNet consists of two sub-architectures: spatial architecture (SA) and temporal architecture (TA). The SA is aimed at extracting representations of bus/line measurements and modeling the spatial structure based on their representations. The TA is aimed at modeling the temporal structure of a sequence of measurements. Therefore, the proposed PowerFDNet can effectively model the spatiotemporal structure of measurements. Case studies on the detection of SFDIAs on the benchmark smart grids show that the PowerFDNet achieved significant improvement compared with the state-of-the-art SFDIA detection methods. In addition, an IoT-oriented lightweight prototype of size 52 MB is implemented and tested for mobile devices, which demonstrates the potential applications on mobile devices. The trained model will be available at \textit{https://github.com/HubYZ/PowerFDNet}.
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated that smart grids are vulnerable to stealthy false data injection attacks (SFDIAs), as SFDIAs can bypass residual-based bad data detection mechanisms. The SFDIA detection has become one of the focuses of smart grid research. Methods based on deep learning technology have shown promising accuracy in the detection of SFDIAs. However, most existing methods rely on the temporal structure of a sequence of measurements but do not take account of the spatial structure between buses and transmission lines. To address this issue, we propose a spatiotemporal deep network, PowerFDNet, for the SFDIA detection in AC-model power grids. The PowerFDNet consists of two sub-architectures: spatial architecture (SA) and temporal architecture (TA). The SA is aimed at extracting representations of bus/line measurements and modeling the spatial structure based on their representations. The TA is aimed at modeling the temporal structure of a sequence of measurements. Therefore, the proposed PowerFDNet can effectively model the spatiotemporal structure of measurements. Case studies on the detection of SFDIAs on the benchmark smart grids show that the PowerFDNet achieved significant improvement compared with the state-of-the-art SFDIA detection methods. In addition, an IoT-oriented lightweight prototype of size 52 MB is implemented and tested for mobile devices, which demonstrates the potential applications on mobile devices. The trained model will be available at \textit{https://github.com/HubYZ/PowerFDNet}.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，智能电网很容易受到隐形虚假数据注入攻击 (SFDIA)，因为 SFDIA 可以绕过基于残留的不良数据检测机制。 SFDIA检测已成为智能电网研究的热点之一。基于深度学习技术的方法在 SFDIA 检测方面显示出良好的准确性。然而，大多数现有方法依赖于测量序列的时间结构，但没有考虑总线和传输线之间的空间结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种时空深度网络 PowerFDNet，用于交流模型电网中的 SFDIA 检测。 PowerFDNet 由两个子架构组成：空间架构（SA）和时间架构（TA）。 SA 的目的是提取公交/线路测量的表示并根据其表示对空间结构进行建模。 TA 旨在对一系列测量的时间结构进行建模。因此，所提出的PowerFDNet可以有效地对测量的时空结构进行建模。对基准智能电网上 SFDIA 检测的案例研究表明，与最先进的 SFDIA 检测方法相比，PowerFDNet 取得了显着的改进。此外，还针对移动设备实现并测试了面向物联网的52MB轻量级原型，展示了在移动设备上的潜在应用。训练后的模型将在 \textit{https://github.com/HubYZ/PowerFDNet} 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的时空网络PowerFDNet，用于检测交流模型输电系统中的隐蔽虚假数据注入攻击（SFDIA）。
AI.motivation: 现有SFDIA检测方法仅依赖时间序列结构，忽视了母线与输电线路间的空间结构关系，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含空间架构（SA）和时间架构（TA）的双子网络：SA提取母线/线路测量的空间特征，TA建模时间序列结构，实现时空联合建模。
AI.result: 在基准智能电网案例中显著优于现有方法，且开发了52MB轻量级原型，验证了移动端部署可行性。
AI.conclusion: PowerFDNet通过融合时空特征有效提升SFDIA检测性能，轻量化版本为移动端应用提供了潜在解决方案。

authors_text: Rizka Purwanto,Arindam Pal,Alan Blair,Sanjay Jha
title: PhishSim: Aiding Phishing Website Detection with a Feature-Free Tool
title_zh: PhishSim：使用无功能的工具帮助检测网络钓鱼网站
abstract: In this paper, we propose a feature-free method for detecting phishing websites using the Normalized Compression Distance (NCD), a parameter-free similarity measure which computes the similarity of two websites by compressing them, thus eliminating the need to perform any feature extraction. It also removes any dependence on a specific set of website features. This method examines the HTML of webpages and computes their similarity with known phishing websites, in order to classify them. We use the Furthest Point First algorithm to perform phishing prototype extractions, in order to select instances that are representative of a cluster of phishing webpages. We also introduce the use of an incremental learning algorithm as a framework for continuous and adaptive detection without extracting new features when concept drift occurs. On a large dataset, our proposed method significantly outperforms previous methods in detecting phishing websites, with an AUC score of 98.68%, a high true positive rate (TPR) of around 90%, while maintaining a low false positive rate (FPR) of 0.58%. Our approach uses prototypes, eliminating the need to retain long term data in the future, and is feasible to deploy in real systems with a processing time of roughly 0.3 seconds.
summary: In this paper, we propose a feature-free method for detecting phishing websites using the Normalized Compression Distance (NCD), a parameter-free similarity measure which computes the similarity of two websites by compressing them, thus eliminating the need to perform any feature extraction. It also removes any dependence on a specific set of website features. This method examines the HTML of webpages and computes their similarity with known phishing websites, in order to classify them. We use the Furthest Point First algorithm to perform phishing prototype extractions, in order to select instances that are representative of a cluster of phishing webpages. We also introduce the use of an incremental learning algorithm as a framework for continuous and adaptive detection without extracting new features when concept drift occurs. On a large dataset, our proposed method significantly outperforms previous methods in detecting phishing websites, with an AUC score of 98.68%, a high true positive rate (TPR) of around 90%, while maintaining a low false positive rate (FPR) of 0.58%. Our approach uses prototypes, eliminating the need to retain long term data in the future, and is feasible to deploy in real systems with a processing time of roughly 0.3 seconds.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用归一化压缩距离（NCD）检测网络钓鱼网站的无特征方法，这是一种无参数相似性度量，通过压缩来计算两个网站的相似性，从而无需执行任何特征提取。它还消除了对一组特定网站功能的任何依赖。该方法检查网页的 HTML 并计算它们与已知网络钓鱼网站的相似度，以便对它们进行分类。我们使用最远点优先算法来执行网络钓鱼原型提取，以便选择代表网络钓鱼网页集群的实例。我们还介绍了使用增量学习算法作为连续自适应检测的框架，而在概念漂移发生时无需提取新特征。在大型数据集上，我们提出的方法在检测钓鱼网站方面显着优于以前的方法，AUC得分为98.68％，真阳性率（TPR）约为90％，同时保持了0.58％的低假阳性率（FPR）。我们的方法使用原型，无需在未来保留长期数据，并且可以部署在实际系统中，处理时间约为 0.3 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需特征提取的钓鱼网站检测方法PhishSim，利用归一化压缩距离（NCD）计算网页相似性进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖特征提取且难以适应概念漂移，本文旨在开发一种无需特征、可自适应更新的高效检测方案。
AI.method: 基于NCD比较网页HTML内容相似性，结合最远点优先算法提取钓鱼网站原型，并采用增量学习框架应对概念漂移。
AI.result: 在大型数据集上达到98.68%的AUC值，90%的真正例率和0.58%的假正例率，单次检测耗时约0.3秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过原型机制降低数据存储需求，兼具高检测精度与实时部署可行性，有效解决传统特征依赖型方法的局限性。

search_text: PhishSim: Aiding Phishing Website Detection with a Feature-Free Tool PhishSim：使用无功能的工具帮助检测网络钓鱼网站 In this paper, we propose a feature-free method for detecting phishing websites using the Normalized Compression Distance (NCD), a parameter-free similarity measure which computes the similarity of two websites by compressing them, thus eliminating the need to perform any feature extraction. It also removes any dependence on a specific set of website features. This method examines the HTML of webpages and computes their similarity with known phishing websites, in order to classify them. We also introduce the use of an incremental learning algorithm as a framework for continuous and adaptive detection without extracting new features when concept drift occurs. On a large dataset, our proposed method significantly outperforms previous methods in detecting phishing websites, with an AUC score of 98.68%, a high true positive rate (TPR) of around 90%, while maintaining a low false positive rate (FPR) of 0.58%. Our approach uses prototypes, eliminating the need to retain long term data in the future, and is feasible to deploy in real systems with a processing time of roughly 0.3 seconds. 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用归一化压缩距离（NCD）检测网络钓鱼网站的无特征方法，这是一种无参数相似性度量，通过压缩来计算两个网站的相似性，从而无需执行任何特征提取。它还消除了对一组特定网站功能的任何依赖。该方法检查网页的 HTML 并计算它们与已知网络钓鱼网站的相似度，以便对它们进行分类。我们使用最远点优先算法来执行网络钓鱼原型提取，以便选择代表网络钓鱼网页集群的实例。我们还介绍了使用增量学习算法作为连续自适应检测的框架，而在概念漂移发生时无需提取新特征。在大型数据集上，我们提出的方法在检测钓鱼网站方面显着优于以前的方法，AUC得分为98.68％，真阳性率（TPR）约为90％，同时保持了0.58％的低假阳性率（FPR）。我们的方法使用原型，无需在未来保留长期数据，并且可以部署在实际系统中，处理时间约为 0.3 秒。 本文提出一种无需特征提取的钓鱼网站检测方法PhishSim，利用归一化压缩距离（NCD）计算网页相似性进行分类。 Rizka Purwanto,Arindam Pal,Alan Blair,Sanjay Jha cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Haseeb Younis,Paul Trust,Rosane Minghim
title: Understanding High Dimensional Spaces through Visual Means Employing Multidimensional Projections
title_zh: 通过采用多维投影的视觉手段了解高维空间
abstract: Data visualisation helps understanding data represented by multiple variables, also called features, stored in a large matrix where individuals are stored in lines and variable values in columns. These data structures are frequently called multidimensional spaces.In this paper, we illustrate ways of employing the visual results of multidimensional projection algorithms to understand and fine-tune the parameters of their mathematical framework. Some of the common mathematical common to these approaches are Laplacian matrices, Euclidian distance, Cosine distance, and statistical methods such as Kullback-Leibler divergence, employed to fit probability distributions and reduce dimensions. Two of the relevant algorithms in the data visualisation field are t-distributed stochastic neighbourhood embedding (t-SNE) and Least-Square Projection (LSP). These algorithms can be used to understand several ranges of mathematical functions including their impact on datasets. In this article, mathematical parameters of underlying techniques such as Principal Component Analysis (PCA) behind t-SNE and mesh reconstruction methods behind LSP are adjusted to reflect the properties afforded by the mathematical formulation. The results, supported by illustrative methods of the processes of LSP and t-SNE, are meant to inspire students in understanding the mathematics behind such methods, in order to apply them in effective data analysis tasks in multiple applications.
summary: Data visualisation helps understanding data represented by multiple variables, also called features, stored in a large matrix where individuals are stored in lines and variable values in columns. These data structures are frequently called multidimensional spaces.In this paper, we illustrate ways of employing the visual results of multidimensional projection algorithms to understand and fine-tune the parameters of their mathematical framework. Some of the common mathematical common to these approaches are Laplacian matrices, Euclidian distance, Cosine distance, and statistical methods such as Kullback-Leibler divergence, employed to fit probability distributions and reduce dimensions. Two of the relevant algorithms in the data visualisation field are t-distributed stochastic neighbourhood embedding (t-SNE) and Least-Square Projection (LSP). These algorithms can be used to understand several ranges of mathematical functions including their impact on datasets. In this article, mathematical parameters of underlying techniques such as Principal Component Analysis (PCA) behind t-SNE and mesh reconstruction methods behind LSP are adjusted to reflect the properties afforded by the mathematical formulation. The results, supported by illustrative methods of the processes of LSP and t-SNE, are meant to inspire students in understanding the mathematics behind such methods, in order to apply them in effective data analysis tasks in multiple applications.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化有助于理解由多个变量（也称为特征）表示的数据，这些变量存储在一个大矩阵中，其中个体存储在行中，变量值存储在列中。这些数据结构通常称为多维空间。在本文中，我们说明了利用多维投影算法的视觉结果来理解和微调其数学框架的参数的方法。这些方法的一些常见数学包括拉普拉斯矩阵、欧几里得距离、余弦距离以及用于拟合概率分布和减少维度的统计方法（例如 Kullback-Leibler 散度）。数据可视化领域的两个相关算法是t分布随机邻域嵌入（t-SNE）和最小二乘投影（LSP）。这些算法可用于理解多种数学函数，包括它们对数据集的影响。在本文中，调整了基础技术的数学参数，例如 t-SNE 背后的主成分分析 (PCA) 和 LSP 背后的网格重建方法，以反映数学公式所提供的属性。结果在 LSP 和 t-SNE 过程的说明性方法的支持下，旨在启发学生理解这些方法背后的数学原理，以便将它们应用于多种应用中的有效数据分析任务。

AI.tldr: 本文通过多维投影算法的可视化结果，调整其数学框架参数以帮助理解高维数据。
AI.motivation: 帮助学生掌握数据可视化方法背后的数学原理，提升其在多领域数据分析中的应用能力。
AI.method: 采用t-SNE和LSP算法，结合PCA与网格重建技术，通过参数调整与可视化过程展示数学特性。
AI.result: 通过实例展示参数调整对数据集的影响，直观呈现算法数学原理与实际应用的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 可视化辅助参数调优可有效提升学生对数据降维算法数学本质的理解与应用水平。

authors_text: Cédric Beaulac,Sidi Wu,Erin Gibson,Michelle F. Miranda,Jiguo Cao,Leno Rocha,Mirza Faisal Beg,Farouk S. Nathoo
title: Neuroimaging Feature Extraction using a Neural Network Classifier for Imaging Genetics
title_zh: 使用神经网络分类器进行神经影像特征提取以进行影像遗传学
abstract: A major issue in the association of genes to neuroimaging phenotypes is the high dimension of both genetic data and neuroimaging data. In this article, we tackle the latter problem with an eye toward developing solutions that are relevant for disease prediction. Supported by a vast literature on the predictive power of neural networks, our proposed solution uses neural networks to extract from neuroimaging data features that are relevant for predicting Alzheimer's Disease (AD) for subsequent relation to genetics. Our neuroimaging-genetic pipeline is comprised of image processing, neuroimaging feature extraction and genetic association steps. We propose a neural network classifier for extracting neuroimaging features that are related with disease and a multivariate Bayesian group sparse regression model for genetic association. We compare the predictive power of these features to expert selected features and take a closer look at the SNPs identified with the new neuroimaging features.
summary: A major issue in the association of genes to neuroimaging phenotypes is the high dimension of both genetic data and neuroimaging data. In this article, we tackle the latter problem with an eye toward developing solutions that are relevant for disease prediction. Supported by a vast literature on the predictive power of neural networks, our proposed solution uses neural networks to extract from neuroimaging data features that are relevant for predicting Alzheimer's Disease (AD) for subsequent relation to genetics. Our neuroimaging-genetic pipeline is comprised of image processing, neuroimaging feature extraction and genetic association steps. We propose a neural network classifier for extracting neuroimaging features that are related with disease and a multivariate Bayesian group sparse regression model for genetic association. We compare the predictive power of these features to expert selected features and take a closer look at the SNPs identified with the new neuroimaging features.
abstract_zh: 基因与神经影像表型关联的一个主要问题是遗传数据和神经影像数据的高维度。在本文中，我们解决后一个问题，着眼于开发与疾病预测相关的解决方案。在有关神经网络预测能力的大量文献的支持下，我们提出的解决方案使用神经网络从神经影像数据中提取与预测阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 相关的特征，以了解随后与遗传学的关系。我们的神经影像遗传流程由图像处理、神经影像特征提取和遗传关联步骤组成。我们提出了一种用于提取与疾病相关的神经影像特征的神经网络分类器和用于遗传关联的多元贝叶斯组稀疏回归模型。我们将这些特征的预测能力与专家选择的特征进行比较，并仔细研究用新的神经影像特征识别的 SNP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用神经网络分类器从神经影像数据中提取与阿尔茨海默病预测相关的特征，并结合遗传关联分析方法建立影像遗传学分析流程。
AI.motivation: 基因与神经影像表型关联研究面临数据高维性挑战，传统方法难以有效提取疾病相关特征，需开发新型特征提取方法以提升疾病预测准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含图像处理、神经网络特征提取和遗传关联分析的完整流程，采用神经网络分类器提取疾病相关影像特征，结合多变量贝叶斯组稀疏回归模型进行遗传关联分析。
AI.result: 新方法提取的特征在预测能力上优于专家选定特征，并成功识别出与新型影像特征相关的新型SNPs位点。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络驱动的特征提取方法能有效提升影像遗传学分析效果，为疾病预测和遗传机制研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Minguk Jang,Sae-Young Chung,Hye Won Chung
title: Test-Time Adaptation via Self-Training with Nearest Neighbor Information
title_zh: 通过使用最近邻信息进行自训练来适应测试时间
abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt a trained classifier using online unlabeled test data only, without any information related to the training procedure. Most existing TTA methods adapt the trained classifier using the classifier's prediction on the test data as pseudo-label. However, under test-time domain shift, accuracy of the pseudo labels cannot be guaranteed, and thus the TTA methods often encounter performance degradation at the adapted classifier. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel test-time adaptation method, called Test-time Adaptation via Self-Training with nearest neighbor information (TAST), which is composed of the following procedures: (1) adds trainable adaptation modules on top of the trained feature extractor; (2) newly defines a pseudo-label distribution for the test data by using the nearest neighbor information; (3) trains these modules only a few times during test time to match the nearest neighbor-based pseudo label distribution and a prototype-based class distribution for the test data; and (4) predicts the label of test data using the average predicted class distribution from these modules. The pseudo-label generation is based on the basic intuition that a test data and its nearest neighbor in the embedding space are likely to share the same label under the domain shift. By utilizing multiple randomly initialized adaptation modules, TAST extracts useful information for the classification of the test data under the domain shift, using the nearest neighbor information. TAST showed better performance than the state-of-the-art TTA methods on two standard benchmark tasks, domain generalization, namely VLCS, PACS, OfficeHome, and TerraIncognita, and image corruption, particularly CIFAR-10/100C.
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt a trained classifier using online unlabeled test data only, without any information related to the training procedure. The pseudo-label generation is based on the basic intuition that a test data and its nearest neighbor in the embedding space are likely to share the same label under the domain shift. By utilizing multiple randomly initialized adaptation modules, TAST extracts useful information for the classification of the test data under the domain shift, using the nearest neighbor information. TAST showed better performance than the state-of-the-art TTA methods on two standard benchmark tasks, domain generalization, namely VLCS, PACS, OfficeHome, and TerraIncognita, and image corruption, particularly CIFAR-10/100C.
abstract_zh: 测试时间适应（TTA）旨在仅使用在线未标记测试数据来适应训练有素的分类器，而不需要任何与训练过程相关的信息。大多数现有的 TTA 方法使用分类器对测试数据的预测作为伪标签来调整经过训练的分类器。然而，在测试时域偏移下，无法保证伪标签的准确性，因此TTA方法经常在适应的分类器上遇到性能下降的问题。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种新的测试时间适应方法，称为通过最近邻信息自训练的测试时间适应（TAST），它由以下过程组成：（1）在经过训练的特征提取器之上添加可训练的适应模块； (2)利用最近邻信息重新定义测试数据的伪标签分布； (3) 在测试期间仅训练这些模块几次，以匹配测试数据的基于最近邻的伪标签分布和基于原型的类分布； (4) 使用这些模块的平均预测类别分布来预测测试数据的标签。伪标签生成基于这样的基本直觉：测试数据及其在嵌入空间中的最近邻在域移位下可能共享相同的标签。通过利用多个随机初始化的自适应模块，TAST 使用最近邻信息提取域移位下测试数据分类的有用信息。 TAST 在两个标准基准测试任务、域泛化（即 VLCS、PACS、OfficeHome 和 TerraIncognita）以及图像损坏（尤其是 CIFAR-10/100C）上表现出比最先进的 TTA 方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最近邻信息的自训练测试时适应方法（TAST），旨在通过改进伪标签生成策略提升模型在领域偏移下的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法依赖模型自身预测生成伪标签，但在领域偏移场景下伪标签准确性难以保证，导致适应效果下降。
AI.method: TAST通过添加可训练适配模块，结合嵌入空间中最近邻样本的标签信息生成伪标签分布，并利用多模块联合预测平均分布进行分类，仅需少量测试时训练。
AI.result: 在VLCS、PACS等域泛化基准和CIFAR-10/100C图像退化任务中，TAST均优于现有最先进测试时适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用最近邻信息构建更可靠的伪标签分布，TAST有效缓解了领域偏移带来的伪标签噪声问题，实现了更鲁棒的测试时适应。

search_text: Test-Time Adaptation via Self-Training with Nearest Neighbor Information 通过使用最近邻信息进行自训练来适应测试时间 Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to adapt a trained classifier using online unlabeled test data only, without any information related to the training procedure. Most existing TTA methods adapt the trained classifier using the classifier's prediction on the test data as pseudo-label. However, under test-time domain shift, accuracy of the pseudo labels cannot be guaranteed, and thus the TTA methods often encounter performance degradation at the adapted classifier. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel test-time adaptation method, called Test-time Adaptation via Self-Training with nearest neighbor information (TAST), which is composed of the following procedures: (1) adds trainable adaptation modules on top of the trained feature extractor; (2) newly defines a pseudo-label distribution for the test data by using the nearest neighbor information; (3) trains these modules only a few times during test time to match the nearest neighbor-based pseudo label distribution and a prototype-based class distribution for the test data; and (4) predicts the label of test data using the average predicted class distribution from these modules. The pseudo-label generation is based on the basic intuition that a test data and its nearest neighbor in the embedding space are likely to share the same label under the domain shift. By utilizing multiple randomly initialized adaptation modules, TAST extracts useful information for the classification of the test data under the domain shift, using the nearest neighbor information. TAST showed better performance than the state-of-the-art TTA methods on two standard benchmark tasks, domain generalization, namely VLCS, PACS, OfficeHome, and TerraIncognita, and image corruption, particularly CIFAR-10/100C. 测试时间适应（TTA）旨在仅使用在线未标记测试数据来适应训练有素的分类器，而不需要任何与训练过程相关的信息。大多数现有的 TTA 方法使用分类器对测试数据的预测作为伪标签来调整经过训练的分类器。然而，在测试时域偏移下，无法保证伪标签的准确性，因此TTA方法经常在适应的分类器上遇到性能下降的问题。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种新的测试时间适应方法，称为通过最近邻信息自训练的测试时间适应（TAST），它由以下过程组成：（1）在经过训练的特征提取器之上添加可训练的适应模块； (2)利用最近邻信息重新定义测试数据的伪标签分布； (3) 在测试期间仅训练这些模块几次，以匹配测试数据的基于最近邻的伪标签分布和基于原型的类分布； (4) 使用这些模块的平均预测类别分布来预测测试数据的标签。伪标签生成基于这样的基本直觉：测试数据及其在嵌入空间中的最近邻在域移位下可能共享相同的标签。通过利用多个随机初始化的自适应模块，TAST 使用最近邻信息提取域移位下测试数据分类的有用信息。 TAST 在两个标准基准测试任务、域泛化（即 VLCS、PACS、OfficeHome 和 TerraIncognita）以及图像损坏（尤其是 CIFAR-10/100C）上表现出比最先进的 TTA 方法更好的性能。 本文提出了一种基于最近邻信息的自训练测试时适应方法（TAST），旨在通过改进伪标签生成策略提升模型在领域偏移下的分类性能。 Minguk Jang,Sae-Young Chung,Hye Won Chung cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Khoi D. Nguyen,Quoc-Huy Tran,Khoi Nguyen,Binh-Son Hua,Rang Nguyen
title: Inductive and Transductive Few-Shot Video Classification via Appearance and Temporal Alignments
title_zh: 通过外观和时间对齐进行归纳式和传导式少样本视频分类
abstract: We present a novel method for few-shot video classification, which performs appearance and temporal alignments. In particular, given a pair of query and support videos, we conduct appearance alignment via frame-level feature matching to achieve the appearance similarity score between the videos, while utilizing temporal order-preserving priors for obtaining the temporal similarity score between the videos. Moreover, we introduce a few-shot video classification framework that leverages the above appearance and temporal similarity scores across multiple steps, namely prototype-based training and testing as well as inductive and transductive prototype refinement. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to explore transductive few-shot video classification. Extensive experiments on both Kinetics and Something-Something V2 datasets show that both appearance and temporal alignments are crucial for datasets with temporal order sensitivity such as Something-Something V2. Our approach achieves similar or better results than previous methods on both datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/fsvc-ata.
summary: We present a novel method for few-shot video classification, which performs appearance and temporal alignments. In particular, given a pair of query and support videos, we conduct appearance alignment via frame-level feature matching to achieve the appearance similarity score between the videos, while utilizing temporal order-preserving priors for obtaining the temporal similarity score between the videos. Moreover, we introduce a few-shot video classification framework that leverages the above appearance and temporal similarity scores across multiple steps, namely prototype-based training and testing as well as inductive and transductive prototype refinement. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to explore transductive few-shot video classification. Extensive experiments on both Kinetics and Something-Something V2 datasets show that both appearance and temporal alignments are crucial for datasets with temporal order sensitivity such as Something-Something V2. Our approach achieves similar or better results than previous methods on both datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/fsvc-ata.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于少镜头视频分类的新颖方法，该方法执行外观和时间对齐。特别是，给定一对查询视频和支持视频，我们通过帧级特征匹配进行外观对齐，以获得视频之间的外观相似度得分，同时利用时间顺序保留先验来获得视频之间的时间相似度得分。此外，我们引入了一个少镜头视频分类框架，该框架在多个步骤中利用上述外观和时间相似性分数，即基于原型的训练和测试以及归纳和传导原型细化。据我们所知，我们的工作是第一个探索传导性少镜头视频分类的工作。对 Kinetics 和 Something-Something V2 数据集的大量实验表明，外观和时间对齐对于具有时间顺序敏感性的数据集（例如 Something-Something V2）至关重要。我们的方法在两个数据集上都比以前的方法取得了相似或更好的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/fsvc-ata 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过外观和时间对齐进行归纳和转导式少样本视频分类的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本视频分类方法未充分考虑外观与时间顺序的双重特征，尤其在时间敏感数据集（如Something-Something V2）中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过帧级特征匹配计算外观相似度，利用时间顺序先验获取时间相似度，并结合原型训练/测试及归纳与转导式原型优化框架。
AI.result: 在Kinetics和Something-Something V2数据集上均取得优于或接近现有方法的性能，验证了外观与时间对齐的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 融合外观与时间对齐的框架能有效提升少样本视频分类性能，尤其适用于时间敏感场景。

authors_text: Iani JMB Gayo,Shaheer U. Saeed,Dean C. Barratt,Matthew J. Clarkson,Yipeng Hu
title: Strategising template-guided needle placement for MR-targeted prostate biopsy
title_zh: 制定模板引导针放置策略以进行 MR 靶向前列腺活检
comment: Paper submitted and accepted to CaPTion (Cancer Prevention through early detecTion) @ MICCAI 2022 Workshop
comments: Paper submitted and accepted to CaPTion (Cancer Prevention through early detecTion) @ MICCAI 2022 Workshop
abstract: Clinically significant prostate cancer has a better chance to be sampled during ultrasound-guided biopsy procedures, if suspected lesions found in pre-operative magnetic resonance (MR) images are used as targets. However, the diagnostic accuracy of the biopsy procedure is limited by the operator-dependent skills and experience in sampling the targets, a sequential decision making process that involves navigating an ultrasound probe and placing a series of sampling needles for potentially multiple targets. This work aims to learn a reinforcement learning (RL) policy that optimises the actions of continuous positioning of 2D ultrasound views and biopsy needles with respect to a guiding template, such that the MR targets can be sampled efficiently and sufficiently. We first formulate the task as a Markov decision process (MDP) and construct an environment that allows the targeting actions to be performed virtually for individual patients, based on their anatomy and lesions derived from MR images. A patient-specific policy can thus be optimised, before each biopsy procedure, by rewarding positive sampling in the MDP environment. Experiment results from fifty four prostate cancer patients show that the proposed RL-learned policies obtained a mean hit rate of 93% and an average cancer core length of 11 mm, which compared favourably to two alternative baseline strategies designed by humans, without hand-engineered rewards that directly maximise these clinically relevant metrics. Perhaps more interestingly, it is found that the RL agents learned strategies that were adaptive to the lesion size, where spread of the needles was prioritised for smaller lesions. Such a strategy has not been previously reported or commonly adopted in clinical practice, but led to an overall superior targeting performance when compared with intuitively designed strategies.
summary: Clinically significant prostate cancer has a better chance to be sampled during ultrasound-guided biopsy procedures, if suspected lesions found in pre-operative magnetic resonance (MR) images are used as targets. However, the diagnostic accuracy of the biopsy procedure is limited by the operator-dependent skills and experience in sampling the targets, a sequential decision making process that involves navigating an ultrasound probe and placing a series of sampling needles for potentially multiple targets. This work aims to learn a reinforcement learning (RL) policy that optimises the actions of continuous positioning of 2D ultrasound views and biopsy needles with respect to a guiding template, such that the MR targets can be sampled efficiently and sufficiently. We first formulate the task as a Markov decision process (MDP) and construct an environment that allows the targeting actions to be performed virtually for individual patients, based on their anatomy and lesions derived from MR images. A patient-specific policy can thus be optimised, before each biopsy procedure, by rewarding positive sampling in the MDP environment. Experiment results from fifty four prostate cancer patients show that the proposed RL-learned policies obtained a mean hit rate of 93% and an average cancer core length of 11 mm, which compared favourably to two alternative baseline strategies designed by humans, without hand-engineered rewards that directly maximise these clinically relevant metrics. Perhaps more interestingly, it is found that the RL agents learned strategies that were adaptive to the lesion size, where spread of the needles was prioritised for smaller lesions. Such a strategy has not been previously reported or commonly adopted in clinical practice, but led to an overall superior targeting performance when compared with intuitively designed strategies.
abstract_zh: 如果将术前磁共振 (MR) 图像中发现的可疑病变用作目标，则在超声引导活检过程中对具有临床意义的前列腺癌进行采样的机会更大。然而，活检过程的诊断准确性受到操作员对目标采样的技能和经验的限制，这是一个连续的决策过程，涉及导航超声探头并为潜在的多个目标放置一系列采样针。这项工作旨在学习一种强化学习（RL）策略，该策略可以优化 2D 超声视图和活检针相对于引导模板的连续定位动作，从而可以有效且充分地对 MR 目标进行采样。我们首先将任务制定为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，并构建一个环境，允许根据来自 MR 图像的解剖结构和病变，为个体患者虚拟执行靶向操作。因此，在每次活检程序之前，可以通过奖励 MDP 环境中的阳性采样来优化针对患者的策略。来自 54 名前列腺癌患者的实验结果表明，所提出的 RL 学习策略获得了 93% 的平均命中率和 11 毫米的平均癌症核心长度，与人类设计的两种替代基线策略相比，没有手工设计的奖励直接最大化这些临床相关指标。也许更有趣的是，我们发现 RL 智能体学习了适应病变大小的策略，其中针对较小的病变优先考虑针的扩散。这种策略以前没有报道过，也没有在临床实践中普遍采用，但与直观设计的策略相比，它具有整体优越的靶向性能。

AI.tldr: 利用强化学习优化模板引导的前列腺活检针头放置策略，以提高MR靶向活检的采样效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 解决超声引导前列腺活检中操作者依赖性导致的诊断准确性不足问题，提高靶向采样效率。
AI.method: 通过将任务建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），构建基于患者个体MRI解剖和病变的虚拟环境，利用强化学习优化针头和超声探头的定位策略。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，RL策略在54例患者中平均命中率达93%，平均癌芯长度11mm，优于传统人工策略。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习策略能自适应调整针头分布，尤其针对小病变，显著提升靶向活检效果，为临床提供新方法。

search_text: Strategising template-guided needle placement for MR-targeted prostate biopsy 制定模板引导针放置策略以进行 MR 靶向前列腺活检 Clinically significant prostate cancer has a better chance to be sampled during ultrasound-guided biopsy procedures, if suspected lesions found in pre-operative magnetic resonance (MR) images are used as targets. However, the diagnostic accuracy of the biopsy procedure is limited by the operator-dependent skills and experience in sampling the targets, a sequential decision making process that involves navigating an ultrasound probe and placing a series of sampling needles for potentially multiple targets. This work aims to learn a reinforcement learning (RL) policy that optimises the actions of continuous positioning of 2D ultrasound views and biopsy needles with respect to a guiding template, such that the MR targets can be sampled efficiently and sufficiently. We first formulate the task as a Markov decision process (MDP) and construct an environment that allows the targeting actions to be performed virtually for individual patients, based on their anatomy and lesions derived from MR images. A patient-specific policy can thus be optimised, before each biopsy procedure, by rewarding positive sampling in the MDP environment. Experiment results from fifty four prostate cancer patients show that the proposed RL-learned policies obtained a mean hit rate of 93% and an average cancer core length of 11 mm, which compared favourably to two alternative baseline strategies designed by humans, without hand-engineered rewards that directly maximise these clinically relevant metrics. Perhaps more interestingly, it is found that the RL agents learned strategies that were adaptive to the lesion size, where spread of the needles was prioritised for smaller lesions. Such a strategy has not been previously reported or commonly adopted in clinical practice, but led to an overall superior targeting performance when compared with intuitively designed strategies. 如果将术前磁共振 (MR) 图像中发现的可疑病变用作目标，则在超声引导活检过程中对具有临床意义的前列腺癌进行采样的机会更大。然而，活检过程的诊断准确性受到操作员对目标采样的技能和经验的限制，这是一个连续的决策过程，涉及导航超声探头并为潜在的多个目标放置一系列采样针。这项工作旨在学习一种强化学习（RL）策略，该策略可以优化 2D 超声视图和活检针相对于引导模板的连续定位动作，从而可以有效且充分地对 MR 目标进行采样。我们首先将任务制定为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，并构建一个环境，允许根据来自 MR 图像的解剖结构和病变，为个体患者虚拟执行靶向操作。因此，在每次活检程序之前，可以通过奖励 MDP 环境中的阳性采样来优化针对患者的策略。来自 54 名前列腺癌患者的实验结果表明，所提出的 RL 学习策略获得了 93% 的平均命中率和 11 毫米的平均癌症核心长度，与人类设计的两种替代基线策略相比，没有手工设计的奖励直接最大化这些临床相关指标。也许更有趣的是，我们发现 RL 智能体学习了适应病变大小的策略，其中针对较小的病变优先考虑针的扩散。这种策略以前没有报道过，也没有在临床实践中普遍采用，但与直观设计的策略相比，它具有整体优越的靶向性能。 利用强化学习优化模板引导的前列腺活检针头放置策略，以提高MR靶向活检的采样效率和准确性。 Iani JMB Gayo,Shaheer U. authors_text: Konrad Kułakowski,Anna Kędzior,Jacek Szybowski,Jiri Mazurek
title: Mean-based incomplete pairwise comparisons method with the reference values
title_zh: 基于均值的不完全成对比较方法与参考值
abstract: In this article, we propose two quantitative methods for calculating weight vectors for incomplete pairwise comparison matrices using reference values. Both procedures are extensions of arithmetic and geometric heuristic estimation (HRE) methods. The proposed solutions allow flexible selection of the number of reference alternatives and the range of comparisons, from the acceptable minimum to a complete set. In this paper, we prove that the newly introduced geometric HRE method for incomplete data is optimal. For this method, we also prove the existence of a feasible solution. In the paper, we also provide sufficient conditions for the existence of a solution for the second arithmetic variant of the HRE method. We illustrate the presented methods with numerical examples.
summary: In this article, we propose two quantitative methods for calculating weight vectors for incomplete pairwise comparison matrices using reference values. Both procedures are extensions of arithmetic and geometric heuristic estimation (HRE) methods. The proposed solutions allow flexible selection of the number of reference alternatives and the range of comparisons, from the acceptable minimum to a complete set. In this paper, we prove that the newly introduced geometric HRE method for incomplete data is optimal. For this method, we also prove the existence of a feasible solution. In the paper, we also provide sufficient conditions for the existence of a solution for the second arithmetic variant of the HRE method. We illustrate the presented methods with numerical examples.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了两种使用参考值计算不完整成对比较矩阵的权重向量的定量方法。这两个过程都是算术和几何启发式估计 (HRE) 方法的扩展。所提出的解决方案允许灵活选择参考替代品的数量和比较范围，从可接受的最小值到完整的集合。在本文中，我们证明了新引入的几何 HRE 方法对于不完整数据是最优的。对于该方法，我们还证明了可行解的存在性。在本文中，我们还为 HRE 方法的第二个算术变体的解的存在性提供了充分条件。我们用数值例子来说明所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出两种基于参考值的定量方法，用于计算不完全成对比较矩阵的权重向量，扩展了算术和几何启发式估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理不完全成对比较矩阵时缺乏灵活性，需提供更优的解决方案。
AI.method: 扩展算术和几何启发式估计（HRE）方法，利用参考值处理不完全数据，并证明几何HRE方法的最优性及解的存在性。
AI.result: 证明几何HRE方法在不完全数据下的最优性，确立解的存在性，并提供算术方法的充分条件，通过数值示例验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的几何HRE方法在不完全数据下最优，且两种方法均提供灵活的解决方案，适用于不同范围的比较需求。

authors_text: Gadiel Sznaier Camps,Robert Dyro,Marco Pavone,Mac Schwager
title: Learning Deep SDF Maps Online for Robot Navigation and Exploration
title_zh: 在线学习深度 SDF 地图以进行机器人导航和探索
comment: Added additional reference to Section II: Related Work, citing iSDF
comments: Added additional reference to Section II: Related Work, citing iSDF
abstract: We propose an algorithm to (i) learn online a deep signed distance function (SDF) with a LiDAR-equipped robot to represent the 3D environment geometry, and (ii) plan collision-free trajectories given this deep learned map. Our algorithm takes a stream of incoming LiDAR scans and continually optimizes a neural network to represent the SDF of the environment around its current vicinity. When the SDF network quality saturates, we cache a copy of the network, along with a learned confidence metric, and initialize a new SDF network to continue mapping new regions of the environment. We then concatenate all the cached local SDFs through a confidence-weighted scheme to give a global SDF for planning. For planning, we make use of a sequential convex model predictive control (MPC) algorithm. The MPC planner optimizes a dynamically feasible trajectory for the robot while enforcing no collisions with obstacles mapped in the global SDF. We show that our online mapping algorithm produces higher-quality maps than existing methods for online SDF training. In the WeBots simulator, we further showcase the combined mapper and planner running online -- navigating autonomously and without collisions in an unknown environment.
summary: We propose an algorithm to (i) learn online a deep signed distance function (SDF) with a LiDAR-equipped robot to represent the 3D environment geometry, and (ii) plan collision-free trajectories given this deep learned map. Our algorithm takes a stream of incoming LiDAR scans and continually optimizes a neural network to represent the SDF of the environment around its current vicinity. When the SDF network quality saturates, we cache a copy of the network, along with a learned confidence metric, and initialize a new SDF network to continue mapping new regions of the environment. We then concatenate all the cached local SDFs through a confidence-weighted scheme to give a global SDF for planning. For planning, we make use of a sequential convex model predictive control (MPC) algorithm. The MPC planner optimizes a dynamically feasible trajectory for the robot while enforcing no collisions with obstacles mapped in the global SDF. We show that our online mapping algorithm produces higher-quality maps than existing methods for online SDF training. In the WeBots simulator, we further showcase the combined mapper and planner running online -- navigating autonomously and without collisions in an unknown environment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法，用于 (i) 使用配备 LiDAR 的机器人在线学习深度符号距离函数 (SDF) 来表示 3D 环境几何形状，以及 (ii) 根据深度学习地图规划无碰撞轨迹。我们的算法采用传入的 LiDAR 扫描流，并不断优化神经网络以表示当前附近环境的 SDF。当 SDF 网络质量饱和时，我们缓存网络的副本以及学习的置信度度量，并初始化新的 SDF 网络以继续映射环境的新区域。然后，我们通过置信加权方案连接所有缓存的本地 SDF，以给出用于规划的全局 SDF。对于规划，我们使用顺序凸模型预测控制（MPC）算法。 MPC 规划器优化机器人的动态可行轨迹，同时强制不与全局 SDF 中映射的障碍物发生碰撞。我们表明，与现有的在线 SDF 训练方法相比，我们的在线地图算法可以生成更高质量的地图。在 WeBots 模拟器中，我们进一步展示了在线运行的组合映射器和规划器——在未知环境中自主导航且不会发生碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线学习深度符号距离函数（SDF）的算法，用于机器人导航与探索，结合LiDAR数据生成3D环境地图并规划避障轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有在线SDF训练方法生成的地图质量不足，难以满足机器人自主导航需求，需改进实时建图与避障能力。
AI.method: 通过LiDAR实时优化神经网络学习局部SDF，当网络性能饱和时缓存并初始化新网络扩展映射区域，采用置信度加权融合全局SDF；结合序列凸优化模型预测控制（MPC）规划动态可行轨迹。
AI.result: 在线映射算法生成的地图质量优于现有方法，仿真验证了系统在未知环境中可自主避障导航。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了机器人实时建图与规划能力，为未知环境探索提供了可靠解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种在线学习深度符号距离函数（SDF）的算法，用于机器人导航与探索，结合LiDAR数据生成3D环境地图并规划避障轨迹。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了机器人实时建图与规划能力，为未知环境探索提供了可靠解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种在线学习深度符号距离函数（SDF）的算法，用于机器人导航与探索，结合LiDAR数据生成3D环境地图并规划避障轨迹。
motivation: 现有在线SDF训练方法生成的地图质量不足，难以满足机器人自主导航需求，需改进实时建图与避障能力。
method: 通过LiDAR实时优化神经网络学习局部SDF，当网络性能饱和时缓存并初始化新网络扩展映射区域，采用置信度加权融合全局SDF；结合序列凸优化模型预测控制（MPC）规划动态可行轨迹。
result: 在线映射算法生成的地图质量优于现有方法，仿真验证了系统在未知环境中可自主避障导航。
conclusion: 该方法有效提升了机器人实时建图与规划能力，为未知环境探索提供了可靠解决方案。
search_text: Learning Deep SDF Maps Online for Robot Navigation and Exploration 在线学习深度 SDF 地图以进行机器人导航和探索 We propose an algorithm to (i) learn online a deep signed distance function (SDF) with a LiDAR-equipped robot to represent the 3D environment geometry, and (ii) plan collision-free trajectories given this deep learned map. Our algorithm takes a stream of incoming LiDAR scans and continually optimizes a neural network to represent the SDF of the environment around its current vicinity. When the SDF network quality saturates, we cache a copy of the network, along with a learned confidence metric, and initialize a new SDF network to continue mapping new regions of the environment. We then concatenate all the cached local SDFs through a confidence-weighted scheme to give a global SDF for planning. For planning, we make use of a sequential convex model predictive control (MPC) algorithm. The MPC planner optimizes a dynamically feasible trajectory for the robot while enforcing no collisions with obstacles mapped in the global SDF. We show that our online mapping algorithm produces higher-quality maps than existing methods for online SDF training. In the WeBots simulator, we further showcase the combined mapper and planner running online -- navigating autonomously and without collisions in an unknown environment. 我们提出了一种算法，用于 (i) 使用配备 LiDAR 的机器人在线学习深度符号距离函数 (SDF) 来表示 3D 环境几何形状，以及 (ii) 根据深度学习地图规划无碰撞轨迹。我们的算法采用传入的 LiDAR 扫描流，并不断优化神经网络以表示当前附近环境的 SDF。当 SDF 网络质量饱和时，我们缓存网络的副本以及学习的置信度度量，并初始化新的 SDF 网络以继续映射环境的新区域。然后，我们通过置信加权方案连接所有缓存的本地 SDF，以给出用于规划的全局 SDF。对于规划，我们使用顺序凸模型预测控制（MPC）算法。 MPC 规划器优化机器人的动态可行轨迹，同时强制不与全局 SDF 中映射的障碍物发生碰撞。我们表明，与现有的在线 SDF 训练方法相比，我们的在线地图算法可以生成更高质量的地图。在 WeBots 模拟器中，我们进一步展示了在线运行的组合映射器和规划器——在未知环境中自主导航且不会发生碰撞。 本文提出一种在线学习深度符号距离函数（SDF）的算法，用于机器人导航与探索，结合LiDAR数据生成3D环境地图并规划避障轨迹。 Gadiel Sznaier Camps,Robert Dyro,Marco Pavone,Mac Schwager cs.RO

authors_text: Khalid Oublal,Xinyi Dai
title: An advanced combination of semi-supervised Normalizing Flow & Yolo (YoloNF) to detect and recognize vehicle license plates
title_zh: 半监督归一化流和 Yolo (YoloNF) 的高级组合，用于检测和识别车辆牌照
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1802.09567 by other authors; text overlap with arXiv:2012.06737 by other authors without attribution
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1802.09567 by other authors; text overlap with arXiv:2012.06737 by other authors without attribution
abstract: Fully Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) has been a frequent research topic due to several practical applications. However, many of the current solutions are still not robust enough in real situations, commonly depending on many constraints. This paper presents a robust and efficient ALPR system based on the state-of-the-art YOLO object detector and Normalizing flows. The model uses two new strategies. Firstly, a two-stage network using YOLO and a normalization flow-based model for normalization to detect Licenses Plates (LP) and recognize the LP with numbers and Arabic characters. Secondly, Multi-scale image transformations are implemented to provide a solution to the problem of the YOLO cropped LP detection including significant background noise. Furthermore, extensive experiments are led on a new dataset with realistic scenarios, we introduce a larger public annotated dataset collected from Moroccan plates. We demonstrate that our proposed model can learn on a small number of samples free of single or multiple characters. The dataset will also be made publicly available to encourage further studies and research on plate detection and recognition.
summary: Fully Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) has been a frequent research topic due to several practical applications. However, many of the current solutions are still not robust enough in real situations, commonly depending on many constraints. This paper presents a robust and efficient ALPR system based on the state-of-the-art YOLO object detector and Normalizing flows. The model uses two new strategies. Firstly, a two-stage network using YOLO and a normalization flow-based model for normalization to detect Licenses Plates (LP) and recognize the LP with numbers and Arabic characters. Secondly, Multi-scale image transformations are implemented to provide a solution to the problem of the YOLO cropped LP detection including significant background noise. Furthermore, extensive experiments are led on a new dataset with realistic scenarios, we introduce a larger public annotated dataset collected from Moroccan plates. We demonstrate that our proposed model can learn on a small number of samples free of single or multiple characters. The dataset will also be made publicly available to encourage further studies and research on plate detection and recognition.
abstract_zh: 由于一些实际应用，全自动车牌识别（ALPR）一直是一个频繁的研究课题。然而，当前的许多解决方案在实际情况中仍然不够稳健，通常取决于许多约束。本文提出了一种基于最先进的 YOLO 目标检测器和归一化流的稳健且高效的 ALPR 系统。该模型使用两种新策略。首先，使用 YOLO 的两级网络和基于归一化流的归一化模型来检测车牌（LP）并识别带有数字和阿拉伯字符的 LP。其次，实现多尺度图像变换，为 YOLO 裁剪的 LP 检测（包括显着的背景噪声）问题提供解决方案。此外，在具有现实场景的新数据集上进行了广泛的实验，我们引入了从摩洛哥板块收集的更大的公共注释数据集。我们证明我们提出的模型可以在没有单个或多个字符的少量样本上进行学习。该数据集还将公开，以鼓励对车牌检测和识别的进一步研究和研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合YOLO和归一化流的半监督方法，用于高效检测和识别车辆牌照。
AI.motivation: 现有自动牌照识别系统在实际场景中鲁棒性不足，依赖诸多约束条件，需提升复杂环境下的识别能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段网络：第一阶段用YOLO检测牌照区域，第二阶段用归一化流模型识别字符；引入多尺度图像变换以减少背景噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在包含摩洛哥牌照的真实场景数据集上验证，模型能在少量样本下实现高精度识别，数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法提升了牌照识别的鲁棒性与效率，为小样本学习和复杂场景识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fangneng Zhan,Yingchen Yu,Rongliang Wu,Jiahui Zhang,Kaiwen Cui,Changgong Zhang,Shijian Lu
title: Auto-regressive Image Synthesis with Integrated Quantization
title_zh: 具有集成量化的自回归图像合成
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022 as Oral Presentation
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022 as Oral Presentation
abstract: Deep generative models have achieved conspicuous progress in realistic image synthesis with multifarious conditional inputs, while generating diverse yet high-fidelity images remains a grand challenge in conditional image generation. This paper presents a versatile framework for conditional image generation which incorporates the inductive bias of CNNs and powerful sequence modeling of auto-regression that naturally leads to diverse image generation. Instead of independently quantizing the features of multiple domains as in prior research, we design an integrated quantization scheme with a variational regularizer that mingles the feature discretization in multiple domains, and markedly boosts the auto-regressive modeling performance. Notably, the variational regularizer enables to regularize feature distributions in incomparable latent spaces by penalizing the intra-domain variations of distributions. In addition, we design a Gumbel sampling strategy that allows to incorporate distribution uncertainty into the auto-regressive training procedure. The Gumbel sampling substantially mitigates the exposure bias that often incurs misalignment between the training and inference stages and severely impairs the inference performance. Extensive experiments over multiple conditional image generation tasks show that our method achieves superior diverse image generation performance qualitatively and quantitatively as compared with the state-of-the-art.
summary: Deep generative models have achieved conspicuous progress in realistic image synthesis with multifarious conditional inputs, while generating diverse yet high-fidelity images remains a grand challenge in conditional image generation. This paper presents a versatile framework for conditional image generation which incorporates the inductive bias of CNNs and powerful sequence modeling of auto-regression that naturally leads to diverse image generation. Instead of independently quantizing the features of multiple domains as in prior research, we design an integrated quantization scheme with a variational regularizer that mingles the feature discretization in multiple domains, and markedly boosts the auto-regressive modeling performance. Notably, the variational regularizer enables to regularize feature distributions in incomparable latent spaces by penalizing the intra-domain variations of distributions. In addition, we design a Gumbel sampling strategy that allows to incorporate distribution uncertainty into the auto-regressive training procedure. The Gumbel sampling substantially mitigates the exposure bias that often incurs misalignment between the training and inference stages and severely impairs the inference performance. Extensive experiments over multiple conditional image generation tasks show that our method achieves superior diverse image generation performance qualitatively and quantitatively as compared with the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 深度生成模型在具有多种条件输入的真实图像合成方面取得了显着的进步，而生成多样化但高保真度的图像仍然是条件图像生成中的巨大挑战。本文提出了一个用于条件图像生成的通用框架，该框架结合了 CNN 的归纳偏差和强大的自回归序列建模，自然会导致多样化的图像生成。我们没有像之前的研究那样独立量化多个域的特征，而是设计了一种带有变分正则化器的集成量化方案，该方案混合了多个域中的特征离散化，并显着提高了自回归建模性能。值得注意的是，变分正则化器能够通过惩罚分布的域内变化来正则化不可比较的潜在空间中的特征分布。此外，我们设计了一种 Gumbel 采样策略，允许将分布不确定性纳入自回归训练过程中。 Gumbel 采样大大减轻了暴露偏差，这种偏差通​​常会导致训练和推理阶段之间的不一致，并严重损害推理性能。对多个条件图像生成任务的广泛实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在定性和定量上实现了卓越的多样化图像生成性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络归纳偏置和自回归序列建模的条件图像生成框架，通过集成量化方案和变分正则化器提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度生成模型在图像合成领域取得进展，但生成多样且高保真图像仍是挑战。现有方法独立量化多领域特征，难以有效融合跨领域信息并优化自回归建模性能。
AI.method: 设计集成量化方案，通过变分正则化器融合多领域特征离散化；引入Gumbel采样策略，缓解训练与推理阶段的暴露偏差问题，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个条件图像生成任务中，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法，显著提升图像多样性与生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 集成量化与变分正则化结合Gumbel采样的框架有效解决了跨领域特征建模难题，为自回归图像合成提供了新思路。

In addition, we design a Gumbel sampling strategy that allows to incorporate distribution uncertainty into the auto-regressive training procedure. The Gumbel sampling substantially mitigates the exposure bias that often incurs misalignment between the training and inference stages and severely impairs the inference performance. Extensive experiments over multiple conditional image generation tasks show that our method achieves superior diverse image generation performance qualitatively and quantitatively as compared with the state-of-the-art. 深度生成模型在具有多种条件输入的真实图像合成方面取得了显着的进步，而生成多样化但高保真度的图像仍然是条件图像生成中的巨大挑战。本文提出了一个用于条件图像生成的通用框架，该框架结合了 CNN 的归纳偏差和强大的自回归序列建模，自然会导致多样化的图像生成。我们没有像之前的研究那样独立量化多个域的特征，而是设计了一种带有变分正则化器的集成量化方案，该方案混合了多个域中的特征离散化，并显着提高了自回归建模性能。值得注意的是，变分正则化器能够通过惩罚分布的域内变化来正则化不可比较的潜在空间中的特征分布。此外，我们设计了一种 Gumbel 采样策略，允许将分布不确定性纳入自回归训练过程中。 Gumbel 采样大大减轻了暴露偏差，这种偏差通​​常会导致训练和推理阶段之间的不一致，并严重损害推理性能。对多个条件图像生成任务的广泛实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在定性和定量上实现了卓越的多样化图像生成性能。 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络归纳偏置和自回归序列建模的条件图像生成框架，通过集成量化方案和变分正则化器提升生成效果。 Fangneng Zhan,Yingchen Yu,Rongliang Wu,Jiahui Zhang,Kaiwen Cui,Changgong Zhang,Shijian Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Bastian Wittmann,Fernando Navarro,Suprosanna Shit,Bjoern Menze
title: Focused Decoding Enables 3D Anatomical Detection by Transformers
title_zh: 聚焦解码可实现 Transformer 的 3D 解剖检测
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2023:003
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) https://melba-journal.org/2023:003
abstract: Detection Transformers represent end-to-end object detection approaches based on a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture, exploiting the attention mechanism for global relation modeling. Although Detection Transformers deliver results on par with or even superior to their highly optimized CNN-based counterparts operating on 2D natural images, their success is closely coupled to access to a vast amount of training data. This, however, restricts the feasibility of employing Detection Transformers in the medical domain, as access to annotated data is typically limited. To tackle this issue and facilitate the advent of medical Detection Transformers, we propose a novel Detection Transformer for 3D anatomical structure detection, dubbed Focused Decoder. Focused Decoder leverages information from an anatomical region atlas to simultaneously deploy query anchors and restrict the cross-attention's field of view to regions of interest, which allows for a precise focus on relevant anatomical structures. We evaluate our proposed approach on two publicly available CT datasets and demonstrate that Focused Decoder not only provides strong detection results and thus alleviates the need for a vast amount of annotated data but also exhibits exceptional and highly intuitive explainability of results via attention weights. Our code is available at https://github.com/bwittmann/transoar.
summary: Detection Transformers represent end-to-end object detection approaches based on a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture, exploiting the attention mechanism for global relation modeling. Although Detection Transformers deliver results on par with or even superior to their highly optimized CNN-based counterparts operating on 2D natural images, their success is closely coupled to access to a vast amount of training data. This, however, restricts the feasibility of employing Detection Transformers in the medical domain, as access to annotated data is typically limited. To tackle this issue and facilitate the advent of medical Detection Transformers, we propose a novel Detection Transformer for 3D anatomical structure detection, dubbed Focused Decoder. Focused Decoder leverages information from an anatomical region atlas to simultaneously deploy query anchors and restrict the cross-attention's field of view to regions of interest, which allows for a precise focus on relevant anatomical structures. We evaluate our proposed approach on two publicly available CT datasets and demonstrate that Focused Decoder not only provides strong detection results and thus alleviates the need for a vast amount of annotated data but also exhibits exceptional and highly intuitive explainability of results via attention weights. Our code is available at https://github.com/bwittmann/transoar.
abstract_zh: 检测 Transformer 代表基于 Transformer 编码器-解码器架构的端到端对象检测方法，利用全局关系建模的注意力机制。尽管检测变压器提供的结果与在 2D 自然图像上运行的高度优化的基于 CNN 的同类产品相当甚至优于，但它们的成功与获取大量训练数据密切相关。然而，这限制了在医学领域使用检测变压器的可行性，因为对带注释的数据的访问通常是有限的。为了解决这个问题并促进医学检测变压器的出现，我们提出了一种用于 3D 解剖结构检测的新型检测变压器，称为聚焦解码器。聚焦解码器利用来自解剖区域图集的信息来同时部署查询锚点并将交叉注意力的视野限制在感兴趣的区域，从而可以精确关注相关的解剖结构。我们在两个公开可用的 CT 数据集上评估了我们提出的方法，并证明 Focused Decoder 不仅提供了强大的检测结果，从而减少了对大量注释数据的需求，而且还通过注意力权重展示了结果的卓越且高度直观的可解释性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/bwittmann/transoar 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的3D解剖结构检测方法，通过聚焦解码器解决医学图像数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 检测Transformer在自然图像上表现优异，但医学领域因标注数据有限难以应用，需开发适应小样本场景的检测方法。
AI.method: 设计聚焦解码器，利用解剖区域图谱生成查询锚点，并通过限制交叉注意力范围聚焦感兴趣区域，提升检测精度与可解释性。
AI.result: 在两个公开CT数据集上验证，模型在少量标注数据下实现高检测精度，且通过注意力权重提供直观的可解释性结果。
AI.conclusion: 聚焦解码器有效缓解医学图像数据不足问题，为医疗检测Transformer的发展提供可行方案。

authors_text: Umut Çalıkyılmaz,Sadi Turgut
title: Quantum search in sets with prior knowledge
title_zh: 具有先验知识的集合中的量子搜索
abstract: Quantum Search Algorithm made a big impact by being able to solve the search problem for a set with $N$ elements using only $O(\sqrt{N})$ steps. Unfortunately, it is impossible to reduce the order of the complexity of this problem, however, it is possible to make improvements by a constant factor. In this paper we pursued such improvements for search problem in sets with known probability distributions. We have shown that by using a modified version of quantum search algorithm, it is possible to decrease the expected number of iterations for such sets.
summary: Quantum Search Algorithm made a big impact by being able to solve the search problem for a set with $N$ elements using only $O(\sqrt{N})$ steps. Unfortunately, it is impossible to reduce the order of the complexity of this problem, however, it is possible to make improvements by a constant factor. In this paper we pursued such improvements for search problem in sets with known probability distributions. We have shown that by using a modified version of quantum search algorithm, it is possible to decrease the expected number of iterations for such sets.
abstract_zh: 量子搜索算法产生了巨大的影响，它能够仅使用 $O(\sqrt{N})$ 步骤解决具有 $N$ 元素的集合的搜索问题。不幸的是，不可能降低这个问题的复杂性，但是可以通过一个常数因子进行改进。在本文中，我们对具有已知概率分布的集合中的搜索问题进行了此类改进。我们已经证明，通过使用量子搜索算法的修改版本，可以减少此类集合的预期迭代次数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在已知概率分布的情况下，如何改进量子搜索算法以减少搜索集合的预期迭代次数。
AI.motivation: 量子搜索算法虽能以O(√N)复杂度解决搜索问题，但无法进一步降低复杂度阶数。通过利用先验概率分布信息，可望在实际应用中优化常数因子以提升效率。
AI.method: 提出一种基于已知概率分布的量子搜索算法改进方案，通过调整算法参数和搜索策略实现优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的算法能在特定概率分布下有效降低搜索过程的预期迭代次数。
AI.conclusion: 利用先验知识优化量子搜索算法可在实际场景中提升效率，但无法突破O(√N)的复杂度下界。

authors_text: Jiezhang Cao,Jingyun Liang,Kai Zhang,Wenguan Wang,Qin Wang,Yulun Zhang,Hao Tang,Luc Van Gool
title: Towards Interpretable Video Super-Resolution via Alternating Optimization
title_zh: 通过交替优化实现可解释的视频超分辨率
abstract: In this paper, we study a practical space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) problem which aims at generating a high-framerate high-resolution sharp video from a low-framerate low-resolution blurry video. Such problem often occurs when recording a fast dynamic event with a low-framerate and low-resolution camera, and the captured video would suffer from three typical issues: i) motion blur occurs due to object/camera motions during exposure time; ii) motion aliasing is unavoidable when the event temporal frequency exceeds the Nyquist limit of temporal sampling; iii) high-frequency details are lost because of the low spatial sampling rate. These issues can be alleviated by a cascade of three separate sub-tasks, including video deblurring, frame interpolation, and super-resolution, which, however, would fail to capture the spatial and temporal correlations among video sequences. To address this, we propose an interpretable STVSR framework by leveraging both model-based and learning-based methods. Specifically, we formulate STVSR as a joint video deblurring, frame interpolation, and super-resolution problem, and solve it as two sub-problems in an alternate way. For the first sub-problem, we derive an interpretable analytical solution and use it as a Fourier data transform layer. Then, we propose a recurrent video enhancement layer for the second sub-problem to further recover high-frequency details. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of quantitative metrics and visual quality.
summary: In this paper, we study a practical space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) problem which aims at generating a high-framerate high-resolution sharp video from a low-framerate low-resolution blurry video. Such problem often occurs when recording a fast dynamic event with a low-framerate and low-resolution camera, and the captured video would suffer from three typical issues: i) motion blur occurs due to object/camera motions during exposure time; ii) motion aliasing is unavoidable when the event temporal frequency exceeds the Nyquist limit of temporal sampling; iii) high-frequency details are lost because of the low spatial sampling rate. These issues can be alleviated by a cascade of three separate sub-tasks, including video deblurring, frame interpolation, and super-resolution, which, however, would fail to capture the spatial and temporal correlations among video sequences. To address this, we propose an interpretable STVSR framework by leveraging both model-based and learning-based methods. Specifically, we formulate STVSR as a joint video deblurring, frame interpolation, and super-resolution problem, and solve it as two sub-problems in an alternate way. For the first sub-problem, we derive an interpretable analytical solution and use it as a Fourier data transform layer. Then, we propose a recurrent video enhancement layer for the second sub-problem to further recover high-frequency details. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of quantitative metrics and visual quality.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一个实用的时空视频超分辨率（STVSR）问题，旨在从低帧率低分辨率模糊视频生成高帧率高分辨率清晰视频。当使用低帧率和低分辨率的相机记录快速动态事件时，经常会出现这样的问题，并且捕获的视频会遇到三个典型问题：i）由于曝光时间期间物体/相机运动而出现运动模糊； ii) 当事件时间频率超过时间采样的奈奎斯特极限时，运动混叠是不可避免的； iii) 由于空间采样率低，高频细节丢失。这些问题可以通过级联三个独立的子任务来缓解，包括视频去模糊、帧插值和超分辨率，然而，这些子任务无法捕获视频序列之间的空间和时间相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们通过利用基于模型和基于学习的方法提出了一个可解释的 STVSR 框架。具体来说，我们将 STVSR 表述为联合视频去模糊、帧插值和超分辨率问题，并以交替的方式将其解决为两个子问题。对于第一个子问题，我们得出一个可解释的解析解并将其用作傅立叶数据变换层。然后，我们针对第二个子问题提出了一个循环视频增强层，以进一步恢复高频细节。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在定量指标和视觉质量方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过交替优化实现可解释的时空视频超分辨率（STVSR）方法，解决低帧率低分辨率视频中的运动模糊、运动混叠和高频细节丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分步处理（去模糊、插值、超分辨率）无法捕捉视频序列的时空相关性，导致处理效果受限。
AI.method: 将STVSR建模为联合优化问题，分两阶段交替求解：第一阶段用解析解作为傅里叶变换层，第二阶段设计递归视频增强层恢复高频细节。
AI.result: 在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于现有方法，有效缓解运动模糊、混叠和细节丢失问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可解释框架通过交替优化有效融合时空信息，在视频超分辨率任务中表现出色。
