search_text: Towards Interpretable Video Super-Resolution via Alternating Optimization 通过交替优化实现可解释的视频超分辨率 In this paper, we study a practical space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) problem which aims at generating a high-framerate high-resolution sharp video from a low-framerate low-resolution blurry video. Such problem often occurs when recording a fast dynamic event with a low-framerate and low-resolution camera, and the captured video would suffer from three typical issues: i) motion blur occurs due to object/camera motions during exposure time; ii) motion aliasing is unavoidable when the event temporal frequency exceeds the Nyquist limit of temporal sampling; iii) high-frequency details are lost because of the low spatial sampling rate. These issues can be alleviated by a cascade of three separate sub-tasks, including video deblurring, frame interpolation, and super-resolution, which, however, would fail to capture the spatial and temporal correlations among video sequences. To address this, we propose an interpretable STVSR framework by leveraging both model-based and learning-based methods. Specifically, we formulate STVSR as a joint video deblurring, frame interpolation, and super-resolution problem, and solve it as two sub-problems in an alternate way. For the first sub-problem, we derive an interpretable analytical solution and use it as a Fourier data transform layer. Then, we propose a recurrent video enhancement layer for the second sub-problem to further recover high-frequency details. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method in terms of quantitative metrics and visual quality. 在本文中，我们研究了一个实用的时空视频超分辨率（STVSR）问题，旨在从低帧率低分辨率模糊视频生成高帧率高分辨率清晰视频。当使用低帧率和低分辨率的相机记录快速动态事件时，经常会出现这样的问题，并且捕获的视频会遇到三个典型问题：i）由于曝光时间期间物体/相机运动而出现运动模糊； ii) 当事件时间频率超过时间采样的奈奎斯特极限时，运动混叠是不可避免的； iii) 由于空间采样率低，高频细节丢失。这些问题可以通过级联三个独立的子任务来缓解，包括视频去模糊、帧插值和超分辨率，然而，这些子任务无法捕获视频序列之间的空间和时间相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们通过利用基于模型和基于学习的方法提出了一个可解释的 STVSR 框架。具体来说，我们将 STVSR 表述为联合视频去模糊、帧插值和超分辨率问题，并以交替的方式将其解决为两个子问题。对于第一个子问题，我们得出一个可解释的解析解并将其用作傅立叶数据变换层。然后，我们针对第二个子问题提出了一个循环视频增强层，以进一步恢复高频细节。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在定量指标和视觉质量方面的优越性。 本文提出一种通过交替优化实现可解释的时空视频超分辨率（STVSR）方法，解决低帧率低分辨率视频中的运动模糊、运动混叠和高频细节丢失问题。 Jiezhang Cao,Jingyun Liang,Kai Zhang,Wenguan Wang,Qin Wang,Yulun Zhang,Hao Tang,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Yijiong Lin,John Lloyd,Alex Church,Nathan F. Lepora
title: Tactile Gym 2.0: Sim-to-real Deep Reinforcement Learning for Comparing Low-cost High-Resolution Robot Touch
title_zh: Tactile Gym 2.0：模拟真实深度强化学习，用于比较低成本高分辨率机器人触摸
abstract: High-resolution optical tactile sensors are increasingly used in robotic learning environments due to their ability to capture large amounts of data directly relating to agent-environment interaction. However, there is a high barrier of entry to research in this area due to the high cost of tactile robot platforms, specialised simulation software, and sim-to-real methods that lack generality across different sensors. In this letter we extend the Tactile Gym simulator to include three new optical tactile sensors (TacTip, DIGIT and DigiTac) of the two most popular types, Gelsight-style (image-shading based) and TacTip-style (marker based). We demonstrate that a single sim-to-real approach can be used with these three different sensors to achieve strong real-world performance despite the significant differences between real tactile images. Additionally, we lower the barrier of entry to the proposed tasks by adapting them to an inexpensive 4-DoF robot arm, further enabling the dissemination of this benchmark. We validate the extended environment on three physically-interactive tasks requiring a sense of touch: object pushing, edge following and surface following. The results of our experimental validation highlight some differences between these sensors, which may help future researchers select and customize the physical characteristics of tactile sensors for different manipulations scenarios.
summary: High-resolution optical tactile sensors are increasingly used in robotic learning environments due to their ability to capture large amounts of data directly relating to agent-environment interaction. However, there is a high barrier of entry to research in this area due to the high cost of tactile robot platforms, specialised simulation software, and sim-to-real methods that lack generality across different sensors. In this letter we extend the Tactile Gym simulator to include three new optical tactile sensors (TacTip, DIGIT and DigiTac) of the two most popular types, Gelsight-style (image-shading based) and TacTip-style (marker based). We demonstrate that a single sim-to-real approach can be used with these three different sensors to achieve strong real-world performance despite the significant differences between real tactile images. Additionally, we lower the barrier of entry to the proposed tasks by adapting them to an inexpensive 4-DoF robot arm, further enabling the dissemination of this benchmark. We validate the extended environment on three physically-interactive tasks requiring a sense of touch: object pushing, edge following and surface following. The results of our experimental validation highlight some differences between these sensors, which may help future researchers select and customize the physical characteristics of tactile sensors for different manipulations scenarios.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率光学触觉传感器越来越多地用于机器人学习环境，因为它们能够捕获与代理与环境交互直接相关的大量数据。然而，由于触觉机器人平台、专门的仿真软件和模拟到真实的方法缺乏跨不同传感器的通用性的高成本，该领域的研究进入壁垒很高。在这封信中，我们扩展了 Tactile Gym 模拟器，使其包含两种最流行类型的三种新型光学触觉传感器（TacTip、DIGIT 和 DigiTac）：Gelsight 式（基于图像着色）和 TacTip 式（基于标记）。我们证明，尽管真实触觉图像之间存在显着差异，但单一的模拟到真实方法可以与这三种不同的传感器一起使用，以实现强大的现实世界性能。此外，我们通过将所提出的任务适应廉价的 4-DoF 机器人手臂，降低了进入的门槛，进一步促进了这一基准的传播。我们在三个需要触觉的物理交互任务上验证了扩展环境：物体推动、边缘跟随和表面跟随。我们的实验验证结果突出了这些传感器之间的一些差异，这可能有助于未来的研究人员针对不同的操作场景选择和定制触觉传感器的物理特性。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了Tactile Gym模拟器，集成三种高分辨率触觉传感器，并通过统一的sim-to-real方法验证其在低成本机械臂上的触觉任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉传感器研究面临高成本、专用仿真工具缺乏及sim-to-real方法通用性不足的问题，阻碍了该领域的普及与比较研究。
AI.method: 在Tactile Gym中新增三种光学触觉传感器（TacTip/DIGIT/DigiTac），结合廉价4-DoF机械臂，通过深度强化学习实现仿真到现实的迁移，并测试物体推动、边缘跟踪等任务。
AI.result: 统一方法在三种传感器上均取得良好现实表现，揭示了传感器间的性能差异，为不同操作场景下的传感器选型提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 该工作降低了触觉研究门槛，证明了通用sim-to-real方法的可行性，为未来传感器定制化设计提供了实验基准。

authors_text: Vojtech Panek,Zuzana Kukelova,Torsten Sattler
title: MeshLoc: Mesh-Based Visual Localization
title_zh: MeshLoc：基于网格的视觉定位
comment: to be published in the proceedings of ECCV 2022, code repository: https://github.com/tsattler/meshloc_release
comments: to be published in the proceedings of ECCV 2022, code repository: https://github.com/tsattler/meshloc_release
abstract: Visual localization, i.e., the problem of camera pose estimation, is a central component of applications such as autonomous robots and augmented reality systems. A dominant approach in the literature, shown to scale to large scenes and to handle complex illumination and seasonal changes, is based on local features extracted from images. The scene representation is a sparse Structure-from-Motion point cloud that is tied to a specific local feature. Switching to another feature type requires an expensive feature matching step between the database images used to construct the point cloud. In this work, we thus explore a more flexible alternative based on dense 3D meshes that does not require features matching between database images to build the scene representation. We show that this approach can achieve state-of-the-art results. We further show that surprisingly competitive results can be obtained when extracting features on renderings of these meshes, without any neural rendering stage, and even when rendering raw scene geometry without color or texture. Our results show that dense 3D model-based representations are a promising alternative to existing representations and point to interesting and challenging directions for future research.
summary: Visual localization, i.e., the problem of camera pose estimation, is a central component of applications such as autonomous robots and augmented reality systems. A dominant approach in the literature, shown to scale to large scenes and to handle complex illumination and seasonal changes, is based on local features extracted from images. The scene representation is a sparse Structure-from-Motion point cloud that is tied to a specific local feature. Switching to another feature type requires an expensive feature matching step between the database images used to construct the point cloud. In this work, we thus explore a more flexible alternative based on dense 3D meshes that does not require features matching between database images to build the scene representation. We show that this approach can achieve state-of-the-art results. We further show that surprisingly competitive results can be obtained when extracting features on renderings of these meshes, without any neural rendering stage, and even when rendering raw scene geometry without color or texture. Our results show that dense 3D model-based representations are a promising alternative to existing representations and point to interesting and challenging directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 视觉定位，即相机姿态估计问题，是自主机器人和增强现实系统等应用的核心组成部分。文献中的一种主要方法是基于从图像中提取的局部特征，该方法可以扩展到大场景并处理复杂的照明和季节变化。场景表示是一个稀疏的运动结构点云，与特定的局部特征相关。切换到另一种特征类型需要在用于构建点云的数据库图像之间进行昂贵的特征匹配步骤。因此，在这项工作中，我们探索了一种基于密集 3D 网格的更灵活的替代方案，不需要数据库图像之间的特征匹配来构建场景表示。我们证明这种方法可以取得最先进的结果。我们进一步表明，在没有任何神经渲染阶段的情况下，甚至在渲染没有颜色或纹理的原始场景几何体时，在这些网格的渲染上提取特征时，可以获得令人惊讶的竞争结果。我们的结果表明，基于密集 3D 模型的表示是现有表示的一种有前途的替代方案，并为未来的研究指明了有趣且具有挑战性的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MeshLoc方法，通过密集3D网格实现视觉定位，替代传统稀疏点云表示。
AI.motivation: 传统基于局部特征的稀疏点云方法在切换特征类型时需耗时特征匹配，限制了灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 构建密集3D网格作为场景表示，直接在网格渲染图像中提取特征，无需神经渲染或颜色纹理。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，且在无纹理渲染情况下仍保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 密集3D网格表示为视觉定位提供了更灵活的替代方案，为未来研究指明了新方向。

search_text: MeshLoc: Mesh-Based Visual Localization MeshLoc：基于网格的视觉定位 Visual localization, i.e., the problem of camera pose estimation, is a central component of applications such as autonomous robots and augmented reality systems. A dominant approach in the literature, shown to scale to large scenes and to handle complex illumination and seasonal changes, is based on local features extracted from images. The scene representation is a sparse Structure-from-Motion point cloud that is tied to a specific local feature. Switching to another feature type requires an expensive feature matching step between the database images used to construct the point cloud. In this work, we thus explore a more flexible alternative based on dense 3D meshes that does not require features matching between database images to build the scene representation. We show that this approach can achieve state-of-the-art results. We further show that surprisingly competitive results can be obtained when extracting features on renderings of these meshes, without any neural rendering stage, and even when rendering raw scene geometry without color or texture. Our results show that dense 3D model-based representations are a promising alternative to existing representations and point to interesting and challenging directions for future research. 视觉定位，即相机姿态估计问题，是自主机器人和增强现实系统等应用的核心组成部分。文献中的一种主要方法是基于从图像中提取的局部特征，该方法可以扩展到大场景并处理复杂的照明和季节变化。场景表示是一个稀疏的运动结构点云，与特定的局部特征相关。切换到另一种特征类型需要在用于构建点云的数据库图像之间进行昂贵的特征匹配步骤。因此，在这项工作中，我们探索了一种基于密集 3D 网格的更灵活的替代方案，不需要数据库图像之间的特征匹配来构建场景表示。我们证明这种方法可以取得最先进的结果。我们进一步表明，在没有任何神经渲染阶段的情况下，甚至在渲染没有颜色或纹理的原始场景几何体时，在这些网格的渲染上提取特征时，可以获得令人惊讶的竞争结果。我们的结果表明，基于密集 3D 模型的表示是现有表示的一种有前途的替代方案，并为未来的研究指明了有趣且具有挑战性的方向。 本文提出MeshLoc方法，通过密集3D网格实现视觉定位，替代传统稀疏点云表示。 Vojtech Panek,Zuzana Kukelova,Torsten Sattler cs.CV

authors_text: Gabriel Sarch,Zhaoyuan Fang,Adam W. Harley,Paul Schydlo,Michael J. Tarr,Saurabh Gupta,Katerina Fragkiadaki
title: TIDEE: Tidying Up Novel Rooms using Visuo-Semantic Commonsense Priors
title_zh: TIDEE：使用视觉语义常识先验整理新房间
abstract: We introduce TIDEE, an embodied agent that tidies up a disordered scene based on learned commonsense object placement and room arrangement priors. TIDEE explores a home environment, detects objects that are out of their natural place, infers plausible object contexts for them, localizes such contexts in the current scene, and repositions the objects. Commonsense priors are encoded in three modules: i) visuo-semantic detectors that detect out-of-place objects, ii) an associative neural graph memory of objects and spatial relations that proposes plausible semantic receptacles and surfaces for object repositions, and iii) a visual search network that guides the agent's exploration for efficiently localizing the receptacle-of-interest in the current scene to reposition the object. We test TIDEE on tidying up disorganized scenes in the AI2THOR simulation environment. TIDEE carries out the task directly from pixel and raw depth input without ever having observed the same room beforehand, relying only on priors learned from a separate set of training houses. Human evaluations on the resulting room reorganizations show TIDEE outperforms ablative versions of the model that do not use one or more of the commonsense priors. On a related room rearrangement benchmark that allows the agent to view the goal state prior to rearrangement, a simplified version of our model significantly outperforms a top-performing method by a large margin. Code and data are available at the project website: https://tidee-agent.github.io/.
summary: We introduce TIDEE, an embodied agent that tidies up a disordered scene based on learned commonsense object placement and room arrangement priors. TIDEE explores a home environment, detects objects that are out of their natural place, infers plausible object contexts for them, localizes such contexts in the current scene, and repositions the objects. Commonsense priors are encoded in three modules: i) visuo-semantic detectors that detect out-of-place objects, ii) an associative neural graph memory of objects and spatial relations that proposes plausible semantic receptacles and surfaces for object repositions, and iii) a visual search network that guides the agent's exploration for efficiently localizing the receptacle-of-interest in the current scene to reposition the object. We test TIDEE on tidying up disorganized scenes in the AI2THOR simulation environment. TIDEE carries out the task directly from pixel and raw depth input without ever having observed the same room beforehand, relying only on priors learned from a separate set of training houses. Human evaluations on the resulting room reorganizations show TIDEE outperforms ablative versions of the model that do not use one or more of the commonsense priors. On a related room rearrangement benchmark that allows the agent to view the goal state prior to rearrangement, a simplified version of our model significantly outperforms a top-performing method by a large margin. Code and data are available at the project website: https://tidee-agent.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 TIDEE，一种实体代理，可以根据学习到的常识性对象放置和房间布置先验来整理无序的场景。 TIDEE 探索家庭环境，检测超出其自然位置的对象，为其推断合理的对象上下文，在当前场景中定位此类上下文，并重新定位对象。常识先验被编码为三个模块：i）检测不合适的对象的视觉语义检测器，ii）对象和空间关系的关联神经图记忆，为对象重新定位提出合理的语义容器和表面，以及iii）视觉搜索网络，指导代理有效地定位当前场景中感兴趣的容器以重新定位对象。我们在 AI2THOR 模拟环境中测试 TIDEE 整理杂乱场景的能力。 TIDEE 直接根据像素和原始深度输入执行任务，而无需事先观察同一个房间，仅依赖于从一组单独的训练室学到的先验知识。对由此产生的房间重组进行的人工评估表明，TIDEE 的性能优于不使用一个或多个常识性先验的模型的消融版本。在相关的房间重新安排基准上，允许代理在重新安排之前查看目标状态，我们模型的简化版本在很大程度上明显优于表现最好的方法。代码和数据可在项目网站获取：https://tidee-agent.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIDEE，一种基于视觉语义常识先验的具身智能体，用于整理无序房间中的物体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖特定场景训练，难以泛化到新环境。TIDEE旨在通过学习通用常识先验，使智能体能自主推理物体合理位置并完成整理任务。
AI.method: 构建包含三模块的框架：1) 视觉语义检测器识别异常物体；2) 关联神经图记忆模块推断合理放置位置；3) 视觉搜索网络引导智能体定位目标区域。
AI.result: 在AI2THOR环境中，TIDEE在未见过的房间中实现有效整理，人类评估显示其优于去除常识先验的模型版本，并在相关基准测试中大幅超越现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 常识先验显著提升智能体在未知环境中的任务执行能力，验证了基于语义推理的视觉-空间联合建模的有效性。

authors_text: Keunwoo Choi,Sangshin Oh,Minsung Kang,Brian McFee
title: A Proposal for Foley Sound Synthesis Challenge
title_zh: 拟音声音合成挑战赛的提案
abstract: "Foley" refers to sound effects that are added to multimedia during post-production to enhance its perceived acoustic properties, e.g., by simulating the sounds of footsteps, ambient environmental sounds, or visible objects on the screen. While foley is traditionally produced by foley artists, there is increasing interest in automatic or machine-assisted techniques building upon recent advances in sound synthesis and generative models. To foster more participation in this growing research area, we propose a challenge for automatic foley synthesis. Through case studies on successful previous challenges in audio and machine learning, we set the goals of the proposed challenge: rigorous, unified, and efficient evaluation of different foley synthesis systems, with an overarching goal of drawing active participation from the research community. We outline the details and design considerations of a foley sound synthesis challenge, including task definition, dataset requirements, and evaluation criteria.
summary: "Foley" refers to sound effects that are added to multimedia during post-production to enhance its perceived acoustic properties, e.g., by simulating the sounds of footsteps, ambient environmental sounds, or visible objects on the screen. While foley is traditionally produced by foley artists, there is increasing interest in automatic or machine-assisted techniques building upon recent advances in sound synthesis and generative models. To foster more participation in this growing research area, we propose a challenge for automatic foley synthesis. Through case studies on successful previous challenges in audio and machine learning, we set the goals of the proposed challenge: rigorous, unified, and efficient evaluation of different foley synthesis systems, with an overarching goal of drawing active participation from the research community. We outline the details and design considerations of a foley sound synthesis challenge, including task definition, dataset requirements, and evaluation criteria.
abstract_zh: “拟音”是指在后期制作过程中添加到多媒体中的声音效果，以增强其感知的声学特性，例如通过模拟脚步声、周围环境声音或屏幕上的可见物体的声音。虽然拟音传统上是由拟音艺术家制作的，但人们对基于声音合成和生成模型最新进展的自动或机器辅助技术越来越感兴趣。为了促进更多人参与这个不断发展的研究领域，我们提出了自动拟音合成的挑战。通过对音频和机器学习领域以往成功挑战的案例研究，我们设定了拟议挑战的目标：对不同的拟音合成系统进行严格、统一和高效的评估，总体目标是吸引研究界的积极参与。我们概述了拟音声音合成挑战的细节和设计注意事项，包括任务定义、数据集要求和评估标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个自动Foley音效合成挑战，旨在推动该领域的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 传统Foley音效依赖人工制作，而自动合成技术因生成模型进步而备受关注，但缺乏统一评估框架，需通过挑战赛促进研究参与。
AI.method: 通过分析音频与机器学习领域成功挑战案例，设计包含任务定义、数据集要求及评估标准的挑战框架。
AI.result: 明确了挑战赛的核心目标与设计要素，为后续系统评估与比较提供基准。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛将激发研究社区参与，推动自动Foley合成技术的标准化与高效发展。

We outline the details and design considerations of a foley sound synthesis challenge, including task definition, dataset requirements, and evaluation criteria. “拟音”是指在后期制作过程中添加到多媒体中的声音效果，以增强其感知的声学特性，例如通过模拟脚步声、周围环境声音或屏幕上的可见物体的声音。虽然拟音传统上是由拟音艺术家制作的，但人们对基于声音合成和生成模型最新进展的自动或机器辅助技术越来越感兴趣。为了促进更多人参与这个不断发展的研究领域，我们提出了自动拟音合成的挑战。通过对音频和机器学习领域以往成功挑战的案例研究，我们设定了拟议挑战的目标：对不同的拟音合成系统进行严格、统一和高效的评估，总体目标是吸引研究界的积极参与。我们概述了拟音声音合成挑战的细节和设计注意事项，包括任务定义、数据集要求和评估标准。 本文提出一个自动Foley音效合成挑战，旨在推动该领域的研究进展。 Keunwoo Choi,Sangshin Oh,Minsung Kang,Brian McFee cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Abhinav Kumar,Garrick Brazil,Enrique Corona,Armin Parchami,Xiaoming Liu
title: DEVIANT: Depth EquiVarIAnt NeTwork for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: DEVIANT：用于单目 3D 物体检测的深度等变网络
abstract: Modern neural networks use building blocks such as convolutions that are equivariant to arbitrary 2D translations. However, these vanilla blocks are not equivariant to arbitrary 3D translations in the projective manifold. Even then, all monocular 3D detectors use vanilla blocks to obtain the 3D coordinates, a task for which the vanilla blocks are not designed for. This paper takes the first step towards convolutions equivariant to arbitrary 3D translations in the projective manifold. Since the depth is the hardest to estimate for monocular detection, this paper proposes Depth EquiVarIAnt NeTwork (DEVIANT) built with existing scale equivariant steerable blocks. As a result, DEVIANT is equivariant to the depth translations in the projective manifold whereas vanilla networks are not. The additional depth equivariance forces the DEVIANT to learn consistent depth estimates, and therefore, DEVIANT achieves state-of-the-art monocular 3D detection results on KITTI and Waymo datasets in the image-only category and performs competitively to methods using extra information. Moreover, DEVIANT works better than vanilla networks in cross-dataset evaluation. Code and models at https://github.com/abhi1kumar/DEVIANT
summary: Modern neural networks use building blocks such as convolutions that are equivariant to arbitrary 2D translations. However, these vanilla blocks are not equivariant to arbitrary 3D translations in the projective manifold. Even then, all monocular 3D detectors use vanilla blocks to obtain the 3D coordinates, a task for which the vanilla blocks are not designed for. This paper takes the first step towards convolutions equivariant to arbitrary 3D translations in the projective manifold. Since the depth is the hardest to estimate for monocular detection, this paper proposes Depth EquiVarIAnt NeTwork (DEVIANT) built with existing scale equivariant steerable blocks. As a result, DEVIANT is equivariant to the depth translations in the projective manifold whereas vanilla networks are not. The additional depth equivariance forces the DEVIANT to learn consistent depth estimates, and therefore, DEVIANT achieves state-of-the-art monocular 3D detection results on KITTI and Waymo datasets in the image-only category and performs competitively to methods using extra information. Moreover, DEVIANT works better than vanilla networks in cross-dataset evaluation. Code and models at https://github.com/abhi1kumar/DEVIANT
abstract_zh: 现代神经网络使用与任意二维平移等价的构建块，例如卷积。然而，这些普通块并不等同于射影流形中的任意 3D 平移。即便如此，所有单目 3D 探测器都使用普通块来获取 3D 坐标，而普通块并不是为这项任务而设计的。本文迈出了与投影流形中任意 3D 平移等变的卷积的第一步。由于单目检测中深度最难估计，本文提出了利用现有尺度等变可操纵块构建的深度等变网络（DEVIANT）。因此，DEVIANT 与射影流形中的深度平移等价，而普通网络则不然。额外的深度等方差迫使 DEVIANT 学习一致的深度估计，因此，DEVIANT 在仅图像类别的 KITTI 和 Waymo 数据集上实现了最先进的单目 3D 检测结果，并且与使用额外信息的方法相比具有竞争力。此外，DEVIANT 在跨数据集评估方面比普通网络表现更好。代码和模型位于 https://github.com/abhi1kumar/DEVIANT

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEVIANT网络，通过改进卷积网络的等变性，提升单目3D目标检测的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络的卷积模块对2D平移等变，但无法处理3D投影流形中的深度平移，导致单目3D检测中深度估计困难。
AI.method: 设计深度等变网络DEVIANT，基于现有尺度等变可旋转模块，实现对投影流形中深度平移的等变性。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo数据集的单目任务中达到SOTA性能，且跨数据集评估优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入深度等变性，DEVIANT有效提升了单目3D检测的深度估计一致性与整体性能。

authors_text: Caleb Tung,Abhinav Goel,Xiao Hu,Nicholas Eliopoulos,Emmanuel Amobi,George K. Thiruvathukal,Vipin Chaudhary,Yung-Hsiang Lu
title: Irrelevant Pixels are Everywhere: Find and Exclude Them for More Efficient Computer Vision
title_zh: 不相关的像素无处不在：查找并排除它们以提高计算机视觉效率
abstract: Computer vision is often performed using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). CNNs are compute-intensive and challenging to deploy on power-contrained systems such as mobile and Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices. CNNs are compute-intensive because they indiscriminately compute many features on all pixels of the input image. We observe that, given a computer vision task, images often contain pixels that are irrelevant to the task. For example, if the task is looking for cars, pixels in the sky are not very useful. Therefore, we propose that a CNN be modified to only operate on relevant pixels to save computation and energy. We propose a method to study three popular computer vision datasets, finding that 48% of pixels are irrelevant. We also propose the focused convolution to modify a CNN's convolutional layers to reject the pixels that are marked irrelevant. On an embedded device, we observe no loss in accuracy, while inference latency, energy consumption, and multiply-add count are all reduced by about 45%.
summary: Computer vision is often performed using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). CNNs are compute-intensive and challenging to deploy on power-contrained systems such as mobile and Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices. CNNs are compute-intensive because they indiscriminately compute many features on all pixels of the input image. We observe that, given a computer vision task, images often contain pixels that are irrelevant to the task. For example, if the task is looking for cars, pixels in the sky are not very useful. Therefore, we propose that a CNN be modified to only operate on relevant pixels to save computation and energy. We propose a method to study three popular computer vision datasets, finding that 48% of pixels are irrelevant. We also propose the focused convolution to modify a CNN's convolutional layers to reject the pixels that are marked irrelevant. On an embedded device, we observe no loss in accuracy, while inference latency, energy consumption, and multiply-add count are all reduced by about 45%.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉通常使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来执行。 CNN 是计算密集型的，部署在移动和物联网 (IoT) 设备等功率受限的系统上具有挑战性。 CNN 是计算密集型的，因为它们不加区别地计算输入图像所有像素上的许多特征。我们观察到，给定计算机视觉任务，图像通常包含与任务无关的像素。例如，如果任务是寻找汽车，那么天空中的像素就不是很有用。因此，我们建议将 CNN 修改为仅对相关像素进行操作，以节省计算量和能量。我们提出了一种方法来研究三个流行的计算机视觉数据集，发现 48% 的像素是不相关的。我们还建议使用聚焦卷积来修改 CNN 的卷积层，以拒绝标记为不相关的像素。在嵌入式设备上，我们观察到准确性没有损失，而推理延迟、能耗和乘加计数均减少了约 45%。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在识别并排除图像中的无关像素，以提升卷积神经网络在计算机视觉任务中的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN对所有像素进行计算，导致计算资源浪费，尤其在资源受限设备上效率低下，需通过排除无关像素来优化。
AI.method: 通过分析三个主流数据集确定无关像素比例，并设计聚焦卷积（focused convolution）修改CNN结构，使其仅处理相关像素。
AI.result: 在嵌入式设备测试中，模型准确率保持不变，但推理延迟、能耗及乘加运算量均降低约45%。
AI.conclusion: 排除无关像素可显著提升CNN计算效率，为资源受限设备部署计算机视觉模型提供有效解决方案。

Thiruvathukal,Vipin Chaudhary,Yung-Hsiang Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Azzam Alhussain,Mingjie Lin
title: Hardware-Efficient Template-Based Deep CNNs Accelerator Design
title_zh: 基于硬件高效模板的深度 CNN 加速器设计
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, 16th IEEE International Conference on Networking, Architecture, and Storage (IEEE NAS 2022), 3-4 October 2022
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures, 16th IEEE International Conference on Networking, Architecture, and Storage (IEEE NAS 2022), 3-4 October 2022
abstract: Acceleration of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on edge devices has recently achieved a remarkable performance in image classification and object detection applications. This paper proposes an efficient and scalable CNN-based SoC-FPGA accelerator design that takes pre-trained weights with a 16-bit fixed-point quantization and target hardware specification to generate an optimized template capable of achieving higher performance versus resource utilization trade-off. The template analyzed the computational workload, data dependency, and external memory bandwidth and utilized loop tiling transformation along with dataflow modeling to convert convolutional and fully connected layers into vector multiplication between input and output feature maps, which resulted in a single compute unit on-chip. Furthermore, the accelerator was examined among AlexNet, VGG16, and LeNet networks and ran at 200-MHz with a peak performance of 230 GOP/s depending on ZYNQ boards and state-space exploration of different compute unit configurations during simulation and synthesis. Lastly, our proposed methodology was benchmarked against the previous development on Ultra96 for higher performance measurement.
summary: Acceleration of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on edge devices has recently achieved a remarkable performance in image classification and object detection applications. This paper proposes an efficient and scalable CNN-based SoC-FPGA accelerator design that takes pre-trained weights with a 16-bit fixed-point quantization and target hardware specification to generate an optimized template capable of achieving higher performance versus resource utilization trade-off. The template analyzed the computational workload, data dependency, and external memory bandwidth and utilized loop tiling transformation along with dataflow modeling to convert convolutional and fully connected layers into vector multiplication between input and output feature maps, which resulted in a single compute unit on-chip. Furthermore, the accelerator was examined among AlexNet, VGG16, and LeNet networks and ran at 200-MHz with a peak performance of 230 GOP/s depending on ZYNQ boards and state-space exploration of different compute unit configurations during simulation and synthesis. Lastly, our proposed methodology was benchmarked against the previous development on Ultra96 for higher performance measurement.
abstract_zh: 边缘设备上的卷积神经网络（CNN）加速最近在图像分类和目标检测应用中取得了显着的性能。本文提出了一种高效且可扩展的基于 CNN 的 SoC-FPGA 加速器设计，该设计采用具有 16 位定点量化和目标硬件规范的预训练权重来生成能够实现更高性能与资源利用率权衡的优化模板。该模板分析了计算工作量、数据依赖性和外部存储器带宽，并利用循环平铺变换和数据流建模将卷积层和全连接层转换为输入和输出特征图之间的向量乘法，从而形成片上单个计算单元。此外，加速器在 AlexNet、VGG16 和 LeNet 网络中进行了检查，并以 200 MHz 运行，峰值性能为 230 GOP/s，具体取决于 ZYNQ 板以及仿真和综合期间不同计算单元配置的状态空间探索。最后，我们提出的方法以 Ultra96 的先前开发为基准，以实现更高的性能测量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模板的高效深度卷积神经网络（CNN）加速器设计，旨在优化边缘设备上的CNN计算性能与资源利用率。
AI.motivation: 在边缘设备上加速CNN以实现图像分类和目标检测应用，需在计算性能与硬件资源消耗之间取得平衡，现有方法尚未充分满足这一需求。
AI.method: 采用16位定点量化预训练权重，结合硬件规格生成优化模板；通过分析计算负载、数据依赖性和内存带宽，利用循环分块变换和数据流建模，将卷积层和全连接层转化为片上单计算单元的向量乘法，并在ZYNQ板上进行多网络验证。
AI.result: 加速器在200 MHz频率下实现最高230 GOP/s性能，支持AlexNet、VGG16和LeNet网络，在Ultra96平台上验证了优于现有方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过模板化设计和计算单元优化，在边缘设备上实现了CNN加速的性能与资源高效平衡，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

search_text: Hardware-Efficient Template-Based Deep CNNs Accelerator Design 基于硬件高效模板的深度 CNN 加速器设计 Acceleration of Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) on edge devices has recently achieved a remarkable performance in image classification and object detection applications. This paper proposes an efficient and scalable CNN-based SoC-FPGA accelerator design that takes pre-trained weights with a 16-bit fixed-point quantization and target hardware specification to generate an optimized template capable of achieving higher performance versus resource utilization trade-off. The template analyzed the computational workload, data dependency, and external memory bandwidth and utilized loop tiling transformation along with dataflow modeling to convert convolutional and fully connected layers into vector multiplication between input and output feature maps, which resulted in a single compute unit on-chip. Furthermore, the accelerator was examined among AlexNet, VGG16, and LeNet networks and ran at 200-MHz with a peak performance of 230 GOP/s depending on ZYNQ boards and state-space exploration of different compute unit configurations during simulation and synthesis. Lastly, our proposed methodology was benchmarked against the previous development on Ultra96 for higher performance measurement. 边缘设备上的卷积神经网络（CNN）加速最近在图像分类和目标检测应用中取得了显着的性能。本文提出了一种高效且可扩展的基于 CNN 的 SoC-FPGA 加速器设计，该设计采用具有 16 位定点量化和目标硬件规范的预训练权重来生成能够实现更高性能与资源利用率权衡的优化模板。该模板分析了计算工作量、数据依赖性和外部存储器带宽，并利用循环平铺变换和数据流建模将卷积层和全连接层转换为输入和输出特征图之间的向量乘法，从而形成片上单个计算单元。此外，加速器在 AlexNet、VGG16 和 LeNet 网络中进行了检查，并以 200 MHz 运行，峰值性能为 230 GOP/s，具体取决于 ZYNQ 板以及仿真和综合期间不同计算单元配置的状态空间探索。最后，我们提出的方法以 Ultra96 的先前开发为基准，以实现更高的性能测量。 本文提出了一种基于模板的高效深度卷积神经网络（CNN）加速器设计，旨在优化边缘设备上的CNN计算性能与资源利用率。 Azzam Alhussain,Mingjie Lin cs.AR,eess.IV

authors_text: Ashwin Sanjay Lele,Arijit Raychowdhury
title: Fusing Frame and Event Vision for High-speed Optical Flow for Edge Application
title_zh: 用于边缘应用的高速光流的融合框架和事件视觉
abstract: Optical flow computation with frame-based cameras provides high accuracy but the speed is limited either by the model size of the algorithm or by the frame rate of the camera. This makes it inadequate for high-speed applications. Event cameras provide continuous asynchronous event streams overcoming the frame-rate limitation. However, the algorithms for processing the data either borrow frame like setup limiting the speed or suffer from lower accuracy. We fuse the complementary accuracy and speed advantages of the frame and event-based pipelines to provide high-speed optical flow while maintaining a low error rate. Our bio-mimetic network is validated with the MVSEC dataset showing 19% error degradation at 4x speed up. We then demonstrate the system with a high-speed drone flight scenario where a high-speed event camera computes the flow even before the optical camera sees the drone making it suited for applications like tracking and segmentation. This work shows the fundamental trade-offs in frame-based processing may be overcome by fusing data from other modalities.
summary: Optical flow computation with frame-based cameras provides high accuracy but the speed is limited either by the model size of the algorithm or by the frame rate of the camera. This makes it inadequate for high-speed applications. Event cameras provide continuous asynchronous event streams overcoming the frame-rate limitation. However, the algorithms for processing the data either borrow frame like setup limiting the speed or suffer from lower accuracy. We fuse the complementary accuracy and speed advantages of the frame and event-based pipelines to provide high-speed optical flow while maintaining a low error rate. Our bio-mimetic network is validated with the MVSEC dataset showing 19% error degradation at 4x speed up. We then demonstrate the system with a high-speed drone flight scenario where a high-speed event camera computes the flow even before the optical camera sees the drone making it suited for applications like tracking and segmentation. This work shows the fundamental trade-offs in frame-based processing may be overcome by fusing data from other modalities.
abstract_zh: 基于帧的相机的光流计算提供了高精度，但速度受到算法的模型大小或相机的帧速率的限制。这使得它不适用于高速应用。事件摄像机提供连续的异步事件流，克服了帧速率限制。然而，处理数据的算法要么借用框架之类的设置来限制速度，要么精度较低。我们融合了帧和基于事件的管道的互补精度和速度优势，以提供高速光流，同时保持低错误率。我们的仿生网络经过 MVSEC 数据集的验证，显示在 4 倍加速下错误率降低了 19%。然后，我们通过高速无人机飞行场景演示该系统，其中高速事件相机甚至在光学相机看到无人机之前就计算流量，使其适合跟踪和分割等应用。这项工作表明，基于框架的处理中的基本权衡可以通过融合来自其他模式的数据来克服。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合帧和事件视觉的方法，用于实现高速光学流计算，适用于边缘应用。
AI.motivation: 基于帧的相机计算光学流虽然精度高，但速度受限于模型大小或帧率，无法满足高速应用需求；而事件相机虽然克服了帧率限制，但处理算法速度或精度不足。
AI.method: 本文通过融合帧和事件视觉的优势，设计了一种仿生网络，以实现高速光学流计算并保持低误差率。
AI.result: 在MVSEC数据集上验证了该网络，在速度提升4倍的情况下误差仅增加19%。并在高速无人机飞行场景中展示了系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合不同模态的数据，可以克服基于帧处理的根本权衡，为高速应用提供更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiruo Liu,Shibani Singh,Cory Cornelius,Colin Busho,Mike Tan,Anindya Paul,Jason Martin
title: Synthetic Dataset Generation for Adversarial Machine Learning Research
title_zh: 用于对抗性机器学习研究的合成数据集生成
abstract: Existing adversarial example research focuses on digitally inserted perturbations on top of existing natural image datasets. This construction of adversarial examples is not realistic because it may be difficult, or even impossible, for an attacker to deploy such an attack in the real-world due to sensing and environmental effects. To better understand adversarial examples against cyber-physical systems, we propose approximating the real-world through simulation. In this paper we describe our synthetic dataset generation tool that enables scalable collection of such a synthetic dataset with realistic adversarial examples. We use the CARLA simulator to collect such a dataset and demonstrate simulated attacks that undergo the same environmental transforms and processing as real-world images. Our tools have been used to collect datasets to help evaluate the efficacy of adversarial examples, and can be found at https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla/pull/4992.
summary: Existing adversarial example research focuses on digitally inserted perturbations on top of existing natural image datasets. This construction of adversarial examples is not realistic because it may be difficult, or even impossible, for an attacker to deploy such an attack in the real-world due to sensing and environmental effects. To better understand adversarial examples against cyber-physical systems, we propose approximating the real-world through simulation. In this paper we describe our synthetic dataset generation tool that enables scalable collection of such a synthetic dataset with realistic adversarial examples. We use the CARLA simulator to collect such a dataset and demonstrate simulated attacks that undergo the same environmental transforms and processing as real-world images. Our tools have been used to collect datasets to help evaluate the efficacy of adversarial examples, and can be found at https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla/pull/4992.
abstract_zh: 现有的对抗性示例研究侧重于现有自然图像数据集之上的数字插入扰动。这种对抗性示例的构造是不现实的，因为由于感知和环境影响，攻击者可能很难甚至不可能在现实世界中部署这种攻击。为了更好地理解针对网络物理系统的对抗示例，我们建议通过模拟来近似现实世界。在本文中，我们描述了我们的合成数据集生成工具，该工具能够使用真实的对抗性示例来可扩展地收集此类合成数据集。我们使用 CARLA 模拟器来收集这样的数据集，并演示模拟攻击，这些攻击经历与真实世界图像相同的环境转换和处理。我们的工具已用于收集数据集，以帮助评估对抗性示例的有效性，可以在 https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla/pull/4992 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成合成数据集的工具，用于研究对抗性机器学习，特别是在网络物理系统中的对抗性示例。
AI.motivation: 现有的对抗性示例研究主要集中在对现有自然图像数据集进行数字扰动，这种方法在现实世界中可能难以或无法实现，因此需要通过模拟来更真实地理解对抗性示例。
AI.method: 使用CARLA模拟器收集合成数据集，模拟攻击经历与真实世界图像相同的环境转换和处理。
AI.result: 该工具已被用于收集数据集，以评估对抗性示例的有效性，并可在GitHub上找到相关代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟生成的合成数据集能够更真实地反映对抗性示例在现实世界中的表现，有助于对抗性机器学习的研究。

In this paper we describe our synthetic dataset generation tool that enables scalable collection of such a synthetic dataset with realistic adversarial examples. We use the CARLA simulator to collect such a dataset and demonstrate simulated attacks that undergo the same environmental transforms and processing as real-world images. Our tools have been used to collect datasets to help evaluate the efficacy of adversarial examples, and can be found at https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla/pull/4992. 现有的对抗性示例研究侧重于现有自然图像数据集之上的数字插入扰动。这种对抗性示例的构造是不现实的，因为由于感知和环境影响，攻击者可能很难甚至不可能在现实世界中部署这种攻击。为了更好地理解针对网络物理系统的对抗示例，我们建议通过模拟来近似现实世界。在本文中，我们描述了我们的合成数据集生成工具，该工具能够使用真实的对抗性示例来可扩展地收集此类合成数据集。我们使用 CARLA 模拟器来收集这样的数据集，并演示模拟攻击，这些攻击经历与真实世界图像相同的环境转换和处理。我们的工具已用于收集数据集，以帮助评估对抗性示例的有效性，可以在 https://github.com/carla-simulator/carla/pull/4992 找到。 本文提出了一种生成合成数据集的工具，用于研究对抗性机器学习，特别是在网络物理系统中的对抗性示例。 Xiruo Liu,Shibani Singh,Cory Cornelius,Colin Busho,Mike Tan,Anindya Paul,Jason Martin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mohammad Taghi Hajiaghayi,Dariusz R. Kowalski,Piotr Krysta,Jan Olkowski
title: Optimal Algorithms for Free Order Multiple-Choice Secretary
title_zh: 自由订单多项选择秘书的最优算法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.13203
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.13203
abstract: Suppose we are given integer $k \leq n$ and $n$ boxes labeled $1,\ldots, n$ by an adversary, each containing a number chosen from an unknown distribution. We have to choose an order to sequentially open these boxes, and each time we open the next box in this order, we learn its number. If we reject a number in a box, the box cannot be recalled. Our goal is to accept the $k$ largest of these numbers, without necessarily opening all boxes. This is the free order multiple-choice secretary problem. Free order variants were studied extensively for the secretary and prophet problems. Kesselheim, Kleinberg, and Niazadeh KKN (STOC'15) initiated a study of randomness-efficient algorithms (with the cheapest order in terms of used random bits) for the free order secretary problems. We present an algorithm for free order multiple-choice secretary, which is simultaneously optimal for the competitive ratio and used amount of randomness. I.e., we construct a distribution on orders with optimal entropy $Θ(\log\log n)$ such that a deterministic multiple-threshold algorithm is $1-O(\sqrt{\log k/k})$-competitive. This improves in three ways the previous best construction by KKN, whose competitive ratio is $1 - O(1/k^{1/3}) - o(1)$. Our competitive ratio is (near)optimal for the multiple-choice secretary problem; it works for exponentially larger parameter $k$; and our algorithm is a simple deterministic multiple-threshold algorithm, while that in KKN is randomized. We also prove a corresponding lower bound on the entropy of optimal solutions for the multiple-choice secretary problem, matching entropy of our algorithm, where no such previous lower bound was known. We obtain our algorithmic results with a host of new techniques, and with these techniques we also improve significantly the previous results of KKN about constructing entropy-optimal distributions for the classic free order secretary.

abstract_zh: 假设对手给了我们整数 $k \leq n$ 和 $n$ 个标记为 $1,\ldots, n$ 的盒子，每个盒子都包含从未知分布中选择的数字。我们必须选择一个顺序来顺序打开这些盒子，每次我们按这个顺序打开下一个盒子时，我们都会知道它的编号。如果我们拒绝盒子中的某个数字，则该盒子将无法被召回。我们的目标是接受这些数字中最大的$k$，而不必打开所有盒子。这就是自由序多项选择秘书问题。对于秘书和先知问题，自由阶变体进行了广泛的研究。 Kesselheim、Kleinberg 和 Niazadeh KKN (STOC'15) 发起了一项针对自由顺序秘书问题的随机高效算法（就使用的随机位而言具有最便宜的顺序）的研究。我们提出了一种自由顺序多项选择秘书算法，该算法对于竞争率和随机性使用量来说是同时最优的。也就是说，我们构建一个具有最佳熵$θ(\log\log n)$的订单分布，使得确定性多阈值算法具有$1-O(\sqrt{\log k/k})$竞争性。这在三个方面改进了 KKN 之前的最佳构造，其竞争比为 $1 - O(1/k^{1/3}) - o(1)$。对于多项选择秘书问题，我们的竞争比是（接近）最佳的；它适用于指数较大的参数 $k$；我们的算法是一个简单的确定性多阈值算法，而 KKN 中的算法是随机的。我们还证明了多项选择秘书问题的最优解的熵的相应下界，匹配我们算法的熵，其中之前不知道这样的下界。我们通过一系列新技术获得了算法结果，并且通过这些技术，我们还显着改进了 KKN 之前关于为经典自由订单秘书构建熵最优分布的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自由顺序多选秘书问题，提出了一种同时优化竞争比和随机性使用的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在竞争比、参数k的适用范围及随机性效率方面存在不足，需改进以实现更优性能。
AI.method: 通过构造熵为Θ(log log n)的顺序分布，结合确定性多阈值算法，改进了KKN的随机化方法。
AI.result: 算法竞争比达到1-O(√(log k/k))，支持更大的k值，且为确定性算法；同时证明了熵的下界。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在竞争比和随机性使用上均达到最优，改进了经典自由顺序秘书问题的熵最优分布构造方法。

authors_text: Anton Bredenbeck,Shubham Vyas,Martin Zwick,Dorit Borrmann,Miguel Olivares-Mendez,Andreas Nüchter
title: Trajectory Optimization and Following for a Three Degrees of Freedom Overactuated Floating Platform
title_zh: 三自由度过驱动浮动平台的轨迹优化与跟随
abstract: Space robotics applications, such as Active Space Debris Removal (ASDR), require representative testing before launch. A commonly used approach to emulate the microgravity environment in space is air-bearing based platforms on flat-floors, such as the European Space Agency's Orbital Robotics and GNC Lab (ORGL). This work proposes a control architecture for a floating platform at the ORGL, equipped with eight solenoid-valve-based thrusters and one reaction wheel. The control architecture consists of two main components: a trajectory planner that finds optimal trajectories connecting two states and a trajectory follower that follows any physically feasible trajectory. The controller is first evaluated within an introduced simulation, achieving a 100 % success rate at finding and following trajectories to the origin within a Monte-Carlo test. Individual trajectories are also successfully followed by the physical system. In this work, we showcase the ability of the controller to reject disturbances and follow a straight-line trajectory within tens of centimeters.
summary: Space robotics applications, such as Active Space Debris Removal (ASDR), require representative testing before launch. A commonly used approach to emulate the microgravity environment in space is air-bearing based platforms on flat-floors, such as the European Space Agency's Orbital Robotics and GNC Lab (ORGL). This work proposes a control architecture for a floating platform at the ORGL, equipped with eight solenoid-valve-based thrusters and one reaction wheel. The control architecture consists of two main components: a trajectory planner that finds optimal trajectories connecting two states and a trajectory follower that follows any physically feasible trajectory. The controller is first evaluated within an introduced simulation, achieving a 100 % success rate at finding and following trajectories to the origin within a Monte-Carlo test. Individual trajectories are also successfully followed by the physical system. In this work, we showcase the ability of the controller to reject disturbances and follow a straight-line trajectory within tens of centimeters.
abstract_zh: 太空机器人应用，例如主动空间碎片清除（ASDR），需要在发射前进行代表性测试。模拟太空微重力环境的常用方法是在平坦的地板上使用基于空气轴承的平台，例如欧洲航天局的轨道机器人和 GNC 实验室 (ORGL)。这项工作提出了一种用于 ORGL 浮动平台的控制架构，该平台配备了八个基于电磁阀的推进器和一个反作用轮。控制架构由两个主要组件组成：一个轨迹规划器，用于找到连接两个状态的最佳轨迹；以及一个轨迹跟随器，用于遵循任何物理上可行的轨迹。首先在引入的模拟中对控制器进行评估，在蒙特卡罗测试中找到并跟踪原点轨迹的成功率达到 100%。物理系统也成功地跟踪个体轨迹。在这项工作中，我们展示了控制器抑制干扰并在数十厘米内遵循直线轨迹的能力。

AI.tldr: 设计用于模拟微重力环境的三自由度过驱动浮动平台的轨迹优化与跟踪控制架构
AI.motivation: 空间机器人任务（如太空碎片清除）需在地面模拟微重力环境进行测试，现有平台需更高效的轨迹规划与跟踪控制方法
AI.method: 提出包含轨迹规划器和跟踪器的控制架构，结合八电磁阀推进器与反作用轮，通过仿真与物理实验验证
AI.result: 仿真测试100%成功，实际系统成功跟踪轨迹，且能抑制干扰，直线轨迹跟踪精度达厘米级
AI.conclusion: 所提出的控制器能有效优化与跟踪轨迹，适用于微重力环境下的高精度空间机器人控制

authors_text: Yue Sun,Honggang Zhang,Zhuoming Huang,Benyuan Liu
title: R2P: A Deep Learning Model from mmWave Radar to Point Cloud
title_zh: R2P：从毫米波雷达到点云的深度学习模型
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.09188
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.09188
abstract: Recent research has shown the effectiveness of mmWave radar sensing for object detection in low visibility environments, which makes it an ideal technique in autonomous navigation systems. In this paper, we introduce Radar to Point Cloud (R2P), a deep learning model that generates smooth, dense, and highly accurate point cloud representation of a 3D object with fine geometry details, based on rough and sparse point clouds with incorrect points obtained from mmWave radar. These input point clouds are converted from the 2D depth images that are generated from raw mmWave radar sensor data, characterized by inconsistency, and orientation and shape errors. R2P utilizes an architecture of two sequential deep learning encoder-decoder blocks to extract the essential features of those radar-based input point clouds of an object when observed from multiple viewpoints, and to ensure the internal consistency of a generated output point cloud and its accurate and detailed shape reconstruction of the original object. We implement R2P to replace Stage 2 of our recently proposed 3DRIMR (3D Reconstruction and Imaging via mmWave Radar) system. Our experiments demonstrate the significant performance improvement of R2P over the popular existing methods such as PointNet, PCN, and the original 3DRIMR design.
summary: Recent research has shown the effectiveness of mmWave radar sensing for object detection in low visibility environments, which makes it an ideal technique in autonomous navigation systems. In this paper, we introduce Radar to Point Cloud (R2P), a deep learning model that generates smooth, dense, and highly accurate point cloud representation of a 3D object with fine geometry details, based on rough and sparse point clouds with incorrect points obtained from mmWave radar. These input point clouds are converted from the 2D depth images that are generated from raw mmWave radar sensor data, characterized by inconsistency, and orientation and shape errors. R2P utilizes an architecture of two sequential deep learning encoder-decoder blocks to extract the essential features of those radar-based input point clouds of an object when observed from multiple viewpoints, and to ensure the internal consistency of a generated output point cloud and its accurate and detailed shape reconstruction of the original object. We implement R2P to replace Stage 2 of our recently proposed 3DRIMR (3D Reconstruction and Imaging via mmWave Radar) system. Our experiments demonstrate the significant performance improvement of R2P over the popular existing methods such as PointNet, PCN, and the original 3DRIMR design.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，毫米波雷达传感在低能见度环境中进行物体检测的有效性，这使其成为自主导航系统的理想技术。在本文中，我们介绍了雷达到点云（R2P），这是一种深度学习模型，它基于从毫米波雷达获得的具有错误点的粗糙和稀疏点云，生成具有精细几何细节的 3D 对象的平滑、密集和高精度的点云表示。这些输入点云是从原始毫米波雷达传感器数据生成的 2D 深度图像转换而来的，其特点是不一致、方向和形状错误。 R2P利用两个顺序深度学习编码器-解码器块的架构来提取从多个视点观察时物体的基于雷达的输入点云的基本特征，并确保生成的输出点云的内部一致性及其对原始物体的准确和详细的形状重建。我们实施 R2P 来取代我们最近提出的 3DRIMR（通过毫米波雷达进行 3D 重建和成像）系统的第 2 阶段。我们的实验证明了 R2P 相对于流行的现有方法（例如 PointNet、PCN 和原始 3DRIMR 设计）具有显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出R2P深度学习模型，将毫米波雷达获取的稀疏、粗糙点云数据转换为高精度、密集且几何细节丰富的点云表示。
AI.motivation: 毫米波雷达在低能见度环境下具有良好的物体检测能力，但其生成的点云存在稀疏性、不一致性及形状误差，需改进重建精度以满足自动驾驶等场景需求。
AI.method: 采用双阶段编码-解码器架构，从多视角提取雷达点云关键特征，通过特征融合与优化确保输出点云的内部一致性及几何细节还原。
AI.result: 实验表明R2P在点云重建精度上显著优于PointNet、PCN及原3DRIMR系统，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: R2P为毫米波雷达到高质量点云的转换提供了新方法，可提升自动驾驶系统在复杂环境下的感知能力。

These input point clouds are converted from the 2D depth images that are generated from raw mmWave radar sensor data, characterized by inconsistency, and orientation and shape errors. We implement R2P to replace Stage 2 of our recently proposed 3DRIMR (3D Reconstruction and Imaging via mmWave Radar) system. authors_text: Jintai Chen,Kuanlun Liao,Kun Wei,Haochao Ying,Danny Z. Chen,Jian Wu
title: ME-GAN: Learning Panoptic Electrocardio Representations for Multi-view ECG Synthesis Conditioned on Heart Diseases
title_zh: ME-GAN：学习全景心电表示，用于心脏病条件下的多视图心电图合成
comment: ef:In International Conference on Machine Learning, 3360--3370, (2022), PMLR
comments: ef:In International Conference on Machine Learning, 3360--3370, (2022), PMLR
abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) is a widely used non-invasive diagnostic tool for heart diseases. Many studies have devised ECG analysis models (e.g., classifiers) to assist diagnosis. As an upstream task, researches have built generative models to synthesize ECG data, which are beneficial to providing training samples, privacy protection, and annotation reduction. However, previous generative methods for ECG often neither synthesized multi-view data, nor dealt with heart disease conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel disease-aware generative adversarial network for multi-view ECG synthesis called ME-GAN, which attains panoptic electrocardio representations conditioned on heart diseases and projects the representations onto multiple standard views to yield ECG signals. Since ECG manifestations of heart diseases are often localized in specific waveforms, we propose a new "mixup normalization" to inject disease information precisely into suitable locations. In addition, we propose a view discriminator to revert disordered ECG views into a pre-determined order, supervising the generator to obtain ECG representing correct view characteristics. Besides, a new metric, rFID, is presented to assess the quality of the synthesized ECG signals. Comprehensive experiments verify that our ME-GAN performs well on multi-view ECG signal synthesis with trusty morbid manifestations.
summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG) is a widely used non-invasive diagnostic tool for heart diseases. Many studies have devised ECG analysis models (e.g., classifiers) to assist diagnosis. As an upstream task, researches have built generative models to synthesize ECG data, which are beneficial to providing training samples, privacy protection, and annotation reduction. However, previous generative methods for ECG often neither synthesized multi-view data, nor dealt with heart disease conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel disease-aware generative adversarial network for multi-view ECG synthesis called ME-GAN, which attains panoptic electrocardio representations conditioned on heart diseases and projects the representations onto multiple standard views to yield ECG signals. Since ECG manifestations of heart diseases are often localized in specific waveforms, we propose a new "mixup normalization" to inject disease information precisely into suitable locations. In addition, we propose a view discriminator to revert disordered ECG views into a pre-determined order, supervising the generator to obtain ECG representing correct view characteristics. Besides, a new metric, rFID, is presented to assess the quality of the synthesized ECG signals. Comprehensive experiments verify that our ME-GAN performs well on multi-view ECG signal synthesis with trusty morbid manifestations.
abstract_zh: 心电图（ECG）是一种广泛使用的心脏病无创诊断工具。许多研究设计了心电图分析模型（例如分类器）来辅助诊断。作为上游任务，研究人员建立了生成模型来合成心电图数据，这有利于提供训练样本、隐私保护和注释减少。然而，以前的心电图生成方法通常既不能合成多视图数据，也不能处理心脏病状况。在本文中，我们提出了一种新型的疾病感知生成对抗网络，用于多视图心电图合成，称为 ME-GAN，它获得以心脏病为条件的全景心电表示，并将这些表示投影到多个标准视图上以产生心电图信号。由于心脏病的心电图表现通常局限于特定波形，因此我们提出了一种新的“混合标准化”，将疾病信息精确地注入到合适的位置。此外，我们提出了一个视图鉴别器，将无序的心电图视图恢复为预定的顺序，监督生成器获得代表正确视图特征的心电图。此外，还提出了一种新的指标 rFID 来评估合成心电图信号的质量。全面的实验验证了我们的 ME-GAN 在多视图心电图信号合成方面表现良好，具有可靠的病态表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ME-GAN模型，用于生成多视角且与心脏疾病条件相关的ECG信号。
AI.motivation: 现有ECG生成方法无法同时处理多视角数据和心脏疾病条件，限制了其在诊断和隐私保护中的应用。
AI.method: 设计疾病感知的生成对抗网络，引入'混洗归一化'精确注入疾病信息，并采用视角判别器恢复ECG视图顺序，提出rFID指标评估合成质量。
AI.result: 实验验证ME-GAN在多视角ECG合成中表现优异，能准确呈现疾病特征。
AI.conclusion: ME-GAN通过融合疾病条件与多视角生成，有效解决了ECG数据生成中的关键问题，为诊断和研究提供新工具。

search_text: ME-GAN: Learning Panoptic Electrocardio Representations for Multi-view ECG Synthesis Conditioned on Heart Diseases ME-GAN：学习全景心电表示，用于心脏病条件下的多视图心电图合成 Electrocardiogram (ECG) is a widely used non-invasive diagnostic tool for heart diseases. Many studies have devised ECG analysis models (e.g., classifiers) to assist diagnosis. As an upstream task, researches have built generative models to synthesize ECG data, which are beneficial to providing training samples, privacy protection, and annotation reduction. However, previous generative methods for ECG often neither synthesized multi-view data, nor dealt with heart disease conditions. In this paper, we propose a novel disease-aware generative adversarial network for multi-view ECG synthesis called ME-GAN, which attains panoptic electrocardio representations conditioned on heart diseases and projects the representations onto multiple standard views to yield ECG signals. Since ECG manifestations of heart diseases are often localized in specific waveforms, we propose a new "mixup normalization" to inject disease information precisely into suitable locations. In addition, we propose a view discriminator to revert disordered ECG views into a pre-determined order, supervising the generator to obtain ECG representing correct view characteristics. Besides, a new metric, rFID, is presented to assess the quality of the synthesized ECG signals. Comprehensive experiments verify that our ME-GAN performs well on multi-view ECG signal synthesis with trusty morbid manifestations. 心电图（ECG）是一种广泛使用的心脏病无创诊断工具。许多研究设计了心电图分析模型（例如分类器）来辅助诊断。作为上游任务，研究人员建立了生成模型来合成心电图数据，这有利于提供训练样本、隐私保护和注释减少。然而，以前的心电图生成方法通常既不能合成多视图数据，也不能处理心脏病状况。在本文中，我们提出了一种新型的疾病感知生成对抗网络，用于多视图心电图合成，称为 ME-GAN，它获得以心脏病为条件的全景心电表示，并将这些表示投影到多个标准视图上以产生心电图信号。由于心脏病的心电图表现通常局限于特定波形，因此我们提出了一种新的“混合标准化”，将疾病信息精确地注入到合适的位置。此外，我们提出了一个视图鉴别器，将无序的心电图视图恢复为预定的顺序，监督生成器获得代表正确视图特征的心电图。此外，还提出了一种新的指标 rFID 来评估合成心电图信号的质量。全面的实验验证了我们的 ME-GAN 在多视图心电图信号合成方面表现良好，具有可靠的病态表现。 本文提出ME-GAN模型，用于生成多视角且与心脏疾病条件相关的ECG信号。 Jintai Chen,Kuanlun Liao,Kun Wei,Haochao Ying,Danny Z. authors_text: Theodoros Panagiotakopoulos,Pier Luigi Dovesi,Linus Härenstam-Nielsen,Matteo Poggi
title: Online Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation in Ever-Changing Conditions
title_zh: 不断变化的条件下语义分割的在线域适应
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims at reducing the domain gap between training and testing data and is, in most cases, carried out in offline manner. However, domain changes may occur continuously and unpredictably during deployment (e.g. sudden weather changes). In such conditions, deep neural networks witness dramatic drops in accuracy and offline adaptation may not be enough to contrast it. In this paper, we tackle Online Domain Adaptation (OnDA) for semantic segmentation. We design a pipeline that is robust to continuous domain shifts, either gradual or sudden, and we evaluate it in the case of rainy and foggy scenarios. Our experiments show that our framework can effectively adapt to new domains during deployment, while not being affected by catastrophic forgetting of the previous domains.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims at reducing the domain gap between training and testing data and is, in most cases, carried out in offline manner. However, domain changes may occur continuously and unpredictably during deployment (e.g. sudden weather changes). In such conditions, deep neural networks witness dramatic drops in accuracy and offline adaptation may not be enough to contrast it. In this paper, we tackle Online Domain Adaptation (OnDA) for semantic segmentation. We design a pipeline that is robust to continuous domain shifts, either gradual or sudden, and we evaluate it in the case of rainy and foggy scenarios. Our experiments show that our framework can effectively adapt to new domains during deployment, while not being affected by catastrophic forgetting of the previous domains.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在缩小训练数据和测试数据之间的域差距，在大多数情况下以离线方式进行。然而，在部署过程中，域变化可能会连续且不可预测地发生（例如天气突然变化）。在这种情况下，深度神经网络的准确性急剧下降，而离线适应可能不足以与之形成对比。在本文中，我们解决了语义分割的在线域适应（OnDA）问题。我们设计了一个对连续域转移（无论是渐进的还是突然的）具有鲁棒性的管道，并在雨天和雾天的情况下对其进行评估。我们的实验表明，我们的框架可以在部署过程中有效地适应新领域，同时不会受到先前领域的灾难性遗忘的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线领域自适应（OnDA）框架，用于在持续变化的天气条件下（如雨天和雾天）进行语义分割，以应对传统离线领域自适应方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应（UDA）方法在离线场景下效果有限，无法应对部署过程中持续或突发的领域变化（如天气突变），导致模型准确性显著下降。
AI.method: 设计了一种鲁棒的在线领域自适应流水线，能够处理渐进式或突发式的领域偏移，并在雨天和雾天场景中进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能够在部署过程中有效适应新领域，同时避免对先前领域的灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为持续变化条件下的语义分割提供了有效的在线领域自适应解决方案。

search_text: Online Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation in Ever-Changing Conditions 不断变化的条件下语义分割的在线域适应 Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims at reducing the domain gap between training and testing data and is, in most cases, carried out in offline manner. However, domain changes may occur continuously and unpredictably during deployment (e.g. sudden weather changes). In such conditions, deep neural networks witness dramatic drops in accuracy and offline adaptation may not be enough to contrast it. In this paper, we tackle Online Domain Adaptation (OnDA) for semantic segmentation. We design a pipeline that is robust to continuous domain shifts, either gradual or sudden, and we evaluate it in the case of rainy and foggy scenarios. Our experiments show that our framework can effectively adapt to new domains during deployment, while not being affected by catastrophic forgetting of the previous domains. 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在缩小训练数据和测试数据之间的域差距，在大多数情况下以离线方式进行。然而，在部署过程中，域变化可能会连续且不可预测地发生（例如天气突然变化）。在这种情况下，深度神经网络的准确性急剧下降，而离线适应可能不足以与之形成对比。在本文中，我们解决了语义分割的在线域适应（OnDA）问题。我们设计了一个对连续域转移（无论是渐进的还是突然的）具有鲁棒性的管道，并在雨天和雾天的情况下对其进行评估。我们的实验表明，我们的框架可以在部署过程中有效地适应新领域，同时不会受到先前领域的灾难性遗忘的影响。 本文提出了一种在线领域自适应（OnDA）框架，用于在持续变化的天气条件下（如雨天和雾天）进行语义分割，以应对传统离线领域自适应方法的不足。 Theodoros Panagiotakopoulos,Pier Luigi Dovesi,Linus Härenstam-Nielsen,Matteo Poggi cs.CV

authors_text: Kan Wu,Jinnian Zhang,Houwen Peng,Mengchen Liu,Bin Xiao,Jianlong Fu,Lu Yuan
title: TinyViT: Fast Pretraining Distillation for Small Vision Transformers
title_zh: TinyViT：小型视觉 Transformer 的快速预训练蒸馏
abstract: Vision transformer (ViT) recently has drawn great attention in computer vision due to its remarkable model capability. However, most prevailing ViT models suffer from huge number of parameters, restricting their applicability on devices with limited resources. To alleviate this issue, we propose TinyViT, a new family of tiny and efficient small vision transformers pretrained on large-scale datasets with our proposed fast distillation framework. The central idea is to transfer knowledge from large pretrained models to small ones, while enabling small models to get the dividends of massive pretraining data. More specifically, we apply distillation during pretraining for knowledge transfer. The logits of large teacher models are sparsified and stored in disk in advance to save the memory cost and computation overheads. The tiny student transformers are automatically scaled down from a large pretrained model with computation and parameter constraints. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of TinyViT. It achieves a top-1 accuracy of 84.8% on ImageNet-1k with only 21M parameters, being comparable to Swin-B pretrained on ImageNet-21k while using 4.2 times fewer parameters. Moreover, increasing image resolutions, TinyViT can reach 86.5% accuracy, being slightly better than Swin-L while using only 11% parameters. Last but not the least, we demonstrate a good transfer ability of TinyViT on various downstream tasks. Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/Cream/tree/main/TinyViT.
summary: Vision transformer (ViT) recently has drawn great attention in computer vision due to its remarkable model capability. However, most prevailing ViT models suffer from huge number of parameters, restricting their applicability on devices with limited resources. To alleviate this issue, we propose TinyViT, a new family of tiny and efficient small vision transformers pretrained on large-scale datasets with our proposed fast distillation framework. The central idea is to transfer knowledge from large pretrained models to small ones, while enabling small models to get the dividends of massive pretraining data. More specifically, we apply distillation during pretraining for knowledge transfer. The logits of large teacher models are sparsified and stored in disk in advance to save the memory cost and computation overheads. The tiny student transformers are automatically scaled down from a large pretrained model with computation and parameter constraints. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of TinyViT. It achieves a top-1 accuracy of 84.8% on ImageNet-1k with only 21M parameters, being comparable to Swin-B pretrained on ImageNet-21k while using 4.2 times fewer parameters. Moreover, increasing image resolutions, TinyViT can reach 86.5% accuracy, being slightly better than Swin-L while using only 11% parameters. Last but not the least, we demonstrate a good transfer ability of TinyViT on various downstream tasks. Code and models are available at https://github.com/microsoft/Cream/tree/main/TinyViT.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）由于其卓越的模型能力，最近在计算机视觉领域引起了极大的关注。然而，大多数流行的 ViT 模型都存在大量参数，限制了它们在资源有限的设备上的适用性。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 TinyViT，这是一个新的小型高效小型视觉转换器系列，使用我们提出的快速蒸馏框架在大规模数据集上进行了预训练。中心思想是将知识从大型预训练模型转移到小型模型，同时使小型模型能够获得海量预训练数据的红利。更具体地说，我们在预训练期间应用蒸馏来进行知识转移。大型教师模型的逻辑被稀疏化并提前存储在磁盘中，以节省内存成本和计算开销。微型学生变压器是通过计算和参数约束从大型预训练模型自动缩小的。综合实验证明了TinyViT的功效。它仅使用 21M 个参数在 ImageNet-1k 上实现了 84.8% 的 top-1 准确率，与在 ImageNet-21k 上预训练的 Swin-B 相当，但使用的参数少了 4.2 倍。此外，在提高图像分辨率的情况下，TinyViT 的准确率可以达到 86.5%，仅使用 11% 的参数，略优于 Swin-L。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们在各种下游任务上展示了 TinyViT 良好的传输能力。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/microsoft/Cream/tree/main/TinyViT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TinyViT，一种通过快速预训练蒸馏方法实现的小型高效视觉Transformer模型，旨在减少参数量同时保持高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer（ViT）模型参数量庞大，难以部署在资源受限设备上，需开发参数更少但性能接近大模型的轻量级模型。
AI.method: 提出快速预训练蒸馏框架，通过稀疏化存储大模型logits并约束计算参数自动缩放，从大模型中蒸馏知识至小型学生模型。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k上以21M参数达到84.8%精度（媲美Swin-B但参数少4.2倍），高分辨率下达86.5%（优于Swin-L且参数仅11%），并在下游任务中展现良好迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: TinyViT验证了通过蒸馏构建轻量级视觉模型的有效性，为资源受限场景提供了高性能解决方案。

authors_text: Grant Van Horn,Rui Qian,Kimberly Wilber,Hartwig Adam,Oisin Mac Aodha,Serge Belongie
title: Exploring Fine-Grained Audiovisual Categorization with the SSW60 Dataset
title_zh: 使用 SSW60 数据集探索细粒度视听分类
abstract: We present a new benchmark dataset, Sapsucker Woods 60 (SSW60), for advancing research on audiovisual fine-grained categorization. While our community has made great strides in fine-grained visual categorization on images, the counterparts in audio and video fine-grained categorization are relatively unexplored. To encourage advancements in this space, we have carefully constructed the SSW60 dataset to enable researchers to experiment with classifying the same set of categories in three different modalities: images, audio, and video. The dataset covers 60 species of birds and is comprised of images from existing datasets, and brand new, expert-curated audio and video datasets. We thoroughly benchmark audiovisual classification performance and modality fusion experiments through the use of state-of-the-art transformer methods. Our findings show that performance of audiovisual fusion methods is better than using exclusively image or audio based methods for the task of video classification. We also present interesting modality transfer experiments, enabled by the unique construction of SSW60 to encompass three different modalities. We hope the SSW60 dataset and accompanying baselines spur research in this fascinating area.
summary: We present a new benchmark dataset, Sapsucker Woods 60 (SSW60), for advancing research on audiovisual fine-grained categorization. While our community has made great strides in fine-grained visual categorization on images, the counterparts in audio and video fine-grained categorization are relatively unexplored. To encourage advancements in this space, we have carefully constructed the SSW60 dataset to enable researchers to experiment with classifying the same set of categories in three different modalities: images, audio, and video. The dataset covers 60 species of birds and is comprised of images from existing datasets, and brand new, expert-curated audio and video datasets. We thoroughly benchmark audiovisual classification performance and modality fusion experiments through the use of state-of-the-art transformer methods. Our findings show that performance of audiovisual fusion methods is better than using exclusively image or audio based methods for the task of video classification. We also present interesting modality transfer experiments, enabled by the unique construction of SSW60 to encompass three different modalities. We hope the SSW60 dataset and accompanying baselines spur research in this fascinating area.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的基准数据集 Sapsucker Woods 60 (SSW60)，用于推进视听细粒度分类的研究。虽然我们的社区在图像的细粒度视觉分类方面取得了长足的进步，但音频和视频细粒度分类方面的对应领域相对尚未探索。为了鼓励这一领域的进步，我们精心构建了 SSW60 数据集，使研究人员能够尝试以三种不同的方式对同一组类别进行分类：图像、音频和视频。该数据集涵盖 60 种鸟类，由现有数据集的图像以及专家策划的全新音频和视频数据集组成。我们通过使用最先进的变压器方法对视听分类性能和模态融合实验进行彻底的基准测试。我们的研究结果表明，在视频分类任务中，视听融合方法的性能优于仅使用基于图像或音频的方法。我们还提出了有趣的模态转移实验，通过 SSW60 的独特结构实现了涵盖三种不同模态的实验。我们希望 SSW60 数据集和随附的基线能够促进这一迷人领域的研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个名为SSW60的新数据集，用于推动细粒度视听分类研究，并通过多模态融合实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管细粒度视觉分类已取得进展，但音频和视频的细粒度分类研究仍较为薄弱，缺乏统一基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含60种鸟类的图像、音频和视频数据的SSW60数据集，并采用先进Transformer方法进行多模态分类与融合实验。
AI.result: 音频视觉融合方法在视频分类任务中表现优于单一模态方法，且通过模态迁移实验验证了跨模态学习的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SSW60数据集及基线模型为细粒度视听分类研究提供了新方向，有望推动多模态融合技术的发展。

tldr: 该论文提出一个名为SSW60的新数据集，用于推动细粒度视听分类研究，并通过多模态融合实验验证其有效性。
motivation: 尽管细粒度视觉分类已取得进展，但音频和视频的细粒度分类研究仍较为薄弱，缺乏统一基准数据集。
method: 构建包含60种鸟类的图像、音频和视频数据的SSW60数据集，并采用先进Transformer方法进行多模态分类与融合实验。
result: 音频视觉融合方法在视频分类任务中表现优于单一模态方法，且通过模态迁移实验验证了跨模态学习的可行性。
conclusion: SSW60数据集及基线模型为细粒度视听分类研究提供了新方向，有望推动多模态融合技术的发展。
search_text: Exploring Fine-Grained Audiovisual Categorization with the SSW60 Dataset 使用 SSW60 数据集探索细粒度视听分类 We present a new benchmark dataset, Sapsucker Woods 60 (SSW60), for advancing research on audiovisual fine-grained categorization. While our community has made great strides in fine-grained visual categorization on images, the counterparts in audio and video fine-grained categorization are relatively unexplored. To encourage advancements in this space, we have carefully constructed the SSW60 dataset to enable researchers to experiment with classifying the same set of categories in three different modalities: images, audio, and video. The dataset covers 60 species of birds and is comprised of images from existing datasets, and brand new, expert-curated audio and video datasets. We thoroughly benchmark audiovisual classification performance and modality fusion experiments through the use of state-of-the-art transformer methods. Our findings show that performance of audiovisual fusion methods is better than using exclusively image or audio based methods for the task of video classification. We also present interesting modality transfer experiments, enabled by the unique construction of SSW60 to encompass three different modalities. We hope the SSW60 dataset and accompanying baselines spur research in this fascinating area. 我们提出了一个新的基准数据集 Sapsucker Woods 60 (SSW60)，用于推进视听细粒度分类的研究。虽然我们的社区在图像的细粒度视觉分类方面取得了长足的进步，但音频和视频细粒度分类方面的对应领域相对尚未探索。为了鼓励这一领域的进步，我们精心构建了 SSW60 数据集，使研究人员能够尝试以三种不同的方式对同一组类别进行分类：图像、音频和视频。该数据集涵盖 60 种鸟类，由现有数据集的图像以及专家策划的全新音频和视频数据集组成。我们通过使用最先进的变压器方法对视听分类性能和模态融合实验进行彻底的基准测试。我们的研究结果表明，在视频分类任务中，视听融合方法的性能优于仅使用基于图像或音频的方法。我们还提出了有趣的模态转移实验，通过 SSW60 的独特结构实现了涵盖三种不同模态的实验。我们希望 SSW60 数据集和随附的基线能够促进这一迷人领域的研究。 该论文提出一个名为SSW60的新数据集，用于推动细粒度视听分类研究，并通过多模态融合实验验证其有效性。 Grant Van Horn,Rui Qian,Kimberly Wilber,Hartwig Adam,Oisin Mac Aodha,Serge Belongie cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Aayush Bansal,Michael Zollhoefer
title: Neural Pixel Composition: 3D-4D View Synthesis from Multi-Views
title_zh: 神经像素合成：多视图的 3D-4D 视图合成
comment: A technical report on 3D-4D view synthesis (40 pages, 22 figures and 18 tables). High-resolution version of paper: http://www.aayushbansal.xyz/npc/npc_hi-res.pdf. Project page (containing video results): http://www.aayushbansal.xyz/npc/
comments: A technical report on 3D-4D view synthesis (40 pages, 22 figures and 18 tables). High-resolution version of paper: http://www.aayushbansal.xyz/npc/npc_hi-res.pdf. Project page (containing video results): http://www.aayushbansal.xyz/npc/
abstract: We present Neural Pixel Composition (NPC), a novel approach for continuous 3D-4D view synthesis given only a discrete set of multi-view observations as input. Existing state-of-the-art approaches require dense multi-view supervision and an extensive computational budget. The proposed formulation reliably operates on sparse and wide-baseline multi-view imagery and can be trained efficiently within a few seconds to 10 minutes for hi-res (12MP) content, i.e., 200-400X faster convergence than existing methods. Crucial to our approach are two core novelties: 1) a representation of a pixel that contains color and depth information accumulated from multi-views for a particular location and time along a line of sight, and 2) a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that enables the composition of this rich information provided for a pixel location to obtain the final color output. We experiment with a large variety of multi-view sequences, compare to existing approaches, and achieve better results in diverse and challenging settings. Finally, our approach enables dense 3D reconstruction from sparse multi-views, where COLMAP, a state-of-the-art 3D reconstruction approach, struggles.
summary: We present Neural Pixel Composition (NPC), a novel approach for continuous 3D-4D view synthesis given only a discrete set of multi-view observations as input. Existing state-of-the-art approaches require dense multi-view supervision and an extensive computational budget. The proposed formulation reliably operates on sparse and wide-baseline multi-view imagery and can be trained efficiently within a few seconds to 10 minutes for hi-res (12MP) content, i.e., 200-400X faster convergence than existing methods. Crucial to our approach are two core novelties: 1) a representation of a pixel that contains color and depth information accumulated from multi-views for a particular location and time along a line of sight, and 2) a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that enables the composition of this rich information provided for a pixel location to obtain the final color output. We experiment with a large variety of multi-view sequences, compare to existing approaches, and achieve better results in diverse and challenging settings. Finally, our approach enables dense 3D reconstruction from sparse multi-views, where COLMAP, a state-of-the-art 3D reconstruction approach, struggles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了神经像素合成 (NPC)，这是一种仅将一组离散的多视图观察作为输入的连续 3D-4D 视图合成的新颖方法。现有最先进的方法需要密集的多视图监督和广泛的计算预算。所提出的公式可以在稀疏和宽基线多视图图像上可靠地运行，并且可以在几秒到 10 分钟内有效地训练高分辨率 (12MP) 内容，即比现有方法的收敛速度快 200-400 倍。我们的方法的关键在于两个核心新颖之处：1）像素的表示，其中包含沿视线的特定位置和时间的多视图累积的颜色和深度信息；2）多层感知器（MLP），它能够组合为像素位置提供的丰富信息以获得最终的颜色输出。我们尝试了多种多视图序列，与现有方法进行比较，并在多样化和具有挑战性的环境中取得了更好的结果。最后，我们的方法能够从稀疏的多视图中进行密集的 3D 重建，而 COLMAP（一种最先进的 3D 重建方法）却在这方面遇到了困难。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经像素组合（NPC）方法，实现从稀疏多视角图像中高效生成3D-4D视图合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖密集多视角监督和高计算成本，难以处理稀疏和宽基线场景，且收敛速度慢。
AI.method: 通过像素级多视角颜色-深度信息融合表示，结合多层感知机（MLP）进行像素信息组合，实现高效视图合成。
AI.result: 在多种多视角序列中优于现有方法，尤其在稀疏视角下实现高质量密集3D重建，训练速度提升200-400倍。
AI.conclusion: NPC通过创新表示与高效网络设计，在稀疏输入条件下实现了更优的视图合成与重建效果，具有显著实际应用价值。

authors_text: Mohammed Suhail,Carlos Esteves,Leonid Sigal,Ameesh Makadia
title: Generalizable Patch-Based Neural Rendering
title_zh: 可推广的基于补丁的神经渲染
comment: Project Page with code and results at https://mohammedsuhail.net/gen_patch_neural_rendering/
comments: Project Page with code and results at https://mohammedsuhail.net/gen_patch_neural_rendering/
abstract: Neural rendering has received tremendous attention since the advent of Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF), and has pushed the state-of-the-art on novel-view synthesis considerably. The recent focus has been on models that overfit to a single scene, and the few attempts to learn models that can synthesize novel views of unseen scenes mostly consist of combining deep convolutional features with a NeRF-like model. We propose a different paradigm, where no deep features and no NeRF-like volume rendering are needed. Our method is capable of predicting the color of a target ray in a novel scene directly, just from a collection of patches sampled from the scene. We first leverage epipolar geometry to extract patches along the epipolar lines of each reference view. Each patch is linearly projected into a 1D feature vector and a sequence of transformers process the collection. For positional encoding, we parameterize rays as in a light field representation, with the crucial difference that the coordinates are canonicalized with respect to the target ray, which makes our method independent of the reference frame and improves generalization. We show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art on novel view synthesis of unseen scenes even when being trained with considerably less data than prior work.
summary: Neural rendering has received tremendous attention since the advent of Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF), and has pushed the state-of-the-art on novel-view synthesis considerably. The recent focus has been on models that overfit to a single scene, and the few attempts to learn models that can synthesize novel views of unseen scenes mostly consist of combining deep convolutional features with a NeRF-like model. We propose a different paradigm, where no deep features and no NeRF-like volume rendering are needed. Our method is capable of predicting the color of a target ray in a novel scene directly, just from a collection of patches sampled from the scene. We first leverage epipolar geometry to extract patches along the epipolar lines of each reference view. Each patch is linearly projected into a 1D feature vector and a sequence of transformers process the collection. For positional encoding, we parameterize rays as in a light field representation, with the crucial difference that the coordinates are canonicalized with respect to the target ray, which makes our method independent of the reference frame and improves generalization. We show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art on novel view synthesis of unseen scenes even when being trained with considerably less data than prior work.
abstract_zh: 自神经辐射场 (NeRF) 出现以来，神经渲染受到了极大的关注，并极大地推动了新颖视图合成的最先进水平。最近的焦点是过度适应单一场景的模型，而学习能够合成未见过场景的新颖视图的模型的少数尝试主要包括将深度卷积特征与类似 NeRF 的模型相结合。我们提出了一种不同的范例，其中不需要深层特征，也不需要类似 NeRF 的体积渲染。我们的方法能够直接根据从场景中采样的补丁集合来预测新场景中目标光线的颜色。我们首先利用极线几何形状沿着每个参考视图的极线提取补丁。每个补丁都线性投影到一维特征向量中，并且一系列转换器处理该集合。对于位置编码，我们将光线参数化为光场表示，其关键区别在于坐标相对于目标光线进行规范化，这使得我们的方法独立于参考系并提高了泛化性。我们表明，即使使用比以前的工作少得多的数据进行训练，我们的方法在未见过的场景的新颖视图合成方面也优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需深度特征和体积渲染的通用神经渲染方法，通过从场景中采样的补丁直接预测新场景中目标光线的颜色。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染模型过度拟合单一场景，且少数尝试学习通用模型的方法依赖深度卷积特征与NeRF结合。作者旨在探索无需深度特征和体积渲染的新型范式，以提升对未见过场景的泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用极线几何从参考视图中提取极线补丁，将每个补丁线性投影为1D特征向量，并通过变压器序列处理。通过将光线参数化为光场表示，坐标相对于目标光线进行规范化，实现与参考帧无关的泛化。
AI.result: 在未见过场景的新视角合成任务中，该方法在数据量远少于先前工作的条件下，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过补丁级变压器与光场参数化结合，本文方法无需深度特征和体积渲染即可实现对新场景的高效泛化，为神经渲染提供了新范式。

Each patch is linearly projected into a 1D feature vector and a sequence of transformers process the collection. We show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art on novel view synthesis of unseen scenes even when being trained with considerably less data than prior work. 自神经辐射场 (NeRF) 出现以来，神经渲染受到了极大的关注，并极大地推动了新颖视图合成的最先进水平。最近的焦点是过度适应单一场景的模型，而学习能够合成未见过场景的新颖视图的模型的少数尝试主要包括将深度卷积特征与类似 NeRF 的模型相结合。我们提出了一种不同的范例，其中不需要深层特征，也不需要类似 NeRF 的体积渲染。我们的方法能够直接根据从场景中采样的补丁集合来预测新场景中目标光线的颜色。我们首先利用极线几何形状沿着每个参考视图的极线提取补丁。每个补丁都线性投影到一维特征向量中，并且一系列转换器处理该集合。对于位置编码，我们将光线参数化为光场表示，其关键区别在于坐标相对于目标光线进行规范化，这使得我们的方法独立于参考系并提高了泛化性。我们表明，即使使用比以前的工作少得多的数据进行训练，我们的方法在未见过的场景的新颖视图合成方面也优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种无需深度特征和体积渲染的通用神经渲染方法，通过从场景中采样的补丁直接预测新场景中目标光线的颜色。 Mohammed Suhail,Carlos Esteves,Leonid Sigal,Ameesh Makadia cs.CV

authors_text: Junfeng Wu,Qihao Liu,Yi Jiang,Song Bai,Alan Yuille,Xiang Bai
title: In Defense of Online Models for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 捍卫视频实例分割的在线模型
abstract: In recent years, video instance segmentation (VIS) has been largely advanced by offline models, while online models gradually attracted less attention possibly due to their inferior performance. However, online methods have their inherent advantage in handling long video sequences and ongoing videos while offline models fail due to the limit of computational resources. Therefore, it would be highly desirable if online models can achieve comparable or even better performance than offline models. By dissecting current online models and offline models, we demonstrate that the main cause of the performance gap is the error-prone association between frames caused by the similar appearance among different instances in the feature space. Observing this, we propose an online framework based on contrastive learning that is able to learn more discriminative instance embeddings for association and fully exploit history information for stability. Despite its simplicity, our method outperforms all online and offline methods on three benchmarks. Specifically, we achieve 49.5 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019, a significant improvement of 13.2 AP and 2.1 AP over the prior online and offline art, respectively. Moreover, we achieve 30.2 AP on OVIS, a more challenging dataset with significant crowding and occlusions, surpassing the prior art by 14.8 AP. The proposed method won first place in the video instance segmentation track of the 4th Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge (CVPR2022). We hope the simplicity and effectiveness of our method, as well as our insight into current methods, could shed light on the exploration of VIS models.
