However, online methods have their inherent advantage in handling long video sequences and ongoing videos while offline models fail due to the limit of computational resources. Therefore, it would be highly desirable if online models can achieve comparable or even better performance than offline models. By dissecting current online models and offline models, we demonstrate that the main cause of the performance gap is the error-prone association between frames caused by the similar appearance among different instances in the feature space. Observing this, we propose an online framework based on contrastive learning that is able to learn more discriminative instance embeddings for association and fully exploit history information for stability. Despite its simplicity, our method outperforms all online and offline methods on three benchmarks. Specifically, we achieve 49.5 AP on YouTube-VIS 2019, a significant improvement of 13.2 AP and 2.1 AP over the prior online and offline art, respectively. Moreover, we achieve 30.2 AP on OVIS, a more challenging dataset with significant crowding and occlusions, surpassing the prior art by 14.8 AP. The proposed method won first place in the video instance segmentation track of the 4th Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge (CVPR2022). We hope the simplicity and effectiveness of our method, as well as our insight into current methods, could shed light on the exploration of VIS models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视频实例分割（VIS）在很大程度上是由离线模型推动的，而在线模型可能由于性能较差而逐渐受到关注。然而，在线方法在处理长视频序列和持续视频方面有其固有的优势，而离线模型由于计算资源的限制而失败。因此，如果在线模型能够达到与离线模型相当甚至更好的性能，那将是非常可取的。通过剖析当前的在线模型和离线模型，我们证明了性能差距的主要原因是由于特征空间中不同实例之间的相似外观而导致的帧之间容易出错的关联。观察到这一点，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的在线框架，该框架能够学习更具区分性的实例嵌入以进行关联，并充分利用历史信息来实现稳定性。尽管很简单，但我们的方法在三个基准测试中优于所有在线和离线方法。具体来说，我们在 YouTube-VIS 2019 上获得了 49.5 AP，分别比之前的在线和离线艺术显着提高了 13.2 AP 和 2.1 AP。此外，我们在 OVIS 上实现了 30.2 AP，这是一个更具挑战性的数据集，具有明显的拥挤和遮挡，超过了现有技术 14.8 AP。该方法在第四届大规模视频对象分割挑战赛（CVPR2022）的视频实例分割赛道中获得第一名。我们希望我们的方法的简单性和有效性，以及我们对当前方法的洞察，能够为 VIS 模型的探索带来启发。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进在线模型的性能，使其在视频实例分割任务中达到甚至超越离线模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 在线模型在处理长视频序列和持续视频时具有优势，但因性能不足而被忽视。现有在线模型因特征空间中实例外观相似导致的帧关联错误，存在性能差距。
AI.method: 提出基于对比学习的在线框架，通过学习更具判别性的实例嵌入并充分利用历史信息来提升稳定性。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中优于所有在线和离线方法，在YouTube-VIS 2019上达到49.5 AP（提升13.2 AP），在OVIS上达到30.2 AP（提升14.8 AP），并获得CVPR2022挑战赛冠军。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以简洁有效的方式证明了在线模型的潜力，为视频实例分割模型的研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Garrick Brazil,Abhinav Kumar,Julian Straub,Nikhila Ravi,Justin Johnson,Georgia Gkioxari
title: Omni3D: A Large Benchmark and Model for 3D Object Detection in the Wild
title_zh: Omni3D：野外 3D 物体检测的大型基准和模型
abstract: Recognizing scenes and objects in 3D from a single image is a longstanding goal of computer vision with applications in robotics and AR/VR. For 2D recognition, large datasets and scalable solutions have led to unprecedented advances. In 3D, existing benchmarks are small in size and approaches specialize in few object categories and specific domains, e.g. urban driving scenes. Motivated by the success of 2D recognition, we revisit the task of 3D object detection by introducing a large benchmark, called Omni3D. Omni3D re-purposes and combines existing datasets resulting in 234k images annotated with more than 3 million instances and 98 categories. 3D detection at such scale is challenging due to variations in camera intrinsics and the rich diversity of scene and object types. We propose a model, called Cube R-CNN, designed to generalize across camera and scene types with a unified approach. We show that Cube R-CNN outperforms prior works on the larger Omni3D and existing benchmarks. Finally, we prove that Omni3D is a powerful dataset for 3D object recognition and show that it improves single-dataset performance and can accelerate learning on new smaller datasets via pre-training.
summary: Recognizing scenes and objects in 3D from a single image is a longstanding goal of computer vision with applications in robotics and AR/VR. For 2D recognition, large datasets and scalable solutions have led to unprecedented advances. In 3D, existing benchmarks are small in size and approaches specialize in few object categories and specific domains, e.g. urban driving scenes. Motivated by the success of 2D recognition, we revisit the task of 3D object detection by introducing a large benchmark, called Omni3D. Omni3D re-purposes and combines existing datasets resulting in 234k images annotated with more than 3 million instances and 98 categories. 3D detection at such scale is challenging due to variations in camera intrinsics and the rich diversity of scene and object types. We propose a model, called Cube R-CNN, designed to generalize across camera and scene types with a unified approach. We show that Cube R-CNN outperforms prior works on the larger Omni3D and existing benchmarks. Finally, we prove that Omni3D is a powerful dataset for 3D object recognition and show that it improves single-dataset performance and can accelerate learning on new smaller datasets via pre-training.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像中识别 3D 场景和对象是计算机视觉在机器人和 AR/VR 中应用的长期目标。对于 2D 识别，大型数据集和可扩展的解决方案带来了前所未有的进步。在 3D 领域，现有基准规模较小，并且方法专门针对少数对象类别和特定领域，例如城市驾驶场景。受到 2D 识别成功的激励，我们通过引入一个名为 Omni3D 的大型基准来重新审视 3D 对象检测任务。 Omni3D 重新利用并组合现有数据集，生成 234k 幅图像，并标注了超过 300 万个实例和 98 个类别。由于相机内在的变化以及场景和物体类型的丰富多样性，如此规模的 3D 检测具有挑战性。我们提出了一种名为 Cube R-CNN 的模型，旨在通过统一的方法泛化摄像机和场景类型。我们证明 Cube R-CNN 在更大的 Omni3D 和现有基准上的性能优于之前的工作。最后，我们证明 Omni3D 是一个强大的 3D 对象识别数据集，并表明它提高了单数据集性能，并可以通过预训练加速对新的较小数据集的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Omni3D的大规模基准数据集和3D目标检测模型Cube R-CNN，用于在复杂真实场景中进行3D物体检测。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测基准数据集规模小且局限于特定领域，缺乏类似2D识别中大规模数据集的通用性，难以支持跨场景和相机类型的泛化检测。
AI.method: 通过整合现有数据集构建包含234k张图像、300万实例和98类物体的Omni3D基准，设计Cube R-CNN模型，采用统一架构应对相机参数差异和场景多样性挑战。
AI.result: Cube R-CNN在Omni3D及现有基准上均优于先前方法，证明了数据集的有效性，并通过预训练显著提升小数据集上的学习效率。
AI.conclusion: Omni3D为3D物体识别提供了强大基准，其多样化数据和Cube R-CNN模型可推动跨领域、跨场景的通用3D检测技术发展。

Finally, we prove that Omni3D is a powerful dataset for 3D object recognition and show that it improves single-dataset performance and can accelerate learning on new smaller datasets via pre-training. 从单个图像中识别 3D 场景和对象是计算机视觉在机器人和 AR/VR 中应用的长期目标。对于 2D 识别，大型数据集和可扩展的解决方案带来了前所未有的进步。在 3D 领域，现有基准规模较小，并且方法专门针对少数对象类别和特定领域，例如城市驾驶场景。受到 2D 识别成功的激励，我们通过引入一个名为 Omni3D 的大型基准来重新审视 3D 对象检测任务。 Omni3D 重新利用并组合现有数据集，生成 234k 幅图像，并标注了超过 300 万个实例和 98 个类别。由于相机内在的变化以及场景和物体类型的丰富多样性，如此规模的 3D 检测具有挑战性。我们提出了一种名为 Cube R-CNN 的模型，旨在通过统一的方法泛化摄像机和场景类型。我们证明 Cube R-CNN 在更大的 Omni3D 和现有基准上的性能优于之前的工作。最后，我们证明 Omni3D 是一个强大的 3D 对象识别数据集，并表明它提高了单数据集性能，并可以通过预训练加速对新的较小数据集的学习。 本文提出一个名为Omni3D的大规模基准数据集和3D目标检测模型Cube R-CNN，用于在复杂真实场景中进行3D物体检测。 Garrick Brazil,Abhinav Kumar,Julian Straub,Nikhila Ravi,Justin Johnson,Georgia Gkioxari cs.CV

authors_text: K J Joseph,Sujoy Paul,Gaurav Aggarwal,Soma Biswas,Piyush Rai,Kai Han,Vineeth N Balasubramanian
title: Novel Class Discovery without Forgetting
title_zh: 新颖的类别发现，不会忘记
abstract: Humans possess an innate ability to identify and differentiate instances that they are not familiar with, by leveraging and adapting the knowledge that they have acquired so far. Importantly, they achieve this without deteriorating the performance on their earlier learning. Inspired by this, we identify and formulate a new, pragmatic problem setting of NCDwF: Novel Class Discovery without Forgetting, which tasks a machine learning model to incrementally discover novel categories of instances from unlabeled data, while maintaining its performance on the previously seen categories. We propose 1) a method to generate pseudo-latent representations which act as a proxy for (no longer available) labeled data, thereby alleviating forgetting, 2) a mutual-information based regularizer which enhances unsupervised discovery of novel classes, and 3) a simple Known Class Identifier which aids generalized inference when the testing data contains instances form both seen and unseen categories. We introduce experimental protocols based on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-1000 to measure the trade-off between knowledge retention and novel class discovery. Our extensive evaluations reveal that existing models catastrophically forget previously seen categories while identifying novel categories, while our method is able to effectively balance between the competing objectives. We hope our work will attract further research into this newly identified pragmatic problem setting.
summary: Humans possess an innate ability to identify and differentiate instances that they are not familiar with, by leveraging and adapting the knowledge that they have acquired so far. Importantly, they achieve this without deteriorating the performance on their earlier learning. Inspired by this, we identify and formulate a new, pragmatic problem setting of NCDwF: Novel Class Discovery without Forgetting, which tasks a machine learning model to incrementally discover novel categories of instances from unlabeled data, while maintaining its performance on the previously seen categories. We propose 1) a method to generate pseudo-latent representations which act as a proxy for (no longer available) labeled data, thereby alleviating forgetting, 2) a mutual-information based regularizer which enhances unsupervised discovery of novel classes, and 3) a simple Known Class Identifier which aids generalized inference when the testing data contains instances form both seen and unseen categories. We introduce experimental protocols based on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-1000 to measure the trade-off between knowledge retention and novel class discovery. Our extensive evaluations reveal that existing models catastrophically forget previously seen categories while identifying novel categories, while our method is able to effectively balance between the competing objectives. We hope our work will attract further research into this newly identified pragmatic problem setting.
abstract_zh: 人类拥有一种天生的能力，可以通过利用和调整他们迄今为止所获得的知识来识别和区分他们不熟悉的实例。重要的是，他们实现这一目标的同时并没有降低早期学习的表现。受此启发，我们确定并制定了 NCDwF 的一个新的、务实的问题设置：Novel Class Discovery without Forgetting，它要求机器学习模型从未标记的数据中逐步发现新的实例类别，同时保持其在先前见过的类别上的性能。我们提出了 1）一种生成伪潜在表示的方法，该表示充当（不再可用）标记数据的代理，从而减轻遗忘，2）一种基于互信息的正则化器，可以增强新类的无监督发现，3）一种简单的已知类标识符，当测试数据包含来自可见和未见类别的实例时，它有助于广义推理。我们引入基于 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet-1000 的实验协议来衡量知识保留和新类发现之间的权衡。我们的广泛评估表明，现有模型在识别新类别时灾难性地忘记了以前见过的类别，而我们的方法能够有效地平衡相互竞争的目标。我们希望我们的工作能够吸引对这个新确定的务实问题设置的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的增量学习框架NCDwF，旨在从无标签数据中发现新类别，同时保持对已有类别的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 受人类学习能力启发，现有模型在发现新类别时容易遗忘已学知识，亟需解决增量学习中的知识保留与新类别发现的平衡问题。
AI.method: 提出伪潜在表示生成、基于互信息的正则化器以及已知类别标识符三重方法，通过代理标签缓解遗忘、增强无监督发现能力并实现混合数据推理。
AI.result: 在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，现有方法存在灾难性遗忘问题，而本文方法能有效平衡知识保留与新类别发现的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次定义NCDwF问题，提出有效解决方案，为增量学习领域提供了新的研究方向和实用框架。

authors_text: Bilal Abu-Salih,Mohammad Alhabashneh,Dengya Zhu,Albara Awajan,Yazan Alshamaileh,Bashar Al-Shboul,Mohammad Alshraideh
title: Emotion detection of social data: APIs comparative study
title_zh: 社交数据的情绪检测：API 比较研究
abstract: The development of emotion detection technology has emerged as a highly valuable possibility in the corporate sector due to the nearly limitless uses of this new discipline, particularly with the unceasing propagation of social data. In recent years, the electronic marketplace has witnessed the establishment of a large number of start-up businesses with an almost sole focus on building new commercial and open-source tools and APIs for emotion detection and recognition. Yet, these tools and APIs must be continuously reviewed and evaluated, and their performances should be reported and discussed. There is a lack of research to empirically compare current emotion detection technologies in terms of the results obtained from each model using the same textual dataset. Also, there is a lack of comparative studies that apply benchmark comparison to social data. This study compares eight technologies; IBM Watson NLU, ParallelDots, Symanto-Ekman, Crystalfeel, Text to Emotion, Senpy, Textprobe, and NLP Cloud. The comparison was undertaken using two different datasets. The emotions from the chosen datasets were then derived using the incorporated APIs. The performance of these APIs was assessed using the aggregated scores that they delivered as well as the theoretically proven evaluation metrics such as the micro-average of accuracy, classification error, precision, recall, and f1-score. Lastly, the assessment of these APIs incorporating the evaluation measures is reported and discussed.
summary: The development of emotion detection technology has emerged as a highly valuable possibility in the corporate sector due to the nearly limitless uses of this new discipline, particularly with the unceasing propagation of social data. In recent years, the electronic marketplace has witnessed the establishment of a large number of start-up businesses with an almost sole focus on building new commercial and open-source tools and APIs for emotion detection and recognition. Yet, these tools and APIs must be continuously reviewed and evaluated, and their performances should be reported and discussed. There is a lack of research to empirically compare current emotion detection technologies in terms of the results obtained from each model using the same textual dataset. Also, there is a lack of comparative studies that apply benchmark comparison to social data. This study compares eight technologies; IBM Watson NLU, ParallelDots, Symanto-Ekman, Crystalfeel, Text to Emotion, Senpy, Textprobe, and NLP Cloud. The comparison was undertaken using two different datasets. The emotions from the chosen datasets were then derived using the incorporated APIs. The performance of these APIs was assessed using the aggregated scores that they delivered as well as the theoretically proven evaluation metrics such as the micro-average of accuracy, classification error, precision, recall, and f1-score. Lastly, the assessment of these APIs incorporating the evaluation measures is reported and discussed.
abstract_zh: 由于这一新学科的用途几乎无限，特别是随着社交数据的不断传播，情绪检测技术的发展已成为企业领域极具价值的可能性。近年来，电子市场见证了大量初创企业的成立，这些企业几乎只专注于构建用于情绪检测和识别的新商业和开源工具以及 API。然而，必须不断审查和评估这些工具和 API，并报告和讨论它们的性能。缺乏研究来根据使用相同文本数据集的每个模型获得的结果来对当前情绪检测技术进行实证比较。此外，还缺乏将基准比较应用于社会数据的比较研究。这项研究比较了八种技术； IBM Watson NLU、ParallelDots、Symanto-Ekman、Crystalfeel、Text to Emotion、Senpy、Textprobe 和 NLP Cloud。使用两个不同的数据集进行比较。然后使用合并的 API 导出所选数据集的情绪。这些 API 的性能是使用它们提供的汇总分数以及理论上经过验证的评估指标（例如准确度、分类错误、精确度、召回率和 f1 分数的微平均值）进行评估的。最后，报告并讨论了结合评估措施对这些 API 的评估。

AI.tldr: 比较八种情感检测API在社交媒体数据上的性能
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对情感检测API的系统比较和基准测试，需评估其在相同数据集上的表现
AI.method: 采用两个数据集，利用各API的输出结果，结合微平均准确率、分类误差、精确率、召回率和F1分数等指标进行评估
AI.result: 各API在不同指标上表现存在差异，部分API在特定指标上表现更优
AI.conclusion: 不同API性能各异，选择时应考虑具体需求，未来需进一步研究

ai_content.result: 各API在不同指标上表现存在差异，部分API在特定指标上表现更优
ai_content.conclusion: 不同API性能各异，选择时应考虑具体需求，未来需进一步研究

authors_text: Patrik Joslin Kenfack,Kamil Sabbagh,Adín Ramírez Rivera,Adil Khan
title: RepFair-GAN: Mitigating Representation Bias in GANs Using Gradient Clipping
title_zh: RepFair-GAN：使用梯度裁剪减轻 GAN 中的表示偏差
abstract: Fairness has become an essential problem in many domains of Machine Learning (ML), such as classification, natural language processing, and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). In this research effort, we study the unfairness of GANs. We formally define a new fairness notion for generative models in terms of the distribution of generated samples sharing the same protected attributes (gender, race, etc.). The defined fairness notion (representational fairness) requires the distribution of the sensitive attributes at the test time to be uniform, and, in particular for GAN model, we show that this fairness notion is violated even when the dataset contains equally represented groups, i.e., the generator favors generating one group of samples over the others at the test time. In this work, we shed light on the source of this representation bias in GANs along with a straightforward method to overcome this problem. We first show on two widely used datasets (MNIST, SVHN) that when the norm of the gradient of one group is more important than the other during the discriminator's training, the generator favours sampling data from one group more than the other at test time. We then show that controlling the groups' gradient norm by performing group-wise gradient norm clipping in the discriminator during the training leads to a more fair data generation in terms of representational fairness compared to existing models while preserving the quality of generated samples.
summary: Fairness has become an essential problem in many domains of Machine Learning (ML), such as classification, natural language processing, and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). In this work, we shed light on the source of this representation bias in GANs along with a straightforward method to overcome this problem. We first show on two widely used datasets (MNIST, SVHN) that when the norm of the gradient of one group is more important than the other during the discriminator's training, the generator favours sampling data from one group more than the other at test time. We then show that controlling the groups' gradient norm by performing group-wise gradient norm clipping in the discriminator during the training leads to a more fair data generation in terms of representational fairness compared to existing models while preserving the quality of generated samples.
abstract_zh: 公平性已成为机器学习 (ML) 许多领域的一个基本问题，例如分类、自然语言处理和生成对抗网络 (GAN)。在这项研究中，我们研究了 GAN 的不公平性。我们根据共享相同受保护属性（性别、种族等）的生成样本的分布，正式为生成模型定义了一个新的公平概念。定义的公平概念（代表性公平）要求测试时敏感属性的分布是均匀的，特别是对于 GAN 模型，我们表明，即使数据集包含同等代表性的组，也违反了这种公平概念，即生成器在测试时倾向于生成一组样本而不是其他样本。在这项工作中，我们揭示了 GAN 中这种表示偏差的根源，以及克服这个问题的简单方法。我们首先在两个广泛使用的数据集（MNIST、SVHN）上证明，当判别器训练期间一组的梯度范数比另一组更重要时，生成器在测试时比另一组更倾向于采样一组数据。然后，我们表明，在训练期间通过在判别器中执行分组梯度范数裁剪来控制组的梯度范数，与现有模型相比，可以在表示公平性方面产生更公平的数据生成，同时保留生成样本的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RepFair-GAN，通过梯度裁剪缓解生成对抗网络（GAN）中的表示偏差问题。
AI.motivation: GAN在生成数据时可能因敏感属性（如性别、种族）分布不均而产生表示偏差，即使训练数据均衡，生成结果仍可能偏向某些群体，影响公平性。
AI.method: 定义表示公平性概念，分析判别器训练中不同群体梯度范数差异导致生成偏差的机制，并通过判别器训练时的分组梯度范数裁剪方法缓解该问题。
AI.result: 在MNIST和SVHN数据集上验证，该方法在保持生成样本质量的同时，显著提升了表示公平性，优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 梯度裁剪能有效缓解GAN的表示偏差问题，为生成公平数据提供可行方案。

search_text: RepFair-GAN: Mitigating Representation Bias in GANs Using Gradient Clipping RepFair-GAN：使用梯度裁剪减轻 GAN 中的表示偏差 Fairness has become an essential problem in many domains of Machine Learning (ML), such as classification, natural language processing, and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). In this research effort, we study the unfairness of GANs. We formally define a new fairness notion for generative models in terms of the distribution of generated samples sharing the same protected attributes (gender, race, etc.). The defined fairness notion (representational fairness) requires the distribution of the sensitive attributes at the test time to be uniform, and, in particular for GAN model, we show that this fairness notion is violated even when the dataset contains equally represented groups, i.e., the generator favors generating one group of samples over the others at the test time. In this work, we shed light on the source of this representation bias in GANs along with a straightforward method to overcome this problem. We first show on two widely used datasets (MNIST, SVHN) that when the norm of the gradient of one group is more important than the other during the discriminator's training, the generator favours sampling data from one group more than the other at test time. We then show that controlling the groups' gradient norm by performing group-wise gradient norm clipping in the discriminator during the training leads to a more fair data generation in terms of representational fairness compared to existing models while preserving the quality of generated samples. 公平性已成为机器学习 (ML) 许多领域的一个基本问题，例如分类、自然语言处理和生成对抗网络 (GAN)。在这项研究中，我们研究了 GAN 的不公平性。我们根据共享相同受保护属性（性别、种族等）的生成样本的分布，正式为生成模型定义了一个新的公平概念。定义的公平概念（代表性公平）要求测试时敏感属性的分布是均匀的，特别是对于 GAN 模型，我们表明，即使数据集包含同等代表性的组，也违反了这种公平概念，即生成器在测试时倾向于生成一组样本而不是其他样本。在这项工作中，我们揭示了 GAN 中这种表示偏差的根源，以及克服这个问题的简单方法。我们首先在两个广泛使用的数据集（MNIST、SVHN）上证明，当判别器训练期间一组的梯度范数比另一组更重要时，生成器在测试时比另一组更倾向于采样一组数据。然后，我们表明，在训练期间通过在判别器中执行分组梯度范数裁剪来控制组的梯度范数，与现有模型相比，可以在表示公平性方面产生更公平的数据生成，同时保留生成样本的质量。 本文提出RepFair-GAN，通过梯度裁剪缓解生成对抗网络（GAN）中的表示偏差问题。 Patrik Joslin Kenfack,Kamil Sabbagh,Adín Ramírez Rivera,Adil Khan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Michael Desmond,Evelyn Duesterwald,Vatche Isahagian,Vinod Muthusamy
title: A No-Code Low-Code Paradigm for Authoring Business Automations Using Natural Language
title_zh: 使用自然语言编写业务自动化的无代码低代码范式
abstract: Most business process automation is still developed using traditional automation technologies such as workflow engines. These systems provide domain specific languages that require both business knowledge and programming skills to effectively use. As such, business users often lack adequate programming skills to fully leverage these code oriented environments. We propose a paradigm for the construction of business automations using natural language. The approach applies a large language model to translate business rules and automations described in natural language, into a domain specific language interpretable by a business rule engine. We compare the performance of various language model configurations, across various target domains, and explore the use of constrained decoding to ensure syntactically correct generation of output.
summary: Most business process automation is still developed using traditional automation technologies such as workflow engines. These systems provide domain specific languages that require both business knowledge and programming skills to effectively use. As such, business users often lack adequate programming skills to fully leverage these code oriented environments. We propose a paradigm for the construction of business automations using natural language. The approach applies a large language model to translate business rules and automations described in natural language, into a domain specific language interpretable by a business rule engine. We compare the performance of various language model configurations, across various target domains, and explore the use of constrained decoding to ensure syntactically correct generation of output.
abstract_zh: 大多数业务流程自动化仍然是使用工作流引擎等传统自动化技术开发的。这些系统提供了需要业务知识和编程技能才能有效使用的领域特定语言。因此，业务用户通常缺乏足够的编程技能来充分利用这些面向代码的环境。我们提出了使用自然语言构建业务自动化的范例。该方法应用大型语言模型来将以自然语言描述的业务规则和自动化转换为可由业务规则引擎解释的领域特定语言。我们比较了不同目标域中各种语言模型配置的性能，并探索使用约束解码来确保语法上正确的输出生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言的无代码/低代码范式，用于构建业务自动化系统。
AI.motivation: 传统业务流程自动化工具依赖需要编程技能的领域特定语言，导致业务用户难以充分利用这些系统。
AI.method: 利用大语言模型将自然语言描述的业务规则转换为可被规则引擎解析的领域特定语言，并通过约束解码确保输出语法正确性。
AI.result: 评估了不同语言模型配置在多领域场景下的性能，验证了约束解码对生成质量的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自然语言接口降低了业务自动化开发门槛，为非技术人员提供了可行的自动化构建方案。

authors_text: Jiahao Chen,Zitao Liu,Weiqi Luo
title: Wide & Deep Learning for Judging Student Performance in Online One-on-one Math Classes
title_zh: 用于判断学生在线一对一数学课程表现的广泛和深度学习
comment: Accepted at AIED'22: The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education, 2022
comments: Accepted at AIED'22: The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education, 2022
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the opportunities of automating the judgment process in online one-on-one math classes. We build a Wide & Deep framework to learn fine-grained predictive representations from a limited amount of noisy classroom conversation data that perform better student judgments. We conducted experiments on the task of predicting students' levels of mastery of example questions and the results demonstrate the superiority and availability of our model in terms of various evaluation metrics.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the opportunities of automating the judgment process in online one-on-one math classes. We build a Wide & Deep framework to learn fine-grained predictive representations from a limited amount of noisy classroom conversation data that perform better student judgments. We conducted experiments on the task of predicting students' levels of mastery of example questions and the results demonstrate the superiority and availability of our model in terms of various evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了在线一对一数学课程中自动化判断过程的机会。我们构建了一个 Wide & Deep 框架，从有限数量的嘈杂课堂对话数据中学习细粒度的预测表示，从而更好地进行学生判断。我们对预测学生对示例问题的掌握水平进行了实验，结果证明了我们的模型在各种评估指标方面的优越性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wide & Deep框架的模型，用于自动化评估在线一对一数学课堂中学生的表现。
AI.motivation: 人工判断学生表现耗时且主观，而现有课堂对话数据量有限且存在噪声，需更高效的自动化方法。
AI.method: 构建结合宽模型与深度神经网络的Wide & Deep框架，从有限的嘈杂对话数据中学习细粒度预测表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在预测学生掌握例题水平的任务中优于其他方法，多种评估指标表现突出。
AI.conclusion: Wide & Deep模型能有效处理噪声数据，为在线教育中的学生表现评估提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Xin-Cheng Wen,Jia-Xin Ye,Yan Luo,Yong Xu,Xuan-Ze Wang,Chang-Li Wu,Kun-Hong Liu
title: CTL-MTNet: A Novel CapsNet and Transfer Learning-Based Mixed Task Net for the Single-Corpus and Cross-Corpus Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: CTL-MTNet：一种新颖的基于 CapsNet 和迁移学习的混合任务网络，用于单语料库和跨语料库语音情感识别
comment: this paper has been accepted by IJCAI 2022. Please cite it by: Xin-Cheng Wen#, JiaXin Ye#, Yan Luo, Yong Xu, Xuan-Ze WANG, Chang-Li Wu, Kun-Hong Liu*, CTL-MTNet: A Novel CapsNet and Transfer Learning-Based Mixed Task Net for the Single-Corpus and Cross-Corpus Speech Emotion Recognition, IJCAI 2022
comments: this paper has been accepted by IJCAI 2022. Please cite it by: Xin-Cheng Wen#, JiaXin Ye#, Yan Luo, Yong Xu, Xuan-Ze WANG, Chang-Li Wu, Kun-Hong Liu*, CTL-MTNet: A Novel CapsNet and Transfer Learning-Based Mixed Task Net for the Single-Corpus and Cross-Corpus Speech Emotion Recognition, IJCAI 2022
abstract: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) has become a growing focus of research in human-computer interaction. An essential challenge in SER is to extract common attributes from different speakers or languages, especially when a specific source corpus has to be trained to recognize the unknown data coming from another speech corpus. To address this challenge, a Capsule Network (CapsNet) and Transfer Learning based Mixed Task Net (CTLMTNet) are proposed to deal with both the singlecorpus and cross-corpus SER tasks simultaneously in this paper. For the single-corpus task, the combination of Convolution-Pooling and Attention CapsNet module CPAC) is designed by embedding the self-attention mechanism to the CapsNet, guiding the module to focus on the important features that can be fed into different capsules. The extracted high-level features by CPAC provide sufficient discriminative ability. Furthermore, to handle the cross-corpus task, CTL-MTNet employs a Corpus Adaptation Adversarial Module (CAAM) by combining CPAC with Margin Disparity Discrepancy (MDD), which can learn the domain-invariant emotion representations through extracting the strong emotion commonness. Experiments including ablation studies and visualizations on both singleand cross-corpus tasks using four well-known SER datasets in different languages are conducted for performance evaluation and comparison. The results indicate that in both tasks the CTL-MTNet showed better performance in all cases compared to a number of state-of-the-art methods. The source code and the supplementary materials are available at: https://github.com/MLDMXM2017/CTLMTNet
summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) has become a growing focus of research in human-computer interaction. An essential challenge in SER is to extract common attributes from different speakers or languages, especially when a specific source corpus has to be trained to recognize the unknown data coming from another speech corpus. To address this challenge, a Capsule Network (CapsNet) and Transfer Learning based Mixed Task Net (CTLMTNet) are proposed to deal with both the singlecorpus and cross-corpus SER tasks simultaneously in this paper. For the single-corpus task, the combination of Convolution-Pooling and Attention CapsNet module CPAC) is designed by embedding the self-attention mechanism to the CapsNet, guiding the module to focus on the important features that can be fed into different capsules. The extracted high-level features by CPAC provide sufficient discriminative ability. Furthermore, to handle the cross-corpus task, CTL-MTNet employs a Corpus Adaptation Adversarial Module (CAAM) by combining CPAC with Margin Disparity Discrepancy (MDD), which can learn the domain-invariant emotion representations through extracting the strong emotion commonness. Experiments including ablation studies and visualizations on both singleand cross-corpus tasks using four well-known SER datasets in different languages are conducted for performance evaluation and comparison. The results indicate that in both tasks the CTL-MTNet showed better performance in all cases compared to a number of state-of-the-art methods. The source code and the supplementary materials are available at: https://github.com/MLDMXM2017/CTLMTNet
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）已成为人机交互领域日益增长的研究焦点。 SER 的一个重要挑战是从不同的说话者或语言中提取共同属性，特别是当必须训练特定源语料库以识别来自另一个语音语料库的未知数据时。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了胶囊网络（CapsNet）和基于迁移学习的混合任务网络（CTLMTNet）来同时处理单语料库和跨语料库SER任务。对于单语料库任务，Convolution-Pooling 和 Attention CapsNet 模块（CPAC）的结合是通过将自注意力机制嵌入到 CapsNet 中来设计的，引导模块专注于可以输入到不同 CapsNet 中的重要特征。 CPAC提取的高级特征提供了足够的判别能力。此外，为了处理跨语料库任务，CTL-MTNet 通过将 CPAC 与边缘差异差异（MDD）相结合，采用语料库适应对抗模块（CAAM），可以通过提取强情感共性来学习领域不变的情感表示。使用四个不同语言的著名 SER 数据集进行了实验，包括对单语料库和跨语料库任务的消融研究和可视化，以进行性能评估和比较。结果表明，在这两项任务中，与许多最先进的方法相比，CTL-MTNet 在所有情况下都表现出了更好的性能。源代码和补充材料可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/MLDMXM2017/CTLMTNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出CTL-MTNet，结合胶囊网络与迁移学习，同时解决单语料库和跨语料库的语音情感识别任务。
AI.motivation: 语音情感识别面临从不同说话人或语言中提取共性特征的挑战，尤其当训练数据与测试数据来自不同语料库时性能下降明显。
AI.method: 设计CPAC模块（含自注意力机制的卷积-池化胶囊网络）提取单语料库任务的高层特征，并通过CAAM模块（结合MDD的领域对抗模块）实现跨语料库任务的域不变情感表征学习。
AI.result: 在四个多语言数据集上的实验表明，CTL-MTNet在单语料库和跨语料库任务中均优于现有先进方法，且通过消融实验和可视化验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTL-MTNet通过融合胶囊网络与迁移学习机制，有效解决了单/跨语料库语音情感识别问题，代码开源便于复现与应用。

search_text: CTL-MTNet: A Novel CapsNet and Transfer Learning-Based Mixed Task Net for the Single-Corpus and Cross-Corpus Speech Emotion Recognition CTL-MTNet：一种新颖的基于 CapsNet 和迁移学习的混合任务网络，用于单语料库和跨语料库语音情感识别 Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) has become a growing focus of research in human-computer interaction. An essential challenge in SER is to extract common attributes from different speakers or languages, especially when a specific source corpus has to be trained to recognize the unknown data coming from another speech corpus. For the single-corpus task, the combination of Convolution-Pooling and Attention CapsNet module CPAC) is designed by embedding the self-attention mechanism to the CapsNet, guiding the module to focus on the important features that can be fed into different capsules. The extracted high-level features by CPAC provide sufficient discriminative ability. Furthermore, to handle the cross-corpus task, CTL-MTNet employs a Corpus Adaptation Adversarial Module (CAAM) by combining CPAC with Margin Disparity Discrepancy (MDD), which can learn the domain-invariant emotion representations through extracting the strong emotion commonness. Experiments including ablation studies and visualizations on both singleand cross-corpus tasks using four well-known SER datasets in different languages are conducted for performance evaluation and comparison. The results indicate that in both tasks the CTL-MTNet showed better performance in all cases compared to a number of state-of-the-art methods. authors_text: Paden Tomasello,Akshat Shrivastava,Daniel Lazar,Po-Chun Hsu,Duc Le,Adithya Sagar,Ali Elkahky,Jade Copet,Wei-Ning Hsu,Yossi Adi,Robin Algayres,Tu Ahn Nguyen,Emmanuel Dupoux,Luke Zettlemoyer,Abdelrahman Mohamed
title: STOP: A dataset for Spoken Task Oriented Semantic Parsing
title_zh: STOP：面向口语任务的语义解析数据集
abstract: End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) predicts intent directly from audio using a single model. It promises to improve the performance of assistant systems by leveraging acoustic information lost in the intermediate textual representation and preventing cascading errors from Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). Further, having one unified model has efficiency advantages when deploying assistant systems on-device. However, the limited number of public audio datasets with semantic parse labels hinders the research progress in this area. In this paper, we release the Spoken Task-Oriented semantic Parsing (STOP) dataset, the largest and most complex SLU dataset to be publicly available. Additionally, we define low-resource splits to establish a benchmark for improving SLU when limited labeled data is available. Furthermore, in addition to the human-recorded audio, we are releasing a TTS-generated version to benchmark the performance for low-resource domain adaptation of end-to-end SLU systems. Initial experimentation show end-to-end SLU models performing slightly worse than their cascaded counterparts, which we hope encourages future work in this direction.
summary: End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) predicts intent directly from audio using a single model. It promises to improve the performance of assistant systems by leveraging acoustic information lost in the intermediate textual representation and preventing cascading errors from Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). Further, having one unified model has efficiency advantages when deploying assistant systems on-device. However, the limited number of public audio datasets with semantic parse labels hinders the research progress in this area. In this paper, we release the Spoken Task-Oriented semantic Parsing (STOP) dataset, the largest and most complex SLU dataset to be publicly available. Additionally, we define low-resource splits to establish a benchmark for improving SLU when limited labeled data is available. Furthermore, in addition to the human-recorded audio, we are releasing a TTS-generated version to benchmark the performance for low-resource domain adaptation of end-to-end SLU systems. Initial experimentation show end-to-end SLU models performing slightly worse than their cascaded counterparts, which we hope encourages future work in this direction.
abstract_zh: 端到端口语理解 (SLU) 使用单个模型直接从音频预测意图。它有望通过利用中间文本表示中丢失的声学信息并防止自动语音识别（ASR）中的级联错误来提高辅助系统的性能。此外，在设备上部署辅助系统时，拥有一个统一的模型具有效率优势。然而，带有语义解析标签的公共音频数据集数量有限，阻碍了该领域的研究进展。在本文中，我们发布了面向口语任务的语义解析 (STOP) 数据集，这是公开可用的最大、最复杂的 SLU 数据集。此外，我们还定义了低资源分割，以建立在可用有限标记数据时改进 SLU 的基准。此外，除了人工录制的音频之外，我们还发布了 TTS 生成的版本，以对端到端 SLU 系统的低资源域适应的性能进行基准测试。初步实验表明，端到端 SLU 模型的性能比级联模型稍差，我们希望这能鼓励未来在这个方向上的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文发布了一个名为STOP的语音任务导向语义解析数据集，用于推动端到端语音语言理解（SLU）的研究。
AI.motivation: 端到端SLU模型能利用声学信息提升助手系统性能，但缺乏带语义标签的公开语音数据集阻碍了该领域研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含人类录音和TTS生成语音的STOP数据集，并定义低资源分割基准，评估有限标注数据下的SLU性能。
AI.result: 初步实验显示端到端SLU模型表现略逊于级联系统，凸显该方向研究的必要性。
AI.conclusion: STOP数据集为低资源场景下的端到端SLU提供了基准，呼吁进一步优化模型性能。

authors_text: Xiaoming Zhao,Fangchang Ma,David Güera,Zhile Ren,Alexander G. Schwing,Alex Colburn
title: Generative Multiplane Images: Making a 2D GAN 3D-Aware
title_zh: 生成多平面图像：制作 2D GAN 3D 感知
abstract: What is really needed to make an existing 2D GAN 3D-aware? To answer this question, we modify a classical GAN, i.e., StyleGANv2, as little as possible. We find that only two modifications are absolutely necessary: 1) a multiplane image style generator branch which produces a set of alpha maps conditioned on their depth; 2) a pose-conditioned discriminator. We refer to the generated output as a 'generative multiplane image' (GMPI) and emphasize that its renderings are not only high-quality but also guaranteed to be view-consistent, which makes GMPIs different from many prior works. Importantly, the number of alpha maps can be dynamically adjusted and can differ between training and inference, alleviating memory concerns and enabling fast training of GMPIs in less than half a day at a resolution of $1024^2$. Our findings are consistent across three challenging and common high-resolution datasets, including FFHQ, AFHQv2, and MetFaces.
summary: What is really needed to make an existing 2D GAN 3D-aware? To answer this question, we modify a classical GAN, i.e., StyleGANv2, as little as possible. We find that only two modifications are absolutely necessary: 1) a multiplane image style generator branch which produces a set of alpha maps conditioned on their depth; 2) a pose-conditioned discriminator. We refer to the generated output as a 'generative multiplane image' (GMPI) and emphasize that its renderings are not only high-quality but also guaranteed to be view-consistent, which makes GMPIs different from many prior works. Importantly, the number of alpha maps can be dynamically adjusted and can differ between training and inference, alleviating memory concerns and enabling fast training of GMPIs in less than half a day at a resolution of $1024^2$. Our findings are consistent across three challenging and common high-resolution datasets, including FFHQ, AFHQv2, and MetFaces.
abstract_zh: 要让现有的 2D GAN 具有 3D 感知能力，真正需要什么？为了回答这个问题，我们尽可能少地修改经典 GAN，即 StyleGANv2。我们发现只有两个修改是绝对必要的：1）多平面图像样式生成器分支，它生成一组以其深度为条件的 alpha 贴图； 2）姿势条件鉴别器。我们将生成的输出称为“生成多平面图像”（GMPI），并强调其渲染不仅是高质量的，而且还保证视图一致，这使得 GMPI 与许多先前的作品不同。重要的是，alpha 图的数量可以动态调整，并且训练和推理之间可以有所不同，从而减轻内存问题，并能够在不到半天的时间内以 1024^2 美元的分辨率快速训练 GMPI。我们的研究结果在三个具有挑战性和常见的高分辨率数据集（包括 FFHQ、AFHQv2 和 MetFaces）中是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过最小化修改使2D GAN具备3D感知能力，生成视图一致的高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 现有2D GAN生成的图像缺乏3D感知能力，难以保证多视角一致性，且高分辨率训练效率低。
AI.method: 在StyleGANv2基础上引入多平面图像风格生成器（基于深度生成alpha图）和姿态感知判别器，动态调整alpha图数量以优化内存与训练速度。
AI.result: 在FFHQ、AFHQv2和MetFaces数据集上实现高质量视图一致渲染，1024²分辨率下训练时间缩短至半天以内。
AI.conclusion: 通过两项关键修改，该方法有效赋予2D GAN 3D感知能力，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升训练效率。

search_text: Generative Multiplane Images: Making a 2D GAN 3D-Aware 生成多平面图像：制作 2D GAN 3D 感知 What is really needed to make an existing 2D GAN 3D-aware? To answer this question, we modify a classical GAN, i.e., StyleGANv2, as little as possible. We find that only two modifications are absolutely necessary: 1) a multiplane image style generator branch which produces a set of alpha maps conditioned on their depth; 2) a pose-conditioned discriminator. We refer to the generated output as a 'generative multiplane image' (GMPI) and emphasize that its renderings are not only high-quality but also guaranteed to be view-consistent, which makes GMPIs different from many prior works. Importantly, the number of alpha maps can be dynamically adjusted and can differ between training and inference, alleviating memory concerns and enabling fast training of GMPIs in less than half a day at a resolution of $1024^2$. Our findings are consistent across three challenging and common high-resolution datasets, including FFHQ, AFHQv2, and MetFaces. 要让现有的 2D GAN 具有 3D 感知能力，真正需要什么？为了回答这个问题，我们尽可能少地修改经典 GAN，即 StyleGANv2。我们发现只有两个修改是绝对必要的：1）多平面图像样式生成器分支，它生成一组以其深度为条件的 alpha 贴图； 2）姿势条件鉴别器。我们将生成的输出称为“生成多平面图像”（GMPI），并强调其渲染不仅是高质量的，而且还保证视图一致，这使得 GMPI 与许多先前的作品不同。重要的是，alpha 图的数量可以动态调整，并且训练和推理之间可以有所不同，从而减轻内存问题，并能够在不到半天的时间内以 1024^2 美元的分辨率快速训练 GMPI。我们的研究结果在三个具有挑战性和常见的高分辨率数据集（包括 FFHQ、AFHQv2 和 MetFaces）中是一致的。 本文提出通过最小化修改使2D GAN具备3D感知能力，生成视图一致的高质量图像。 Xiaoming Zhao,Fangchang Ma,David Güera,Zhile Ren,Alexander G. Schwing,Alex Colburn cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yang Liu,Aradhana Nayak,Aude Billard
title: A Solution to Adaptive Mobile Manipulator Throwing
title_zh: 自适应移动机械手投掷解决方案
comment: Accepted at IROS 2022. Code is available at: https://github.com/epfl-lasa/mobile-throwing
comments: Accepted at IROS 2022. Code is available at: https://github.com/epfl-lasa/mobile-throwing
abstract: Mobile manipulator throwing is a promising method to increase the flexibility and efficiency of dynamic manipulation in factories. Its major challenge is to efficiently plan a feasible throw under a wide set of task specifications. We show that the mobile manipulator throwing problem can be simplified to a planar problem, hence greatly reducing the computational costs. Using machine learning approaches, we build a model of the object's inverted flying dynamics and the robot's kinematic feasibility, which enables throwing motion generation within 1 ms for given query of target position. Thanks to the computational efficiency of our method, we show that the system is adaptive under disturbance, via replanning on the fly for alternative solutions, instead of sticking to the original throwing plan.
summary: Mobile manipulator throwing is a promising method to increase the flexibility and efficiency of dynamic manipulation in factories. Its major challenge is to efficiently plan a feasible throw under a wide set of task specifications. We show that the mobile manipulator throwing problem can be simplified to a planar problem, hence greatly reducing the computational costs. Using machine learning approaches, we build a model of the object's inverted flying dynamics and the robot's kinematic feasibility, which enables throwing motion generation within 1 ms for given query of target position. Thanks to the computational efficiency of our method, we show that the system is adaptive under disturbance, via replanning on the fly for alternative solutions, instead of sticking to the original throwing plan.
abstract_zh: 移动机械手投掷是提高工厂动态操纵灵活性和效率的一种有前途的方法。它的主要挑战是在广泛的任务规范下有效地规划可行的投掷。我们表明，移动机械臂投掷问题可以简化为平面问题，从而大大降低了计算成本。使用机器学习方法，我们建立了物体倒飞动力学和机器人运动学可行性的模型，这使得对于给定的目标位置查询能够在 1 毫秒内生成投掷运动。由于我们方法的计算效率，我们表明系统在干扰下是自适应的，通过动态重新规划替代解决方案，而不是坚持原始的投掷计划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的自适应移动机械臂投掷方法，通过简化问题并结合机器学习实现快速运动规划。
AI.motivation: 移动机械臂投掷能提升工厂动态操作的灵活性和效率，但现有方法在复杂任务规格下计算成本高且缺乏适应性。
AI.method: 将三维投掷问题简化为二维平面问题，并利用机器学习建模物体逆向飞行动力学与机械臂运动学可行性，实现1毫秒内的实时规划。
AI.result: 系统在1毫秒内生成投掷动作，通过动态重规划适应干扰，验证了方法的计算效率和自适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过问题简化与机器学习结合，为动态环境下的移动机械臂投掷提供了高效且适应性强的解决方案。

authors_text: William F. Basener,Alexey Castrodad,David Messinger,Jennifer Mahle,Paul Prue
title: A Dynamical Systems Algorithm for Clustering in Hyperspectral Imagery
title_zh: 高光谱图像聚类的动态系统算法
abstract: In this paper we present a new dynamical systems algorithm for clustering in hyperspectral images. The main idea of the algorithm is that data points are pushed\' in the direction of increasing density and groups of pixels that end up in the same dense regions belong to the same class. This is essentially a numerical solution of the differential equation defined by the gradient of the density of data points on the data manifold. The number of classes is automated and the resulting clustering can be extremely accurate. In addition to providing a accurate clustering, this algorithm presents a new tool for understanding hyperspectral data in high dimensions. We evaluate the algorithm on the Urban (Available at www.tec.ary.mil/Hypercube/) scene comparing performance against the k-means algorithm using pre-identified classes of materials as ground truth.
summary: In this paper we present a new dynamical systems algorithm for clustering in hyperspectral images. The main idea of the algorithm is that data points are pushed\' in the direction of increasing density and groups of pixels that end up in the same dense regions belong to the same class. This is essentially a numerical solution of the differential equation defined by the gradient of the density of data points on the data manifold. The number of classes is automated and the resulting clustering can be extremely accurate. In addition to providing a accurate clustering, this algorithm presents a new tool for understanding hyperspectral data in high dimensions. We evaluate the algorithm on the Urban (Available at www.tec.ary.mil/Hypercube/) scene comparing performance against the k-means algorithm using pre-identified classes of materials as ground truth.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高光谱图像聚类的新动力系统算法。该算法的主要思想是数据点被推向密度增加的方向，并且最终位于相同密集区域的像素组属于同一类。这本质上是由数据流形上数据点密度梯度定义的微分方程的数值解。类的数量是自动的，并且所得的聚类可以非常准确。除了提供准确的聚类之外，该算法还提供了一种用于理解高维高光谱数据的新工具。我们在城市（可在 www.tec.ary.mil/Hypercube/ 上获取）场景上评估算法，将性能与使用预先识别的材料类别作为基本事实的 k 均值算法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动力系统的高光谱图像聚类算法，通过数据点密度梯度方向推动像素分组，实现自动化分类。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法如k-means在高维高光谱数据中存在分类数量固定、精度不足的问题，需开发更适应高维数据特征的聚类工具。
AI.method: 将数据点沿密度梯度方向动态推移，通过求解数据流形上的密度梯度微分方程实现像素分组，自动确定类别数量。
AI.result: 在Urban数据集测试中，该算法相比k-means方法在预定义材料类别下的聚类准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维高光谱数据分析提供了新工具，实现了自动化且高精度的像素分类，具有重要的应用价值。

authors_text: Yang Chen,Shanshan Zhao,Wei Ji,Mingming Gong,Liping Xie
title: MetaComp: Learning to Adapt for Online Depth Completion
title_zh: MetaComp：学习适应在线深度完成
abstract: Relying on deep supervised or self-supervised learning, previous methods for depth completion from paired single image and sparse depth data have achieved impressive performance in recent years. However, facing a new environment where the test data occurs online and differs from the training data in the RGB image content and depth sparsity, the trained model might suffer severe performance drop. To encourage the trained model to work well in such conditions, we expect it to be capable of adapting to the new environment continuously and effectively. To achieve this, we propose MetaComp. It utilizes the meta-learning technique to simulate adaptation policies during the training phase, and then adapts the model to new environments in a self-supervised manner in testing. Considering that the input is multi-modal data, it would be challenging to adapt a model to variations in two modalities simultaneously, due to significant differences in structure and form of the two modal data. Therefore, we further propose to disentangle the adaptation procedure in the basic meta-learning training into two steps, the first one focusing on the depth sparsity while the second attending to the image content. During testing, we take the same strategy to adapt the model online to new multi-modal data. Experimental results and comprehensive ablations show that our MetaComp is capable of adapting to the depth completion in a new environment effectively and robust to changes in different modalities.
summary: Relying on deep supervised or self-supervised learning, previous methods for depth completion from paired single image and sparse depth data have achieved impressive performance in recent years. However, facing a new environment where the test data occurs online and differs from the training data in the RGB image content and depth sparsity, the trained model might suffer severe performance drop. To encourage the trained model to work well in such conditions, we expect it to be capable of adapting to the new environment continuously and effectively. To achieve this, we propose MetaComp. It utilizes the meta-learning technique to simulate adaptation policies during the training phase, and then adapts the model to new environments in a self-supervised manner in testing. Considering that the input is multi-modal data, it would be challenging to adapt a model to variations in two modalities simultaneously, due to significant differences in structure and form of the two modal data. Therefore, we further propose to disentangle the adaptation procedure in the basic meta-learning training into two steps, the first one focusing on the depth sparsity while the second attending to the image content. During testing, we take the same strategy to adapt the model online to new multi-modal data. Experimental results and comprehensive ablations show that our MetaComp is capable of adapting to the depth completion in a new environment effectively and robust to changes in different modalities.
abstract_zh: 依靠深度​​监督或自监督学习，以前的配对单图像和稀疏深度数据的深度补全方法近年来取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，面对新的环境，测试数据在线出现，并且与训练数据在RGB图像内容和深度稀疏性方面存在差异，训练后的模型可能会出现严重的性能下降。为了鼓励训练后的模型在这种条件下良好工作，我们期望它能够持续有效地适应新环境。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 MetaComp。它利用元学习技术在训练阶段模拟适应策略，然后在测试中以自我监督的方式使模型适应新环境。考虑到输入是多模态数据，由于两种模态数据的结构和形式存在显着差异，因此使模型同时适应两种模态的变化将具有挑战性。因此，我们进一步建议将基本元学习训练中的适应过程分为两个步骤，第一个步骤关注深度稀疏性，第二个步骤关注图像内容。在测试过程中，我们采取相同的策略使模型在线适应新的多模态数据。实验结果和综合消融表明，我们的 MetaComp 能够有效地适应新环境中的深度完成，并对不同模式的变化具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaComp方法，解决在线深度补全任务中因测试环境与训练数据差异导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度补全方法在测试数据出现在线且与训练数据存在RGB内容和深度稀疏性差异时，模型性能显著下降，需具备持续有效适应新环境的能力。
AI.method: 基于元学习技术，训练阶段模拟适应策略；测试阶段通过自监督方式分两步适应多模态数据：先处理深度稀疏性，再处理图像内容变化。
AI.result: 实验与消融分析表明，MetaComp能有效适应新环境，对多模态变化具有鲁棒性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaComp通过分阶段适应策略，成功解决了在线深度补全中多模态数据变化带来的挑战，验证了方法的有效性和适应性。

authors_text: Paul Upchurch,Ransen Niu
title: A Dense Material Segmentation Dataset for Indoor and Outdoor Scene Parsing
title_zh: 用于室内和室外场景解析的密集材质分割数据集
abstract: A key algorithm for understanding the world is material segmentation, which assigns a label (metal, glass, etc.) to each pixel. We find that a model trained on existing data underperforms in some settings and propose to address this with a large-scale dataset of 3.2 million dense segments on 44,560 indoor and outdoor images, which is 23x more segments than existing data. Our data covers a more diverse set of scenes, objects, viewpoints and materials, and contains a more fair distribution of skin types. We show that a model trained on our data outperforms a state-of-the-art model across datasets and viewpoints. We propose a large-scale scene parsing benchmark and baseline of 0.729 per-pixel accuracy, 0.585 mean class accuracy and 0.420 mean IoU across 46 materials.
summary: A key algorithm for understanding the world is material segmentation, which assigns a label (metal, glass, etc.) to each pixel. We find that a model trained on existing data underperforms in some settings and propose to address this with a large-scale dataset of 3.2 million dense segments on 44,560 indoor and outdoor images, which is 23x more segments than existing data. Our data covers a more diverse set of scenes, objects, viewpoints and materials, and contains a more fair distribution of skin types. We show that a model trained on our data outperforms a state-of-the-art model across datasets and viewpoints. We propose a large-scale scene parsing benchmark and baseline of 0.729 per-pixel accuracy, 0.585 mean class accuracy and 0.420 mean IoU across 46 materials.
abstract_zh: 理解世界的一个关键算法是材质分割，它为每个像素分配一个标签（金属、玻璃等）。我们发现，在现有数据上训练的模型在某些情况下表现不佳，并建议通过 44,560 张室内和室外图像上的 320 万个密集片段的大型数据集来解决这个问题，该数据集比现有数据多 23 倍。我们的数据涵盖了更多样化的场景、物体、视点和材质，并且包含更公平的皮肤类型分布。我们证明，在我们的数据上训练的模型在数据集和观点上优于最先进的模型。我们提出了跨 46 种材料的大规模场景解析基准和基线，每像素精度为 0.729，平均类精度为 0.585，平均 IoU 为 0.420。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于室内外场景解析的密集材料分割数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在某些场景下表现不佳，因此需要一个更大规模、更多样化的数据集来提升材料分割的效果。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含320万个密集分割的44,560张室内外图像的数据集，并提出了一个大规模场景解析基准和基线。
AI.result: 基于该数据集训练的模型在多个数据集和视角上优于现有最先进的模型，基线达到了0.729的像素准确率、0.585的平均类别准确率和0.420的平均IoU。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基准为材料分割任务提供了更全面和公平的评估平台，有助于推动相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Xiaoling Hu,Xiao Chen,Yikang Liu,Eric Z. Chen,Terrence Chen,Shanhui Sun
title: Deep Statistic Shape Model for Myocardium Segmentation
title_zh: 用于心肌分割的深度统计形状模型
abstract: Accurate segmentation and motion estimation of myocardium have always been important in clinic field, which essentially contribute to the downstream diagnosis. However, existing methods cannot always guarantee the shape integrity for myocardium segmentation. In addition, motion estimation requires point correspondence on the myocardium region across different frames. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end deep statistic shape model to focus on myocardium segmentation with both shape integrity and boundary correspondence preserving. Specifically, myocardium shapes are represented by a fixed number of points, whose variations are extracted by Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Deep neural network is used to predict the transformation parameters (both affine and deformation), which are then used to warp the mean point cloud to the image domain. Furthermore, a differentiable rendering layer is introduced to incorporate mask supervision into the framework to learn more accurate point clouds. In this way, the proposed method is able to consistently produce anatomically reasonable segmentation mask without post processing. Additionally, the predicted point cloud guarantees boundary correspondence for sequential images, which contributes to the downstream tasks, such as the motion estimation of myocardium. We conduct several experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on several benchmark datasets.
summary: Accurate segmentation and motion estimation of myocardium have always been important in clinic field, which essentially contribute to the downstream diagnosis. However, existing methods cannot always guarantee the shape integrity for myocardium segmentation. In addition, motion estimation requires point correspondence on the myocardium region across different frames. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end deep statistic shape model to focus on myocardium segmentation with both shape integrity and boundary correspondence preserving. Specifically, myocardium shapes are represented by a fixed number of points, whose variations are extracted by Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Deep neural network is used to predict the transformation parameters (both affine and deformation), which are then used to warp the mean point cloud to the image domain. Furthermore, a differentiable rendering layer is introduced to incorporate mask supervision into the framework to learn more accurate point clouds. In this way, the proposed method is able to consistently produce anatomically reasonable segmentation mask without post processing. Additionally, the predicted point cloud guarantees boundary correspondence for sequential images, which contributes to the downstream tasks, such as the motion estimation of myocardium. We conduct several experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on several benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 心肌的准确分割和运动估计在临床领域一直很重要，这对下游诊断有重要贡献。然而，现有方法不能总是保证心肌分割的形状完整性。此外，运动估计需要跨不同帧的心肌区域的点对应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端深度统计形状模型，重点关注具有形状完整性和边界对应性保留的心肌分割。具体来说，心肌形状由固定数量的点表示，通过主成分分析（PCA）提取其变化。深度神经网络用于预测变换参数（仿射和变形），然后用于将平均点云扭曲到图像域。此外，引入了可微分渲染层，将掩模监督纳入框架中，以学习更准确的点云。通过这种方式，所提出的方法能够一致地产生解剖学上合理的分割掩模，而无需进行后处理。此外，预测的点云保证了序列图像的边界对应，这有助于下游任务，例如心肌的运动估计。我们进行了多次实验来证明所提出的方法在多个基准数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的深度统计形状模型，用于心肌分割，同时保持形状完整性和边界对应关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在心肌分割中难以保证形状完整性，且运动估计需要跨帧的心肌区域点对应，存在技术挑战。
AI.method: 通过主成分分析（PCA）提取心肌形状变化，利用深度神经网络预测仿射和变形变换参数，结合可微渲染层引入掩码监督，生成解剖合理的分割掩码。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，能够无需后处理生成准确分割结果，并支持心肌运动估计等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过统计形状建模与深度学习结合，在保持心肌形状完整性及边界对应性方面表现出色，为临床诊断提供可靠支持。

tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的深度统计形状模型，用于心肌分割，同时保持形状完整性和边界对应关系。
motivation: 现有方法在心肌分割中难以保证形状完整性，且运动估计需要跨帧的心肌区域点对应，存在技术挑战。
method: 通过主成分分析（PCA）提取心肌形状变化，利用深度神经网络预测仿射和变形变换参数，结合可微渲染层引入掩码监督，生成解剖合理的分割掩码。
result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，能够无需后处理生成准确分割结果，并支持心肌运动估计等下游任务。
conclusion: 该模型通过统计形状建模与深度学习结合，在保持心肌形状完整性及边界对应性方面表现出色，为临床诊断提供可靠支持。
search_text: Deep Statistic Shape Model for Myocardium Segmentation 用于心肌分割的深度统计形状模型 Accurate segmentation and motion estimation of myocardium have always been important in clinic field, which essentially contribute to the downstream diagnosis. However, existing methods cannot always guarantee the shape integrity for myocardium segmentation. In addition, motion estimation requires point correspondence on the myocardium region across different frames. In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end deep statistic shape model to focus on myocardium segmentation with both shape integrity and boundary correspondence preserving. Specifically, myocardium shapes are represented by a fixed number of points, whose variations are extracted by Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Deep neural network is used to predict the transformation parameters (both affine and deformation), which are then used to warp the mean point cloud to the image domain. Furthermore, a differentiable rendering layer is introduced to incorporate mask supervision into the framework to learn more accurate point clouds. In this way, the proposed method is able to consistently produce anatomically reasonable segmentation mask without post processing. Additionally, the predicted point cloud guarantees boundary correspondence for sequential images, which contributes to the downstream tasks, such as the motion estimation of myocardium. We conduct several experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on several benchmark datasets. 心肌的准确分割和运动估计在临床领域一直很重要，这对下游诊断有重要贡献。然而，现有方法不能总是保证心肌分割的形状完整性。此外，运动估计需要跨不同帧的心肌区域的点对应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端深度统计形状模型，重点关注具有形状完整性和边界对应性保留的心肌分割。具体来说，心肌形状由固定数量的点表示，通过主成分分析（PCA）提取其变化。深度神经网络用于预测变换参数（仿射和变形），然后用于将平均点云扭曲到图像域。此外，引入了可微分渲染层，将掩模监督纳入框架中，以学习更准确的点云。通过这种方式，所提出的方法能够一致地产生解剖学上合理的分割掩模，而无需进行后处理。此外，预测的点云保证了序列图像的边界对应，这有助于下游任务，例如心肌的运动估计。我们进行了多次实验来证明所提出的方法在多个基准数据集上的有效性。 本文提出一种端到端的深度统计形状模型，用于心肌分割，同时保持形状完整性和边界对应关系。 Xiaoling Hu,Xiao Chen,Yikang Liu,Eric Z. Chen,Terrence Chen,Shanhui Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Leonid Keselman,Martial Hebert
title: Approximate Differentiable Rendering with Algebraic Surfaces
title_zh: 使用代数曲面的近似可微渲染
comment: Accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Differentiable renderers provide a direct mathematical link between an object's 3D representation and images of that object. In this work, we develop an approximate differentiable renderer for a compact, interpretable representation, which we call Fuzzy Metaballs. Our approximate renderer focuses on rendering shapes via depth maps and silhouettes. It sacrifices fidelity for utility, producing fast runtimes and high-quality gradient information that can be used to solve vision tasks. Compared to mesh-based differentiable renderers, our method has forward passes that are 5x faster and backwards passes that are 30x faster. The depth maps and silhouette images generated by our method are smooth and defined everywhere. In our evaluation of differentiable renderers for pose estimation, we show that our method is the only one comparable to classic techniques. In shape from silhouette, our method performs well using only gradient descent and a per-pixel loss, without any surrogate losses or regularization. These reconstructions work well even on natural video sequences with segmentation artifacts. Project page: https://leonidk.github.io/fuzzy-metaballs
summary: Differentiable renderers provide a direct mathematical link between an object's 3D representation and images of that object. In this work, we develop an approximate differentiable renderer for a compact, interpretable representation, which we call Fuzzy Metaballs. Our approximate renderer focuses on rendering shapes via depth maps and silhouettes. It sacrifices fidelity for utility, producing fast runtimes and high-quality gradient information that can be used to solve vision tasks. Compared to mesh-based differentiable renderers, our method has forward passes that are 5x faster and backwards passes that are 30x faster. The depth maps and silhouette images generated by our method are smooth and defined everywhere. In our evaluation of differentiable renderers for pose estimation, we show that our method is the only one comparable to classic techniques. In shape from silhouette, our method performs well using only gradient descent and a per-pixel loss, without any surrogate losses or regularization. These reconstructions work well even on natural video sequences with segmentation artifacts. Project page: https://leonidk.github.io/fuzzy-metaballs
abstract_zh: 可微分渲染器提供了对象的 3D 表示和该对象的图像之间的直接数学链接。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个近似可微渲染器，用于紧凑的、可解释的表示，我们称之为模糊元球。我们的近似渲染器专注于通过深度图和轮廓渲染形状。它牺牲了实用性的保真度，产生快速的运行时间和高质量的梯度信息，可用于解决视觉任务。与基于网格的可微渲染器相比，我们的方法的前向传递速度快 5 倍，反向传递速度快 30 倍。我们的方法生成的深度图和轮廓图像是平滑的并且到处都有定义。在我们对用于姿态估计的可微渲染器的评估中，我们表明我们的方法是唯一可以与经典技术相媲美的方法。在轮廓形状中，我们的方法仅使用梯度下降和每像素损失就表现良好，没有任何替代损失或正则化。即使在具有分割伪影的自然视频序列上，这些重建也能很好地工作。项目页面：https://leonidk.github.io/fuzzy-metaballs

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模糊Metaballs的近似可微分渲染方法，通过深度图和轮廓实现快速渲染与高质量梯度计算，应用于计算机视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 传统可微分渲染器（如基于网格的方法）计算效率低，难以满足实时需求。本文旨在开发更高效的渲染框架，在保持梯度质量的同时显著提升运算速度。
AI.method: 设计Fuzzy Metaballs作为紧凑表示，通过深度图和轮廓渲染牺牲部分保真度，利用代数曲面实现全局平滑的梯度计算，正向/反向传递速度分别提升5倍和30倍。
AI.result: 在姿态估计任务中性能接近经典方法，在形状从轮廓任务中仅需梯度下降和逐像素损失即可获得良好效果，且能处理含分割伪影的自然视频序列。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在效率与梯度质量间取得平衡，为实时视觉任务提供了新型可微分渲染方案，尤其适合需要快速优化的场景。

authors_text: Xun Gong,Zhikai Zhou,Yanmin Qian
title: Knowledge Transfer and Distillation from Autoregressive to Non-Autoregressive Speech Recognition
title_zh: 从自回归到非自回归语音识别的知识转移和蒸馏
abstract: Modern non-autoregressive~(NAR) speech recognition systems aim to accelerate the inference speed; however, they suffer from performance degradation compared with autoregressive~(AR) models as well as the huge model size issue. We propose a novel knowledge transfer and distillation architecture that leverages knowledge from AR models to improve the NAR performance while reducing the model's size. Frame- and sequence-level objectives are well-designed for transfer learning. To further boost the performance of NAR, a beam search method on Mask-CTC is developed to enlarge the search space during the inference stage. Experiments show that the proposed NAR beam search relatively reduces CER by over 5% on AISHELL-1 benchmark with a tolerable real-time-factor~(RTF) increment. By knowledge transfer, the NAR student who has the same size as the AR teacher obtains relative CER reductions of 8/16% on AISHELL-1 dev/test sets, and over 25% relative WER reductions on LibriSpeech test-clean/other sets. Moreover, the ~9x smaller NAR models achieve ~25% relative CER/WER reductions on both AISHELL-1 and LibriSpeech benchmarks with the proposed knowledge transfer and distillation.
summary: Modern non-autoregressive~(NAR) speech recognition systems aim to accelerate the inference speed; however, they suffer from performance degradation compared with autoregressive~(AR) models as well as the huge model size issue. We propose a novel knowledge transfer and distillation architecture that leverages knowledge from AR models to improve the NAR performance while reducing the model's size. Frame- and sequence-level objectives are well-designed for transfer learning. To further boost the performance of NAR, a beam search method on Mask-CTC is developed to enlarge the search space during the inference stage. Experiments show that the proposed NAR beam search relatively reduces CER by over 5% on AISHELL-1 benchmark with a tolerable real-time-factor~(RTF) increment. By knowledge transfer, the NAR student who has the same size as the AR teacher obtains relative CER reductions of 8/16% on AISHELL-1 dev/test sets, and over 25% relative WER reductions on LibriSpeech test-clean/other sets. Moreover, the ~9x smaller NAR models achieve ~25% relative CER/WER reductions on both AISHELL-1 and LibriSpeech benchmarks with the proposed knowledge transfer and distillation.
abstract_zh: 现代非自回归（NAR）语音识别系统旨在加快推理速度；然而，与自回归（AR）模型相比，它们存在性能下降以及巨大的模型大小问题。我们提出了一种新颖的知识转移和蒸馏架构，它利用 AR 模型中的知识来提高 NAR 性能，同时减小模型的大小。帧级和序列级目标是为迁移学习精心设计的。为了进一步提高 NAR 的性能，在 Mask-CTC 上开发了一种波束搜索方法，以扩大推理阶段的搜索空间。实验表明，所提出的 NAR 波束搜索在 AISHELL-1 基准上相对降低了 5% 以上的 CER，并具有可容忍的实时因子~（RTF）增量。通过知识转移，与 AR 教师规模相同的 NAR 学生在 AISHELL-1 开发/测试集上获得相对 CER 减少 8/16%，在 LibriSpeech test-clean/其他集上获得超过 25% 的相对 WER 减少。此外，通过所提出的知识转移和蒸馏，缩小约 9 倍的 NAR 模型在 AISHELL-1 和 LibriSpeech 基准上实现了约 25% 的相对 CER/WER 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从自回归(AR)模型到非自回归(NAR)语音识别的知识迁移与蒸馏架构，以提升NAR性能并减小模型规模。
AI.motivation: NAR语音识别系统虽能加速推理，但存在性能下降和模型体积过大的问题，需通过知识迁移提升其表现并优化模型效率。
AI.method: 设计了帧级和序列级目标用于知识迁移，开发了基于Mask-CTC的束搜索方法扩展推理搜索空间，并通过知识蒸馏训练更小的NAR模型。
AI.result: NAR束搜索在AISHELL-1基准上将CER降低5%以上，知识迁移使同规模NAR模型在AISHELL-1上CER减少8-16%，在LibriSpeech上WER减少25%以上；9倍小型化模型在两项基准上均实现25%以上的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了AR到NAR的知识迁移，在保持推理速度优势的同时显著提升性能并减小模型规模，为NAR模型应用提供了可行方案。

conclusion: 该方法有效实现了AR到NAR的知识迁移，在保持推理速度优势的同时显著提升性能并减小模型规模，为NAR模型应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Knowledge Transfer and Distillation from Autoregressive to Non-Autoregressive Speech Recognition 从自回归到非自回归语音识别的知识转移和蒸馏 Modern non-autoregressive~(NAR) speech recognition systems aim to accelerate the inference speed; however, they suffer from performance degradation compared with autoregressive~(AR) models as well as the huge model size issue. We propose a novel knowledge transfer and distillation architecture that leverages knowledge from AR models to improve the NAR performance while reducing the model's size. Frame- and sequence-level objectives are well-designed for transfer learning. To further boost the performance of NAR, a beam search method on Mask-CTC is developed to enlarge the search space during the inference stage. Experiments show that the proposed NAR beam search relatively reduces CER by over 5% on AISHELL-1 benchmark with a tolerable real-time-factor~(RTF) increment. By knowledge transfer, the NAR student who has the same size as the AR teacher obtains relative CER reductions of 8/16% on AISHELL-1 dev/test sets, and over 25% relative WER reductions on LibriSpeech test-clean/other sets. Moreover, the ~9x smaller NAR models achieve ~25% relative CER/WER reductions on both AISHELL-1 and LibriSpeech benchmarks with the proposed knowledge transfer and distillation. 现代非自回归（NAR）语音识别系统旨在加快推理速度；然而，与自回归（AR）模型相比，它们存在性能下降以及巨大的模型大小问题。我们提出了一种新颖的知识转移和蒸馏架构，它利用 AR 模型中的知识来提高 NAR 性能，同时减小模型的大小。帧级和序列级目标是为迁移学习精心设计的。为了进一步提高 NAR 的性能，在 Mask-CTC 上开发了一种波束搜索方法，以扩大推理阶段的搜索空间。实验表明，所提出的 NAR 波束搜索在 AISHELL-1 基准上相对降低了 5% 以上的 CER，并具有可容忍的实时因子~（RTF）增量。通过知识转移，与 AR 教师规模相同的 NAR 学生在 AISHELL-1 开发/测试集上获得相对 CER 减少 8/16%，在 LibriSpeech test-clean/其他集上获得超过 25% 的相对 WER 减少。此外，通过所提出的知识转移和蒸馏，缩小约 9 倍的 NAR 模型在 AISHELL-1 和 LibriSpeech 基准上实现了约 25% 的相对 CER/WER 降低。 本文提出了一种从自回归(AR)模型到非自回归(NAR)语音识别的知识迁移与蒸馏架构，以提升NAR性能并减小模型规模。 Xun Gong,Zhikai Zhou,Yanmin Qian cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Hao Yang,Chen Shi,Yihong Chen,Liwei Wang
title: Boosting 3D Object Detection via Object-Focused Image Fusion
title_zh: 通过以对象为中心的图像融合增强 3D 对象检测
abstract: 3D object detection has achieved remarkable progress by taking point clouds as the only input. However, point clouds often suffer from incomplete geometric structures and the lack of semantic information, which makes detectors hard to accurately classify detected objects. In this work, we focus on how to effectively utilize object-level information from images to boost the performance of point-based 3D detector. We present DeMF, a simple yet effective method to fuse image information into point features. Given a set of point features and image feature maps, DeMF adaptively aggregates image features by taking the projected 2D location of the 3D point as reference. We evaluate our method on the challenging SUN RGB-D dataset, improving state-of-the-art results by a large margin (+2.1 mAP@0.25 and +2.3mAP@0.5). Code is available at https://github.com/haoy945/DeMF.
summary: 3D object detection has achieved remarkable progress by taking point clouds as the only input. However, point clouds often suffer from incomplete geometric structures and the lack of semantic information, which makes detectors hard to accurately classify detected objects. In this work, we focus on how to effectively utilize object-level information from images to boost the performance of point-based 3D detector. We present DeMF, a simple yet effective method to fuse image information into point features. Given a set of point features and image feature maps, DeMF adaptively aggregates image features by taking the projected 2D location of the 3D point as reference. We evaluate our method on the challenging SUN RGB-D dataset, improving state-of-the-art results by a large margin (+2.1 mAP@0.25 and +2.3mAP@0.5). Code is available at https://github.com/haoy945/DeMF.
abstract_zh: 通过将点云作为唯一输入，3D 物体检测取得了显着的进步。然而，点云往往存在不完整的几何结构和缺乏语义信息，这使得检测器难以准确地对检测到的对象进行分类。在这项工作中，我们重点关注如何有效利用图像中的对象级信息来提高基于点的 3D 检测器的性能。我们提出 DeMF，这是一种将图像信息融合到点特征中的简单而有效的方法。给定一组点特征和图像特征图，DeMF 通过将 3D 点的投影 2D 位置作为参考来自适应聚合图像特征。我们在具有挑战性的 SUN RGB-D 数据集上评估我们的方法，大幅提高了最先进的结果（+2.1 mAP@0.25 和 +2.3mAP@0.5）。代码可在 https://github.com/haoy945/DeMF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像信息融合的3D目标检测方法，通过增强点云特征来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 点云数据存在几何结构不完整和缺乏语义信息的问题，导致3D目标检测分类准确性不足。
AI.method: 提出DeMF方法，通过将3D点投影到2D图像位置，自适应聚合图像特征以增强点云特征。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上，mAP@0.25和mAP@0.5指标分别提升2.1和2.3，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 图像信息融合能有效提升3D检测性能，DeMF方法简单有效且代码已开源。

authors_text: Zuo-Liang Zhu,Zhen Li,Rui-Xun Zhang,Chun-Le Guo,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Designing An Illumination-Aware Network for Deep Image Relighting
title_zh: 设计用于深度图像重新照明的照明感知网络
comment: Accepted for publication as a Regular paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (T-IP)
comments: Accepted for publication as a Regular paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (T-IP)
abstract: Lighting is a determining factor in photography that affects the style, expression of emotion, and even quality of images. Creating or finding satisfying lighting conditions, in reality, is laborious and time-consuming, so it is of great value to develop a technology to manipulate illumination in an image as post-processing. Although previous works have explored techniques based on the physical viewpoint for relighting images, extensive supervisions and prior knowledge are necessary to generate reasonable images, restricting the generalization ability of these works. In contrast, we take the viewpoint of image-to-image translation and implicitly merge ideas of the conventional physical viewpoint. In this paper, we present an Illumination-Aware Network (IAN) which follows the guidance from hierarchical sampling to progressively relight a scene from a single image with high efficiency. In addition, an Illumination-Aware Residual Block (IARB) is designed to approximate the physical rendering process and to extract precise descriptors of light sources for further manipulations. We also introduce a depth-guided geometry encoder for acquiring valuable geometry- and structure-related representations once the depth information is available. Experimental results show that our proposed method produces better quantitative and qualitative relighting results than previous state-of-the-art methods. The code and models are publicly available on https://github.com/NK-CS-ZZL/IAN.
summary: Lighting is a determining factor in photography that affects the style, expression of emotion, and even quality of images. Creating or finding satisfying lighting conditions, in reality, is laborious and time-consuming, so it is of great value to develop a technology to manipulate illumination in an image as post-processing. Although previous works have explored techniques based on the physical viewpoint for relighting images, extensive supervisions and prior knowledge are necessary to generate reasonable images, restricting the generalization ability of these works. In contrast, we take the viewpoint of image-to-image translation and implicitly merge ideas of the conventional physical viewpoint. In this paper, we present an Illumination-Aware Network (IAN) which follows the guidance from hierarchical sampling to progressively relight a scene from a single image with high efficiency. In addition, an Illumination-Aware Residual Block (IARB) is designed to approximate the physical rendering process and to extract precise descriptors of light sources for further manipulations. We also introduce a depth-guided geometry encoder for acquiring valuable geometry- and structure-related representations once the depth information is available. Experimental results show that our proposed method produces better quantitative and qualitative relighting results than previous state-of-the-art methods. The code and models are publicly available on https://github.com/NK-CS-ZZL/IAN.
abstract_zh: 光线是摄影中的决定性因素，影响着风格、情感的表达，甚至图像的质量。实际上，创建或找到令人满意的照明条件是费力且耗时的，因此开发一种在图像后处理中操纵图像照明的技术具有重要价值。尽管以前的作品已经探索了基于物理视点重新照亮图像的技术，但需要广泛的监督和先验知识来生成合理的图像，限制了这些作品的泛化能力。相比之下，我们采取图像到图像转换的观点，并隐式地融合了传统物理观点的思想。在本文中，我们提出了一种照明感知网络（IAN），它遵循分层采样的指导，以高效率逐步从单个图像重新照亮场景。此外，照明感知残差块 (IARB) 旨在近似物理渲染过程并提取光源的精确描述符以进行进一步操作。我们还引入了深度引导几何编码器，用于在深度信息可用后获取有价值的几何和结构相关表示。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比以前最先进的方法产生更好的定量和定性重新照明结果。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/NK-CS-ZZL/IAN 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种光照感知网络（IAN），用于从单张图像中高效地进行图像重光照，通过结合图像到图像翻译和物理渲染思想，实现更自然的光照调整。
AI.motivation: 现有光照调整方法依赖大量监督和先验知识，泛化能力受限，需开发无需复杂物理模型且高效通用的图像重光照技术。
AI.method: 设计了分层采样引导的IAN网络，包含光照感知残差块（IARB）以逼近物理渲染过程，并引入深度引导的几何编码器提取结构信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定量指标和视觉效果上均优于现有最先进方法，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的IAN通过融合物理原理与图像翻译框架，实现了高效且泛化性更强的图像重光照解决方案。

authors_text: Cigdem Beyan,Alessandro Vinciarelli,Alessio Del Bue
title: Co-Located Human-Human Interaction Analysis using Nonverbal Cues: A Survey
title_zh: 使用非语言线索的同位人机交互分析：一项调查
comment: This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive version was published in ACM Computing Surveys, https://doi.org/10.1145/3626516
comments: This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive version was published in ACM Computing Surveys, https://doi.org/10.1145/3626516
abstract: Automated co-located human-human interaction analysis has been addressed by the use of nonverbal communication as measurable evidence of social and psychological phenomena. We survey the computing studies (since 2010) detecting phenomena related to social traits (e.g., leadership, dominance, personality traits), social roles/relations, and interaction dynamics (e.g., group cohesion, engagement, rapport). Our target is to identify the nonverbal cues and computational methodologies resulting in effective performance. This survey differs from its counterparts by involving the widest spectrum of social phenomena and interaction settings (free-standing conversations, meetings, dyads, and crowds). We also present a comprehensive summary of the related datasets and outline future research directions which are regarding the implementation of artificial intelligence, dataset curation, and privacy-preserving interaction analysis. Some major observations are: the most often used nonverbal cue, computational method, interaction environment, and sensing approach are speaking activity, support vector machines, and meetings composed of 3-4 persons equipped with microphones and cameras, respectively; multimodal features are prominently performing better; deep learning architectures showed improved performance in overall, but there exist many phenomena whose detection has never been implemented through deep models. We also identified several limitations such as the lack of scalable benchmarks, annotation reliability tests, cross-dataset experiments, and explainability analysis.
summary: Automated co-located human-human interaction analysis has been addressed by the use of nonverbal communication as measurable evidence of social and psychological phenomena. We survey the computing studies (since 2010) detecting phenomena related to social traits (e.g., leadership, dominance, personality traits), social roles/relations, and interaction dynamics (e.g., group cohesion, engagement, rapport). Our target is to identify the nonverbal cues and computational methodologies resulting in effective performance. This survey differs from its counterparts by involving the widest spectrum of social phenomena and interaction settings (free-standing conversations, meetings, dyads, and crowds). We also present a comprehensive summary of the related datasets and outline future research directions which are regarding the implementation of artificial intelligence, dataset curation, and privacy-preserving interaction analysis. Some major observations are: the most often used nonverbal cue, computational method, interaction environment, and sensing approach are speaking activity, support vector machines, and meetings composed of 3-4 persons equipped with microphones and cameras, respectively; multimodal features are prominently performing better; deep learning architectures showed improved performance in overall, but there exist many phenomena whose detection has never been implemented through deep models. We also identified several limitations such as the lack of scalable benchmarks, annotation reliability tests, cross-dataset experiments, and explainability analysis.
abstract_zh: 通过使用非语言交流作为社会和心理现象的可测量证据，自动进行人机交互分析。我们调查了计算机研究（自 2010 年以来），检测与社会特征（例如领导力、支配力、个性特征）、社会角色/关系和互动动态（例如群体凝聚力、参与度、融洽关系）相关的现象。我们的目标是识别非语言线索和计算方法，从而实现有效的表现。这项调查与同类调查的不同之处在于，它涉及最广泛的社会现象和互动环境（独立对话、会议、二人组和人群）。我们还对相关数据集进行了全面总结，并概述了未来的研究方向，包括人工智能的实施、数据集管理和隐私保护交互分析。一些主要观察结果是：最常用的非语言提示、计算方法、交互环境和感知方法分别是说话活动、支持向量机以及由 3-4 人配备麦克风和摄像头组成的会议；多模态特征明显表现更好；深度学习架构总体上表现出改进的性能，但存在许多现象从未通过深度模型实现过检测。我们还发现了一些限制，例如缺乏可扩展的基准、注释可靠性测试、跨数据集实验和可解释性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用非语言线索分析共处人类互动的计算研究，涵盖社交特征、角色关系及互动动态等现象。
AI.motivation: 旨在识别有效的非语言线索与计算方法，总结数据集并指出未来研究方向，如人工智能应用与隐私保护。
AI.method: 通过调研2010年以来的计算研究，分类分析社交现象、交互场景及技术方法，并总结数据集与局限性。
AI.result: 发现语音活动为最常用线索，支持向量机与会议场景为常见方法与环境，多模态特征与深度学习表现更优但存在应用盲区。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习虽提升性能，但缺乏可扩展基准、标注可靠性验证及跨数据集实验，需加强可解释性分析。
