search_text: Co-Located Human-Human Interaction Analysis using Nonverbal Cues: A Survey 使用非语言线索的同位人机交互分析：一项调查 Automated co-located human-human interaction analysis has been addressed by the use of nonverbal communication as measurable evidence of social and psychological phenomena. We survey the computing studies (since 2010) detecting phenomena related to social traits (e.g., leadership, dominance, personality traits), social roles/relations, and interaction dynamics (e.g., group cohesion, engagement, rapport). Our target is to identify the nonverbal cues and computational methodologies resulting in effective performance. This survey differs from its counterparts by involving the widest spectrum of social phenomena and interaction settings (free-standing conversations, meetings, dyads, and crowds). We also present a comprehensive summary of the related datasets and outline future research directions which are regarding the implementation of artificial intelligence, dataset curation, and privacy-preserving interaction analysis. Some major observations are: the most often used nonverbal cue, computational method, interaction environment, and sensing approach are speaking activity, support vector machines, and meetings composed of 3-4 persons equipped with microphones and cameras, respectively; multimodal features are prominently performing better; deep learning architectures showed improved performance in overall, but there exist many phenomena whose detection has never been implemented through deep models. We also identified several limitations such as the lack of scalable benchmarks, annotation reliability tests, cross-dataset experiments, and explainability analysis. 通过使用非语言交流作为社会和心理现象的可测量证据，自动进行人机交互分析。我们调查了计算机研究（自 2010 年以来），检测与社会特征（例如领导力、支配力、个性特征）、社会角色/关系和互动动态（例如群体凝聚力、参与度、融洽关系）相关的现象。我们的目标是识别非语言线索和计算方法，从而实现有效的表现。这项调查与同类调查的不同之处在于，它涉及最广泛的社会现象和互动环境（独立对话、会议、二人组和人群）。我们还对相关数据集进行了全面总结，并概述了未来的研究方向，包括人工智能的实施、数据集管理和隐私保护交互分析。一些主要观察结果是：最常用的非语言提示、计算方法、交互环境和感知方法分别是说话活动、支持向量机以及由 3-4 人配备麦克风和摄像头组成的会议；多模态特征明显表现更好；深度学习架构总体上表现出改进的性能，但存在许多现象从未通过深度模型实现过检测。我们还发现了一些限制，例如缺乏可扩展的基准、注释可靠性测试、跨数据集实验和可解释性分析。 本文综述了利用非语言线索分析共处人类互动的计算研究，涵盖社交特征、角色关系及互动动态等现象。 Cigdem Beyan,Alessandro Vinciarelli,Alessio Del Bue cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Yeying Jin,Wenhan Yang,Robby T. Tan
title: Unsupervised Night Image Enhancement: When Layer Decomposition Meets Light-Effects Suppression
title_zh: 无监督夜间图像增强：当层分解遇到光效抑制时
abstract: Night images suffer not only from low light, but also from uneven distributions of light. Most existing night visibility enhancement methods focus mainly on enhancing low-light regions. This inevitably leads to over enhancement and saturation in bright regions, such as those regions affected by light effects (glare, floodlight, etc). To address this problem, we need to suppress the light effects in bright regions while, at the same time, boosting the intensity of dark regions. With this idea in mind, we introduce an unsupervised method that integrates a layer decomposition network and a light-effects suppression network. Given a single night image as input, our decomposition network learns to decompose shading, reflectance and light-effects layers, guided by unsupervised layer-specific prior losses. Our light-effects suppression network further suppresses the light effects and, at the same time, enhances the illumination in dark regions. This light-effects suppression network exploits the estimated light-effects layer as the guidance to focus on the light-effects regions. To recover the background details and reduce hallucination/artefacts, we propose structure and high-frequency consistency losses. Our quantitative and qualitative evaluations on real images show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in suppressing night light effects and boosting the intensity of dark regions.
summary: Night images suffer not only from low light, but also from uneven distributions of light. Most existing night visibility enhancement methods focus mainly on enhancing low-light regions. This inevitably leads to over enhancement and saturation in bright regions, such as those regions affected by light effects (glare, floodlight, etc). To address this problem, we need to suppress the light effects in bright regions while, at the same time, boosting the intensity of dark regions. With this idea in mind, we introduce an unsupervised method that integrates a layer decomposition network and a light-effects suppression network. Given a single night image as input, our decomposition network learns to decompose shading, reflectance and light-effects layers, guided by unsupervised layer-specific prior losses. Our light-effects suppression network further suppresses the light effects and, at the same time, enhances the illumination in dark regions. This light-effects suppression network exploits the estimated light-effects layer as the guidance to focus on the light-effects regions. To recover the background details and reduce hallucination/artefacts, we propose structure and high-frequency consistency losses. Our quantitative and qualitative evaluations on real images show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in suppressing night light effects and boosting the intensity of dark regions.
abstract_zh: 夜间图像不仅受到弱光的影响，而且还受到光线分布不均匀的影响。大多数现有的夜间能见度增强方法主要集中于增强弱光区域。这不可避免地导致明亮区域的过度增强和饱和，例如受光效应（眩光、泛光灯等）影响的区域。为了解决这个问题，我们需要抑制明亮区域的光效应，同时增强黑暗区域的强度。考虑到这个想法，我们引入了一种集成层分解网络和光效抑制网络的无监督方法。给定单个夜间图像作为输入，我们的分解网络在无监督的特定层先验损失的指导下学习分解阴影、反射率和光效果层。我们的光效抑制网络进一步抑制光效，同时增强黑暗区域的照明。该光效抑制网络利用估计的光效层作为关注光效区域的指导。为了恢复背景细节并减少幻觉/伪影，我们提出了结构和高频一致性损失。我们对真实图像的定量和定性评估表明，我们的方法在抑制夜光效应和增强黑暗区域的强度方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督夜间图像增强方法，通过结合层分解网络和光效抑制网络，解决夜间图像中暗区增强与亮区光效抑制的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有夜间增强方法过度增强亮区导致饱和，无法有效抑制光污染（如眩光、强光），需同时解决暗区增强与亮区光效抑制问题。
AI.method: 设计层分解网络分离阴影、反射和光效层，结合无监督层先验损失；利用光效层引导抑制网络增强暗区并抑制亮区光效，引入结构与高频一致性损失减少伪影。
AI.result: 在真实图像上定量与定性评估表明，该方法在光效抑制和暗区增强方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过层分解与光效抑制网络的协同，结合无监督损失设计，有效解决了夜间图像增强中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Ikechukwu Obi,Colin M. Gray,Shruthi Sai Chivukula,Ja-Nae Duane,Janna Johns,Matthew Will,Ziqing Li,Thomas Carlock
title: Let's Talk About Socio-Technical Angst: Tracing the History and Evolution of Dark Patterns on Twitter from 2010-2021
title_zh: 让我们来谈谈社会技术焦虑：追踪 2010 年至 2021 年 Twitter 上黑暗模式的历史和演变
abstract: Designers' use of deceptive and manipulative design practices have become increasingly ubiquitous, impacting users' ability to make choices that respect their agency and autonomy. These practices have been popularly defined through the term "dark patterns" which has gained attention from designers, privacy scholars, and more recently, even legal scholars and regulators. The increased interest in the term and underpinnings of dark patterns across a range of sociotechnical practitioners intrigued us to study the evolution of the concept, to potentially speculate the future trajectory of conversations around dark patterns. In this paper, we examine the history and evolution of the Twitter discourse through #darkpatterns from its inception in June 2010 until April 2021, using a combination of quantitative and qualitative methods to describe how this discourse has changed over time. We frame the evolution of this discourse as an emergent transdisciplinary conversation that connects multiple disciplinary perspectives through the shared concept of dark patterns, whereby these participants engage in a conversation marked by socio-technical angst in order to identify and fight back against deceptive design practices. We discuss the potential future trajectories of this discourse and opportunities for further scholarship at the intersection of design, policy, and activism.
summary: Designers' use of deceptive and manipulative design practices have become increasingly ubiquitous, impacting users' ability to make choices that respect their agency and autonomy. These practices have been popularly defined through the term "dark patterns" which has gained attention from designers, privacy scholars, and more recently, even legal scholars and regulators. The increased interest in the term and underpinnings of dark patterns across a range of sociotechnical practitioners intrigued us to study the evolution of the concept, to potentially speculate the future trajectory of conversations around dark patterns. In this paper, we examine the history and evolution of the Twitter discourse through #darkpatterns from its inception in June 2010 until April 2021, using a combination of quantitative and qualitative methods to describe how this discourse has changed over time. We frame the evolution of this discourse as an emergent transdisciplinary conversation that connects multiple disciplinary perspectives through the shared concept of dark patterns, whereby these participants engage in a conversation marked by socio-technical angst in order to identify and fight back against deceptive design practices. We discuss the potential future trajectories of this discourse and opportunities for further scholarship at the intersection of design, policy, and activism.
abstract_zh: 设计师对欺骗性和操纵性设计实践的使用变得越来越普遍，影响了用户做出尊重其代理和自主权的选择的能力。这些做法通常通过“黑暗模式”一词来定义，该术语引起了设计师、隐私学者、甚至最近法律学者和监管机构的关注。一系列社会技术从业者对这个术语和黑暗模式基础的兴趣日益浓厚，这促使我们研究这个概念的演变，并有可能推测围绕黑暗模式的对话的未来轨迹。在本文中，我们通过#darkpatterns研究了Twitter话语从2010年6月成立到2021年4月的历史和演变，使用定量和定性相结合的方法来描述这种话语如何随着时间的推移而变化。我们将这种话语的演变定义为一种新兴的跨学科对话，通过共享的黑暗模式概念连接多个学科观点，这些参与者参与一场以社会技术焦虑为标志的对话，以识别和反击欺骗性的设计实践。我们讨论了这一讨论的潜在未来轨迹，以及在设计、政策和行动主义交叉领域进一步开展学术研究的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Twitter上#darkpatterns标签从2010至2021年的讨论，研究暗模式概念的历史演变及其跨学科对话的形成过程。
AI.motivation: 随着暗模式对用户自主权的影响日益显著，需追踪其概念在设计、隐私及法律等领域的跨学科演变，并探索未来研究方向。
AI.method: 结合定量分析（如话题模型）与定性分析（如话语分析），对Twitter平台相关讨论进行时间序列研究。
AI.result: 发现暗模式讨论逐渐从设计领域扩展至法律与政策领域，形成以社会技术焦虑为核心的跨学科对话网络。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需加强设计实践、政策制定与社会运动间的协同，以应对暗模式带来的伦理挑战。

search_text: Let's Talk About Socio-Technical Angst: Tracing the History and Evolution of Dark Patterns on Twitter from 2010-2021 让我们来谈谈社会技术焦虑：追踪 2010 年至 2021 年 Twitter 上黑暗模式的历史和演变 Designers' use of deceptive and manipulative design practices have become increasingly ubiquitous, impacting users' ability to make choices that respect their agency and autonomy. These practices have been popularly defined through the term "dark patterns" which has gained attention from designers, privacy scholars, and more recently, even legal scholars and regulators. The increased interest in the term and underpinnings of dark patterns across a range of sociotechnical practitioners intrigued us to study the evolution of the concept, to potentially speculate the future trajectory of conversations around dark patterns. In this paper, we examine the history and evolution of the Twitter discourse through #darkpatterns from its inception in June 2010 until April 2021, using a combination of quantitative and qualitative methods to describe how this discourse has changed over time. We frame the evolution of this discourse as an emergent transdisciplinary conversation that connects multiple disciplinary perspectives through the shared concept of dark patterns, whereby these participants engage in a conversation marked by socio-technical angst in order to identify and fight back against deceptive design practices. We discuss the potential future trajectories of this discourse and opportunities for further scholarship at the intersection of design, policy, and activism. 设计师对欺骗性和操纵性设计实践的使用变得越来越普遍，影响了用户做出尊重其代理和自主权的选择的能力。这些做法通常通过“黑暗模式”一词来定义，该术语引起了设计师、隐私学者、甚至最近法律学者和监管机构的关注。一系列社会技术从业者对这个术语和黑暗模式基础的兴趣日益浓厚，这促使我们研究这个概念的演变，并有可能推测围绕黑暗模式的对话的未来轨迹。在本文中，我们通过#darkpatterns研究了Twitter话语从2010年6月成立到2021年4月的历史和演变，使用定量和定性相结合的方法来描述这种话语如何随着时间的推移而变化。我们将这种话语的演变定义为一种新兴的跨学科对话，通过共享的黑暗模式概念连接多个学科观点，这些参与者参与一场以社会技术焦虑为标志的对话，以识别和反击欺骗性的设计实践。我们讨论了这一讨论的潜在未来轨迹，以及在设计、政策和行动主义交叉领域进一步开展学术研究的机会。 本文通过分析Twitter上#darkpatterns标签从2010至2021年的讨论，研究暗模式概念的历史演变及其跨学科对话的形成过程。 Ikechukwu Obi,Colin M. Gray,Shruthi Sai Chivukula,Ja-Nae Duane,Janna Johns,Matthew Will,Ziqing Li,Thomas Carlock cs.SI,cs.HC

authors_text: Remi Desmartin,Grant Passmore,Ekaterina Komendantskaya,Matthew Daggitt
title: CheckINN: Wide Range Neural Network Verification in Imandra (Extended)
title_zh: CheckINN：Imandra 中的大范围神经网络验证（扩展）
comment: PPDP 2022, 24th International Symposium on Principles and Practice of Declarative Programming
comments: PPDP 2022, 24th International Symposium on Principles and Practice of Declarative Programming
abstract: Neural networks are increasingly relied upon as components of complex safety-critical systems such as autonomous vehicles. There is high demand for tools and methods that embed neural network verification in a larger verification cycle. However, neural network verification is difficult due to a wide range of verification properties of interest, each typically only amenable to verification in specialised solvers. In this paper, we show how Imandra, a functional programming language and a theorem prover originally designed for verification, validation and simulation of financial infrastructure can offer a holistic infrastructure for neural network verification. We develop a novel library CheckINN that formalises neural networks in Imandra, and covers different important facets of neural network verification.
summary: Neural networks are increasingly relied upon as components of complex safety-critical systems such as autonomous vehicles. There is high demand for tools and methods that embed neural network verification in a larger verification cycle. However, neural network verification is difficult due to a wide range of verification properties of interest, each typically only amenable to verification in specialised solvers. In this paper, we show how Imandra, a functional programming language and a theorem prover originally designed for verification, validation and simulation of financial infrastructure can offer a holistic infrastructure for neural network verification. We develop a novel library CheckINN that formalises neural networks in Imandra, and covers different important facets of neural network verification.
abstract_zh: 神经网络越来越多地被依赖作为复杂的安全关键系统（例如自动驾驶汽车）的组件。对于将神经网络验证嵌入到更大的验证周期中的工具和方法的需求很高。然而，由于感兴趣的验证属性范围广泛，神经网络验证很困难，每个验证属性通常只能在专门的求解器中进行验证。在本文中，我们展示了 Imandra（一种最初为金融基础设施的验证、验证和模拟而设计的函数式编程语言和定理证明器）如何为神经网络验证提供整体基础设施。我们开发了一个新颖的库 CheckINN，它在 Imandra 中形式化了神经网络，并涵盖了神经网络验证的不同重要方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CheckINN库，利用Imandra语言构建神经网络验证的综合基础设施。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在安全关键系统中应用广泛，但现有验证工具难以统一处理多样化的验证需求。
AI.method: 基于Imandra语言开发CheckINN库，通过形式化方法实现神经网络的多维度验证功能。
AI.result: 成功构建支持多种验证属性的神经网络验证框架，验证了方法的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: CheckINN为神经网络验证提供了统一的解决方案，可有效集成到复杂系统验证流程中。

authors_text: Sepehr Assadi,Martin Farach-Colton,William Kuszmaul
title: Tight Bounds for Monotone Minimal Perfect Hashing
title_zh: 单调最小完美哈希的严格界限
abstract: The monotone minimal perfect hash function (MMPHF) problem is the following indexing problem. Given a set $S= \{s_1,\ldots,s_n\}$ of $n$ distinct keys from a universe $U$ of size $u$, create a data structure $DS$ that answers the following query: \[ RankOp(q) = \text{rank of } q \text{ in } S \text{ for all } q\in S ~\text{ and arbitrary answer otherwise.} \] Solutions to the MMPHF problem are in widespread use in both theory and practice. The best upper bound known for the problem encodes $DS$ in $O(n\log\log\log u)$ bits and performs queries in $O(\log u)$ time. It has been an open problem to either improve the space upper bound or to show that this somewhat odd looking bound is tight. In this paper, we show the latter: specifically that any data structure (deterministic or randomized) for monotone minimal perfect hashing of any collection of $n$ elements from a universe of size $u$ requires $Ω(n \cdot \log\log\log{u})$ expected bits to answer every query correctly. We achieve our lower bound by defining a graph $\mathbf{G}$ where the nodes are the possible ${u \choose n}$ inputs and where two nodes are adjacent if they cannot share the same $DS$. The size of $DS$ is then lower bounded by the log of the chromatic number of $\mathbf{G}$. Finally, we show that the fractional chromatic number (and hence the chromatic number) of $\mathbf{G}$ is lower bounded by $2^{Ω(n \log\log\log u)}$.
summary: The monotone minimal perfect hash function (MMPHF) problem is the following indexing problem. Given a set $S= \{s_1,\ldots,s_n\}$ of $n$ distinct keys from a universe $U$ of size $u$, create a data structure $DS$ that answers the following query: \[ RankOp(q) = \text{rank of } q \text{ in } S \text{ for all } q\in S ~\text{ and arbitrary answer otherwise.} \] Solutions to the MMPHF problem are in widespread use in both theory and practice. The best upper bound known for the problem encodes $DS$ in $O(n\log\log\log u)$ bits and performs queries in $O(\log u)$ time. It has been an open problem to either improve the space upper bound or to show that this somewhat odd looking bound is tight. In this paper, we show the latter: specifically that any data structure (deterministic or randomized) for monotone minimal perfect hashing of any collection of $n$ elements from a universe of size $u$ requires $Ω(n \cdot \log\log\log{u})$ expected bits to answer every query correctly. We achieve our lower bound by defining a graph $\mathbf{G}$ where the nodes are the possible ${u \choose n}$ inputs and where two nodes are adjacent if they cannot share the same $DS$. The size of $DS$ is then lower bounded by the log of the chromatic number of $\mathbf{G}$. Finally, we show that the fractional chromatic number (and hence the chromatic number) of $\mathbf{G}$ is lower bounded by $2^{Ω(n \log\log\log u)}$.
abstract_zh: 单调最小完美哈希函数（MMPHF）问题是以下索引问题。给定来自大小为 $u$ 的宇宙 $U$ 的一组 $S= \{s_1,\ldots,s_n\}$ ，其中包含 $n$ 个不同键，创建一个数据结构 $DS$ 来回答以下查询： \[ RankOp(q) = \text{rank of } q \text{ in } S \text{ for all } q\in S ~\text{ 以及任意答案。} \] MMPHF 问题的解决方案在理论和实践中都广泛使用练习。该问题已知的最佳上限将 $DS$ 编码为 $O(n\log\log\log u)$ 位，并在 $O(\log u)$ 时间内执行查询。改善空间上限或表明这个看起来有点奇怪的边界是紧的，这一直是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们展示了后者：具体来说，对于大小为 $u$ 的宇宙中任何 $n$ 元素集合的单调最小完美散列的任何数据结构（确定性或随机）都需要 $Ω(n \cdot \log\log\log{u})$ 期望位来正确回答每个查询。我们通过定义一个图 $\mathbf{G}$ 来实现下界，其中节点是可能的 ${u \choose n}$ 输入，并且如果两个节点不能共享相同的 $DS$，则它们是相邻的。 $DS$ 的大小的下限是 $\mathbf{G}$ 色数的对数。最后，我们证明 $\mathbf{G}$ 的分数色数（以及色数）的下界为 $2^{Ω(n \log\log\log u)}$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单调极小完美哈希函数（MMPHF）问题，旨在确定其数据结构所需空间的下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有算法能以O(n log log log u)位空间解决MMPHF问题，但该界是否最优尚不明确。本文旨在证明该空间复杂度是紧致的。
AI.method: 通过构建输入集合的图模型，将数据结构大小与图的色数关联，利用分数色数下界证明空间复杂度的理论极限。
AI.result: 证明任何解决MMPHF问题的数据结构需至少Ω(n log log log u)位空间，与已知上界匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该研究确立了MMPHF问题空间复杂度的紧致下界，解决了长期存在的理论难题。

search_text: Tight Bounds for Monotone Minimal Perfect Hashing 单调最小完美哈希的严格界限 The monotone minimal perfect hash function (MMPHF) problem is the following indexing problem. Given a set $S= \{s_1,\ldots,s_n\}$ of $n$ distinct keys from a universe $U$ of size $u$, create a data structure $DS$ that answers the following query: \[ RankOp(q) = \text{rank of } q \text{ in } S \text{ for all } q\in S ~\text{ and arbitrary answer otherwise.} \] Solutions to the MMPHF problem are in widespread use in both theory and practice. The best upper bound known for the problem encodes $DS$ in $O(n\log\log\log u)$ bits and performs queries in $O(\log u)$ time. It has been an open problem to either improve the space upper bound or to show that this somewhat odd looking bound is tight. In this paper, we show the latter: specifically that any data structure (deterministic or randomized) for monotone minimal perfect hashing of any collection of $n$ elements from a universe of size $u$ requires $Ω(n \cdot \log\log\log{u})$ expected bits to answer every query correctly. We achieve our lower bound by defining a graph $\mathbf{G}$ where the nodes are the possible ${u \choose n}$ inputs and where two nodes are adjacent if they cannot share the same $DS$. The size of $DS$ is then lower bounded by the log of the chromatic number of $\mathbf{G}$. Finally, we show that the fractional chromatic number (and hence the chromatic number) of $\mathbf{G}$ is lower bounded by $2^{Ω(n \log\log\log u)}$. 单调最小完美哈希函数（MMPHF）问题是以下索引问题。给定来自大小为 $u$ 的宇宙 $U$ 的一组 $S= \{s_1,\ldots,s_n\}$ ，其中包含 $n$ 个不同键，创建一个数据结构 $DS$ 来回答以下查询： \[ RankOp(q) = \text{rank of } q \text{ in } S \text{ for all } q\in S ~\text{ 以及任意答案。} \] MMPHF 问题的解决方案在理论和实践中都广泛使用练习。该问题已知的最佳上限将 $DS$ 编码为 $O(n\log\log\log u)$ 位，并在 $O(\log u)$ 时间内执行查询。改善空间上限或表明这个看起来有点奇怪的边界是紧的，这一直是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们展示了后者：具体来说，对于大小为 $u$ 的宇宙中任何 $n$ 元素集合的单调最小完美散列的任何数据结构（确定性或随机）都需要 $Ω(n \cdot \log\log\log{u})$ 期望位来正确回答每个查询。我们通过定义一个图 $\mathbf{G}$ 来实现下界，其中节点是可能的 ${u \choose n}$ 输入，并且如果两个节点不能共享相同的 $DS$，则它们是相邻的。 $DS$ 的大小的下限是 $\mathbf{G}$ 色数的对数。最后，我们证明 $\mathbf{G}$ 的分数色数（以及色数）的下界为 $2^{Ω(n \log\log\log u)}$。 本文研究单调极小完美哈希函数（MMPHF）问题，旨在确定其数据结构所需空间的下界。 Sepehr Assadi,Martin Farach-Colton,William Kuszmaul cs.DS

authors_text: Jennifer J. Sun,Markus Marks,Andrew Ulmer,Dipam Chakraborty,Brian Geuther,Edward Hayes,Heng Jia,Vivek Kumar,Sebastian Oleszko,Zachary Partridge,Milan Peelman,Alice Robie,Catherine E. Schretter,Keith Sheppard,Chao Sun,Param Uttarwar,Julian M. Wagner,Eric Werner,Joseph Parker,Pietro Perona,Yisong Yue,Kristin Branson,Ann Kennedy
title: MABe22: A Multi-Species Multi-Task Benchmark for Learned Representations of Behavior
title_zh: MABe22：学习行为表征的多物种多任务基准
comment: To appear in ICML 2023, Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/computational-behavior/our-datasets/mabe2022-dataset
comments: To appear in ICML 2023, Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/computational-behavior/our-datasets/mabe2022-dataset
abstract: We introduce MABe22, a large-scale, multi-agent video and trajectory benchmark to assess the quality of learned behavior representations. This dataset is collected from a variety of biology experiments, and includes triplets of interacting mice (4.7 million frames video+pose tracking data, 10 million frames pose only), symbiotic beetle-ant interactions (10 million frames video data), and groups of interacting flies (4.4 million frames of pose tracking data). Accompanying these data, we introduce a panel of real-life downstream analysis tasks to assess the quality of learned representations by evaluating how well they preserve information about the experimental conditions (e.g. strain, time of day, optogenetic stimulation) and animal behavior. We test multiple state-of-the-art self-supervised video and trajectory representation learning methods to demonstrate the use of our benchmark, revealing that methods developed using human action datasets do not fully translate to animal datasets. We hope that our benchmark and dataset encourage a broader exploration of behavior representation learning methods across species and settings.
summary: We introduce MABe22, a large-scale, multi-agent video and trajectory benchmark to assess the quality of learned behavior representations. This dataset is collected from a variety of biology experiments, and includes triplets of interacting mice (4.7 million frames video+pose tracking data, 10 million frames pose only), symbiotic beetle-ant interactions (10 million frames video data), and groups of interacting flies (4.4 million frames of pose tracking data). Accompanying these data, we introduce a panel of real-life downstream analysis tasks to assess the quality of learned representations by evaluating how well they preserve information about the experimental conditions (e.g. strain, time of day, optogenetic stimulation) and animal behavior. We test multiple state-of-the-art self-supervised video and trajectory representation learning methods to demonstrate the use of our benchmark, revealing that methods developed using human action datasets do not fully translate to animal datasets. We hope that our benchmark and dataset encourage a broader exploration of behavior representation learning methods across species and settings.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 MABe22，这是一种大规模、多智能体视频和轨迹基准，用于评估学习行为表征的质量。该数据集是从各种生物学实验中收集的，包括相互作用的小鼠三联体（470万帧视频+姿势跟踪数据，仅1000万帧姿势）、共生甲虫-蚂蚁相互作用（1000万帧视频数据）和相互作用的苍蝇群（440万帧姿势跟踪数据）。伴随这些数据，我们引入了一组现实生活中的下游分析任务，通过评估它们保存有关实验条件（例如应变、时间、光遗传学刺激）和动物行为的信息的程度来评估学习表征的质量。我们测试了多种最先进的自监督视频和轨迹表示学习方法，以演示我们的基准的使用，揭示使用人类行为数据集开发的方法不能完全转化为动物数据集。我们希望我们的基准和数据集鼓励对跨物种和环境的行为表征学习方法进行更广泛的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MABe22，一个用于评估学习行为表示质量的多物种多任务基准，包含多种生物实验的视频和轨迹数据。
AI.motivation: 现有行为表示学习方法多基于人类动作数据，缺乏针对动物行为的跨物种评估基准，需建立多物种、多任务数据集以推动该领域研究。
AI.method: 收集了小鼠、昆虫和果蝇等多物种的视频及姿态追踪数据，设计下游任务评估表示方法对实验条件和动物行为信息的保留能力，并测试多种自监督学习方法。
AI.result: 发现基于人类动作数据集开发的方法在动物数据上效果不佳，凸显跨物种行为表示学习的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: MABe22基准为跨物种行为表示学习提供了新方向，推动开发适应不同物种和场景的表示方法。

authors_text: Lander Ver Hoef,Henry Adams,Emily J. King,Imme Ebert-Uphoff
title: A Primer on Topological Data Analysis to Support Image Analysis Tasks in Environmental Science
title_zh: 支持环境科学中图像分析任务的拓扑数据分析入门
comment: This work has been submitted to Artificial Intelligence for the Earth Systems (AIES). Copyright in this work may be transferred without further notice
comments: This work has been submitted to Artificial Intelligence for the Earth Systems (AIES). Copyright in this work may be transferred without further notice
abstract: Topological data analysis (TDA) is a tool from data science and mathematics that is beginning to make waves in environmental science. In this work, we seek to provide an intuitive and understandable introduction to a tool from TDA that is particularly useful for the analysis of imagery, namely persistent homology. We briefly discuss the theoretical background but focus primarily on understanding the output of this tool and discussing what information it can glean. To this end, we frame our discussion around a guiding example of classifying satellite images from the Sugar, Fish, Flower, and Gravel Dataset produced for the study of mesocale organization of clouds by Rasp et. al. in 2020 (arXiv:1906:01906). We demonstrate how persistent homology and its vectorization, persistence landscapes, can be used in a workflow with a simple machine learning algorithm to obtain good results, and explore in detail how we can explain this behavior in terms of image-level features. One of the core strengths of persistent homology is how interpretable it can be, so throughout this paper we discuss not just the patterns we find, but why those results are to be expected given what we know about the theory of persistent homology. Our goal is that a reader of this paper will leave with a better understanding of TDA and persistent homology, be able to identify problems and datasets of their own for which persistent homology could be helpful, and gain an understanding of results they obtain from applying the included GitHub example code.

abstract_zh: 拓扑数据分析（TDA）是一种来自数据科学和数学的工具，开始在环境科学领域掀起波澜。在这项工作中，我们试图对 TDA 的一种工具（即持久同源性）提供直观且易于理解的介绍，该工具对于图像分析特别有用。我们简要讨论理论背景，但主要关注理解该工具的输出并讨论它可以收集哪些信息。为此，我们围绕一个指导性示例进行讨论，该示例对来自 Rasp 等人为研究云的中尺度组织而制作的糖、鱼、花和砾石数据集的卫星图像进行分类。等人。 2020 年（arXiv:1906:01906）。我们演示了如何通过简单的机器学习算法在工作流程中使用持久同源性及其矢量化、持久性景观来获得良好的结果，并详细探索如何根据图像级特征来解释这种行为。持久同源性的核心优势之一是它的可解释性，因此在本文中，我们不仅讨论了我们发现的模式，而且还讨论了为什么根据我们对持久同源性理论的了解，可以预期这些结果。我们的目标是，本文的读者将更好地理解 TDA 和持久同源性，能够识别持久同源性可能有帮助的问题和自己的数据集，并了解他们通过应用所包含的 GitHub 示例代码获得的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为环境科学中的图像分析任务提供拓扑数据分析（TDA）的入门介绍，重点介绍持续同调及其向量化方法在卫星图像分类中的应用。
AI.motivation: 拓扑数据分析在环境科学中逐渐受到关注，但缺乏针对图像分析的直观解释。本文希望通过案例演示，帮助研究者理解TDA工具的可解释性及其在环境图像分析中的潜力。
AI.method: 以Rasp等人2020年发布的数据集为例，结合持续同调理论与持久景观向量化方法，通过机器学习算法实现图像分类，并从图像特征角度解释分析结果。
AI.result: 展示了持续同调与机器学习结合在卫星图像分类中的有效性，验证了其结果可通过图像层级特征进行解释，突显了TDA方法的可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文为TDA在环境科学中的应用提供了实践框架，帮助读者掌握该方法的理论基础、适用场景及结果解读能力，促进其在相关领域的进一步应用。

We demonstrate how persistent homology and its vectorization, persistence landscapes, can be used in a workflow with a simple machine learning algorithm to obtain good results, and explore in detail how we can explain this behavior in terms of image-level features. One of the core strengths of persistent homology is how interpretable it can be, so throughout this paper we discuss not just the patterns we find, but why those results are to be expected given what we know about the theory of persistent homology. Our goal is that a reader of this paper will leave with a better understanding of TDA and persistent homology, be able to identify problems and datasets of their own for which persistent homology could be helpful, and gain an understanding of results they obtain from applying the included GitHub example code. 拓扑数据分析（TDA）是一种来自数据科学和数学的工具，开始在环境科学领域掀起波澜。在这项工作中，我们试图对 TDA 的一种工具（即持久同源性）提供直观且易于理解的介绍，该工具对于图像分析特别有用。我们简要讨论理论背景，但主要关注理解该工具的输出并讨论它可以收集哪些信息。为此，我们围绕一个指导性示例进行讨论，该示例对来自 Rasp 等人为研究云的中尺度组织而制作的糖、鱼、花和砾石数据集的卫星图像进行分类。等人。 2020 年（arXiv:1906:01906）。我们演示了如何通过简单的机器学习算法在工作流程中使用持久同源性及其矢量化、持久性景观来获得良好的结果，并详细探索如何根据图像级特征来解释这种行为。持久同源性的核心优势之一是它的可解释性，因此在本文中，我们不仅讨论了我们发现的模式，而且还讨论了为什么根据我们对持久同源性理论的了解，可以预期这些结果。我们的目标是，本文的读者将更好地理解 TDA 和持久同源性，能够识别持久同源性可能有帮助的问题和自己的数据集，并了解他们通过应用所包含的 GitHub 示例代码获得的结果。 本文旨在为环境科学中的图像分析任务提供拓扑数据分析（TDA）的入门介绍，重点介绍持续同调及其向量化方法在卫星图像分类中的应用。 Lander Ver Hoef,Henry Adams,Emily J. King,Imme Ebert-Uphoff cs.LG,cs.CV,math.GN,physics.ao-ph

authors_text: Haohe Liu,Xubo Liu,Xinhao Mei,Qiuqiang Kong,Wenwu Wang,Mark D. Plumbley
title: Surrey System for DCASE 2022 Task 5: Few-shot Bioacoustic Event Detection with Segment-level Metric Learning
title_zh: DCASE 2022 任务 5 的 Surrey 系统：使用分段级度量学习进行小样本生物声学事件检测
comment: Technical Report of the system that ranks 2nd in the DCASE Challenge Task 5. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.07773
comments: Technical Report of the system that ranks 2nd in the DCASE Challenge Task 5. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.07773
abstract: Few-shot audio event detection is a task that detects the occurrence time of a novel sound class given a few examples. In this work, we propose a system based on segment-level metric learning for the DCASE 2022 challenge of few-shot bioacoustic event detection (task 5). We make better utilization of the negative data within each sound class to build the loss function, and use transductive inference to gain better adaptation on the evaluation set. For the input feature, we find the per-channel energy normalization concatenated with delta mel-frequency cepstral coefficients to be the most effective combination. We also introduce new data augmentation and post-processing procedures for this task. Our final system achieves an f-measure of 68.74 on the DCASE task 5 validation set, outperforming the baseline performance of 29.5 by a large margin. Our system is fully open-sourced at https://github.com/haoheliu/DCASE_2022_Task_5.
summary: Few-shot audio event detection is a task that detects the occurrence time of a novel sound class given a few examples. In this work, we propose a system based on segment-level metric learning for the DCASE 2022 challenge of few-shot bioacoustic event detection (task 5). We make better utilization of the negative data within each sound class to build the loss function, and use transductive inference to gain better adaptation on the evaluation set. For the input feature, we find the per-channel energy normalization concatenated with delta mel-frequency cepstral coefficients to be the most effective combination. We also introduce new data augmentation and post-processing procedures for this task. Our final system achieves an f-measure of 68.74 on the DCASE task 5 validation set, outperforming the baseline performance of 29.5 by a large margin. Our system is fully open-sourced at https://github.com/haoheliu/DCASE_2022_Task_5.
abstract_zh: 少镜头音频事件检测是一项在给出几个示例的情况下检测新颖声音类别的出现时间的任务。在这项工作中，我们针对 DCASE 2022 少样本生物声学事件检测挑战（任务 5）提出了一种基于分段级度量学习的系统。我们更好地利用每个声音类别中的负数据来构建损失函数，并使用转导推理来获得对评估集的更好适应。对于输入特征，我们发现每通道能量归一化与德尔塔梅尔频率倒谱系数相结合是最有效的组合。我们还为此任务引入了新的数据增强和后处理程序。我们的最终系统在 DCASE 任务 5 验证集上实现了 68.74 的 f 测量，大幅优于 29.5 的基线性能。我们的系统完全开源，网址为https://github.com/haoheliu/DCASE_2022_Task_5。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于片段级度量学习的系统，用于DCASE 2022任务5的少样本生物声学事件检测。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本音频事件检测方法在利用负样本和适应评估集方面存在不足，需提升检测性能。
AI.method: 通过片段级度量学习优化损失函数，结合通道能量归一化与delta梅尔频率倒谱系数作为输入特征，并引入数据增强与后处理技术。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2022任务5验证集上达到68.74的F值，显著优于基线29.5。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用负样本和迁移推理，显著提升少样本检测性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Michel Breyer,Lionel Ott,Roland Siegwart,Jen Jen Chung
title: Closed-Loop Next-Best-View Planning for Target-Driven Grasping
title_zh: 用于目标驱动抓取的闭环次最佳视图规划
abstract: Picking a specific object from clutter is an essential component of many manipulation tasks. Partial observations often require the robot to collect additional views of the scene before attempting a grasp. This paper proposes a closed-loop next-best-view planner that drives exploration based on occluded object parts. By continuously predicting grasps from an up-to-date scene reconstruction, our policy can decide online to finalize a grasp execution or to adapt the robot's trajectory for further exploration. We show that our reactive approach decreases execution times without loss of grasp success rates compared to common camera placements and handles situations where the fixed baselines fail. Video and code are available at https://github.com/ethz-asl/active_grasp.
summary: Picking a specific object from clutter is an essential component of many manipulation tasks. Partial observations often require the robot to collect additional views of the scene before attempting a grasp. This paper proposes a closed-loop next-best-view planner that drives exploration based on occluded object parts. By continuously predicting grasps from an up-to-date scene reconstruction, our policy can decide online to finalize a grasp execution or to adapt the robot's trajectory for further exploration. We show that our reactive approach decreases execution times without loss of grasp success rates compared to common camera placements and handles situations where the fixed baselines fail. Video and code are available at https://github.com/ethz-asl/active_grasp.
abstract_zh: 从杂乱中挑选特定对象是许多操作任务的重要组成部分。部分观察通常要求机器人在尝试抓取之前收集额外的场景视图。本文提出了一种闭环次佳视图规划器，可根据遮挡的对象部分驱动探索。通过从最新的场景重建中不断预测抓取，我们的策略可以在线决定最终完成抓取执行或调整机器人的轨迹以进行进一步的探索。我们表明，与常见的相机放置相比，我们的反应式方法可以减少执行时间，而不会损失抓取成功率，并且可以处理固定基线失败的情况。视频和代码可在 https://github.com/ethz-asl/active_grasp 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种闭环的下一次最佳视角规划方法，用于目标驱动的抓取任务，通过实时场景重建和自适应探索策略解决杂乱环境中物体遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 在杂乱场景中抓取特定物体时，传统固定视角或预设相机位置难以应对物体遮挡问题，导致抓取效率低下且成功率不稳定。
AI.method: 基于实时场景重建的闭环规划策略，通过持续预测抓取点并动态判断是执行抓取还是调整机器人轨迹以获取新视角，实现对遮挡区域的主动探索。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持抓取成功率的同时显著降低了执行时间，且能处理固定基线方法失效的复杂遮挡场景。
AI.conclusion: 动态视角规划策略有效提升了目标驱动抓取任务的效率和鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Thibaut Issenhuth,Ugo Tanielian,Jérémie Mary,David Picard
title: Unveiling the Latent Space Geometry of Push-Forward Generative Models
title_zh: 揭示前推生成模型的潜在空间几何
abstract: Many deep generative models are defined as a push-forward of a Gaussian measure by a continuous generator, such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or Variational Auto-Encoders (VAEs). This work explores the latent space of such deep generative models. A key issue with these models is their tendency to output samples outside of the support of the target distribution when learning disconnected distributions. We investigate the relationship between the performance of these models and the geometry of their latent space. Building on recent developments in geometric measure theory, we prove a sufficient condition for optimality in the case where the dimension of the latent space is larger than the number of modes. Through experiments on GANs, we demonstrate the validity of our theoretical results and gain new insights into the latent space geometry of these models. Additionally, we propose a truncation method that enforces a simplicial cluster structure in the latent space and improves the performance of GANs.
summary: Many deep generative models are defined as a push-forward of a Gaussian measure by a continuous generator, such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or Variational Auto-Encoders (VAEs). This work explores the latent space of such deep generative models. A key issue with these models is their tendency to output samples outside of the support of the target distribution when learning disconnected distributions. We investigate the relationship between the performance of these models and the geometry of their latent space. Building on recent developments in geometric measure theory, we prove a sufficient condition for optimality in the case where the dimension of the latent space is larger than the number of modes. Through experiments on GANs, we demonstrate the validity of our theoretical results and gain new insights into the latent space geometry of these models. Additionally, we propose a truncation method that enforces a simplicial cluster structure in the latent space and improves the performance of GANs.
abstract_zh: 许多深度生成模型被定义为连续生成器对高斯测度的前推，例如生成对抗网络 (GAN) 或变分自动编码器 (VAE)。这项工作探索了这种深层生成模型的潜在空间。这些模型的一个关键问题是，在学习不连续的分布时，它们倾向于输出目标分布支持之外的样本。我们研究了这些模型的性能与其潜在空间的几何形状之间的关系。基于几何测度理论的最新发展，我们证明了在潜在空间的维度大于模式数量的情况下最优性的充分条件。通过 GAN 的实验，我们证明了理论结果的有效性，并对这些模型的潜在空间几何结构有了新的见解。此外，我们提出了一种截断方法，可以在潜在空间中强制执行简单的簇结构并提高 GAN 的性能。

AI.tldr: 研究推前生成模型的潜在空间几何结构，分析其与模型性能的关系，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在处理不连通分布时易产生偏离目标分布的样本，需探究潜在空间几何结构对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 基于几何测度理论证明潜在空间维度大于模式数时的最优条件，通过实验验证并提出截断方法以构建单纯形聚类结构。
AI.result: 理论结果得到实验验证，揭示潜在空间几何新特性，截断方法有效提升GAN性能。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间几何结构显著影响生成模型性能，优化其结构可有效提升生成效果。

ai_content.tldr: 研究推前生成模型的潜在空间几何结构，分析其与模型性能的关系，并提出改进方法。
ai_content.motivation: 现有生成模型在处理不连通分布时易产生偏离目标分布的样本，需探究潜在空间几何结构对模型性能的影响。

search_text: Unveiling the Latent Space Geometry of Push-Forward Generative Models 揭示前推生成模型的潜在空间几何 Many deep generative models are defined as a push-forward of a Gaussian measure by a continuous generator, such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or Variational Auto-Encoders (VAEs). This work explores the latent space of such deep generative models. A key issue with these models is their tendency to output samples outside of the support of the target distribution when learning disconnected distributions. We investigate the relationship between the performance of these models and the geometry of their latent space. Building on recent developments in geometric measure theory, we prove a sufficient condition for optimality in the case where the dimension of the latent space is larger than the number of modes. Through experiments on GANs, we demonstrate the validity of our theoretical results and gain new insights into the latent space geometry of these models. Additionally, we propose a truncation method that enforces a simplicial cluster structure in the latent space and improves the performance of GANs. 许多深度生成模型被定义为连续生成器对高斯测度的前推，例如生成对抗网络 (GAN) 或变分自动编码器 (VAE)。这项工作探索了这种深层生成模型的潜在空间。这些模型的一个关键问题是，在学习不连续的分布时，它们倾向于输出目标分布支持之外的样本。我们研究了这些模型的性能与其潜在空间的几何形状之间的关系。基于几何测度理论的最新发展，我们证明了在潜在空间的维度大于模式数量的情况下最优性的充分条件。通过 GAN 的实验，我们证明了理论结果的有效性，并对这些模型的潜在空间几何结构有了新的见解。此外，我们提出了一种截断方法，可以在潜在空间中强制执行简单的簇结构并提高 GAN 的性能。 研究推前生成模型的潜在空间几何结构，分析其与模型性能的关系，并提出改进方法。 Thibaut Issenhuth,Ugo Tanielian,Jérémie Mary,David Picard cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Bill Basener
title: Neural Network Learning of Chemical Bond Representations in Spectral Indices and Features
title_zh: 光谱指数和特征中化学键表示的神经网络学习
abstract: In this paper we investigate neural networks for classification in hyperspectral imaging with a focus on connecting the architecture of the network with the physics of the sensing and materials present. Spectroscopy is the process of measuring light reflected or emitted by a material as a function wavelength. Molecular bonds present in the material have vibrational frequencies which affect the amount of light measured at each wavelength. Thus the measured spectrum contains information about the particular chemical constituents and types of bonds. For example, chlorophyll reflects more light in the near-IR rage (800-900nm) than in the red (625-675nm) range, and this difference can be measured using a normalized vegetation difference index (NDVI), which is commonly used to detect vegetation presence, health, and type in imagery collected at these wavelengths. In this paper we show that the weights in a Neural Network trained on different vegetation classes learn to measure this difference in reflectance. We then show that a Neural Network trained on a more complex set of ten different polymer materials will learn spectral 'features' evident in the weights for the network, and these features can be used to reliably distinguish between the different types of polymers. Examination of the weights provides a human-interpretable understanding of the network.
summary: In this paper we investigate neural networks for classification in hyperspectral imaging with a focus on connecting the architecture of the network with the physics of the sensing and materials present. Spectroscopy is the process of measuring light reflected or emitted by a material as a function wavelength. Molecular bonds present in the material have vibrational frequencies which affect the amount of light measured at each wavelength. Thus the measured spectrum contains information about the particular chemical constituents and types of bonds. For example, chlorophyll reflects more light in the near-IR rage (800-900nm) than in the red (625-675nm) range, and this difference can be measured using a normalized vegetation difference index (NDVI), which is commonly used to detect vegetation presence, health, and type in imagery collected at these wavelengths. In this paper we show that the weights in a Neural Network trained on different vegetation classes learn to measure this difference in reflectance. We then show that a Neural Network trained on a more complex set of ten different polymer materials will learn spectral 'features' evident in the weights for the network, and these features can be used to reliably distinguish between the different types of polymers. Examination of the weights provides a human-interpretable understanding of the network.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了用于高光谱成像分类的神经网络，重点是将网络架构与传感和材料的物理原理联系起来。光谱学是测量材料反射或发射的光作为波长函数的过程。材料中存在的分子键具有振动频率，该振动频率会影响每个波长下测量的光量。因此，测量的光谱包含有关特定化学成分和键类型的信息。例如，叶绿素在近红外范围（800-900nm）反射的光比在红色（625-675nm）范围反射的光更多，这种差异可以使用归一化植被差异指数（NDVI）来测量，该指数通常用于检测在这些波长收集的图像中植被的存在、健康状况和类型。在本文中，我们展示了在不同植被类别上训练的神经网络中的权重学会了测量反射率的差异。然后，我们表明，在更复杂的十种不同聚合物材料上训练的神经网络将学习网络权重中明显的光谱“特征”，并且这些特征可用于可靠地区分不同类型的聚合物。对权重的检查提供了对网络的人类可解释的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络在高光谱成像分类中的应用，通过连接网络架构与传感物理及材料特性，学习化学键的光谱特征表示。
AI.motivation: 传统光谱分析依赖人工设计特征，难以适应复杂材料分类需求，需探索神经网络自动学习物理相关特征的方法。
AI.method: 训练神经网络对不同植被和聚合物材料进行分类，通过分析网络权重揭示其学习到的光谱特征（如NDVI差异及聚合物特定波段响应）。
AI.result: 网络权重显式捕捉到植被近红外与红光反射差异及聚合物材料的光谱特征，实现可靠分类且具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络权重可作为物理可解释的光谱特征提取器，为材料分类提供兼具性能与可理解性的新方法。

authors_text: Samuel Cahyawijaya,Alham Fikri Aji,Holy Lovenia,Genta Indra Winata,Bryan Wilie,Rahmad Mahendra,Fajri Koto,David Moeljadi,Karissa Vincentio,Ade Romadhony,Ayu Purwarianti
title: NusaCrowd: A Call for Open and Reproducible NLP Research in Indonesian Languages
title_zh: NusaCrowd：呼吁开展印度尼西亚语言的开放且可重复的 NLP 研究
abstract: At the center of the underlying issues that halt Indonesian natural language processing (NLP) research advancement, we find data scarcity. Resources in Indonesian languages, especially the local ones, are extremely scarce and underrepresented. Many Indonesian researchers do not publish their dataset. Furthermore, the few public datasets that we have are scattered across different platforms, thus makes performing reproducible and data-centric research in Indonesian NLP even more arduous. Rising to this challenge, we initiate the first Indonesian NLP crowdsourcing effort, NusaCrowd. NusaCrowd strives to provide the largest datasheets aggregation with standardized data loading for NLP tasks in all Indonesian languages. By enabling open and centralized access to Indonesian NLP resources, we hope NusaCrowd can tackle the data scarcity problem hindering NLP progress in Indonesia and bring NLP practitioners to move towards collaboration.
summary: At the center of the underlying issues that halt Indonesian natural language processing (NLP) research advancement, we find data scarcity. Resources in Indonesian languages, especially the local ones, are extremely scarce and underrepresented. Many Indonesian researchers do not publish their dataset. Furthermore, the few public datasets that we have are scattered across different platforms, thus makes performing reproducible and data-centric research in Indonesian NLP even more arduous. Rising to this challenge, we initiate the first Indonesian NLP crowdsourcing effort, NusaCrowd. NusaCrowd strives to provide the largest datasheets aggregation with standardized data loading for NLP tasks in all Indonesian languages. By enabling open and centralized access to Indonesian NLP resources, we hope NusaCrowd can tackle the data scarcity problem hindering NLP progress in Indonesia and bring NLP practitioners to move towards collaboration.
abstract_zh: 我们发现数据稀缺是阻碍印度尼西亚自然语言处理（NLP）研究进展的根本问题的核心。印度尼西亚语言的资源，尤其是当地语言的资源极其稀缺且代表性不足。许多印度尼西亚研究人员没有公布他们的数据集。此外，我们拥有的少数公共数据集分散在不同的平台上，因此使得在印度尼西亚 NLP 中进行可重复且以数据为中心的研究变得更加困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们发起了印度尼西亚第一个 NLP 众包项目 NusaCrowd。 NusaCrowd 致力于为所有印度尼西亚语言的 NLP 任务提供最大的数据表聚合和标准化数据加载。通过开放和集中访问印尼 NLP 资源，我们希望 NusaCrowd 能够解决阻碍印尼 NLP 进步的数据稀缺问题，并带动 NLP 从业者走向合作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NusaCrowd项目，旨在通过众包方式收集和整合印尼语言的自然语言处理数据集，解决数据稀缺和分散的问题。
AI.motivation: 印尼语言的NLP研究因数据资源稀缺、分散且不公开而进展受限，阻碍了可重复和数据驱动的研究。
AI.method: 发起印尼首个NLP众包计划，聚合标准化数据集并提供集中化访问，促进资源开放共享。
AI.result: 建立了包含多种印尼语言数据集的聚合平台，推动了NLP研究者间的协作与数据复用。
AI.conclusion: NusaCrowd通过开放数据资源缓解印尼NLP的数据瓶颈，为后续研究提供基础并促进学术界合作。

Rising to this challenge, we initiate the first Indonesian NLP crowdsourcing effort, NusaCrowd. NusaCrowd strives to provide the largest datasheets aggregation with standardized data loading for NLP tasks in all Indonesian languages. By enabling open and centralized access to Indonesian NLP resources, we hope NusaCrowd can tackle the data scarcity problem hindering NLP progress in Indonesia and bring NLP practitioners to move towards collaboration. 我们发现数据稀缺是阻碍印度尼西亚自然语言处理（NLP）研究进展的根本问题的核心。印度尼西亚语言的资源，尤其是当地语言的资源极其稀缺且代表性不足。许多印度尼西亚研究人员没有公布他们的数据集。此外，我们拥有的少数公共数据集分散在不同的平台上，因此使得在印度尼西亚 NLP 中进行可重复且以数据为中心的研究变得更加困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们发起了印度尼西亚第一个 NLP 众包项目 NusaCrowd。 NusaCrowd 致力于为所有印度尼西亚语言的 NLP 任务提供最大的数据表聚合和标准化数据加载。通过开放和集中访问印尼 NLP 资源，我们希望 NusaCrowd 能够解决阻碍印尼 NLP 进步的数据稀缺问题，并带动 NLP 从业者走向合作。 本文提出NusaCrowd项目，旨在通过众包方式收集和整合印尼语言的自然语言处理数据集，解决数据稀缺和分散的问题。 Samuel Cahyawijaya,Alham Fikri Aji,Holy Lovenia,Genta Indra Winata,Bryan Wilie,Rahmad Mahendra,Fajri Koto,David Moeljadi,Karissa Vincentio,Ade Romadhony,Ayu Purwarianti cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Han Sun,Yu Chen
title: Real-Time Elderly Monitoring for Senior Safety by Lightweight Human Action Recognition
title_zh: 轻量级人体动作识别实时老人监控保障老人安全
comment: ef:the 16th IEEE International Symposium on Medical Information and Communication Technology (ISMICT), Virtual Conference, May 2 - 4, 2022
comments: ef:the 16th IEEE International Symposium on Medical Information and Communication Technology (ISMICT), Virtual Conference, May 2 - 4, 2022
abstract: With an increasing number of elders living alone, care-giving from a distance becomes a compelling need, particularly for safety. Real-time monitoring and action recognition are essential to raise an alert timely when abnormal behaviors or unusual activities occur. While wearable sensors are widely recognized as a promising solution, highly depending on user's ability and willingness makes them inefficient. In contrast, video streams collected through non-contact optical cameras provide richer information and release the burden on elders. In this paper, leveraging the Independently-Recurrent neural Network (IndRNN) we propose a novel Real-time Elderly Monitoring for senior Safety (REMS) based on lightweight human action recognition (HAR) technology. Using captured skeleton images, the REMS scheme is able to recognize abnormal behaviors or actions and preserve the user's privacy. To achieve high accuracy, the HAR module is trained and fine-tuned using multiple databases. An extensive experimental study verified that REMS system performs action recognition accurately and timely. REMS meets the design goals as a privacy-preserving elderly safety monitoring system and possesses the potential to be adopted in various smart monitoring systems.
summary: With an increasing number of elders living alone, care-giving from a distance becomes a compelling need, particularly for safety. Real-time monitoring and action recognition are essential to raise an alert timely when abnormal behaviors or unusual activities occur. While wearable sensors are widely recognized as a promising solution, highly depending on user's ability and willingness makes them inefficient. In contrast, video streams collected through non-contact optical cameras provide richer information and release the burden on elders. In this paper, leveraging the Independently-Recurrent neural Network (IndRNN) we propose a novel Real-time Elderly Monitoring for senior Safety (REMS) based on lightweight human action recognition (HAR) technology. Using captured skeleton images, the REMS scheme is able to recognize abnormal behaviors or actions and preserve the user's privacy. To achieve high accuracy, the HAR module is trained and fine-tuned using multiple databases. An extensive experimental study verified that REMS system performs action recognition accurately and timely. REMS meets the design goals as a privacy-preserving elderly safety monitoring system and possesses the potential to be adopted in various smart monitoring systems.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的独居老人，远程护理成为迫切需要，尤其是出于安全考虑。实时监控和动作识别对于在异常行为或异常活动发生时及时发出警报至关重要。虽然可穿戴传感器被广泛认为是一种有前途的解决方案，但高度依赖用户的能力和意愿导致其效率低下。相比之下，通过非接触式光学摄像头采集的视频流可以提供更丰富的信息，减轻老年人的负担。在本文中，利用独立循环神经网络（IndRNN），我们提出了一种基于轻量级人体动作识别（HAR）技术的新颖的老年人安全实时监测（REMS）。使用捕获的骨骼图像，REMS 方案能够识别异常行为或动作并保护用户的隐私。为了实现高精度，HAR 模块使用多个数据库进行训练和微调。大量的实验研究验证了REMS系统能够准确、及时地进行动作识别。 REMS满足了作为保护隐私的老年人安全监控系统的设计目标，并具有在各种智能监控系统中采用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于轻量级人体动作识别的实时老年人安全监测系统REMS，通过非接触式摄像头识别异常行为以保障独居老人安全。
AI.motivation: 独居老人数量增加导致远程照护需求上升，传统可穿戴设备依赖用户配合度低，需开发隐私保护且无需佩戴的实时监测方案。
AI.method: 采用独立递归神经网络（IndRNN）构建轻量级HAR模块，利用骨架图像识别异常行为，并通过多数据库训练优化模型性能。
AI.result: 实验验证REMS系统在动作识别准确率和响应时效性上表现优异，满足隐私保护的老年人安全监测需求。
AI.conclusion: REMS系统有效实现了隐私友好的实时老年人安全监测，具备在智能监控领域广泛应用的潜力。

authors_text: Sitan Yang,Carson Eisenach,Dhruv Madeka
title: MQRetNN: Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting with Retrieval Augmentation
title_zh: MQRetNN：具有检索增强的多水平时间序列预测
comment: Accepted at KDD2022 Workshop on Mining and Learning from Time Series
comments: Accepted at KDD2022 Workshop on Mining and Learning from Time Series
abstract: Multi-horizon probabilistic time series forecasting has wide applicability to real-world tasks such as demand forecasting. Recent work in neural time-series forecasting mainly focus on the use of Seq2Seq architectures. For example, MQTransformer - an improvement of MQCNN - has shown the state-of-the-art performance in probabilistic demand forecasting. In this paper, we consider incorporating cross-entity information to enhance model performance by adding a cross-entity attention mechanism along with a retrieval mechanism to select which entities to attend over. We demonstrate how our new neural architecture, MQRetNN, leverages the encoded contexts from a pretrained baseline model on the entire population to improve forecasting accuracy. Using MQCNN as the baseline model (due to computational constraints, we do not use MQTransformer), we first show on a small demand forecasting dataset that it is possible to achieve ~3% improvement in test loss by adding a cross-entity attention mechanism where each entity attends to all others in the population. We then evaluate the model with our proposed retrieval methods - as a means of approximating an attention over a large population - on a large-scale demand forecasting application with over 2 million products and observe ~1% performance gain over the MQCNN baseline.
summary: Multi-horizon probabilistic time series forecasting has wide applicability to real-world tasks such as demand forecasting. Recent work in neural time-series forecasting mainly focus on the use of Seq2Seq architectures. For example, MQTransformer - an improvement of MQCNN - has shown the state-of-the-art performance in probabilistic demand forecasting. In this paper, we consider incorporating cross-entity information to enhance model performance by adding a cross-entity attention mechanism along with a retrieval mechanism to select which entities to attend over. We demonstrate how our new neural architecture, MQRetNN, leverages the encoded contexts from a pretrained baseline model on the entire population to improve forecasting accuracy. Using MQCNN as the baseline model (due to computational constraints, we do not use MQTransformer), we first show on a small demand forecasting dataset that it is possible to achieve ~3% improvement in test loss by adding a cross-entity attention mechanism where each entity attends to all others in the population. We then evaluate the model with our proposed retrieval methods - as a means of approximating an attention over a large population - on a large-scale demand forecasting application with over 2 million products and observe ~1% performance gain over the MQCNN baseline.
abstract_zh: 多水平概率时间序列预测对于需求预测等现实任务具有广泛的适用性。最近神经时间序列预测的工作主要集中在 Seq2Seq 架构的使用上。例如，MQTransformer（MQCNN 的改进版）在概率需求预测方面展现了最先进的性能。在本文中，我们考虑通过添加跨实体注意机制以及检索机制来选择要关注的实体，从而合并跨实体信息来增强模型性能。我们演示了我们的新神经架构 MQRetNN 如何利用整个群体的预训练基线模型中的编码上下文来提高预测准确性。使用 MQCNN 作为基线模型（由于计算限制，我们不使用 MQTransformer），我们首先在小型需求预测数据集上表明，通过添加跨实体注意机制（其中每个实体关注群体中的所有其他实体），可以实现约 3% 的测试损失改善。然后，我们使用我们提出的检索方法（作为近似关注大量人群的一种手段）在包含超过 200 万个产品的大规模需求预测应用程序上评估模型，并观察到较 MQCNN 基线有约 1% 的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MQRetNN模型，通过引入跨实体注意力机制和检索增强技术，提升多步时间序列预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有Seq2Seq模型（如MQTransformer）在概率需求预测中表现优异，但未充分利用跨实体信息，且在大规模数据中存在计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于MQCNN基线模型，添加跨实体注意力机制使每个实体关注其他实体，并通过检索机制在大规模数据中近似全局注意力。
AI.result: 在小型数据集上测试损失降低约3%，在超200万产品的大型数据集上实现约1%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强的跨实体注意力机制能有效提升多步预测性能，尤其适用于大规模实体场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MQRetNN模型，通过引入跨实体注意力机制和检索增强技术，提升多步时间序列预测的准确性。

authors_text: Skanda Upadhyaya,Shravan Bhat,Siddhanth P. Rao,V Ashwin,Krishnan Chemmangat
title: A cost effective eye movement tracker based wheel chair control algorithm for people with paraplegia
title_zh: 一种针对截瘫患者的基于成本效益的眼动跟踪器的轮椅控制算法
abstract: Spinal cord injuries can often lead to quadriplegia in patients limiting their mobility. Wheelchairs could be a good proposition for patients, but most of them operate either manually or with the help of electric motors operated with a joystick. This, however, requires the use of hands, making it unsuitable for quadriplegic patients. Controlling eye movement, on the other hand, is retained even by people who undergo brain injury. Monitoring the movements in the eye can be a helpful tool in generating control signals for the wheelchair. This paper is an approach to converting obtained signals from the eye into meaningful signals by trying to control a bot that imitates a wheelchair. The overall system is cost-effective and uses simple image processing and pattern recognition to control the bot. An android application is developed, which could be used by the patients' aid for more refined control of the wheelchair in the actual scenario.

The overall system is cost-effective and uses simple image processing and pattern recognition to control the bot. An android application is developed, which could be used by the patients' aid for more refined control of the wheelchair in the actual scenario.
abstract_zh: 脊髓损伤通常会导致患者四肢瘫痪，限制其活动能力。对于患者来说，轮椅可能是一个不错的选择，但大多数轮椅要么手动操作，要么借助操纵杆操作的电动马达操作。然而，这需要用手，因此不适合四肢瘫痪的患者。另一方面，即使脑部受伤的人也能保持对眼球运动的控制。监测眼睛的运动可以成为生成轮椅控制信号的有用工具。本文是一种通过尝试控制模仿轮椅的机器人，将获得的眼睛信号转换为有意义的信号的方法。整个系统具有成本效益，并使用简单的图像处理和模式识别来控制机器人。开发了一款Android应用程序，可以帮助患者在实际场景中对轮椅进行更精细的控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于眼动追踪的低成本轮椅控制算法，帮助脊髓损伤患者通过眼部运动控制轮椅。
AI.motivation: 传统轮椅依赖手部操作，而脊髓损伤患者常因四肢瘫痪无法使用。眼动控制保留了脑损伤患者的控制能力，具有实际应用价值。
AI.method: 采用图像处理和模式识别技术，将眼动信号转换为控制信号，并开发安卓应用实现精细化控制。
AI.result: 成功构建了低成本眼动追踪轮椅控制系统，通过实验验证了其可行性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为四肢瘫痪患者提供了新型辅助控制方案，具有成本低、实现简单的显著优势。

search_text: A cost effective eye movement tracker based wheel chair control algorithm for people with paraplegia 一种针对截瘫患者的基于成本效益的眼动跟踪器的轮椅控制算法 Spinal cord injuries can often lead to quadriplegia in patients limiting their mobility. Wheelchairs could be a good proposition for patients, but most of them operate either manually or with the help of electric motors operated with a joystick. This, however, requires the use of hands, making it unsuitable for quadriplegic patients. Controlling eye movement, on the other hand, is retained even by people who undergo brain injury. Monitoring the movements in the eye can be a helpful tool in generating control signals for the wheelchair. This paper is an approach to converting obtained signals from the eye into meaningful signals by trying to control a bot that imitates a wheelchair. The overall system is cost-effective and uses simple image processing and pattern recognition to control the bot. An android application is developed, which could be used by the patients' aid for more refined control of the wheelchair in the actual scenario. 脊髓损伤通常会导致患者四肢瘫痪，限制其活动能力。对于患者来说，轮椅可能是一个不错的选择，但大多数轮椅要么手动操作，要么借助操纵杆操作的电动马达操作。然而，这需要用手，因此不适合四肢瘫痪的患者。另一方面，即使脑部受伤的人也能保持对眼球运动的控制。监测眼睛的运动可以成为生成轮椅控制信号的有用工具。本文是一种通过尝试控制模仿轮椅的机器人，将获得的眼睛信号转换为有意义的信号的方法。整个系统具有成本效益，并使用简单的图像处理和模式识别来控制机器人。开发了一款Android应用程序，可以帮助患者在实际场景中对轮椅进行更精细的控制。 本文提出一种基于眼动追踪的低成本轮椅控制算法，帮助脊髓损伤患者通过眼部运动控制轮椅。 Skanda Upadhyaya,Shravan Bhat,Siddhanth P. authors_text: Aline Sindel,Bettina Hohberger,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein
title: Multi-modal Retinal Image Registration Using a Keypoint-Based Vessel Structure Aligning Network
title_zh: 使用基于关键点的血管结构对准网络的多模态视网膜图像配准
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, accepted to MICCAI 2022
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, accepted to MICCAI 2022
abstract: In ophthalmological imaging, multiple imaging systems, such as color fundus, infrared, fluorescein angiography, optical coherence tomography (OCT) or OCT angiography, are often involved to make a diagnosis of retinal disease. Multi-modal retinal registration techniques can assist ophthalmologists by providing a pixel-based comparison of aligned vessel structures in images from different modalities or acquisition times. To this end, we propose an end-to-end trainable deep learning method for multi-modal retinal image registration. Our method extracts convolutional features from the vessel structure for keypoint detection and description and uses a graph neural network for feature matching. The keypoint detection and description network and graph neural network are jointly trained in a self-supervised manner using synthetic multi-modal image pairs and are guided by synthetically sampled ground truth homographies. Our method demonstrates higher registration accuracy as competing methods for our synthetic retinal dataset and generalizes well for our real macula dataset and a public fundus dataset.
summary: In ophthalmological imaging, multiple imaging systems, such as color fundus, infrared, fluorescein angiography, optical coherence tomography (OCT) or OCT angiography, are often involved to make a diagnosis of retinal disease. Multi-modal retinal registration techniques can assist ophthalmologists by providing a pixel-based comparison of aligned vessel structures in images from different modalities or acquisition times. To this end, we propose an end-to-end trainable deep learning method for multi-modal retinal image registration. Our method extracts convolutional features from the vessel structure for keypoint detection and description and uses a graph neural network for feature matching. The keypoint detection and description network and graph neural network are jointly trained in a self-supervised manner using synthetic multi-modal image pairs and are guided by synthetically sampled ground truth homographies. Our method demonstrates higher registration accuracy as competing methods for our synthetic retinal dataset and generalizes well for our real macula dataset and a public fundus dataset.
abstract_zh: 在眼科成像中，常常涉及多种成像系统，例如彩色眼底、红外、荧光素血管造影、光学相干断层扫描（OCT）或OCT血管造影，以对视网膜疾病进行诊断。多模态视网膜配准技术可以通过对不同模态或采集时间的图像中对齐的血管结构进行基于像素的比较来帮助眼科医生。为此，我们提出了一种用于多模态视网膜图像配准的端到端可训练深度学习方法。我们的方法从血管结构中提取卷积特征进行关键点检测和描述，并使用图神经网络进行特征匹配。关键点检测和描述网络以及图神经网络使用合成多模态图像对以自监督方式联合训练，并由合成采样的地面实况单应性引导。我们的方法与我们的合成视网膜数据集的竞争方法相比表现出更高的配准精度，并且对于我们的真实黄斑数据集和公共眼底数据集具有很好的概括性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于关键点的多模态视网膜图像配准方法，通过深度学习实现不同成像设备获取的视网膜图像的血管结构对齐。
AI.motivation: 眼科诊断需融合多种成像设备获取的视网膜图像，但现有配准方法难以准确对齐不同模态或时间点的血管结构，影响诊断效率。
AI.method: 设计端到端深度学习框架，结合卷积网络提取血管特征进行关键点检测与描述，并采用图神经网络实现特征匹配，通过合成数据与自监督学习优化模型。
AI.result: 在合成视网膜数据集及真实黄斑数据集、公开眼底数据集上均取得优于现有方法的配准精度，且具备良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习与图神经网络有效提升多模态视网膜图像配准精度，为眼科疾病诊断提供可靠技术支撑。

search_text: Multi-modal Retinal Image Registration Using a Keypoint-Based Vessel Structure Aligning Network 使用基于关键点的血管结构对准网络的多模态视网膜图像配准 In ophthalmological imaging, multiple imaging systems, such as color fundus, infrared, fluorescein angiography, optical coherence tomography (OCT) or OCT angiography, are often involved to make a diagnosis of retinal disease. Multi-modal retinal registration techniques can assist ophthalmologists by providing a pixel-based comparison of aligned vessel structures in images from different modalities or acquisition times. To this end, we propose an end-to-end trainable deep learning method for multi-modal retinal image registration. Our method extracts convolutional features from the vessel structure for keypoint detection and description and uses a graph neural network for feature matching. The keypoint detection and description network and graph neural network are jointly trained in a self-supervised manner using synthetic multi-modal image pairs and are guided by synthetically sampled ground truth homographies. Our method demonstrates higher registration accuracy as competing methods for our synthetic retinal dataset and generalizes well for our real macula dataset and a public fundus dataset. 在眼科成像中，常常涉及多种成像系统，例如彩色眼底、红外、荧光素血管造影、光学相干断层扫描（OCT）或OCT血管造影，以对视网膜疾病进行诊断。多模态视网膜配准技术可以通过对不同模态或采集时间的图像中对齐的血管结构进行基于像素的比较来帮助眼科医生。为此，我们提出了一种用于多模态视网膜图像配准的端到端可训练深度学习方法。我们的方法从血管结构中提取卷积特征进行关键点检测和描述，并使用图神经网络进行特征匹配。关键点检测和描述网络以及图神经网络使用合成多模态图像对以自监督方式联合训练，并由合成采样的地面实况单应性引导。我们的方法与我们的合成视网膜数据集的竞争方法相比表现出更高的配准精度，并且对于我们的真实黄斑数据集和公共眼底数据集具有很好的概括性。 本文提出一种基于关键点的多模态视网膜图像配准方法，通过深度学习实现不同成像设备获取的视网膜图像的血管结构对齐。 Aline Sindel,Bettina Hohberger,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein cs.CV

authors_text: Boxi Wu,Jindong Gu,Zhifeng Li,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He,Wei Liu
title: Towards Efficient Adversarial Training on Vision Transformers
title_zh: 实现视觉变压器的高效对抗训练
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT), as a powerful alternative to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), has received much attention. Recent work showed that ViTs are also vulnerable to adversarial examples like CNNs. To build robust ViTs, an intuitive way is to apply adversarial training since it has been shown as one of the most effective ways to accomplish robust CNNs. However, one major limitation of adversarial training is its heavy computational cost. The self-attention mechanism adopted by ViTs is a computationally intense operation whose expense increases quadratically with the number of input patches, making adversarial training on ViTs even more time-consuming. In this work, we first comprehensively study fast adversarial training on a variety of vision transformers and illustrate the relationship between the efficiency and robustness. Then, to expediate adversarial training on ViTs, we propose an efficient Attention Guided Adversarial Training mechanism. Specifically, relying on the specialty of self-attention, we actively remove certain patch embeddings of each layer with an attention-guided dropping strategy during adversarial training. The slimmed self-attention modules accelerate the adversarial training on ViTs significantly. With only 65\% of the fast adversarial training time, we match the state-of-the-art results on the challenging ImageNet benchmark.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT), as a powerful alternative to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), has received much attention. Recent work showed that ViTs are also vulnerable to adversarial examples like CNNs. To build robust ViTs, an intuitive way is to apply adversarial training since it has been shown as one of the most effective ways to accomplish robust CNNs. However, one major limitation of adversarial training is its heavy computational cost. The self-attention mechanism adopted by ViTs is a computationally intense operation whose expense increases quadratically with the number of input patches, making adversarial training on ViTs even more time-consuming. In this work, we first comprehensively study fast adversarial training on a variety of vision transformers and illustrate the relationship between the efficiency and robustness. Then, to expediate adversarial training on ViTs, we propose an efficient Attention Guided Adversarial Training mechanism. Specifically, relying on the specialty of self-attention, we actively remove certain patch embeddings of each layer with an attention-guided dropping strategy during adversarial training. The slimmed self-attention modules accelerate the adversarial training on ViTs significantly. With only 65\% of the fast adversarial training time, we match the state-of-the-art results on the challenging ImageNet benchmark.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的强大替代品，受到了广泛关注。最近的研究表明，ViT 也容易受到 CNN 等对抗性例子的影响。要构建鲁棒的 ViT，一种直观的方法是应用对抗性训练，因为它已被证明是实现鲁棒 CNN 的最有效方法之一。然而，对抗训练的一个主要限制是其高昂的计算成本。 ViTs 采用的自注意力机制是一种计算密集型操作，其费用随着输入补丁的数量呈二次方增加，使得 ViTs 的对抗训练更加耗时。在这项工作中，我们首先全面研究了各种视觉变换器的快速对抗训练，并说明了效率和鲁棒性之间的关系。然后，为了加快 ViT 的对抗训练，我们提出了一种有效的注意力引导对抗训练机制。具体来说，依靠自注意力的特殊性，我们在对抗训练过程中通过注意力引导的丢弃策略主动删除每层的某些补丁嵌入。精简的自注意力模块显着加速了 ViT 的对抗训练。仅用 65% 的快速对抗训练时间，我们就可以在具有挑战性的 ImageNet 基准上匹配最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的注意力引导对抗训练机制，以降低视觉Transformer（ViT）的对抗训练计算成本，同时保持模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: ViT虽强大但易受对抗样本攻击，传统对抗训练因自注意力机制的高计算复杂度导致效率低下，亟需平衡效率与鲁棒性的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于自注意力机制特性，提出注意力引导的动态丢弃策略，在对抗训练中主动移除部分冗余的patch嵌入，压缩自注意力模块计算量。
AI.result: 在ImageNet基准测试中，仅需65%的快速对抗训练时间即可达到最先进鲁棒性水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制优化对抗训练流程，在显著降低计算成本的同时保持模型安全性，为ViT的高效鲁棒训练提供新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 基于自注意力机制特性，提出注意力引导的动态丢弃策略，在对抗训练中主动移除部分冗余的patch嵌入，压缩自注意力模块计算量。
ai_content_json.result: 在ImageNet基准测试中，仅需65%的快速对抗训练时间即可达到最先进鲁棒性水平。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过注意力机制优化对抗训练流程，在显著降低计算成本的同时保持模型安全性，为ViT的高效鲁棒训练提供新思路。

search_text: Towards Efficient Adversarial Training on Vision Transformers 实现视觉变压器的高效对抗训练 Vision Transformer (ViT), as a powerful alternative to Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), has received much attention. Recent work showed that ViTs are also vulnerable to adversarial examples like CNNs. To build robust ViTs, an intuitive way is to apply adversarial training since it has been shown as one of the most effective ways to accomplish robust CNNs. However, one major limitation of adversarial training is its heavy computational cost. The self-attention mechanism adopted by ViTs is a computationally intense operation whose expense increases quadratically with the number of input patches, making adversarial training on ViTs even more time-consuming. In this work, we first comprehensively study fast adversarial training on a variety of vision transformers and illustrate the relationship between the efficiency and robustness. Then, to expediate adversarial training on ViTs, we propose an efficient Attention Guided Adversarial Training mechanism. Specifically, relying on the specialty of self-attention, we actively remove certain patch embeddings of each layer with an attention-guided dropping strategy during adversarial training. The slimmed self-attention modules accelerate the adversarial training on ViTs significantly. With only 65\% of the fast adversarial training time, we match the state-of-the-art results on the challenging ImageNet benchmark. 视觉变换器（ViT）作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的强大替代品，受到了广泛关注。最近的研究表明，ViT 也容易受到 CNN 等对抗性例子的影响。要构建鲁棒的 ViT，一种直观的方法是应用对抗性训练，因为它已被证明是实现鲁棒 CNN 的最有效方法之一。然而，对抗训练的一个主要限制是其高昂的计算成本。 ViTs 采用的自注意力机制是一种计算密集型操作，其费用随着输入补丁的数量呈二次方增加，使得 ViTs 的对抗训练更加耗时。在这项工作中，我们首先全面研究了各种视觉变换器的快速对抗训练，并说明了效率和鲁棒性之间的关系。然后，为了加快 ViT 的对抗训练，我们提出了一种有效的注意力引导对抗训练机制。具体来说，依靠自注意力的特殊性，我们在对抗训练过程中通过注意力引导的丢弃策略主动删除每层的某些补丁嵌入。精简的自注意力模块显着加速了 ViT 的对抗训练。仅用 65% 的快速对抗训练时间，我们就可以在具有挑战性的 ImageNet 基准上匹配最先进的结果。 本文提出一种高效的注意力引导对抗训练机制，以降低视觉Transformer（ViT）的对抗训练计算成本，同时保持模型鲁棒性。 Boxi Wu,Jindong Gu,Zhifeng Li,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He,Wei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Suman Ghosh,Guillermo Gallego
title: Multi-Event-Camera Depth Estimation and Outlier Rejection by Refocused Events Fusion
title_zh: 通过重新聚焦事件融合进行多事件相机深度估计和异常值拒绝
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that offer advantages over traditional cameras. They operate asynchronously, sampling the scene at microsecond resolution and producing a stream of brightness changes. This unconventional output has sparked novel computer vision methods to unlock the camera's potential. Here, the problem of event-based stereo 3D reconstruction for SLAM is considered. Most event-based stereo methods attempt to exploit the high temporal resolution of the camera and the simultaneity of events across cameras to establish matches and estimate depth. By contrast, this work investigates how to estimate depth without explicit data association by fusing Disparity Space Images (DSIs) originated in efficient monocular methods. Fusion theory is developed and applied to design multi-camera 3D reconstruction algorithms that produce state-of-the-art results, as confirmed by comparisons with four baseline methods and tests on a variety of available datasets.
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that offer advantages over traditional cameras. They operate asynchronously, sampling the scene at microsecond resolution and producing a stream of brightness changes. This unconventional output has sparked novel computer vision methods to unlock the camera's potential. Here, the problem of event-based stereo 3D reconstruction for SLAM is considered. Most event-based stereo methods attempt to exploit the high temporal resolution of the camera and the simultaneity of events across cameras to establish matches and estimate depth. By contrast, this work investigates how to estimate depth without explicit data association by fusing Disparity Space Images (DSIs) originated in efficient monocular methods. Fusion theory is developed and applied to design multi-camera 3D reconstruction algorithms that produce state-of-the-art results, as confirmed by comparisons with four baseline methods and tests on a variety of available datasets.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机是仿生传感器，与传统摄像机相比具有优势。它们异步运行，以微秒分辨率对场景进行采样并产生一系列亮度变化。这种非常规的输出激发了新颖的计算机视觉方法来释放相机的潜力。这里，考虑SLAM的基于事件的立体3D重建问题。大多数基于事件的立体方法试图利用相机的高时间分辨率和跨相机事件的同时性来建立匹配和估计深度。相比之下，这项工作研究了如何通过融合源自高效单目方法的视差空间图像（DSI）来估计深度，而无需显式数据关联。融合理论被开发并应用于设计多相机 3D 重建算法，这些算法产生最先进的结果，这通过与四种基线方法的比较和对各种可用数据集的测试得到证实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于重聚焦事件融合的多事件相机深度估计方法，无需显式数据关联即可实现高精度3D重建。
AI.motivation: 传统事件相机立体匹配方法依赖显式数据关联，存在计算复杂度高和匹配误差问题，而单目DSI方法效率不足，需探索更优融合策略。
AI.method: 通过融合多相机产生的视差空间图像（DSI），结合重聚焦事件处理理论，设计无需显式匹配的多相机3D重建算法。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上优于四种基线方法，实现最先进的深度估计精度和异常值抑制效果。
AI.conclusion: 融合DSI的多事件相机深度估计方法有效解决了立体匹配难题，为SLAM等应用提供了高效鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Quentin Serdel,Christophe Grand,Julien Marzat,Julien Moras
title: Online Localisation and Colored Mesh Reconstruction Architecture for 3D Visual Feedback in Robotic Exploration Missions
title_zh: 机器人探索任务中 3D 视觉反馈的在线定位和彩色网格重建架构
abstract: This paper introduces an Online Localisation and Colored Mesh Reconstruction (OLCMR) ROS perception architecture for ground exploration robots aiming to perform robust Simultaneous Localisation And Mapping (SLAM) in challenging unknown environments and provide an associated colored 3D mesh representation in real time. It is intended to be used by a remote human operator to easily visualise the mapped environment during or after the mission or as a development base for further researches in the field of exploration robotics. The architecture is mainly composed of carefully-selected open-source ROS implementations of a LiDAR-based SLAM algorithm alongside a colored surface reconstruction procedure using a point cloud and RGB camera images projected into the 3D space. The overall performances are evaluated on the Newer College handheld LiDAR-Vision reference dataset and on two experimental trajectories gathered on board of representative wheeled robots in respectively urban and countryside outdoor environments. Index Terms: Field Robots, Mapping, SLAM, Colored Surface Reconstruction
summary: This paper introduces an Online Localisation and Colored Mesh Reconstruction (OLCMR) ROS perception architecture for ground exploration robots aiming to perform robust Simultaneous Localisation And Mapping (SLAM) in challenging unknown environments and provide an associated colored 3D mesh representation in real time. It is intended to be used by a remote human operator to easily visualise the mapped environment during or after the mission or as a development base for further researches in the field of exploration robotics. The architecture is mainly composed of carefully-selected open-source ROS implementations of a LiDAR-based SLAM algorithm alongside a colored surface reconstruction procedure using a point cloud and RGB camera images projected into the 3D space. The overall performances are evaluated on the Newer College handheld LiDAR-Vision reference dataset and on two experimental trajectories gathered on board of representative wheeled robots in respectively urban and countryside outdoor environments. Index Terms: Field Robots, Mapping, SLAM, Colored Surface Reconstruction
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于地面探索机器人的在线定位和彩色网格重建 (OLCMR) ROS 感知架构，旨在在具有挑战性的未知环境中执行强大的同步定位和建图 (SLAM)，并实时提供相关的彩色 3D 网格表示。它旨在供远程人类操作员在任务期间或任务结束后轻松可视化地图环境，或作为探索机器人领域进一步研究的开发基础。该架构主要由精心挑选的基于 LiDAR 的 SLAM 算法的开源 ROS 实现以及使用点云和投影到 3D 空间的 RGB 相机图像的彩色表面重建程序组成。整体性能是在 Newer College 手持式 LiDAR 视觉参考数据集和分别在城市和乡村室外环境中的代表性轮式机器人上收集的两个实验轨迹上进行评估的。索引术语：野外机器人、建图、SLAM、彩色表面重建

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ROS的在线定位与彩色网格重建架构（OLCMR），旨在为地面探索机器人提供在复杂未知环境下的实时SLAM和3D彩色网格重建，以支持远程操作员的可视化反馈。
AI.motivation: 在未知和复杂环境中，机器人需要鲁棒的SLAM能力和实时3D环境表示，以辅助远程操作员有效感知和决策，同时为后续研究提供基础。
AI.method: 架构结合了开源ROS中的LiDAR SLAM算法与点云及RGB图像的彩色表面重建技术，通过投影RGB图像到3D空间生成实时彩色网格。
AI.result: 在Newer College数据集及城市和乡村户外实验轨迹中验证，系统实现了准确的定位与高质量的实时彩色网格重建。
AI.conclusion: OLCMR架构有效支持了探索机器人的实时3D环境建模，为远程操作和进一步研究提供了可靠的基础框架。

authors_text: Mahdi Gilany,Paul Wilson,Amoon Jamzad,Fahimeh Fooladgar,Minh Nguyen Nhat To,Brian Wodlinger,Purang Abolmaesumi,Parvin Mousavi
title: Towards Confident Detection of Prostate Cancer using High Resolution Micro-ultrasound
title_zh: 使用高分辨率微超声可靠地检测前列腺癌
abstract: MOTIVATION: Detection of prostate cancer during transrectal ultrasound-guided biopsy is challenging. The highly heterogeneous appearance of cancer, presence of ultrasound artefacts, and noise all contribute to these difficulties. Recent advancements in high-frequency ultrasound imaging - micro-ultrasound - have drastically increased the capability of tissue imaging at high resolution. Our aim is to investigate the development of a robust deep learning model specifically for micro-ultrasound-guided prostate cancer biopsy. For the model to be clinically adopted, a key challenge is to design a solution that can confidently identify the cancer, while learning from coarse histopathology measurements of biopsy samples that introduce weak labels. METHODS: We use a dataset of micro-ultrasound images acquired from 194 patients, who underwent prostate biopsy. We train a deep model using a co-teaching paradigm to handle noise in labels, together with an evidential deep learning method for uncertainty estimation. We evaluate the performance of our model using the clinically relevant metric of accuracy vs. confidence. RESULTS: Our model achieves a well-calibrated estimation of predictive uncertainty with area under the curve of 88$\%$. The use of co-teaching and evidential deep learning in combination yields significantly better uncertainty estimation than either alone. We also provide a detailed comparison against state-of-the-art in uncertainty estimation.

abstract_zh: 动机：经直肠超声引导活检过程中前列腺癌的检测具有挑战性。癌症的高度异质性外观、超声伪影的存在以及噪声都导致了这些困难。高频超声成像（微超声）的最新进展极大地提高了高分辨率组织成像的能力。我们的目标是研究专门用于微超声引导前列腺癌活检的强大深度学习模型的开发。对于临床采用的模型，一个关键的挑战是设计一种能够自信地识别癌症的解决方案，同时从引入弱标签的活检样本的粗略组织病理学测量中学习。方法：我们使用从 194 名接受前列腺活检的患者身上采集的显微超声图像数据集。我们使用共同教学范式来训练深度模型来处理标签中的噪声，并结合用于不确定性估计的证据深度学习方法。我们使用临床相关的准确性与置信度指标来评估我们模型的性能。结果：我们的模型实现了预测不确定性的良好校准估计，曲线下面积为 88$\%$。联合教学和证据深度学习的结合使用比单独使用任何一种方法都能产生更好的不确定性估计。我们还提供了与不确定性估计中最先进的技术的详细比较。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种基于微超声的深度学习模型，用于前列腺癌活检中的癌症检测，并通过不确定性估计提高模型的临床可靠性。
AI.motivation: 经直肠超声引导活检中前列腺癌检测面临癌症异质性、超声伪影和噪声等挑战，而微超声技术虽能提供高分辨率成像，但需解决弱标签（粗略病理测量）下的模型鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 使用194名患者的微超声图像数据集，结合共教学（co-teaching）框架处理标签噪声，并引入证据深度学习方法进行不确定性估计，通过临床相关指标（准确率与置信度）评估模型性能。
AI.result: 模型实现了88%的AUC值，表明预测不确定性估计良好；共教学与证据深度学习联合使用显著优于单独方法，且优于现有不确定性估计技术。
AI.conclusion: 联合使用共教学与证据深度学习可有效提升微超声引导下前列腺癌检测的不确定性估计能力，为临床应用提供可靠依据。

authors_text: Bestami Günay,Sefa Burak Okcu,Hasan Şakir Bilge
title: LPYOLO: Low Precision YOLO for Face Detection on FPGA
title_zh: LPYOLO：FPGA 上用于人脸检测的低精度 YOLO
abstract: In recent years, number of edge computing devices and artificial intelligence applications on them have advanced excessively. In edge computing, decision making processes and computations are moved from servers to edge devices. Hence, cheap and low power devices are required. FPGAs are very low power, inclined to do parallel operations and deeply suitable devices for running Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) which are the fundamental unit of an artificial intelligence application. Face detection on surveillance systems is the most expected application on the security market. In this work, TinyYolov3 architecture is redesigned and deployed for face detection. It is a CNN based object detection method and developed for embedded systems. PYNQ-Z2 is selected as a target board which has low-end Xilinx Zynq 7020 System-on-Chip (SoC) on it. Redesigned TinyYolov3 model is defined in numerous bit width precisions with Brevitas library which brings fundamental CNN layers and activations in integer quantized form. Then, the model is trained in a quantized structure with WiderFace dataset. In order to decrease latency and power consumption, onchip memory of the FPGA is configured as a storage of whole network parameters and the last activation function is modified as rescaled HardTanh instead of Sigmoid. Also, high degree of parallelism is applied to logical resources of the FPGA. The model is converted to an HLS based application with using FINN framework and FINN-HLS library which includes the layer definitions in C++. Later, the model is synthesized and deployed. CPU of the SoC is employed with multithreading mechanism and responsible for preprocessing, postprocessing and TCP/IP streaming operations. Consequently, 2.4 Watt total board power consumption, 18 Frames-Per-Second (FPS) throughput and 0.757 mAP accuracy rate on Easy category of the WiderFace are achieved with 4 bits precision model.

The model is converted to an HLS based application with using FINN framework and FINN-HLS library which includes the layer definitions in C++. Later, the model is synthesized and deployed.
