abstract_zh: 近年来，边缘计算设备及其上的人工智能应用数量突飞猛进。在边缘计算中，决策过程和计算从服务器转移到边缘设备。因此，需要廉价且低功耗的设备。 FPGA 功耗非常低，倾向于进行并行操作，并且非常适合运行卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的设备，卷积神经网络是人工智能应用的基本单元。监控系统上的人脸检测是安防市场上最受期待的应用。在这项工作中，TinyYolov3 架构被重新设计并部署用于人脸检测。它是一种基于 CNN 的目标检测方法，专为嵌入式系统开发。选择 PYNQ-Z2 作为目标板，其上装有低端 Xilinx Zynq 7020 片上系统 (SoC)。重新设计的 TinyYolov3 模型通过 Brevitas 库定义了多种位宽精度，该库以整数量化形式带来了基本的 CNN 层和激活。然后，使用 WiderFace 数据集在量化结构中训练模型。为了减少延迟和功耗，FPGA的片上存储器被配置为整个网络参数的存储，并且最后的激活函数被修改为重新缩放的HardTanh而不是Sigmoid。此外，FPGA的逻辑资源也采用了高度并行性。使用 FINN 框架和 FINN-HLS 库（其中包括 C++ 中的层定义）将该模型转换为基于 HLS 的应用程序。随后，模型被综合并部署。 SoC的CPU采用多线程机制，负责预处理、后处理和TCP/IP流操作。因此，4 位精度模型可实现 2.4 瓦总板功耗、18 帧每秒 (FPS) 吞吐量以及 WiderFace Easy 类别上 0.757 mAP 准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LPYOLO方法，通过低精度量化和FPGA加速，在PYNQ-Z2开发板上实现高效的面部检测。
AI.motivation: 边缘计算设备需要低成本、低功耗的解决方案，FPGA适合运行CNN模型，而面部检测是安防领域的重要应用。
AI.method: 基于Brevitas库对TinyYolov3进行整数量化，使用WiderFace数据集训练，优化FPGA片上存储与并行计算资源，采用FINN框架转换为HLS应用，并通过多线程CPU处理预后处理。
AI.result: 在4位精度下实现2.4瓦功耗、18帧/秒吞吐量及0.757 mAP准确率（WiderFace易类别），并降低延迟与能耗。
AI.conclusion: 低精度量化结合FPGA硬件加速可有效提升边缘设备面部检测性能，为安防应用提供可行方案。

Consequently, 2.4 Watt total board power consumption, 18 Frames-Per-Second (FPS) throughput and 0.757 mAP accuracy rate on Easy category of the WiderFace are achieved with 4 bits precision model. 近年来，边缘计算设备及其上的人工智能应用数量突飞猛进。在边缘计算中，决策过程和计算从服务器转移到边缘设备。因此，需要廉价且低功耗的设备。 FPGA 功耗非常低，倾向于进行并行操作，并且非常适合运行卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的设备，卷积神经网络是人工智能应用的基本单元。监控系统上的人脸检测是安防市场上最受期待的应用。在这项工作中，TinyYolov3 架构被重新设计并部署用于人脸检测。它是一种基于 CNN 的目标检测方法，专为嵌入式系统开发。选择 PYNQ-Z2 作为目标板，其上装有低端 Xilinx Zynq 7020 片上系统 (SoC)。重新设计的 TinyYolov3 模型通过 Brevitas 库定义了多种位宽精度，该库以整数量化形式带来了基本的 CNN 层和激活。然后，使用 WiderFace 数据集在量化结构中训练模型。为了减少延迟和功耗，FPGA的片上存储器被配置为整个网络参数的存储，并且最后的激活函数被修改为重新缩放的HardTanh而不是Sigmoid。此外，FPGA的逻辑资源也采用了高度并行性。使用 FINN 框架和 FINN-HLS 库（其中包括 C++ 中的层定义）将该模型转换为基于 HLS 的应用程序。随后，模型被综合并部署。 SoC的CPU采用多线程机制，负责预处理、后处理和TCP/IP流操作。因此，4 位精度模型可实现 2.4 瓦总板功耗、18 帧每秒 (FPS) 吞吐量以及 WiderFace Easy 类别上 0.757 mAP 准确率。 本文提出LPYOLO方法，通过低精度量化和FPGA加速，在PYNQ-Z2开发板上实现高效的面部检测。 Bestami Günay,Sefa Burak Okcu,Hasan Şakir Bilge cs.CV,cs.AR,cs.LG

authors_text: Angelika Adensamer,Rita Gsenger,Lukas Daniel Klausner
title: Wer ist schuld, wenn Algorithmen irren? Entscheidungsautomatisierung, Organisationen und Verantwortung
title_zh: 算法是不是应该的？自动化、组织和维护
abstract: Algorithmic decision support (ADS) is increasingly used in a whole array of different contexts and structures in various areas of society, influencing many people's lives. Its use raises questions, among others, about accountability, transparency and responsibility. Our article aims to give a brief overview of the central issues connected to ADS, responsibility and decision-making in organisational contexts and identify open questions and research gaps. Furthermore, we describe a set of guidelines and a complementary digital tool to assist practitioners in mapping responsibility when introducing ADS within their organisational context. -- Algorithmenunterstützte Entscheidungsfindung (algorithmic decision support, ADS) kommt in verschiedenen Kontexten und Strukturen vermehrt zum Einsatz und beeinflusst in diversen gesellschaftlichen Bereichen das Leben vieler Menschen. Ihr Einsatz wirft einige Fragen auf, unter anderem zu den Themen Rechenschaft, Transparenz und Verantwortung. Im Folgenden möchten wir einen Überblick über die wichtigsten Fragestellungen rund um ADS, Verantwortung und Entscheidungsfindung in organisationalen Kontexten geben und einige offene Fragen und Forschungslücken aufzeigen. Weiters beschreiben wir als konkrete Hilfestellung für die Praxis einen von uns entwickelten Leitfaden samt ergänzendem digitalem Tool, welches Anwender:innen insbesondere bei der Verortung und Zuordnung von Verantwortung bei der Nutzung von ADS in organisationalen Kontexten helfen soll.

Ihr Einsatz wirft einige Fragen auf, unter anderem zu den Themen Rechenschaft, Transparenz und Verantwortung. Im Folgenden möchten wir einen Überblick über die wichtigsten Fragestellungen rund um ADS, Verantwortung und Entscheidungsfindung in organisationalen Kontexten geben und einige offene Fragen und Forschungslücken aufzeigen. Weiters beschreiben wir als konkrete Hilfestellung für die Praxis einen von uns entwickelten Leitfaden samt ergänzendem digitalem Tool, welches Anwender:innen insbesondere bei der Verortung und Zuordnung von Verantwortung bei der Nutzung von ADS in organisationalen Kontexten helfen soll.
abstract_zh: 算法决策支持 (ADS) 越来越多地应用于社会各个领域的各种不同环境和结构中，影响着许多人的生活。它的使用引发了有关问责制、透明度和责任等问题。我们的文章旨在简要概述与 ADS、组织环境中的责任和决策相关的核心问题，并确定悬而未决的问题和研究差距。此外，我们还描述了一套指南和一个补充数字工具，以帮助从业者在其组织环境中引入 ADS 时确定责任。 -- Algorithmenunterstützte Entscheidungsfindung（算法决策支持，ADS）在 verschiedenen Kontexten 和 Strukturen vermehrt zum Einsatz 和 beeinflusst in differenten gesellschaftlichen Bereichen das Leben viler Menschen 中进行。 Ihr Einsatz wirft einige Fragen auf，unterem zu den Themen Rechenschaft、Transparenz und Verantwortung。我将详细介绍 ADS 的运行、​​维护和组织结构中的确定性问题和框架和研究方案。 Weiters beschreiben wir als konkrete Hilfestellung für die Praxis einen von uns entwickelten Leitfaden samt ergänzendem digitalem Tool, welches Anwender:innen insbesondere bei der Verortung und Zuordnung bei der Nutzung von aDS inorganizationalen Kontexten helfen索尔。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨算法决策支持（ADS）在组织中的应用带来的责任归属问题，并提出实践指南与数字工具以帮助定位责任。
AI.motivation: 随着ADS在社会各领域的广泛应用，其引发的问责、透明度和责任问题亟待解决，但现有研究存在空白。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析ADS相关责任问题，结合实践需求开发责任映射指南及配套数字工具。
AI.result: 明确了ADS责任归属的关键议题，识别出研究缺口，并提供了责任定位的实践工具与方法论框架。
AI.conclusion: ADS的负责任使用需多维度责任分配机制，实践工具可辅助组织在引入ADS时系统化处理责任问题。

authors_text: Shan Gao,Xihong Wu,Tianshu Qu
title: Room geometry blind inference based on the localization of real sound source and first order reflections
title_zh: 基于真实声源定位和一阶反射的房间几何盲推理
abstract: The conventional room geometry blind inference techniques with acoustic signals are conducted based on the prior knowledge of the environment, such as the room impulse response (RIR) or the sound source position, which will limit its application under unknown scenarios. To solve this problem, we have proposed a room geometry reconstruction method in this paper by using the geometric relation between the direct signal and first-order reflections. In addition to the information of the compact microphone array itself, this method does not need any precognition of the environmental parameters. Besides, the learning-based DNN models are designed and used to improve the accuracy and integrity of the localization results of the direct source and first-order reflections. The direction of arrival (DOA) and time difference of arrival (TDOA) information of the direct and reflected signals are firstly estimated using the proposed DCNN and TD-CNN models, which have higher sensitivity and accuracy than the conventional methods. Then the position of the sound source is inferred by integrating the DOA, TDOA and array height using the proposed DNN model. After that, the positions of image sources and corresponding boundaries are derived based on the geometric relation. Experimental results of both simulations and real measurements verify the effectiveness and accuracy of the proposed techniques compared with the conventional methods under different reverberant environments.
summary: The conventional room geometry blind inference techniques with acoustic signals are conducted based on the prior knowledge of the environment, such as the room impulse response (RIR) or the sound source position, which will limit its application under unknown scenarios. To solve this problem, we have proposed a room geometry reconstruction method in this paper by using the geometric relation between the direct signal and first-order reflections. In addition to the information of the compact microphone array itself, this method does not need any precognition of the environmental parameters. Besides, the learning-based DNN models are designed and used to improve the accuracy and integrity of the localization results of the direct source and first-order reflections. The direction of arrival (DOA) and time difference of arrival (TDOA) information of the direct and reflected signals are firstly estimated using the proposed DCNN and TD-CNN models, which have higher sensitivity and accuracy than the conventional methods. Then the position of the sound source is inferred by integrating the DOA, TDOA and array height using the proposed DNN model. After that, the positions of image sources and corresponding boundaries are derived based on the geometric relation. Experimental results of both simulations and real measurements verify the effectiveness and accuracy of the proposed techniques compared with the conventional methods under different reverberant environments.
abstract_zh: 传统的声学信号房间几何盲推理技术是基于环境的先验知识进行的，例如房间脉冲响应（RIR）或声源位置，这将限制其在未知场景下的应用。为了解决这个问题，本文利用直接信号和一阶反射之间的几何关系提出了一种房间几何重建方法。该方法除了紧凑型麦克风阵列本身的信息外，不需要任何环境参数的预知。此外，设计并使用基于学习的DNN模型来提高直接源和一阶反射的定位结果的准确性和完整性。首先使用所提出的DCNN和TD-CNN模型估计直达信号和反射信号的到达方向（DOA）和到达时间差（TDOA）信息，该模型比传统方法具有更高的灵敏度和精度。然后使用所提出的 DNN 模型整合 DOA、TDOA 和阵列高度来推断声源的位置。之后，根据几何关系导出图像源的位置和相应的边界。仿真和实际测量的实验结果验证了该技术在不同混响环境下与传统方法相比的有效性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需环境先验知识的房间几何盲推断方法，通过直接声源和一次反射声的几何关系重建房间结构。
AI.motivation: 传统基于声学信号的房间几何推断技术依赖环境先验信息（如房间脉冲响应或声源位置），限制了其在未知场景中的应用。
AI.method: 利用直接声与一次反射声的几何关系，结合深度神经网络（DCNN/TD-CNN）估计到达方向（DOA）和时差（TDOA），通过集成阵列高度推断声源位置，并基于几何关系推导镜像声源与边界位置。
AI.result: 仿真与实测实验验证了该方法在不同混响环境下的有效性，相比传统方法具有更高的定位精度和完整性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法无需环境先验信息，通过声学信号几何关系和深度学习实现了高精度房间几何重建，适用于未知场景。

Experimental results of both simulations and real measurements verify the effectiveness and accuracy of the proposed techniques compared with the conventional methods under different reverberant environments. 传统的声学信号房间几何盲推理技术是基于环境的先验知识进行的，例如房间脉冲响应（RIR）或声源位置，这将限制其在未知场景下的应用。为了解决这个问题，本文利用直接信号和一阶反射之间的几何关系提出了一种房间几何重建方法。该方法除了紧凑型麦克风阵列本身的信息外，不需要任何环境参数的预知。此外，设计并使用基于学习的DNN模型来提高直接源和一阶反射的定位结果的准确性和完整性。首先使用所提出的DCNN和TD-CNN模型估计直达信号和反射信号的到达方向（DOA）和到达时间差（TDOA）信息，该模型比传统方法具有更高的灵敏度和精度。然后使用所提出的 DNN 模型整合 DOA、TDOA 和阵列高度来推断声源的位置。之后，根据几何关系导出图像源的位置和相应的边界。仿真和实际测量的实验结果验证了该技术在不同混响环境下与传统方法相比的有效性和准确性。 本文提出了一种无需环境先验知识的房间几何盲推断方法，通过直接声源和一次反射声的几何关系重建房间结构。 Shan Gao,Xihong Wu,Tianshu Qu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Spencer A. Thomas
title: Fast Data Driven Estimation of Cluster Number in Multiplex Images using Embedded Density Outliers
title_zh: 使用嵌入式密度离群值快速数据驱动估计多重图像中的簇数
abstract: The usage of chemical imaging technologies is becoming a routine accompaniment to traditional methods in pathology. Significant technological advances have developed these next generation techniques to provide rich, spatially resolved, multidimensional chemical images. The rise of digital pathology has significantly enhanced the synergy of these imaging modalities with optical microscopy and immunohistochemistry, enhancing our understanding of the biological mechanisms and progression of diseases. Techniques such as imaging mass cytometry provide labelled multidimensional (multiplex) images of specific components used in conjunction with digital pathology techniques. These powerful techniques generate a wealth of high dimensional data that create significant challenges in data analysis. Unsupervised methods such as clustering are an attractive way to analyse these data, however, they require the selection of parameters such as the number of clusters. Here we propose a methodology to estimate the number of clusters in an automatic data-driven manner using a deep sparse autoencoder to embed the data into a lower dimensional space. We compute the density of regions in the embedded space, the majority of which are empty, enabling the high density regions to be detected as outliers and provide an estimate for the number of clusters. This framework provides a fully unsupervised and data-driven method to analyse multidimensional data. In this work we demonstrate our method using 45 multiplex imaging mass cytometry datasets. Moreover, our model is trained using only one of the datasets and the learned embedding is applied to the remaining 44 images providing an efficient process for data analysis. Finally, we demonstrate the high computational efficiency of our method which is two orders of magnitude faster than estimating via computing the sum squared distances as a function of cluster number.
summary: The usage of chemical imaging technologies is becoming a routine accompaniment to traditional methods in pathology. Significant technological advances have developed these next generation techniques to provide rich, spatially resolved, multidimensional chemical images. The rise of digital pathology has significantly enhanced the synergy of these imaging modalities with optical microscopy and immunohistochemistry, enhancing our understanding of the biological mechanisms and progression of diseases. Techniques such as imaging mass cytometry provide labelled multidimensional (multiplex) images of specific components used in conjunction with digital pathology techniques. These powerful techniques generate a wealth of high dimensional data that create significant challenges in data analysis. Unsupervised methods such as clustering are an attractive way to analyse these data, however, they require the selection of parameters such as the number of clusters. Here we propose a methodology to estimate the number of clusters in an automatic data-driven manner using a deep sparse autoencoder to embed the data into a lower dimensional space. We compute the density of regions in the embedded space, the majority of which are empty, enabling the high density regions to be detected as outliers and provide an estimate for the number of clusters. This framework provides a fully unsupervised and data-driven method to analyse multidimensional data. In this work we demonstrate our method using 45 multiplex imaging mass cytometry datasets. Moreover, our model is trained using only one of the datasets and the learned embedding is applied to the remaining 44 images providing an efficient process for data analysis. Finally, we demonstrate the high computational efficiency of our method which is two orders of magnitude faster than estimating via computing the sum squared distances as a function of cluster number.
abstract_zh: 化学成像技术的使用正在成为传统病理学方法的常规补充。重大技术进步已经开发出这些下一代技术，以提供丰富的、空间分辨率的、多维化学图像。数字病理学的兴起显着增强了这些成像方式与光学显微镜和免疫组织化学的协同作用，增强了我们对疾病生物学机制和进展的理解。成像质谱流式细胞术等技术提供与数字病理学技术结合使用的特定成分的标记多维（多重）图像。这些强大的技术产生了大量的高维数据，给数据分析带来了巨大的挑战。聚类等无监督方法是分析这些数据的一种有吸引力的方法，但是它们需要选择聚类数量等参数。在这里，我们提出了一种方法，使用深度稀疏自动编码器将数据嵌入到较低维空间中，以自动数据驱动的方式估计簇的数量。我们计算嵌入空间中的区域的密度，其中大部分是空的，使得高密度区域能够被检测为异常值，并提供簇数量的估计。该框架提供了一种完全无监督且数据驱动的方法来分析多维数据。在这项工作中，我们使用 45 个多重成像质谱流式数据集演示了我们的方法。此外，我们的模型仅使用其中一个数据集进行训练，并将学习到的嵌入应用于其余 44 张图像，从而提供有效的数据分析过程。最后，我们证明了我们的方法的高计算效率，该方法比通过计算作为簇数函数的平方和距离进行估计要快两个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度稀疏自编码器的数据驱动方法，用于自动估计多路图像中的聚类数量。
AI.motivation: 多路成像技术生成的高维数据在病理分析中面临聚类参数（如聚类数）手动选择的挑战，需开发无需人工干预的自动分析方法。
AI.method: 利用深度稀疏自编码器将数据嵌入低维空间，通过计算嵌入空间中密度分布，识别高密度区域作为异常值，从而估计聚类数量。
AI.result: 在45个多路成像数据集上验证方法有效性，模型仅用一个数据集训练即可泛化至其余44个图像，计算效率比传统方法快100倍。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种高效、全监督的多维数据分析方法，显著提升了高维生物医学图像的聚类分析效率。

authors_text: Dongho Kang,Flavio De Vincenti,Stelian Coros
title: Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for Quadrupedal Locomotion Using Second-Order Sensitivity Analysis
title_zh: 使用二阶灵敏度分析的四足运动非线性模型预测控制
comment: 5 pages. 5 figures. Presented in ICRA 2022: 6th Full-Day Workshop on Legged Robots. The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The supplementary video is available in https://youtu.be/BrJSRlAJaX4
comments: 5 pages. 5 figures. Presented in ICRA 2022: 6th Full-Day Workshop on Legged Robots. The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The supplementary video is available in https://youtu.be/BrJSRlAJaX4
abstract: We present a versatile nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) formulation for quadrupedal locomotion. Our formulation jointly optimizes a base trajectory and a set of footholds over a finite time horizon based on simplified dynamics models. We leverage second-order sensitivity analysis and a sparse Gauss-Newton (SGN) method to solve the resulting optimal control problems. We further describe our ongoing effort to verify our approach through simulation and hardware experiments. Finally, we extend our locomotion framework to deal with challenging tasks that comprise gap crossing, movement on stepping stones, and multi-robot control.
summary: We present a versatile nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) formulation for quadrupedal locomotion. Our formulation jointly optimizes a base trajectory and a set of footholds over a finite time horizon based on simplified dynamics models. We leverage second-order sensitivity analysis and a sparse Gauss-Newton (SGN) method to solve the resulting optimal control problems. We further describe our ongoing effort to verify our approach through simulation and hardware experiments. Finally, we extend our locomotion framework to deal with challenging tasks that comprise gap crossing, movement on stepping stones, and multi-robot control.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于四足运动的多功能非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）公式。我们的公式基于简化的动力学模型在有限时间范围内联合优化基本轨迹和一组立足点。我们利用二阶灵敏度分析和稀疏高斯牛顿（SGN）方法来解决由此产生的最优控制问题。我们进一步描述了我们正在进行的努力，通过模拟和硬件实验来验证我们的方法。最后，我们扩展了我们的运动框架来处理具有挑战性的任务，包括跨越间隙、踏脚石上的移动和多机器人控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二阶灵敏度分析和稀疏高斯-牛顿法的非线性模型预测控制方法，用于四足机器人运动控制，实现轨迹与脚点的联合优化，并扩展至复杂地形任务。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人控制方法在处理复杂地形和动态任务时存在优化效率低、适应性差的问题，需更高效的计算框架应对多样的运动挑战。
AI.method: 结合二阶灵敏度分析与稀疏高斯-牛顿优化方法，联合优化机器人基座轨迹与脚点位置；通过仿真与硬件实验验证方法有效性，并扩展至跨沟、踏石行走及多机器人协同控制场景。
AI.result: 成功验证了该控制框架在仿真与实际硬件中的可行性，能够有效处理复杂地形任务，如跨沟、踏石行走及多机器人协同控制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的NMPC框架通过高效优化方法提升了四足机器人对复杂环境的适应能力，为未来多机器人系统和动态运动控制提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Leonidas Droukas,Zoe Doulgeri,Nikolaos L. Tsakiridis,Dimitra Triantafyllou,Ioannis Kleitsiotis,Ioannis Mariolis,Dimitrios Giakoumis,Dimitrios Tzovaras,Dimitrios Kateris,Dionysis Bochtis
title: A Survey of Robotic Harvesting Systems and Enabling Technologies
title_zh: 机器人收割系统和支持技术调查
comment: 55 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication in Journal of Intelligent & Robotic Systems
comments: 55 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for publication in Journal of Intelligent & Robotic Systems
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of ground agricultural robotic systems and applications with special focus on harvesting that span research and commercial products and results, as well as their enabling technologies. The majority of literature concerns the development of crop detection, field navigation via vision and their related challenges. Health monitoring, yield estimation, water status inspection, seed planting and weed removal are frequently encountered tasks. Regarding robotic harvesting, apples, strawberries, tomatoes and sweet peppers are mainly the crops considered in publications, research projects and commercial products. The reported harvesting agricultural robotic solutions, typically consist of a mobile platform, a single robotic arm/manipulator and various navigation/vision systems. This paper reviews reported development of specific functionalities and hardware, typically required by an operating agricultural robot harvester; they include (a) vision systems, (b) motion planning/navigation methodologies (for the robotic platform and/or arm), (c) Human-Robot-Interaction (HRI) strategies with 3D visualization, (d) system operation planning & grasping strategies and (e) robotic end-effector/gripper design. Clearly, automated agriculture and specifically autonomous harvesting via robotic systems is a research area that remains wide open, offering several challenges where new contributions can be made.

Health monitoring, yield estimation, water status inspection, seed planting and weed removal are frequently encountered tasks. Regarding robotic harvesting, apples, strawberries, tomatoes and sweet peppers are mainly the crops considered in publications, research projects and commercial products. abstract_zh: 本文对地面农业机器人系统和应用进行了全面回顾，特别关注涵盖研究和商业产品和成果的收获及其支持技术。大多数文献涉及作物检测、视觉田间导航的发展及其相关挑战。健康监测、产量估算、水分状况检查、播种和除草是经常遇到的任务。关于机器人收割，苹果、草莓、西红柿和甜椒主要是出版物、研究项目和商业产品中考虑的作物。报道的农业收割机器人解决方案通常由移动平台、单个机械臂/机械手和各种导航/视觉系统组成。本文回顾了已报道的特定功能和硬件的开发，这些功能和硬件通常是操作农业机器人收割机所需的；它们包括 (a) 视觉系统、(b) 运动规划/导航方法（用于机器人平台和/或手臂）、(c) 具有 3D 可视化的人机交互 (HRI) 策略、(d) 系统操作规划和抓取策略以及 (e) 机器人末端执行器/夹具设计​​。显然，自动化农业，特别是通过机器人系统进行自主收割是一个仍然开放的研究领域，提出了一些可以做出新贡献的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了农业机器人收获系统及其关键技术，涵盖研究与商业应用，并分析了其核心功能与硬件发展。
AI.motivation: 农业自动化需求增长，但现有机器人收获系统面临技术挑战，需系统总结研究进展与技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与技术分析，梳理农业机器人系统组成、功能模块及关键技术（如视觉、导航、人机交互等）。
AI.result: 总结了移动平台、机械臂、视觉系统等核心组件，指出作物检测、抓取策略等仍是主要挑战，商业化应用有限。
AI.conclusion: 农业机器人收获领域仍需突破技术难题，未来研究应聚焦多作物适应性、环境交互与系统集成优化。

authors_text: Yingdong Hu,Renhao Wang,Kaifeng Zhang,Yang Gao
title: Semantic-Aware Fine-Grained Correspondence
title_zh: 语义感知的细粒度对应
abstract: Establishing visual correspondence across images is a challenging and essential task. Recently, an influx of self-supervised methods have been proposed to better learn representations for visual correspondence. However, we find that these methods often fail to leverage semantic information and over-rely on the matching of low-level features. In contrast, human vision is capable of distinguishing between distinct objects as a pretext to tracking. Inspired by this paradigm, we propose to learn semantic-aware fine-grained correspondence. Firstly, we demonstrate that semantic correspondence is implicitly available through a rich set of image-level self-supervised methods. We further design a pixel-level self-supervised learning objective which specifically targets fine-grained correspondence. For downstream tasks, we fuse these two kinds of complementary correspondence representations together, demonstrating that they boost performance synergistically. Our method surpasses previous state-of-the-art self-supervised methods using convolutional networks on a variety of visual correspondence tasks, including video object segmentation, human pose tracking, and human part tracking.
summary: Establishing visual correspondence across images is a challenging and essential task. Recently, an influx of self-supervised methods have been proposed to better learn representations for visual correspondence. However, we find that these methods often fail to leverage semantic information and over-rely on the matching of low-level features. In contrast, human vision is capable of distinguishing between distinct objects as a pretext to tracking. Inspired by this paradigm, we propose to learn semantic-aware fine-grained correspondence. Firstly, we demonstrate that semantic correspondence is implicitly available through a rich set of image-level self-supervised methods. We further design a pixel-level self-supervised learning objective which specifically targets fine-grained correspondence. For downstream tasks, we fuse these two kinds of complementary correspondence representations together, demonstrating that they boost performance synergistically. Our method surpasses previous state-of-the-art self-supervised methods using convolutional networks on a variety of visual correspondence tasks, including video object segmentation, human pose tracking, and human part tracking.
abstract_zh: 在图像之间建立视觉对应是一项具有挑战性且重要的任务。最近，人们提出了大量的自监督方法来更好地学习视觉对应的表示。然而，我们发现这些方法往往无法利用语义信息并过度依赖低级特征的匹配。相比之下，人类视觉能够区分不同的物体作为跟踪的借口。受这种范式的启发，我们建议学习语义感知的细粒度对应。首先，我们证明语义对应可以通过一组丰富的图像级自监督方法隐式获得。我们进一步设计了一个像素级的自监督学习目标，专门针对细粒度的对应关系。对于下游任务，我们将这两种互补的对应表示融合在一起，证明它们可以协同提高性能。我们的方法超越了之前在各种视觉对应任务上使用卷积网络的最先进的自监督方法，包括视频对象分割、人体姿势跟踪和人体部位跟踪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义感知的细粒度对应学习方法，通过结合语义信息和像素级自监督目标提升视觉对应任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法过度依赖低级特征匹配，未能有效利用语义信息，而人类视觉通过区分物体实现追踪，因此需引入语义感知机制。
AI.method: 首先利用图像级自监督方法获取隐式语义对应，设计像素级自监督目标专门学习细粒度对应，最终融合两种互补表示增强模型表现。
AI.result: 在视频对象分割、人体姿态跟踪等任务中超越了基于卷积网络的最新自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义感知与细粒度对应联合学习能有效提升视觉对应任务的性能，为后续研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Kui Jiang,Zhongyuan Wang,Chen Chen,Zheng Wang,Laizhong Cui,Chia-Wen Lin
title: Magic ELF: Image Deraining Meets Association Learning and Transformer
title_zh: Magic ELF：图像除雨遇见关联学习和 Transformer
abstract: Convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer have achieved great success in multimedia applications. However, little effort has been made to effectively and efficiently harmonize these two architectures to satisfy image deraining. This paper aims to unify these two architectures to take advantage of their learning merits for image deraining. In particular, the local connectivity and translation equivariance of CNN and the global aggregation ability of self-attention (SA) in Transformer are fully exploited for specific local context and global structure representations. Based on the observation that rain distribution reveals the degradation location and degree, we introduce degradation prior to help background recovery and accordingly present the association refinement deraining scheme. A novel multi-input attention module (MAM) is proposed to associate rain perturbation removal and background recovery. Moreover, we equip our model with effective depth-wise separable convolutions to learn the specific feature representations and trade off computational complexity. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method (dubbed as ELF) outperforms the state-of-the-art approach (MPRNet) by 0.25 dB on average, but only accounts for 11.7\% and 42.1\% of its computational cost and parameters. The source code is available at https://github.com/kuijiang94/Magic-ELF.
summary: Convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer have achieved great success in multimedia applications. However, little effort has been made to effectively and efficiently harmonize these two architectures to satisfy image deraining. This paper aims to unify these two architectures to take advantage of their learning merits for image deraining. In particular, the local connectivity and translation equivariance of CNN and the global aggregation ability of self-attention (SA) in Transformer are fully exploited for specific local context and global structure representations. Based on the observation that rain distribution reveals the degradation location and degree, we introduce degradation prior to help background recovery and accordingly present the association refinement deraining scheme. A novel multi-input attention module (MAM) is proposed to associate rain perturbation removal and background recovery. Moreover, we equip our model with effective depth-wise separable convolutions to learn the specific feature representations and trade off computational complexity. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method (dubbed as ELF) outperforms the state-of-the-art approach (MPRNet) by 0.25 dB on average, but only accounts for 11.7\% and 42.1\% of its computational cost and parameters. The source code is available at https://github.com/kuijiang94/Magic-ELF.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer在多媒体应用中取得了巨大成功。然而，为了有效且高效地协调这两种架构以满足图像去雨的需要，我们付出了很少的努力。本文旨在统一这两种架构，以利用它们在图像去雨方面的学习优点。特别是，CNN的局部连通性和平移等变性以及Transformer中自注意力（SA）的全局聚合能力被充分利用用于特定的局部上下文和全局结构表示。基于对降雨分布揭示退化位置和程度的观察，我们引入退化优先以帮助背景恢复，并相应地提出关联细化除雨方案。提出了一种新颖的多输入注意模块（MAM）来将降雨扰动去除和背景恢复相关联。此外，我们为我们的模型配备了有效的深度可分离卷积，以学习特定的特征表示并权衡计算复杂性。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法（称为 ELF）平均优于最先进的方法（MPRNet）0.25 dB，但仅占其计算成本和参数的 11.7% 和 42.1%。源代码位于https://github.com/kuijian94/Magic-ELF。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer架构的图像去雨方法，命名为Magic ELF，旨在通过融合局部特征提取与全局结构建模提升去雨效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效结合CNN的局部感知能力与Transformer的全局建模优势，导致图像去雨任务在复杂雨情下效果受限，需探索更高效的多模态特征关联机制。
AI.method: 设计多输入注意力模块（MAM）关联雨滴去除与背景恢复，结合深度可分离卷积降低计算复杂度，并引入退化先验指导背景重构，同时利用CNN与Transformer的互补特性进行局部-全局特征联合建模。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，Magic ELF相较MPRNet平均提升0.25dB PSNR，计算成本仅为MPRNet的11.7%，参数量减少至42.1%，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合CNN与Transformer的优势并优化计算效率，Magic ELF在图像去雨任务中实现了性能与效率的平衡，为复杂场景下的雨天图像增强提供了新思路。

search_text: Magic ELF: Image Deraining Meets Association Learning and Transformer Magic ELF：图像除雨遇见关联学习和 Transformer Convolutional neural network (CNN) and Transformer have achieved great success in multimedia applications. However, little effort has been made to effectively and efficiently harmonize these two architectures to satisfy image deraining. This paper aims to unify these two architectures to take advantage of their learning merits for image deraining. In particular, the local connectivity and translation equivariance of CNN and the global aggregation ability of self-attention (SA) in Transformer are fully exploited for specific local context and global structure representations. Based on the observation that rain distribution reveals the degradation location and degree, we introduce degradation prior to help background recovery and accordingly present the association refinement deraining scheme. A novel multi-input attention module (MAM) is proposed to associate rain perturbation removal and background recovery. Moreover, we equip our model with effective depth-wise separable convolutions to learn the specific feature representations and trade off computational complexity. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method (dubbed as ELF) outperforms the state-of-the-art approach (MPRNet) by 0.25 dB on average, but only accounts for 11.7\% and 42.1\% of its computational cost and parameters. The source code is available at https://github.com/kuijiang94/Magic-ELF. 卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer在多媒体应用中取得了巨大成功。然而，为了有效且高效地协调这两种架构以满足图像去雨的需要，我们付出了很少的努力。本文旨在统一这两种架构，以利用它们在图像去雨方面的学习优点。特别是，CNN的局部连通性和平移等变性以及Transformer中自注意力（SA）的全局聚合能力被充分利用用于特定的局部上下文和全局结构表示。基于对降雨分布揭示退化位置和程度的观察，我们引入退化优先以帮助背景恢复，并相应地提出关联细化除雨方案。提出了一种新颖的多输入注意模块（MAM）来将降雨扰动去除和背景恢复相关联。此外，我们为我们的模型配备了有效的深度可分离卷积，以学习特定的特征表示并权衡计算复杂性。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法（称为 ELF）平均优于最先进的方法（MPRNet）0.25 dB，但仅占其计算成本和参数的 11.7% 和 42.1%。源代码位于https://github.com/kuijian94/Magic-ELF。 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer架构的图像去雨方法，命名为Magic ELF，旨在通过融合局部特征提取与全局结构建模提升去雨效果。 Kui Jiang,Zhongyuan Wang,Chen Chen,Zheng Wang,Laizhong Cui,Chia-Wen Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Shouan Wang,Xinyu Zhang,GuiPeng Zhang,Yijin Xiong,Ganglin Tian,Shichun Guo,Jun Li
title: Temporal and Spatial Online Integrated Calibration for Camera and LiDAR
title_zh: 相机和激光雷达时空在线一体化标定
abstract: While camera and LiDAR are widely used in most of the assisted and autonomous driving systems, only a few works have been proposed to associate the temporal synchronization and extrinsic calibration for camera and LiDAR which are dedicated to online sensors data fusion. The temporal and spatial calibration technologies are facing the challenges of lack of relevance and real-time. In this paper, we introduce the pose estimation model and environmental robust line features extraction to improve the relevance of data fusion and instant online ability of correction. Dynamic targets eliminating aims to seek optimal policy considering the correspondence of point cloud matching between adjacent moments. The searching optimization process aims to provide accurate parameters with both computation accuracy and efficiency. To demonstrate the benefits of this method, we evaluate it on the KITTI benchmark with ground truth value. In online experiments, our approach improves the accuracy by 38.5\% than the soft synchronization method in temporal calibration. While in spatial calibration, our approach automatically corrects disturbance errors within 0.4 second and achieves an accuracy of 0.3-degree. This work can promote the research and application of sensor fusion.
summary: While camera and LiDAR are widely used in most of the assisted and autonomous driving systems, only a few works have been proposed to associate the temporal synchronization and extrinsic calibration for camera and LiDAR which are dedicated to online sensors data fusion. The temporal and spatial calibration technologies are facing the challenges of lack of relevance and real-time. In this paper, we introduce the pose estimation model and environmental robust line features extraction to improve the relevance of data fusion and instant online ability of correction. Dynamic targets eliminating aims to seek optimal policy considering the correspondence of point cloud matching between adjacent moments. The searching optimization process aims to provide accurate parameters with both computation accuracy and efficiency. To demonstrate the benefits of this method, we evaluate it on the KITTI benchmark with ground truth value. In online experiments, our approach improves the accuracy by 38.5\% than the soft synchronization method in temporal calibration. While in spatial calibration, our approach automatically corrects disturbance errors within 0.4 second and achieves an accuracy of 0.3-degree. This work can promote the research and application of sensor fusion.
abstract_zh: 虽然摄像头和激光雷达广泛应用于大多数辅助和自动驾驶系统中，但只有少数研究将专门用于在线传感器数据融合的摄像头和激光雷达的时间同步和外在校准相关联。时空标定技术面临着缺乏关联性和实时性的挑战。本文引入位姿估计模型和环境鲁棒线特征提取来提高数据融合的相关性和即时在线校正能力。动态目标消除的目的是考虑相邻时刻点云匹配的对应关系来寻求最优策略。搜索优化过程旨在提供准确的参数，同时兼顾计算精度和效率。为了证明该方法的优点，我们在 KITTI 基准上使用真实值对其进行评估。在在线实验中，我们的方法在时间校准方面比软同步方法提高了 38.5% 的精度。在空间校准时，我们的方法可以在 0.4 秒内自动纠正干扰误差，并达到 0.3 度的精度。该工作可以促进传感器融合的研究和应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线集成标定方法，解决摄像头与激光雷达的时序和空间校准问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在传感器数据融合中存在实时性差、校准相关性不足的问题，影响自动驾驶系统性能。
AI.method: 结合姿态估计模型与环境鲁棒线特征提取，通过动态目标消除和优化搜索实现高效参数校准。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，时序校准精度提升38.5%，空间校准误差控制在0.3度以内，响应时间小于0.4秒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升多传感器融合效率，为自动驾驶系统的实时标定提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuetian Weng,Zizheng Pan,Mingfei Han,Xiaojun Chang,Bohan Zhuang
title: An Efficient Spatio-Temporal Pyramid Transformer for Action Detection
title_zh: 用于动作检测的高效时空金字塔变换器
abstract: The task of action detection aims at deducing both the action category and localization of the start and end moment for each action instance in a long, untrimmed video. While vision Transformers have driven the recent advances in video understanding, it is non-trivial to design an efficient architecture for action detection due to the prohibitively expensive self-attentions over a long sequence of video clips. To this end, we present an efficient hierarchical Spatio-Temporal Pyramid Transformer (STPT) for action detection, building upon the fact that the early self-attention layers in Transformers still focus on local patterns. Specifically, we propose to use local window attention to encode rich local spatio-temporal representations in the early stages while applying global attention modules to capture long-term space-time dependencies in the later stages. In this way, our STPT can encode both locality and dependency with largely reduced redundancy, delivering a promising trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. For example, with only RGB input, the proposed STPT achieves 53.6% mAP on THUMOS14, surpassing I3D+AFSD RGB model by over 10% and performing favorably against state-of-the-art AFSD that uses additional flow features with 31% fewer GFLOPs, which serves as an effective and efficient end-to-end Transformer-based framework for action detection.
summary: The task of action detection aims at deducing both the action category and localization of the start and end moment for each action instance in a long, untrimmed video. While vision Transformers have driven the recent advances in video understanding, it is non-trivial to design an efficient architecture for action detection due to the prohibitively expensive self-attentions over a long sequence of video clips. To this end, we present an efficient hierarchical Spatio-Temporal Pyramid Transformer (STPT) for action detection, building upon the fact that the early self-attention layers in Transformers still focus on local patterns. Specifically, we propose to use local window attention to encode rich local spatio-temporal representations in the early stages while applying global attention modules to capture long-term space-time dependencies in the later stages. In this way, our STPT can encode both locality and dependency with largely reduced redundancy, delivering a promising trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. For example, with only RGB input, the proposed STPT achieves 53.6% mAP on THUMOS14, surpassing I3D+AFSD RGB model by over 10% and performing favorably against state-of-the-art AFSD that uses additional flow features with 31% fewer GFLOPs, which serves as an effective and efficient end-to-end Transformer-based framework for action detection.
abstract_zh: 动作检测的任务旨在推导出未修剪的长视频中每个动作实例的动作类别以及开始和结束时刻的定位。虽然视觉 Transformer 推动了视频理解领域的最新进展，但由于长视频片段序列上的自注意力机制成本高昂，设计一种高效的动作检测架构并非易事。为此，我们提出了一种用于动作检测的高效分层时空金字塔变换器（STPT），其基础是 Transformer 中的早期自注意力层仍然关注局部模式。具体来说，我们建议在早期阶段使用局部窗口注意力来编码丰富的局部时空表示，同时在后期应用全局注意力模块来捕获长期时空依赖性。通过这种方式，我们的 STPT 可以对局部性和依赖性进行编码，并大大减少冗余，从而在准确性和效率之间实现有希望的权衡。例如，仅使用 RGB 输入，所提出的 STPT 在 THUMOS14 上实现了 53.6% mAP，超过了 I3D+AFSD RGB 模型 10% 以上，并且与最先进的 AFSD 相比，AFSD 使用额外的流特征，GFLOP 减少了 31%，这是一种有效且高效的基于 Transformer 的端到端动作检测框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的时空金字塔变换器（STPT），用于在长视频中检测动作，同时识别动作类别及起止时间。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉变换器在处理长视频时因自注意力机制计算成本过高，难以实现高效的动作检测。
AI.method: 通过分层设计，早期使用局部窗口注意力捕捉局部时空特征，后期引入全局注意力模块建模长期依赖，减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 仅使用RGB输入时，在THUMOS14数据集上达到53.6% mAP，相较I3D+AFSD模型提升超10%，且计算量减少31%。
AI.conclusion: STPT在保持检测精度的同时显著降低计算成本，为端到端动作检测提供了高效的变换器框架。

conclusion: STPT在保持检测精度的同时显著降低计算成本，为端到端动作检测提供了高效的变换器框架。
search_text: An Efficient Spatio-Temporal Pyramid Transformer for Action Detection 用于动作检测的高效时空金字塔变换器 The task of action detection aims at deducing both the action category and localization of the start and end moment for each action instance in a long, untrimmed video. While vision Transformers have driven the recent advances in video understanding, it is non-trivial to design an efficient architecture for action detection due to the prohibitively expensive self-attentions over a long sequence of video clips. To this end, we present an efficient hierarchical Spatio-Temporal Pyramid Transformer (STPT) for action detection, building upon the fact that the early self-attention layers in Transformers still focus on local patterns. Specifically, we propose to use local window attention to encode rich local spatio-temporal representations in the early stages while applying global attention modules to capture long-term space-time dependencies in the later stages. In this way, our STPT can encode both locality and dependency with largely reduced redundancy, delivering a promising trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. For example, with only RGB input, the proposed STPT achieves 53.6% mAP on THUMOS14, surpassing I3D+AFSD RGB model by over 10% and performing favorably against state-of-the-art AFSD that uses additional flow features with 31% fewer GFLOPs, which serves as an effective and efficient end-to-end Transformer-based framework for action detection. 动作检测的任务旨在推导出未修剪的长视频中每个动作实例的动作类别以及开始和结束时刻的定位。虽然视觉 Transformer 推动了视频理解领域的最新进展，但由于长视频片段序列上的自注意力机制成本高昂，设计一种高效的动作检测架构并非易事。为此，我们提出了一种用于动作检测的高效分层时空金字塔变换器（STPT），其基础是 Transformer 中的早期自注意力层仍然关注局部模式。具体来说，我们建议在早期阶段使用局部窗口注意力来编码丰富的局部时空表示，同时在后期应用全局注意力模块来捕获长期时空依赖性。通过这种方式，我们的 STPT 可以对局部性和依赖性进行编码，并大大减少冗余，从而在准确性和效率之间实现有希望的权衡。例如，仅使用 RGB 输入，所提出的 STPT 在 THUMOS14 上实现了 53.6% mAP，超过了 I3D+AFSD RGB 模型 10% 以上，并且与最先进的 AFSD 相比，AFSD 使用额外的流特征，GFLOP 减少了 31%，这是一种有效且高效的基于 Transformer 的端到端动作检测框架。 本文提出了一种高效的时空金字塔变换器（STPT），用于在长视频中检测动作，同时识别动作类别及起止时间。 Yuetian Weng,Zizheng Pan,Mingfei Han,Xiaojun Chang,Bohan Zhuang cs.CV

authors_text: Haotian Bai,Ruimao Zhang,Jiong Wang,Xiang Wan
title: Weakly Supervised Object Localization via Transformer with Implicit Spatial Calibration
title_zh: 通过带有隐式空间校准的 Transformer 进行弱监督对象定位
abstract: Weakly Supervised Object Localization (WSOL), which aims to localize objects by only using image-level labels, has attracted much attention because of its low annotation cost in real applications. Recent studies leverage the advantage of self-attention in visual Transformer for long-range dependency to re-active semantic regions, aiming to avoid partial activation in traditional class activation mapping (CAM). However, the long-range modeling in Transformer neglects the inherent spatial coherence of the object, and it usually diffuses the semantic-aware regions far from the object boundary, making localization results significantly larger or far smaller. To address such an issue, we introduce a simple yet effective Spatial Calibration Module (SCM) for accurate WSOL, incorporating semantic similarities of patch tokens and their spatial relationships into a unified diffusion model. Specifically, we introduce a learnable parameter to dynamically adjust the semantic correlations and spatial context intensities for effective information propagation. In practice, SCM is designed as an external module of Transformer, and can be removed during inference to reduce the computation cost. The object-sensitive localization ability is implicitly embedded into the Transformer encoder through optimization in the training phase. It enables the generated attention maps to capture the sharper object boundaries and filter the object-irrelevant background area. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which significantly outperforms its counterpart TS-CAM on both CUB-200 and ImageNet-1K benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/164140757/SCM.
summary: Weakly Supervised Object Localization (WSOL), which aims to localize objects by only using image-level labels, has attracted much attention because of its low annotation cost in real applications. Recent studies leverage the advantage of self-attention in visual Transformer for long-range dependency to re-active semantic regions, aiming to avoid partial activation in traditional class activation mapping (CAM). However, the long-range modeling in Transformer neglects the inherent spatial coherence of the object, and it usually diffuses the semantic-aware regions far from the object boundary, making localization results significantly larger or far smaller. To address such an issue, we introduce a simple yet effective Spatial Calibration Module (SCM) for accurate WSOL, incorporating semantic similarities of patch tokens and their spatial relationships into a unified diffusion model. Specifically, we introduce a learnable parameter to dynamically adjust the semantic correlations and spatial context intensities for effective information propagation. In practice, SCM is designed as an external module of Transformer, and can be removed during inference to reduce the computation cost. The object-sensitive localization ability is implicitly embedded into the Transformer encoder through optimization in the training phase. It enables the generated attention maps to capture the sharper object boundaries and filter the object-irrelevant background area. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which significantly outperforms its counterpart TS-CAM on both CUB-200 and ImageNet-1K benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/164140757/SCM.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位（WSOL）旨在仅使用图像级标签来定位对象，因其在实际应用中标注成本较低而备受关注。最近的研究利用视觉 Transformer 中自注意力的优势来实现对反应语义区域的远程依赖，旨在避免传统类激活映射（CAM）中的部分激活。然而，Transformer 中的远程建模忽略了对象固有的空间连贯性，并且通常将语义感知区域扩散到远离对象边界的位置，使得定位结果显着更大或更小。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个简单而有效的空间校准模块（SCM）来实现准确的 WSOL，将补丁标记的语义相似性及其空间关系合并到统一的扩散模型中。具体来说，我们引入了一个可学习的参数来动态调整语义相关性和空间上下文强度，以实现有效的信息传播。在实际应用中，SCM被设计为Transformer的外部模块，可以在推理过程中移除，以减少计算成本。通过训练阶段的优化，将对象敏感的定位能力隐式嵌入到 Transformer 编码器中。它使生成的注意力图能够捕获更清晰的对象边界并过滤与对象无关的背景区域。大量的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性，该方法在 CUB-200 和 ImageNet-1K 基准测试上均显着优于其对应的 TS-CAM。该代码可在 https://github.com/164140757/SCM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过Transformer实现弱监督目标定位的方法，引入了空间校准模块（SCM）以提高定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 弱监督目标定位（WSOL）因标注成本低而受到关注，但现有方法在利用Transformer的自注意力机制时，忽略了目标的固有空间一致性，导致定位结果不准确。
AI.method: 本文引入了一个空间校准模块（SCM），通过结合补丁标记的语义相似性和空间关系，动态调整语义相关性和空间上下文强度，从而优化Transformer的注意力图生成。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在CUB-200和ImageNet-1K基准测试中显著优于TS-CAM方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入SCM模块，有效提升了弱监督目标定位的准确性，且在推理阶段可移除SCM以减少计算成本。

authors_text: Edward G. A. Henderson,Dónal M. McSweeney,Andrew F. Green
title: COBRA: Cpu-Only aBdominal oRgan segmentAtion
title_zh: COBRA：仅 CPU 腹部器官分割
comment: MCR-RRR submission for the Fast and Low GPU memory Abdominal oRgan sEgmentation Challenge (FLARE) at MICCAI 2021
comments: MCR-RRR submission for the Fast and Low GPU memory Abdominal oRgan sEgmentation Challenge (FLARE) at MICCAI 2021
abstract: Abdominal organ segmentation is a difficult and time-consuming task. To reduce the burden on clinical experts, fully-automated methods are highly desirable. Current approaches are dominated by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) however the computational requirements and the need for large data sets limit their application in practice. By implementing a small and efficient custom 3D CNN, compiling the trained model and optimizing the computational graph: our approach produces high accuracy segmentations (Dice Similarity Coefficient (%): Liver: 97.3$\pm$1.3, Kidneys: 94.8$\pm$3.6, Spleen: 96.4$\pm$3.0, Pancreas: 80.9$\pm$10.1) at a rate of 1.6 seconds per image. Crucially, we are able to perform segmentation inference solely on CPU (no GPU required), thereby facilitating easy and widespread deployment of the model without specialist hardware.
summary: Abdominal organ segmentation is a difficult and time-consuming task. To reduce the burden on clinical experts, fully-automated methods are highly desirable. Current approaches are dominated by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) however the computational requirements and the need for large data sets limit their application in practice. By implementing a small and efficient custom 3D CNN, compiling the trained model and optimizing the computational graph: our approach produces high accuracy segmentations (Dice Similarity Coefficient (%): Liver: 97.3$\pm$1.3, Kidneys: 94.8$\pm$3.6, Spleen: 96.4$\pm$3.0, Pancreas: 80.9$\pm$10.1) at a rate of 1.6 seconds per image. Crucially, we are able to perform segmentation inference solely on CPU (no GPU required), thereby facilitating easy and widespread deployment of the model without specialist hardware.
abstract_zh: 腹部器官分割是一项困难且耗时的任务。为了减轻临床专家的负担，非常需要全自动方法。当前的方法以卷积神经网络（CNN）为主，但是计算要求和对大数据集的需求限制了它们在实践中的应用。通过实现小型高效的定制 3D CNN，编译经过训练的模型并优化计算图：我们的方法以以下速率产生高精度分割（骰子相似系数 (%)：肝脏：97.3$\pm$1.3，肾脏：94.8$\pm$3.6，脾脏：96.4$\pm$3.0，胰腺：80.9$\pm$10.1）每幅图像 1.6 秒。至关重要的是，我们能够仅在 CPU 上执行分段推理（不需要 GPU），从而无需专业硬件即可轻松且广泛地部署模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CPU的腹部器官分割方法COBRA，利用高效的3D卷积神经网络实现快速准确的器官分割。
AI.motivation: 现有腹部器官分割方法依赖GPU计算且需要大规模数据集，限制了临床实际应用。亟需一种无需专业硬件、部署便捷的全自动分割方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级3D CNN网络架构，通过模型编译与计算图优化，在CPU上实现高效推理，完成肝脏、肾脏等器官的分割任务。
AI.result: 在CPU上实现1.6秒/图像的分割速度，Dice系数达：肝脏97.3%、肾脏94.8%、脾脏96.4%、胰腺80.9%，验证了方法的准确性与效率。
AI.conclusion: COBRA方法通过优化网络结构与计算流程，在保证分割精度的同时实现CPU端高效推理，为临床部署提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Arnon Turetzky,Tzvi Michelson,Yossi Adi,Shmuel Peleg
title: Deep Audio Waveform Prior
title_zh: 深度音频波形先验
abstract: Convolutional neural networks contain strong priors for generating natural looking images [1]. These priors enable image denoising, super resolution, and inpainting in an unsupervised manner. Previous attempts to demonstrate similar ideas in audio, namely deep audio priors, (i) use hand picked architectures such as harmonic convolutions, (ii) only work with spectrogram input, and (iii) have been used mostly for eliminating Gaussian noise [2]. In this work we show that existing SOTA architectures for audio source separation contain deep priors even when working with the raw waveform. Deep priors can be discovered by training a neural network to generate a single corrupted signal when given white noise as input. A network with relevant deep priors is likely to generate a cleaner version of the signal before converging on the corrupted signal. We demonstrate this restoration effect with several corruptions: background noise, reverberations, and a gap in the signal (audio inpainting).
summary: Convolutional neural networks contain strong priors for generating natural looking images [1]. These priors enable image denoising, super resolution, and inpainting in an unsupervised manner. Previous attempts to demonstrate similar ideas in audio, namely deep audio priors, (i) use hand picked architectures such as harmonic convolutions, (ii) only work with spectrogram input, and (iii) have been used mostly for eliminating Gaussian noise [2]. In this work we show that existing SOTA architectures for audio source separation contain deep priors even when working with the raw waveform. Deep priors can be discovered by training a neural network to generate a single corrupted signal when given white noise as input. A network with relevant deep priors is likely to generate a cleaner version of the signal before converging on the corrupted signal. We demonstrate this restoration effect with several corruptions: background noise, reverberations, and a gap in the signal (audio inpainting).
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络包含用于生成自然图像的强大先验[1]。这些先验能够以无人监督的方式实现图像去噪、超分辨率和修复。以前尝试在音频中展示类似的想法，即深度音频先验，（i）使用手工挑选的架构，例如谐波卷积，（ii）仅适用于频谱图输入，以及（iii）主要用于消除高斯噪声[2]。在这项工作中，我们展示了用于音频源分离的现有 SOTA 架构即使在使用原始波形时也包含深层先验。可以通过训练神经网络在给定白噪声作为输入时生成单个损坏的信号来发现深层先验。具有相关深度先验的网络可能会在收敛到损坏的信号之前生成更干净的信号版本。我们通过几种损坏来演示这种恢复效果：背景噪声、混响和信号间隙（音频修复）。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了现有音频源分离模型在处理原始波形时所蕴含的深度先验知识，并展示了其在去噪、混响消除和音频修复中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统音频先验方法依赖手工设计架构（如谐波卷积）、仅处理频谱图且主要针对高斯噪声，缺乏对原始波形的通用深度先验探索。
AI.method: 通过训练神经网络以白噪声为输入生成单一受损信号，验证网络是否能在收敛前生成更清晰的原始信号版本，测试类型包括背景噪声、混响和信号缺失修复。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有SOTA模型能在多种退化场景（噪声、混响、缺失）中有效恢复原始音频信号，验证了深度先验的存在性。
AI.conclusion: 音频源分离模型隐含的深度先验可被用于无监督音频修复任务，为原始波形处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xian He,Shuai Zhang,Shanlin Yang,Bo Ouyang
title: Incorporating Prior Knowledge into Reinforcement Learning for Soft Tissue Manipulation with Autonomous Grasping Point Selection
title_zh: 将先验知识融入强化学习中，通过自主抓取点选择进行软组织操作
abstract: Previous soft tissue manipulation studies assumed that the grasping point was known and the target deformation can be achieved. During the operation, the constraints are supposed to be constant, and there is no obstacles around the soft tissue. To go beyond these assumptions, a deep reinforcement learning framework with prior knowledge is proposed for soft tissue manipulation under unknown constraints, such as the force applied by fascia. The prior knowledge is represented through an intuitive manipulation strategy. As an action of the agent, a regulator factor is used to coordinate the intuitive approach and the deliberate network. A reward function is designed to balance the exploration and exploitation for large deformation. Successful simulation results verify that the proposed framework can manipulate the soft tissue while avoiding obstacles and adding new position constraints. Compared with the soft actor-critic (SAC) algorithm, the proposed framework can accelerate the training procedure and improve the generalization.
summary: Previous soft tissue manipulation studies assumed that the grasping point was known and the target deformation can be achieved. During the operation, the constraints are supposed to be constant, and there is no obstacles around the soft tissue. To go beyond these assumptions, a deep reinforcement learning framework with prior knowledge is proposed for soft tissue manipulation under unknown constraints, such as the force applied by fascia. The prior knowledge is represented through an intuitive manipulation strategy. As an action of the agent, a regulator factor is used to coordinate the intuitive approach and the deliberate network. A reward function is designed to balance the exploration and exploitation for large deformation. Successful simulation results verify that the proposed framework can manipulate the soft tissue while avoiding obstacles and adding new position constraints. Compared with the soft actor-critic (SAC) algorithm, the proposed framework can accelerate the training procedure and improve the generalization.
abstract_zh: 以前的软组织操纵研究假设抓取点已知并且可以实现目标变形。手术过程中，约束条件应保持恒定，软组织周围没有障碍物。为了超越这些假设，提出了一种具有先验知识的深度强化学习框架，用于未知约束（例如筋膜施加的力）下的软组织操作。先验知识通过直观的操作策略来表示。作为代理的动作，调节因子用于协调直觉方法和深思熟虑的网络。奖励函数旨在平衡大变形的探索和利用。成功的仿真结果验证了所提出的框架可以操纵软组织，同时避开障碍物并添加新的位置约束。与软演员批评家（SAC）算法相比，所提出的框架可以加速训练过程并提高泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合先验知识的深度强化学习框架，用于在未知约束下实现软组织操作中的自主抓取点选择。
AI.motivation: 传统软组织操作研究假设抓取点已知且无外部约束，难以应对实际手术中如筋膜力等未知约束及障碍物干扰。
AI.method: 设计包含调节因子的智能体架构，通过先验策略与深度网络协同决策，并构建平衡探索与利用的奖励函数。
AI.result: 仿真验证框架可有效避开障碍物并适应新约束，相比SAC算法训练速度提升且泛化能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合先验知识显著提升了复杂约束下软组织操作的鲁棒性与学习效率。

authors_text: Guolei Sun,Yun Liu,Hao Tang,Ajad Chhatkuli,Le Zhang,Luc Van Gool
title: Mining Relations among Cross-Frame Affinities for Video Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 视频语义分割跨帧亲和力之间的挖掘关系
abstract: The essence of video semantic segmentation (VSS) is how to leverage temporal information for prediction. Previous efforts are mainly devoted to developing new techniques to calculate the cross-frame affinities such as optical flow and attention. Instead, this paper contributes from a different angle by mining relations among cross-frame affinities, upon which better temporal information aggregation could be achieved. We explore relations among affinities in two aspects: single-scale intrinsic correlations and multi-scale relations. Inspired by traditional feature processing, we propose Single-scale Affinity Refinement (SAR) and Multi-scale Affinity Aggregation (MAA). To make it feasible to execute MAA, we propose a Selective Token Masking (STM) strategy to select a subset of consistent reference tokens for different scales when calculating affinities, which also improves the efficiency of our method. At last, the cross-frame affinities strengthened by SAR and MAA are adopted for adaptively aggregating temporal information. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method performs favorably against state-of-the-art VSS methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-MRCFA
summary: The essence of video semantic segmentation (VSS) is how to leverage temporal information for prediction. Previous efforts are mainly devoted to developing new techniques to calculate the cross-frame affinities such as optical flow and attention. Instead, this paper contributes from a different angle by mining relations among cross-frame affinities, upon which better temporal information aggregation could be achieved. We explore relations among affinities in two aspects: single-scale intrinsic correlations and multi-scale relations. Inspired by traditional feature processing, we propose Single-scale Affinity Refinement (SAR) and Multi-scale Affinity Aggregation (MAA). To make it feasible to execute MAA, we propose a Selective Token Masking (STM) strategy to select a subset of consistent reference tokens for different scales when calculating affinities, which also improves the efficiency of our method. At last, the cross-frame affinities strengthened by SAR and MAA are adopted for adaptively aggregating temporal information. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method performs favorably against state-of-the-art VSS methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-MRCFA
abstract_zh: 视频语义分割（VSS）的本质是如何利用时间信息进行预测。之前的工作主要致力于开发计算跨帧亲和力的新技术，例如光流和注意力。相反，本文从不同的角度做出贡献，通过挖掘跨帧亲和力之间的关系，可以实现更好的时间信息聚合。我们从两个方面探讨亲和力之间的关系：单尺度内在相关性和多尺度关系。受传统特征处理的启发，我们提出了单尺度亲和细化（SAR）和多尺度亲和聚合（MAA）。为了使执行 MAA 变得可行，我们提出了一种选择性令牌屏蔽（STM）策略，在计算亲和力时为不同规模选择一致参考令牌的子集，这也提高了我们方法的效率。最后，采用SAR和MAA增强的跨帧亲和力来自适应聚合时间信息。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的 VSS 方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-MRCFA 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过挖掘跨帧亲和力关系来改进视频语义分割的方法，旨在更有效地利用时间信息进行预测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要集中在开发新的跨帧亲和力计算技术（如光流和注意力机制），而本文从不同角度出发，通过挖掘跨帧亲和力之间的关系来提升时间信息聚合效果。
AI.method: 本文提出单尺度亲和力优化（SAR）和多尺度亲和力聚合（MAA）两种方法，并引入选择性标记掩码（STM）策略，以高效地筛选不同尺度下的参考标记，从而增强跨帧亲和力的计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在视频语义分割任务中优于现有最先进的方法，且代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘跨帧亲和力的单尺度内在关联与多尺度关系，本文方法有效提升了时间信息聚合能力，实现了更优的视频语义分割性能。

search_text: Mining Relations among Cross-Frame Affinities for Video Semantic Segmentation 视频语义分割跨帧亲和力之间的挖掘关系 The essence of video semantic segmentation (VSS) is how to leverage temporal information for prediction. Previous efforts are mainly devoted to developing new techniques to calculate the cross-frame affinities such as optical flow and attention. Instead, this paper contributes from a different angle by mining relations among cross-frame affinities, upon which better temporal information aggregation could be achieved. We explore relations among affinities in two aspects: single-scale intrinsic correlations and multi-scale relations. Inspired by traditional feature processing, we propose Single-scale Affinity Refinement (SAR) and Multi-scale Affinity Aggregation (MAA). To make it feasible to execute MAA, we propose a Selective Token Masking (STM) strategy to select a subset of consistent reference tokens for different scales when calculating affinities, which also improves the efficiency of our method. At last, the cross-frame affinities strengthened by SAR and MAA are adopted for adaptively aggregating temporal information. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method performs favorably against state-of-the-art VSS methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-MRCFA 视频语义分割（VSS）的本质是如何利用时间信息进行预测。之前的工作主要致力于开发计算跨帧亲和力的新技术，例如光流和注意力。相反，本文从不同的角度做出贡献，通过挖掘跨帧亲和力之间的关系，可以实现更好的时间信息聚合。我们从两个方面探讨亲和力之间的关系：单尺度内在相关性和多尺度关系。受传统特征处理的启发，我们提出了单尺度亲和细化（SAR）和多尺度亲和聚合（MAA）。为了使执行 MAA 变得可行，我们提出了一种选择性令牌屏蔽（STM）策略，在计算亲和力时为不同规模选择一致参考令牌的子集，这也提高了我们方法的效率。最后，采用SAR和MAA增强的跨帧亲和力来自适应聚合时间信息。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的 VSS 方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-MRCFA 上公开获取 本文提出了一种通过挖掘跨帧亲和力关系来改进视频语义分割的方法，旨在更有效地利用时间信息进行预测。 Guolei Sun,Yun Liu,Hao Tang,Ajad Chhatkuli,Le Zhang,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Jiangbei Yue,Dinesh Manocha,He Wang
title: Human Trajectory Prediction via Neural Social Physics
title_zh: 通过神经社会物理学预测人类轨迹
abstract: Trajectory prediction has been widely pursued in many fields, and many model-based and model-free methods have been explored. The former include rule-based, geometric or optimization-based models, and the latter are mainly comprised of deep learning approaches. In this paper, we propose a new method combining both methodologies based on a new Neural Differential Equation model. Our new model (Neural Social Physics or NSP) is a deep neural network within which we use an explicit physics model with learnable parameters. The explicit physics model serves as a strong inductive bias in modeling pedestrian behaviors, while the rest of the network provides a strong data-fitting capability in terms of system parameter estimation and dynamics stochasticity modeling. We compare NSP with 15 recent deep learning methods on 6 datasets and improve the state-of-the-art performance by 5.56%-70%. Besides, we show that NSP has better generalizability in predicting plausible trajectories in drastically different scenarios where the density is 2-5 times as high as the testing data. Finally, we show that the physics model in NSP can provide plausible explanations for pedestrian behaviors, as opposed to black-box deep learning. Code is available: https://github.com/realcrane/Human-Trajectory-Prediction-via-Neural-Social-Physics.
summary: Trajectory prediction has been widely pursued in many fields, and many model-based and model-free methods have been explored. The former include rule-based, geometric or optimization-based models, and the latter are mainly comprised of deep learning approaches. In this paper, we propose a new method combining both methodologies based on a new Neural Differential Equation model. Our new model (Neural Social Physics or NSP) is a deep neural network within which we use an explicit physics model with learnable parameters. The explicit physics model serves as a strong inductive bias in modeling pedestrian behaviors, while the rest of the network provides a strong data-fitting capability in terms of system parameter estimation and dynamics stochasticity modeling. We compare NSP with 15 recent deep learning methods on 6 datasets and improve the state-of-the-art performance by 5.56%-70%. Besides, we show that NSP has better generalizability in predicting plausible trajectories in drastically different scenarios where the density is 2-5 times as high as the testing data. Finally, we show that the physics model in NSP can provide plausible explanations for pedestrian behaviors, as opposed to black-box deep learning. Code is available: https://github.com/realcrane/Human-Trajectory-Prediction-via-Neural-Social-Physics.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测在许多领域得到了广泛的应用，并且已经探索了许多基于模型和无模型的方法。前者包括基于规则、几何或基于优化的模型，后者主要由深度学习方法组成。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于新的神经微分方程模型结合这两种方法的新方法。我们的新模型（神经社会物理或 NSP）是一个深度神经网络，我们在其中使用具有可学习参数的显式物理模型。显式物理模型在行人行为建模中充当强大的归纳偏差，而网络的其余部分在系统参数估计和动态随机性建模方面提供强大的数据拟合能力。我们将 NSP 与 6 个数据集上的 15 种最新深度学习方法进行比较，并将最先进的性能提高了 5.56%-70%。此外，我们还表明，在密度是测试数据的 2-5 倍的截然不同的场景中，NSP 在预测合理轨迹方面具有更好的泛化性。最后，我们证明 NSP 中的物理模型可以为行人行为提供合理的解释，而不是黑盒深度学习。代码可用：https://github.com/realcrane/Human-Trajectory-Prediction-via-Neural-Social-Physics。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合物理模型与深度学习的神经社交物理模型（NSP），用于提升行人轨迹预测的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统模型基于规则或几何假设存在灵活性不足，而深度学习方法缺乏可解释性，需融合物理规律与数据驱动优势以提升预测性能。
AI.method: 设计神经微分方程模型NSP，将可学习参数的物理模型作为归纳偏置，结合神经网络实现系统参数估计与动态随机性建模。
AI.result: 在6个数据集上优于15种深度学习方法（提升5.56%-70%），并在高密度场景中展现更强泛化能力，且能解释行人行为逻辑。
AI.conclusion: NSP通过物理模型与神经网络的结合，在轨迹预测任务中实现了性能与可解释性的双重突破。

authors_text: Yeying Jin,Aashish Sharma,Robby T. Tan
title: DC-ShadowNet: Single-Image Hard and Soft Shadow Removal Using Unsupervised Domain-Classifier Guided Network
title_zh: DC-ShadowNet：使用无监督域分类器引导网络的单图像硬阴影和软阴影去除
abstract: Shadow removal from a single image is generally still an open problem. Most existing learning-based methods use supervised learning and require a large number of paired images (shadow and corresponding non-shadow images) for training. A recent unsupervised method, Mask-ShadowGAN~\cite{Hu19}, addresses this limitation. However, it requires a binary mask to represent shadow regions, making it inapplicable to soft shadows. To address the problem, in this paper, we propose an unsupervised domain-classifier guided shadow removal network, DC-ShadowNet. Specifically, we propose to integrate a shadow/shadow-free domain classifier into a generator and its discriminator, enabling them to focus on shadow regions. To train our network, we introduce novel losses based on physics-based shadow-free chromaticity, shadow-robust perceptual features, and boundary smoothness. Moreover, we show that our unsupervised network can be used for test-time training that further improves the results. Our experiments show that all these novel components allow our method to handle soft shadows, and also to perform better on hard shadows both quantitatively and qualitatively than the existing state-of-the-art shadow removal methods. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/jinyeying/DC-ShadowNet-Hard-and-Soft-Shadow-Removal}.
summary: Shadow removal from a single image is generally still an open problem. Most existing learning-based methods use supervised learning and require a large number of paired images (shadow and corresponding non-shadow images) for training. A recent unsupervised method, Mask-ShadowGAN~\cite{Hu19}, addresses this limitation. However, it requires a binary mask to represent shadow regions, making it inapplicable to soft shadows. To address the problem, in this paper, we propose an unsupervised domain-classifier guided shadow removal network, DC-ShadowNet. Specifically, we propose to integrate a shadow/shadow-free domain classifier into a generator and its discriminator, enabling them to focus on shadow regions. To train our network, we introduce novel losses based on physics-based shadow-free chromaticity, shadow-robust perceptual features, and boundary smoothness. Moreover, we show that our unsupervised network can be used for test-time training that further improves the results. Our experiments show that all these novel components allow our method to handle soft shadows, and also to perform better on hard shadows both quantitatively and qualitatively than the existing state-of-the-art shadow removal methods. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/jinyeying/DC-ShadowNet-Hard-and-Soft-Shadow-Removal}.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像中去除阴影通常仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。现有的大多数基于学习的方法都使用监督学习，需要大量的配对图像（阴影和相应的非阴影图像）进行训练。最近的一种无监督方法 Mask-ShadowGAN~\cite{Hu19} 解决了这个限制。然而，它需要一个二元掩模来表示阴影区域，这使得它不适用于软阴影。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种无监督域分类器引导的阴影去除网络，DC-ShadowNet。具体来说，我们建议将阴影/无阴影域分类器集成到生成器及其鉴别器中，使它们能够专注于阴影区域。为了训练我们的网络，我们引入了基于物理的无阴影色度、阴影鲁棒感知特征和边界平滑度的新颖损失。此外，我们表明我们的无监督网络可以用于测试时训练，从而进一步改善结果。我们的实验表明，所有这些新颖的组件使我们的方法能够处理软阴影，并且在定量和定性上比现有最先进的阴影去除方法在硬阴影上表现更好。我们的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/jinyeying/DC-ShadowNet-Hard-and-Soft-Shadow-Removal}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督领域分类器引导的网络DC-ShadowNet，用于单图像中硬阴影和软阴影的去除。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法依赖监督学习和大量配对图像，且近期无监督方法难以处理软阴影，因此需提出更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 将阴影/无阴影领域分类器集成到生成器和判别器中，并引入基于物理阴影-free色度、阴影鲁棒感知特征和边界平滑性的新型损失函数，结合测试时训练优化结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有最先进的阴影去除方法，能有效处理硬阴影和软阴影。
AI.conclusion: DC-ShadowNet通过无监督领域分类器和多损失函数设计，实现了对单图像中硬阴影和软阴影的高效去除，推动了无监督阴影去除技术的发展。

search_text: DC-ShadowNet: Single-Image Hard and Soft Shadow Removal Using Unsupervised Domain-Classifier Guided Network DC-ShadowNet：使用无监督域分类器引导网络的单图像硬阴影和软阴影去除 Shadow removal from a single image is generally still an open problem. Most existing learning-based methods use supervised learning and require a large number of paired images (shadow and corresponding non-shadow images) for training. A recent unsupervised method, Mask-ShadowGAN~\cite{Hu19}, addresses this limitation. However, it requires a binary mask to represent shadow regions, making it inapplicable to soft shadows. To address the problem, in this paper, we propose an unsupervised domain-classifier guided shadow removal network, DC-ShadowNet. Specifically, we propose to integrate a shadow/shadow-free domain classifier into a generator and its discriminator, enabling them to focus on shadow regions. To train our network, we introduce novel losses based on physics-based shadow-free chromaticity, shadow-robust perceptual features, and boundary smoothness. Moreover, we show that our unsupervised network can be used for test-time training that further improves the results. Our experiments show that all these novel components allow our method to handle soft shadows, and also to perform better on hard shadows both quantitatively and qualitatively than the existing state-of-the-art shadow removal methods. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/jinyeying/DC-ShadowNet-Hard-and-Soft-Shadow-Removal}. 从单个图像中去除阴影通常仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。现有的大多数基于学习的方法都使用监督学习，需要大量的配对图像（阴影和相应的非阴影图像）进行训练。最近的一种无监督方法 Mask-ShadowGAN~\cite{Hu19} 解决了这个限制。然而，它需要一个二元掩模来表示阴影区域，这使得它不适用于软阴影。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种无监督域分类器引导的阴影去除网络，DC-ShadowNet。具体来说，我们建议将阴影/无阴影域分类器集成到生成器及其鉴别器中，使它们能够专注于阴影区域。为了训练我们的网络，我们引入了基于物理的无阴影色度、阴影鲁棒感知特征和边界平滑度的新颖损失。此外，我们表明我们的无监督网络可以用于测试时训练，从而进一步改善结果。我们的实验表明，所有这些新颖的组件使我们的方法能够处理软阴影，并且在定量和定性上比现有最先进的阴影去除方法在硬阴影上表现更好。我们的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/jinyeying/DC-ShadowNet-Hard-and-Soft-Shadow-Removal}。 本文提出了一种基于无监督领域分类器引导的网络DC-ShadowNet，用于单图像中硬阴影和软阴影的去除。 Yeying Jin,Aashish Sharma,Robby T. Tan cs.CV

authors_text: Jinrong Yang,Songtao Liu,Zeming Li,Xiaoping Li,Jian Sun
title: StreamYOLO: Real-time Object Detection for Streaming Perception
title_zh: StreamYOLO：用于流感知的实时对象检测
abstract: The perceptive models of autonomous driving require fast inference within a low latency for safety. While existing works ignore the inevitable environmental changes after processing, streaming perception jointly evaluates the latency and accuracy into a single metric for video online perception, guiding the previous works to search trade-offs between accuracy and speed. In this paper, we explore the performance of real time models on this metric and endow the models with the capacity of predicting the future, significantly improving the results for streaming perception. Specifically, we build a simple framework with two effective modules. One is a Dual Flow Perception module (DFP). It consists of dynamic flow and static flow in parallel to capture moving tendency and basic detection feature, respectively. Trend Aware Loss (TAL) is the other module which adaptively generates loss weight for each object with its moving speed. Realistically, we consider multiple velocities driving scene and further propose Velocity-awared streaming AP (VsAP) to jointly evaluate the accuracy. In this realistic setting, we design a efficient mix-velocity training strategy to guide detector perceive any velocities. Our simple method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on Argoverse-HD dataset and improves the sAP and VsAP by 4.7% and 8.2% respectively compared to the strong baseline, validating its effectiveness.
summary: The perceptive models of autonomous driving require fast inference within a low latency for safety. While existing works ignore the inevitable environmental changes after processing, streaming perception jointly evaluates the latency and accuracy into a single metric for video online perception, guiding the previous works to search trade-offs between accuracy and speed. In this paper, we explore the performance of real time models on this metric and endow the models with the capacity of predicting the future, significantly improving the results for streaming perception. Specifically, we build a simple framework with two effective modules. One is a Dual Flow Perception module (DFP). It consists of dynamic flow and static flow in parallel to capture moving tendency and basic detection feature, respectively. Trend Aware Loss (TAL) is the other module which adaptively generates loss weight for each object with its moving speed. Realistically, we consider multiple velocities driving scene and further propose Velocity-awared streaming AP (VsAP) to jointly evaluate the accuracy. In this realistic setting, we design a efficient mix-velocity training strategy to guide detector perceive any velocities. Our simple method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on Argoverse-HD dataset and improves the sAP and VsAP by 4.7% and 8.2% respectively compared to the strong baseline, validating its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶的感知模型需要在低延迟内进行快速推理以确保安全。虽然现有的工作忽略了处理后不可避免的环境变化，但流感知将延迟和准确性联合评估为视频在线感知的单一指标，指导以前的工作在准确性和速度之间寻求权衡。在本文中，我们探索了实时模型在该指标上的性能，并赋予模型预测未来的能力，显着改善了流感知的结果。具体来说，我们构建了一个包含两个有效模块的简单框架。一种是双流感知模块（DFP）。它由动态流和静态流并行组成，分别捕获运动趋势和基本检测特征。趋势感知损失（TAL）是另一个模块，它根据每个对象的移动速度自适应地生成损失权重。实际上，我们考虑多种速度驾驶场景，并进一步提出速度感知流AP（VsAP）来共同评估准确性。在这种现实的环境中，我们设计了一种有效的混合速度训练策略来引导探测器感知任何速度。我们的简单方法在 Argoverse-HD 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，与强基线相比，sAP 和 VsAP 分别提高了 4.7% 和 8.2%，验证了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StreamYOLO框架，通过动态流与静态流模块及速度感知损失函数，提升自动驾驶场景下流媒体感知的实时目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视环境动态变化，未能有效平衡流媒体感知中的时延与精度，需设计兼顾两者且适应多速度场景的检测模型。
AI.method: 构建包含动态流/静态流并行模块（DFP）与速度感知损失（TAL）的框架，并提出速度感知流媒体AP（VsAP）指标及混合速度训练策略。
AI.result: 在Argoverse-HD数据集上，相较强基线提升sAP 4.7%和VsAP 8.2%，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过建模运动趋势与速度感知损失，有效提升流媒体感知的实时检测精度，验证了动态环境适应性设计的有效性。

authors_text: Andrew M. Saxe,Shagun Sodhani,Sam Lewallen
title: The Neural Race Reduction: Dynamics of Abstraction in Gated Networks
title_zh: 神经竞赛减少：门控网络中的抽象动力学
abstract: Our theoretical understanding of deep learning has not kept pace with its empirical success. While network architecture is known to be critical, we do not yet understand its effect on learned representations and network behavior, or how this architecture should reflect task structure.In this work, we begin to address this gap by introducing the Gated Deep Linear Network framework that schematizes how pathways of information flow impact learning dynamics within an architecture. Crucially, because of the gating, these networks can compute nonlinear functions of their input. We derive an exact reduction and, for certain cases, exact solutions to the dynamics of learning. Our analysis demonstrates that the learning dynamics in structured networks can be conceptualized as a neural race with an implicit bias towards shared representations, which then govern the model's ability to systematically generalize, multi-task, and transfer. We validate our key insights on naturalistic datasets and with relaxed assumptions. Taken together, our work gives rise to general hypotheses relating neural architecture to learning and provides a mathematical approach towards understanding the design of more complex architectures and the role of modularity and compositionality in solving real-world problems. The code and results are available at https://www.saxelab.org/gated-dln .
summary: Our theoretical understanding of deep learning has not kept pace with its empirical success. While network architecture is known to be critical, we do not yet understand its effect on learned representations and network behavior, or how this architecture should reflect task structure.In this work, we begin to address this gap by introducing the Gated Deep Linear Network framework that schematizes how pathways of information flow impact learning dynamics within an architecture. Crucially, because of the gating, these networks can compute nonlinear functions of their input. We derive an exact reduction and, for certain cases, exact solutions to the dynamics of learning. Our analysis demonstrates that the learning dynamics in structured networks can be conceptualized as a neural race with an implicit bias towards shared representations, which then govern the model's ability to systematically generalize, multi-task, and transfer. We validate our key insights on naturalistic datasets and with relaxed assumptions. Taken together, our work gives rise to general hypotheses relating neural architecture to learning and provides a mathematical approach towards understanding the design of more complex architectures and the role of modularity and compositionality in solving real-world problems. The code and results are available at https://www.saxelab.org/gated-dln .
abstract_zh: 我们对深度学习的理论理解并没有跟上其实证成功的步伐。虽然众所周知网络架构至关重要，但我们还不了解它对学习表示和网络行为的影响，或者该架构应如何反映任务结构。在这项工作中，我们开始通过引入门控深度线性网络框架来解决这一差距，该框架概括了信息流路径如何影响架构内的学习动态。至关重要的是，由于门控，这些网络可以计算其输入的非线性函数。我们得出了精确的简化，并且在某些情况下，得到了学习动态的精确解决方案。我们的分析表明，结构化网络中的学习动态可以被概念化为一种神经竞赛，它对共享表示有隐含的偏见，然后控制模型系统地泛化、多任务和迁移的能力。我们通过宽松的假设验证了我们对自然数据集的关键见解。总而言之，我们的工作提出了将神经架构与学习相关的一般假设，并提供了一种数学方法来理解更复杂架构的设计以及模块化和组合性在解决现实世界问题中的作用。代码和结果可在 https://www.saxelab.org/lated-dln 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种门控深度线性网络框架，用于研究网络架构对学习动态的影响，揭示了结构化网络中学习动态的抽象机制。
AI.motivation: 深度学习的理论理解滞后于其实践成功，现有研究尚未明确网络架构如何影响表示学习和行为，以及如何映射任务结构。
AI.method: 引入门控深度线性网络框架，通过精确约简和特定情形下的动态解，分析信息流路径对学习的影响，并验证共享表征的隐含偏差。
AI.result: 发现结构化网络的学习动态可视为具有共享表征偏向的'神经竞赛'，这一机制决定了模型的泛化、多任务和迁移能力，并在自然数据集上验证了核心观点。
AI.conclusion: 提出了连接神经架构与学习的通用假设，为复杂架构设计和模块化解决实际问题提供了数学分析框架。

The code and results are available at https://www.saxelab.org/gated-dln . 我们对深度学习的理论理解并没有跟上其实证成功的步伐。虽然众所周知网络架构至关重要，但我们还不了解它对学习表示和网络行为的影响，或者该架构应如何反映任务结构。在这项工作中，我们开始通过引入门控深度线性网络框架来解决这一差距，该框架概括了信息流路径如何影响架构内的学习动态。至关重要的是，由于门控，这些网络可以计算其输入的非线性函数。我们得出了精确的简化，并且在某些情况下，得到了学习动态的精确解决方案。我们的分析表明，结构化网络中的学习动态可以被概念化为一种神经竞赛，它对共享表示有隐含的偏见，然后控制模型系统地泛化、多任务和迁移的能力。我们通过宽松的假设验证了我们对自然数据集的关键见解。总而言之，我们的工作提出了将神经架构与学习相关的一般假设，并提供了一种数学方法来理解更复杂架构的设计以及模块化和组合性在解决现实世界问题中的作用。代码和结果可在 https://www.saxelab.org/lated-dln 上获取。 本文提出了一种门控深度线性网络框架，用于研究网络架构对学习动态的影响，揭示了结构化网络中学习动态的抽象机制。 Andrew M. Saxe,Shagun Sodhani,Sam Lewallen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yikang Ding,Qingtian Zhu,Xiangyue Liu,Wentao Yuan,Haotian Zhang,Chi Zhang
title: KD-MVS: Knowledge Distillation Based Self-supervised Learning for Multi-view Stereo
title_zh: KD-MVS：基于知识蒸馏的多视立体自监督学习
abstract: Supervised multi-view stereo (MVS) methods have achieved remarkable progress in terms of reconstruction quality, but suffer from the challenge of collecting large-scale ground-truth depth. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised training pipeline for MVS based on knowledge distillation, termed KD-MVS, which mainly consists of self-supervised teacher training and distillation-based student training. Specifically, the teacher model is trained in a self-supervised fashion using both photometric and featuremetric consistency. Then we distill the knowledge of the teacher model to the student model through probabilistic knowledge transferring. With the supervision of validated knowledge, the student model is able to outperform its teacher by a large margin. Extensive experiments performed on multiple datasets show our method can even outperform supervised methods.
summary: Supervised multi-view stereo (MVS) methods have achieved remarkable progress in terms of reconstruction quality, but suffer from the challenge of collecting large-scale ground-truth depth. In this paper, we propose a novel self-supervised training pipeline for MVS based on knowledge distillation, termed KD-MVS, which mainly consists of self-supervised teacher training and distillation-based student training. Specifically, the teacher model is trained in a self-supervised fashion using both photometric and featuremetric consistency. Then we distill the knowledge of the teacher model to the student model through probabilistic knowledge transferring. With the supervision of validated knowledge, the student model is able to outperform its teacher by a large margin. Extensive experiments performed on multiple datasets show our method can even outperform supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 有监督多视立体（MVS）方法在重建质量方面取得了显着进步，但面临着收集大规模地面实况深度的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的新型 MVS 自监督训练流程，称为 KD-MVS，主要包括自监督教师培训和基于蒸馏的学生培训。具体来说，教师模型使用光度和特征一致性以自我监督的方式进行训练。然后我们通过概率知识迁移将教师模型的知识提炼到学生模型。在经过验证的知识的监督下，学生模型能够大幅超越老师。在多个数据集上进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法甚至可以优于监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KD-MVS方法，通过知识蒸馏实现无需真实深度数据的多视角立体视觉自监督学习。
AI.motivation: 监督式MVS方法依赖大规模真实深度数据，而数据采集成本高且困难，需探索自监督学习方案。
AI.method: 构建包含自监督教师模型训练和知识蒸馏学生模型训练的框架，教师模型通过光度与特征一致性自监督学习，学生模型通过概率知识传递学习教师模型知识。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，学生模型性能显著超越教师模型，甚至优于监督方法。
AI.conclusion: KD-MVS验证了知识蒸馏在MVS领域的有效性，为减少对真实数据依赖提供了新思路。
