authors_text: Zhiyu Huang,Haochen Liu,Jingda Wu,Chen Lv
title: Differentiable Integrated Motion Prediction and Planning with Learnable Cost Function for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 具有可学习成本函数的自动驾驶可微分集成运动预测和规划
abstract: Predicting the future states of surrounding traffic participants and planning a safe, smooth, and socially compliant trajectory accordingly is crucial for autonomous vehicles. There are two major issues with the current autonomous driving system: the prediction module is often separated from the planning module and the cost function for planning is hard to specify and tune. To tackle these issues, we propose a differentiable integrated prediction-planning framework (DIPP) that can also learn the cost function from data. Specifically, our framework uses a differentiable nonlinear optimizer as the motion planner, which takes as input the predicted trajectories of surrounding agents given by the neural network and optimizes the trajectory for the autonomous vehicle, enabling all operations to be differentiable, including the cost function weights. The proposed framework is trained on a large-scale real-world driving dataset to imitate human driving trajectories in the entire driving scene and validated in both open-loop and closed-loop manners. The open-loop testing results reveal that the proposed method outperforms the baseline methods across a variety of metrics and delivers planning-centric prediction results, allowing the planning module to output trajectories close to those of human drivers. In closed-loop testing, the proposed method outperforms various baseline methods, showing the ability to handle complex urban driving scenarios and robustness against the distributional shift. Importantly, we find that joint training of planning and prediction modules achieves better performance than planning with a separate trained prediction module in both open-loop and closed-loop tests. Moreover, the ablation study indicates that the learnable components in the framework are essential to ensure planning stability and performance.
summary: Predicting the future states of surrounding traffic participants and planning a safe, smooth, and socially compliant trajectory accordingly is crucial for autonomous vehicles. There are two major issues with the current autonomous driving system: the prediction module is often separated from the planning module and the cost function for planning is hard to specify and tune. To tackle these issues, we propose a differentiable integrated prediction-planning framework (DIPP) that can also learn the cost function from data. Specifically, our framework uses a differentiable nonlinear optimizer as the motion planner, which takes as input the predicted trajectories of surrounding agents given by the neural network and optimizes the trajectory for the autonomous vehicle, enabling all operations to be differentiable, including the cost function weights. The proposed framework is trained on a large-scale real-world driving dataset to imitate human driving trajectories in the entire driving scene and validated in both open-loop and closed-loop manners. The open-loop testing results reveal that the proposed method outperforms the baseline methods across a variety of metrics and delivers planning-centric prediction results, allowing the planning module to output trajectories close to those of human drivers. In closed-loop testing, the proposed method outperforms various baseline methods, showing the ability to handle complex urban driving scenarios and robustness against the distributional shift. Importantly, we find that joint training of planning and prediction modules achieves better performance than planning with a separate trained prediction module in both open-loop and closed-loop tests. Moreover, the ablation study indicates that the learnable components in the framework are essential to ensure planning stability and performance.
abstract_zh: 预测周围交通参与者的未来状态并相应地规划安全、平稳且符合社会要求的轨迹对于自动驾驶汽车至关重要。当前的自动驾驶系统存在两个主要问题：预测模块通常与规划模块分离，规划的成本函数难以指定和调整。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种可微的集成预测规划框架（DIPP），它也可以从数据中学习成本函数。具体来说，我们的框架使用可微的非线性优化器作为运动规划器，它将神经网络给出的周围代理的预测轨迹作为输入，并优化自动驾驶车辆的轨迹，使所有操作都是可微的，包括成本函数权重。所提出的框架在大规模现实世界驾驶数据集上进行训练，以模仿整个驾驶场景中的人类驾驶轨迹，并以开环和闭环方式进行验证。开环测试结果表明，所提出的方法在各种指标上都优于基线方法，并提供以规划为中心的预测结果，使规划模块能够输出接近人类驾驶员的轨迹。在闭环测试中，所提出的方法优于各种基线方法，显示出处理复杂城市驾驶场景的能力以及对分布变化的鲁棒性。重要的是，我们发现在开环和闭环测试中，规划和预测模块的联合训练比使用单独训练的预测模块进行规划取得了更好的性能。此外，消融研究表明，框架中的可学习组件对于确保规划稳定性和性能至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可微分的集成预测-规划框架（DIPP），通过学习成本函数实现自动驾驶中的运动预测与轨迹规划的统一。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统中预测模块与规划模块分离，且规划成本函数难以指定和调整，导致预测与规划结果不一致，影响安全性和社会合规性。
AI.method: 采用可微分非线性优化器作为运动规划器，以神经网络预测的周围代理轨迹为输入，优化自动驾驶车辆轨迹，实现包括成本函数权重在内的全流程可微分，并通过大规模真实驾驶数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 开放环测试显示方法在多指标上优于基线，生成接近人类驾驶轨迹的规划结果；闭环测试验证了其在复杂城市场景中的鲁棒性，联合训练预测与规划模块优于独立训练。
AI.conclusion: 集成预测与规划模块并引入可学习成本函数能显著提升自动驾驶系统的性能稳定性，证明了该框架在实际场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Fatih Cagatay Akyon,Erdem Akagunduz,Sinan Onur Altinuc,Alptekin Temizel
title: Sequence Models for Drone vs Bird Classification
title_zh: 无人机与鸟类分类的序列模型
abstract: Drone detection has become an essential task in object detection as drone costs have decreased and drone technology has improved. It is, however, difficult to detect distant drones when there is weak contrast, long range, and low visibility. In this work, we propose several sequence classification architectures to reduce the detected false-positive ratio of drone tracks. Moreover, we propose a new drone vs. bird sequence classification dataset to train and evaluate the proposed architectures. 3D CNN, LSTM, and Transformer based sequence classification architectures have been trained on the proposed dataset to show the effectiveness of the proposed idea. As experiments show, using sequence information, bird classification and overall F1 scores can be increased by up to 73% and 35%, respectively. Among all sequence classification models, R(2+1)D-based fully convolutional model yields the best transfer learning and fine-tuning results.
summary: Drone detection has become an essential task in object detection as drone costs have decreased and drone technology has improved. It is, however, difficult to detect distant drones when there is weak contrast, long range, and low visibility. In this work, we propose several sequence classification architectures to reduce the detected false-positive ratio of drone tracks. Moreover, we propose a new drone vs. bird sequence classification dataset to train and evaluate the proposed architectures. 3D CNN, LSTM, and Transformer based sequence classification architectures have been trained on the proposed dataset to show the effectiveness of the proposed idea. As experiments show, using sequence information, bird classification and overall F1 scores can be increased by up to 73% and 35%, respectively. Among all sequence classification models, R(2+1)D-based fully convolutional model yields the best transfer learning and fine-tuning results.
abstract_zh: 随着无人机成本的下降和无人机技术的进步，无人机检测已成为物体检测的一项重要任务。然而，当对比度弱、距离远、能见度低时，很难探测到远处的无人机。在这项工作中，我们提出了几种序列分类架构，以减少检测到的无人机轨迹的误报率。此外，我们提出了一个新的无人机与鸟类序列分类数据集来训练和评估所提出的架构。基于 3D CNN、LSTM 和 Transformer 的序列分类架构已在所提出的数据集上进行了训练，以显示所提出想法的有效性。实验表明，利用序列信息，鸟类分类和总体 F1 分数可分别提高 73% 和 35%。在所有序列分类模型中，基于 R(2+1)D 的全卷积模型产生了最好的迁移学习和微调结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出序列模型解决无人机与鸟类分类问题，通过新数据集和多种架构降低误检率。
AI.motivation: 无人机技术普及导致检测需求增加，但远距离低对比度场景下误检率高，亟需有效分类方法。
AI.method: 构建无人机-鸟类序列分类数据集，采用3D CNN、LSTM、Transformer等序列模型进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 序列信息使鸟类分类F1提升73%，总体F1提升35%，其中R(2+1)D模型在迁移学习中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 序列模型显著提升分类性能，R(2+1)D架构在迁移学习中效果最优，新数据集为研究提供基础。

authors_text: Yudong Han,Jianhua Yin,Jianlong Wu,Yinwei Wei,Liqiang Nie
title: Semantic-aware Modular Capsule Routing for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视觉问答的语义感知模块化胶囊路由
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is fundamentally compositional in nature, and many questions are simply answered by decomposing them into modular sub-problems. The recent proposed Neural Module Network (NMN) employ this strategy to question answering, whereas heavily rest with off-the-shelf layout parser or additional expert policy regarding the network architecture design instead of learning from the data. These strategies result in the unsatisfactory adaptability to the semantically-complicated variance of the inputs, thereby hindering the representational capacity and generalizability of the model. To tackle this problem, we propose a Semantic-aware modUlar caPsulE Routing framework, termed as SUPER, to better capture the instance-specific vision-semantic characteristics and refine the discriminative representations for prediction. Particularly, five powerful specialized modules as well as dynamic routers are tailored in each layer of the SUPER network, and the compact routing spaces are constructed such that a variety of customizable routes can be sufficiently exploited and the vision-semantic representations can be explicitly calibrated. We comparatively justify the effectiveness and generalization ability of our proposed SUPER scheme over five benchmark datasets, as well as the parametric-efficient advantage. It is worth emphasizing that this work is not to pursue the state-of-the-art results in VQA. Instead, we expect that our model is responsible to provide a novel perspective towards architecture learning and representation calibration for VQA.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) is fundamentally compositional in nature, and many questions are simply answered by decomposing them into modular sub-problems. The recent proposed Neural Module Network (NMN) employ this strategy to question answering, whereas heavily rest with off-the-shelf layout parser or additional expert policy regarding the network architecture design instead of learning from the data. These strategies result in the unsatisfactory adaptability to the semantically-complicated variance of the inputs, thereby hindering the representational capacity and generalizability of the model. To tackle this problem, we propose a Semantic-aware modUlar caPsulE Routing framework, termed as SUPER, to better capture the instance-specific vision-semantic characteristics and refine the discriminative representations for prediction. Particularly, five powerful specialized modules as well as dynamic routers are tailored in each layer of the SUPER network, and the compact routing spaces are constructed such that a variety of customizable routes can be sufficiently exploited and the vision-semantic representations can be explicitly calibrated. We comparatively justify the effectiveness and generalization ability of our proposed SUPER scheme over five benchmark datasets, as well as the parametric-efficient advantage. It is worth emphasizing that this work is not to pursue the state-of-the-art results in VQA. Instead, we expect that our model is responsible to provide a novel perspective towards architecture learning and representation calibration for VQA.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）本质上是组合性的，许多问题可以通过将其分解为模块化子问题来简单地回答。最近提出的神经模块网络（NMN）采用这种策略来回答问题，而很大程度上依赖于现成的布局解析器或有关网络架构设计的额外专家策略，而不是从数据中学习。这些策略导致对输入的语义复杂方差的适应性不令人满意，从而阻碍了模型的表示能力和泛化性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种语义感知的模块化胶囊路由框架，称为 SUPER，以更好地捕获特定于实例的视觉语义特征并细化用于预测的判别表示。特别是，SUPER网络的每一层都定制了五个强大的专用模块和动态路由器，并构建了紧凑的路由空间，以便可以充分利用各种可定制的路由，并且可以显式校准视觉语义表示。我们通过五个基准数据集比较证明了我们提出的 SUPER 方案的有效性和泛化能力，以及参数高效的优势。值得强调的是，这项工作并不是为了追求 VQA 中最先进的结果。相反，我们希望我们的模型能够为 VQA 的架构学习和表示校准提供新颖的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SUPER的语义感知模块化胶囊路由框架，用于改进视觉问答（VQA）任务中的语义复杂性适应性和表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如神经模块网络（NMN）依赖预定义的布局解析器或专家策略，导致模型对语义复杂输入的适应性不足，限制了其表现力和泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计包含五个专用模块和动态路由器的SUPER网络，构建紧凑的路由空间以自适应地校准视觉-语义表示，并通过模块化路由机制提升特征区分性。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上验证了SUPER的有效性和参数效率，但未追求VQA的最先进结果，而是强调其对架构学习和表示校准的创新性贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过语义感知的模块化设计为VQA模型提供了新的架构学习视角，证明了动态路由与表示校准结合在提升模型适应性方面的潜力。

These strategies result in the unsatisfactory adaptability to the semantically-complicated variance of the inputs, thereby hindering the representational capacity and generalizability of the model. Instead, we expect that our model is responsible to provide a novel perspective towards architecture learning and representation calibration for VQA. 视觉问答（VQA）本质上是组合性的，许多问题可以通过将其分解为模块化子问题来简单地回答。最近提出的神经模块网络（NMN）采用这种策略来回答问题，而很大程度上依赖于现成的布局解析器或有关网络架构设计的额外专家策略，而不是从数据中学习。这些策略导致对输入的语义复杂方差的适应性不令人满意，从而阻碍了模型的表示能力和泛化性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种语义感知的模块化胶囊路由框架，称为 SUPER，以更好地捕获特定于实例的视觉语义特征并细化用于预测的判别表示。特别是，SUPER网络的每一层都定制了五个强大的专用模块和动态路由器，并构建了紧凑的路由空间，以便可以充分利用各种可定制的路由，并且可以显式校准视觉语义表示。我们通过五个基准数据集比较证明了我们提出的 SUPER 方案的有效性和泛化能力，以及参数高效的优势。值得强调的是，这项工作并不是为了追求 VQA 中最先进的结果。相反，我们希望我们的模型能够为 VQA 的架构学习和表示校准提供新颖的视角。 本文提出了一种名为SUPER的语义感知模块化胶囊路由框架，用于改进视觉问答（VQA）任务中的语义复杂性适应性和表示能力。 Yudong Han,Jianhua Yin,Jianlong Wu,Yinwei Wei,Liqiang Nie cs.CV

authors_text: Jiazhi Guan,Hang Zhou,Mingming Gong,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Youjian Zhao
title: Detecting Deepfake by Creating Spatio-Temporal Regularity Disruption
title_zh: 通过创建时空规律性破坏来检测 Deepfake
abstract: Despite encouraging progress in deepfake detection, generalization to unseen forgery types remains a significant challenge due to the limited forgery clues explored during training. In contrast, we notice a common phenomenon in deepfake: fake video creation inevitably disrupts the statistical regularity in original videos. Inspired by this observation, we propose to boost the generalization of deepfake detection by distinguishing the "regularity disruption" that does not appear in real videos. Specifically, by carefully examining the spatial and temporal properties, we propose to disrupt a real video through a Pseudo-fake Generator and create a wide range of pseudo-fake videos for training. Such practice allows us to achieve deepfake detection without using fake videos and improves the generalization ability in a simple and efficient manner. To jointly capture the spatial and temporal disruptions, we propose a Spatio-Temporal Enhancement block to learn the regularity disruption across space and time on our self-created videos. Through comprehensive experiments, our method exhibits excellent performance on several datasets.
summary: Despite encouraging progress in deepfake detection, generalization to unseen forgery types remains a significant challenge due to the limited forgery clues explored during training. In contrast, we notice a common phenomenon in deepfake: fake video creation inevitably disrupts the statistical regularity in original videos. Inspired by this observation, we propose to boost the generalization of deepfake detection by distinguishing the "regularity disruption" that does not appear in real videos. Specifically, by carefully examining the spatial and temporal properties, we propose to disrupt a real video through a Pseudo-fake Generator and create a wide range of pseudo-fake videos for training. Such practice allows us to achieve deepfake detection without using fake videos and improves the generalization ability in a simple and efficient manner. To jointly capture the spatial and temporal disruptions, we propose a Spatio-Temporal Enhancement block to learn the regularity disruption across space and time on our self-created videos. Through comprehensive experiments, our method exhibits excellent performance on several datasets.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度伪造检测方面取得了令人鼓舞的进展，但由于训练期间探索的伪造线索有限，对看不见的伪造类型的泛化仍然是一个重大挑战。相比之下，我们注意到 Deepfake 中的一个常见现象：虚假视频创作不可避免地破坏了原始视频的统计规律。受这一观察的启发，我们建议通过区分真实视频中未出现的“规律性破坏”来促进深度伪造检测的泛化。具体来说，通过仔细检查空间和时间属性，我们建议通过伪假生成器破坏真实视频，并创建各种伪假视频用于训练。这种做法使我们能够在不使用虚假视频的情况下实现深度伪造检测，并以简单有效的方式提高泛化能力。为了共同捕获空间和时间的干扰，我们提出了一个时空增强模块来学习我们自己创建的视频中跨空间和时间的规律性干扰。通过全面的实验，我们的方法在多个数据集上表现出了出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过创建时空规律性破坏来检测深度伪造视频。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法在面对新类型伪造时泛化能力不足，因训练时探索的伪造线索有限。观察到伪造视频会破坏原始视频的统计规律性，因此提出通过区分真实视频中不存在的规律性破坏来提升检测泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计伪伪造生成器破坏真实视频生成伪伪造样本，并提出时空增强模块联合捕捉时空维度的规律性破坏，无需真实伪造视频即可训练检测模型。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在检测性能上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建时空规律性破坏特征，无需依赖真实伪造样本即可实现具有强泛化能力的深度伪造检测。

search_text: Detecting Deepfake by Creating Spatio-Temporal Regularity Disruption 通过创建时空规律性破坏来检测 Deepfake Despite encouraging progress in deepfake detection, generalization to unseen forgery types remains a significant challenge due to the limited forgery clues explored during training. In contrast, we notice a common phenomenon in deepfake: fake video creation inevitably disrupts the statistical regularity in original videos. Inspired by this observation, we propose to boost the generalization of deepfake detection by distinguishing the "regularity disruption" that does not appear in real videos. Specifically, by carefully examining the spatial and temporal properties, we propose to disrupt a real video through a Pseudo-fake Generator and create a wide range of pseudo-fake videos for training. Such practice allows us to achieve deepfake detection without using fake videos and improves the generalization ability in a simple and efficient manner. To jointly capture the spatial and temporal disruptions, we propose a Spatio-Temporal Enhancement block to learn the regularity disruption across space and time on our self-created videos. Through comprehensive experiments, our method exhibits excellent performance on several datasets. 尽管深度伪造检测方面取得了令人鼓舞的进展，但由于训练期间探索的伪造线索有限，对看不见的伪造类型的泛化仍然是一个重大挑战。相比之下，我们注意到 Deepfake 中的一个常见现象：虚假视频创作不可避免地破坏了原始视频的统计规律。受这一观察的启发，我们建议通过区分真实视频中未出现的“规律性破坏”来促进深度伪造检测的泛化。具体来说，通过仔细检查空间和时间属性，我们建议通过伪假生成器破坏真实视频，并创建各种伪假视频用于训练。这种做法使我们能够在不使用虚假视频的情况下实现深度伪造检测，并以简单有效的方式提高泛化能力。为了共同捕获空间和时间的干扰，我们提出了一个时空增强模块来学习我们自己创建的视频中跨空间和时间的规律性干扰。通过全面的实验，我们的方法在多个数据集上表现出了出色的性能。 本文提出通过创建时空规律性破坏来检测深度伪造视频。 Jiazhi Guan,Hang Zhou,Mingming Gong,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang,Youjian Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Meng Cao,Ji Jiang,Long Chen,Yuexian Zou
title: Correspondence Matters for Video Referring Expression Comprehension
title_zh: 视频引用表达理解的对应性很重要
abstract: We investigate the problem of video Referring Expression Comprehension (REC), which aims to localize the referent objects described in the sentence to visual regions in the video frames. Despite the recent progress, existing methods suffer from two problems: 1) inconsistent localization results across video frames; 2) confusion between the referent and contextual objects. To this end, we propose a novel Dual Correspondence Network (dubbed as DCNet) which explicitly enhances the dense associations in both the inter-frame and cross-modal manners. Firstly, we aim to build the inter-frame correlations for all existing instances within the frames. Specifically, we compute the inter-frame patch-wise cosine similarity to estimate the dense alignment and then perform the inter-frame contrastive learning to map them close in feature space. Secondly, we propose to build the fine-grained patch-word alignment to associate each patch with certain words. Due to the lack of this kind of detailed annotations, we also predict the patch-word correspondence through the cosine similarity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on both video and image REC benchmarks. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies and thorough analyses to explore the optimal model designs. Notably, our inter-frame and cross-modal contrastive losses are plug-and-play functions and are applicable to any video REC architectures. For example, by building on top of Co-grounding, we boost the performance by 1.48% absolute improvement on Accu.@0.5 for VID-Sentence dataset.
summary: We investigate the problem of video Referring Expression Comprehension (REC), which aims to localize the referent objects described in the sentence to visual regions in the video frames. Despite the recent progress, existing methods suffer from two problems: 1) inconsistent localization results across video frames; 2) confusion between the referent and contextual objects. To this end, we propose a novel Dual Correspondence Network (dubbed as DCNet) which explicitly enhances the dense associations in both the inter-frame and cross-modal manners. Firstly, we aim to build the inter-frame correlations for all existing instances within the frames. Specifically, we compute the inter-frame patch-wise cosine similarity to estimate the dense alignment and then perform the inter-frame contrastive learning to map them close in feature space. Secondly, we propose to build the fine-grained patch-word alignment to associate each patch with certain words. Due to the lack of this kind of detailed annotations, we also predict the patch-word correspondence through the cosine similarity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our DCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on both video and image REC benchmarks. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies and thorough analyses to explore the optimal model designs. Notably, our inter-frame and cross-modal contrastive losses are plug-and-play functions and are applicable to any video REC architectures. For example, by building on top of Co-grounding, we boost the performance by 1.48% absolute improvement on Accu.@0.5 for VID-Sentence dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们研究视频指称表达理解（REC）问题，其目的是将句子中描述的指称对象定位到视频帧中的视觉区域。尽管最近取得了进展，但现有方法仍存在两个问题：1）视频帧之间的定位结果不一致； 2）所指对象和上下文对象之间的混淆。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的双重对应网络（称为 DCNet），它显着增强了帧间和跨模态方式的密集关联。首先，我们的目标是为帧内所有现有实例建立帧间相关性。具体来说，我们计算帧间补丁式余弦相似度来估计密集对齐，然后执行帧间对比学习以将它们映射到特征空间中。其次，我们建议构建细粒度的补丁-单词对齐，将每个补丁与某些单词相关联。由于缺乏这种详细的注释，我们还通过余弦相似度来预测补丁-单词对应关系。大量实验表明，我们的 DCNet 在视频和图像 REC 基准测试中均实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们进行全面的消融研究和彻底的分析，以探索最佳的模型设计。值得注意的是，我们的帧间和跨模式对比损失是即插即用功能，适用于任何视频 REC 架构。例如，通过在 Co-grounding 的基础上构建，我们将 VID-Sentence 数据集的 Accu.@0.5 的性能绝对提高了 1.48%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频指代表达理解（REC）任务，旨在将句子描述的对象定位到视频帧的视觉区域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在跨帧定位不一致及指代对象与上下文混淆的问题，需增强帧间与跨模态关联以提升准确性。
AI.method: 提出双对应网络（DCNet），通过帧间patch-wise余弦相似度计算与对比学习建立跨帧关联，并预测细粒度patch-word对齐以实现跨模态关联。
AI.result: 在视频和图像REC基准上达到最先进水平， VID-Sentence数据集上Accu.@0.5提升1.48%，且损失函数可适配多种架构。
AI.conclusion: DCNet通过显式建模帧间与跨模态对应关系，有效解决REC任务中的定位不一致与混淆问题，且具有通用性。

authors_text: Yuzhen Zhang,Wentong Wang,Weizhi Guo,Pei Lv,Mingliang Xu,Wei Chen,Dinesh Manocha
title: D2-TPred: Discontinuous Dependency for Trajectory Prediction under Traffic Lights
title_zh: D2-TPred：红绿灯下轨迹预测的不连续依赖
comment: Accepted to ECCV2022, 17 pages, 6 figures. Project page: https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred
comments: Accepted to ECCV2022, 17 pages, 6 figures. Project page: https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred
abstract: A profound understanding of inter-agent relationships and motion behaviors is important to achieve high-quality planning when navigating in complex scenarios, especially at urban traffic intersections. We present a trajectory prediction approach with respect to traffic lights, D2-TPred, which uses a spatial dynamic interaction graph (SDG) and a behavior dependency graph (BDG) to handle the problem of discontinuous dependency in the spatial-temporal space. Specifically, the SDG is used to capture spatial interactions by reconstructing sub-graphs for different agents with dynamic and changeable characteristics during each frame. The BDG is used to infer motion tendency by modeling the implicit dependency of the current state on priors behaviors, especially the discontinuous motions corresponding to acceleration, deceleration, or turning direction. Moreover, we present a new dataset for vehicle trajectory prediction under traffic lights called VTP-TL. Our experimental results show that our model achieves more than {20.45% and 20.78% }improvement in terms of ADE and FDE, respectively, on VTP-TL as compared to other trajectory prediction algorithms. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred.
summary: A profound understanding of inter-agent relationships and motion behaviors is important to achieve high-quality planning when navigating in complex scenarios, especially at urban traffic intersections. We present a trajectory prediction approach with respect to traffic lights, D2-TPred, which uses a spatial dynamic interaction graph (SDG) and a behavior dependency graph (BDG) to handle the problem of discontinuous dependency in the spatial-temporal space. Specifically, the SDG is used to capture spatial interactions by reconstructing sub-graphs for different agents with dynamic and changeable characteristics during each frame. The BDG is used to infer motion tendency by modeling the implicit dependency of the current state on priors behaviors, especially the discontinuous motions corresponding to acceleration, deceleration, or turning direction. Moreover, we present a new dataset for vehicle trajectory prediction under traffic lights called VTP-TL. Our experimental results show that our model achieves more than {20.45% and 20.78% }improvement in terms of ADE and FDE, respectively, on VTP-TL as compared to other trajectory prediction algorithms. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred.
abstract_zh: 深入理解智能体间的关系和运动行为对于在复杂场景中导航时实现高质量的规划非常重要，尤其是在城市交通路口。我们提出了一种针对交通信号灯的轨迹预测方法 D2-TPred，它使用空间动态交互图（SDG）和行为依赖图（BDG）来处理时空空间中的不连续依赖问题。具体来说，SDG 用于通过在每帧期间为具有动态和可变特征的不同代理重建子图来捕获空间交互。 BDG 用于通过建模当前状态对先验行为的隐式依赖性来推断运动趋势，特别是与加速、减速或转向方向相对应的不连续运动。此外，我们提出了一个新的交通灯下车辆轨迹预测数据集，称为 VTP-TL。我们的实验结果表明，与其他轨迹预测算法相比，我们的模型在 VTP-TL 上的 ADE 和 FDE 方面分别实现了超过 {20.45% 和 20.78%} 的改进。数据集和代码可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D2-TPred轨迹预测方法，通过构建空间动态交互图（SDG）和行为依赖图（BDG），解决交通灯场景下的不连续依赖问题，并发布新数据集VTP-TL。
AI.motivation: 城市交通交叉口场景中，代理间复杂交互及交通灯导致的不连续运动（如急停、转向）使轨迹预测难度增加，现有方法难以有效建模此类时空不连续性。
AI.method: 设计SDG捕捉动态空间交互，通过帧间子图重构处理多智能体变化特性；构建BDG建模当前状态与历史行为的隐式依赖，特别针对加速/减速/转向等不连续运动进行行为推理。
AI.result: 在自建数据集VTP-TL上，D2-TPred相较其他算法ADE指标提升20.45%，FDE指标提升20.78%，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空图神经网络建模不连续依赖关系，结合新数据集验证了方法有效性，为交通灯场景下的轨迹预测提供了新思路。

search_text: D2-TPred: Discontinuous Dependency for Trajectory Prediction under Traffic Lights D2-TPred：红绿灯下轨迹预测的不连续依赖 A profound understanding of inter-agent relationships and motion behaviors is important to achieve high-quality planning when navigating in complex scenarios, especially at urban traffic intersections. We present a trajectory prediction approach with respect to traffic lights, D2-TPred, which uses a spatial dynamic interaction graph (SDG) and a behavior dependency graph (BDG) to handle the problem of discontinuous dependency in the spatial-temporal space. Specifically, the SDG is used to capture spatial interactions by reconstructing sub-graphs for different agents with dynamic and changeable characteristics during each frame. The BDG is used to infer motion tendency by modeling the implicit dependency of the current state on priors behaviors, especially the discontinuous motions corresponding to acceleration, deceleration, or turning direction. Moreover, we present a new dataset for vehicle trajectory prediction under traffic lights called VTP-TL. Our experimental results show that our model achieves more than {20.45% and 20.78% }improvement in terms of ADE and FDE, respectively, on VTP-TL as compared to other trajectory prediction algorithms. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred. 深入理解智能体间的关系和运动行为对于在复杂场景中导航时实现高质量的规划非常重要，尤其是在城市交通路口。我们提出了一种针对交通信号灯的轨迹预测方法 D2-TPred，它使用空间动态交互图（SDG）和行为依赖图（BDG）来处理时空空间中的不连续依赖问题。具体来说，SDG 用于通过在每帧期间为具有动态和可变特征的不同代理重建子图来捕获空间交互。 BDG 用于通过建模当前状态对先验行为的隐式依赖性来推断运动趋势，特别是与加速、减速或转向方向相对应的不连续运动。此外，我们提出了一个新的交通灯下车辆轨迹预测数据集，称为 VTP-TL。我们的实验结果表明，与其他轨迹预测算法相比，我们的模型在 VTP-TL 上的 ADE 和 FDE 方面分别实现了超过 {20.45% 和 20.78%} 的改进。数据集和代码可从以下网址获取：https://github.com/VTP-TL/D2-TPred。 本文提出D2-TPred轨迹预测方法，通过构建空间动态交互图（SDG）和行为依赖图（BDG），解决交通灯场景下的不连续依赖问题，并发布新数据集VTP-TL。 Yuzhen Zhang,Wentong Wang,Weizhi Guo,Pei Lv,Mingliang Xu,Wei Chen,Dinesh Manocha cs.CV

authors_text: Bei Chen,Fengji Zhang,Anh Nguyen,Daoguang Zan,Zeqi Lin,Jian-Guang Lou,Weizhu Chen
title: CodeT: Code Generation with Generated Tests
title_zh: CodeT：使用生成的测试生成代码
abstract: The task of generating code solutions for a given programming problem can benefit from the use of pre-trained language models such as Codex, which can produce multiple diverse samples. However, a major challenge for this task is to select the most appropriate solution from the multiple samples generated by the pre-trained language models. A natural way to evaluate the quality and correctness of a code solution is to run it against a set of test cases, but the manual creation of such test cases is often costly and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a novel method, CodeT, that leverages the same pre-trained language models to automatically generate test cases for the code samples, thus reducing the human effort and increasing the coverage of the test scenarios. CodeT then executes the code samples using the generated test cases, and performs a dual execution agreement, which considers both the consistency of the outputs against the generated test cases and the agreement of the outputs with other code samples. We conduct comprehensive experiments on four benchmarks, HumanEval, MBPP, APPS and CodeContests, using five different pre-trained language models with varying sizes and capabilities. Our results show that CodeT can significantly improve the performance of code solution selection over previous methods, achieving remarkable and consistent gains across different models and benchmarks. For instance, CodeT improves the pass@1 metric on HumanEval to 65.8%, which represents an absolute improvement of 18.8% over the code-davinci-002 model, and an absolute improvement of more than 20% over the previous state-of-the-art results.
summary: The task of generating code solutions for a given programming problem can benefit from the use of pre-trained language models such as Codex, which can produce multiple diverse samples. However, a major challenge for this task is to select the most appropriate solution from the multiple samples generated by the pre-trained language models. A natural way to evaluate the quality and correctness of a code solution is to run it against a set of test cases, but the manual creation of such test cases is often costly and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a novel method, CodeT, that leverages the same pre-trained language models to automatically generate test cases for the code samples, thus reducing the human effort and increasing the coverage of the test scenarios. CodeT then executes the code samples using the generated test cases, and performs a dual execution agreement, which considers both the consistency of the outputs against the generated test cases and the agreement of the outputs with other code samples. We conduct comprehensive experiments on four benchmarks, HumanEval, MBPP, APPS and CodeContests, using five different pre-trained language models with varying sizes and capabilities. Our results show that CodeT can significantly improve the performance of code solution selection over previous methods, achieving remarkable and consistent gains across different models and benchmarks. For instance, CodeT improves the pass@1 metric on HumanEval to 65.8%, which represents an absolute improvement of 18.8% over the code-davinci-002 model, and an absolute improvement of more than 20% over the previous state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 为给定的编程问题生成代码解决方案的任务可以受益于使用预训练的语言模型（例如 Codex），它可以生成多个不同的样本。然而，这项任务的一个主要挑战是从预训练语言模型生成的多个样本中选择最合适的解决方案。评估代码解决方案的质量和正确性的一种自然方法是针对一组测试用例运行它，但手动创建此类测试用例通常成本高昂且耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法CodeT，它利用相同的预训练语言模型自动为代码样本生成测试用例，从而减少人力并增加测试场景的覆盖范围。然后，CodeT 使用生成的测试用例执行代码示例，并执行双重执行协议，该协议既考虑输出与生成的测试用例的一致性，又考虑输出与其他代码示例的一致性。我们使用五个不同大小和功能的不同预训练语言模型，对四个基准测试（HumanEval、MBPP、APPS 和 CodeContests）进行了全面的实验。我们的结果表明，与之前的方法相比，CodeT 可以显着提高代码解决方案选择的性能，在不同的模型和基准测试中实现显着且一致的增益。例如，CodeT 将 HumanEval 的 pass@1 指标提高到 65.8%，这意味着比 code-davinci-002 模型绝对提高了 18.8%，比之前的最先进结果绝对提高了 20% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CodeT方法，通过自动生成测试用例并结合双重执行一致性评估，提升代码生成任务中解决方案选择的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成方法依赖人工设计的测试用例进行评估，但该过程耗时且难以覆盖全面场景，限制了代码质量评估的效率与效果。
AI.method: 利用预训练语言模型自动生成测试用例，通过双重执行一致性（输出与测试用例的匹配度及多代码样本间的输出一致性）筛选最优解。
AI.result: 在HumanEval等四个基准测试中，CodeT使pass@1指标提升至65.8%，较基线模型提升18.8%，较之前最优方法提升超20%。
AI.conclusion: CodeT通过自动化测试生成与双重评估机制，显著优于现有方法，在不同模型与基准上均表现出稳定性能提升。

authors_text: Wentao Yuan,Qingtian Zhu,Xiangyue Liu,Yikang Ding,Haotian Zhang,Chi Zhang
title: Sobolev Training for Implicit Neural Representations with Approximated Image Derivatives
title_zh: 使用近似图像导数进行隐式神经表示的 Sobolev 训练
abstract: Recently, Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) parameterized by neural networks have emerged as a powerful and promising tool to represent different kinds of signals due to its continuous, differentiable properties, showing superiorities to classical discretized representations. However, the training of neural networks for INRs only utilizes input-output pairs, and the derivatives of the target output with respect to the input, which can be accessed in some cases, are usually ignored. In this paper, we propose a training paradigm for INRs whose target output is image pixels, to encode image derivatives in addition to image values in the neural network. Specifically, we use finite differences to approximate image derivatives. We show how the training paradigm can be leveraged to solve typical INRs problems, i.e., image regression and inverse rendering, and demonstrate this training paradigm can improve the data-efficiency and generalization capabilities of INRs. The code of our method is available at \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/Sobolev_INRs}.
summary: Recently, Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) parameterized by neural networks have emerged as a powerful and promising tool to represent different kinds of signals due to its continuous, differentiable properties, showing superiorities to classical discretized representations. However, the training of neural networks for INRs only utilizes input-output pairs, and the derivatives of the target output with respect to the input, which can be accessed in some cases, are usually ignored. In this paper, we propose a training paradigm for INRs whose target output is image pixels, to encode image derivatives in addition to image values in the neural network. Specifically, we use finite differences to approximate image derivatives. We show how the training paradigm can be leveraged to solve typical INRs problems, i.e., image regression and inverse rendering, and demonstrate this training paradigm can improve the data-efficiency and generalization capabilities of INRs. The code of our method is available at \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/Sobolev_INRs}.
abstract_zh: 最近，由神经网络参数化的隐式神经表示（INR）因其连续、可微的特性而成为表示不同类型信号的强大且有前途的工具，显示出相对于经典离散表示的优越性。然而，针对 INR 的神经网络训练仅利用输入输出对，并且在某些情况下可以访问的目标输出相对于输入的导数通常被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了一种 INR 的训练范例，其目标输出是图像像素，除了神经网络中的图像值之外，还对图像导数进行编码。具体来说，我们使用有限差分来近似图像导数。我们展示了如何利用训练范式来解决典型的 INR 问题，即图像回归和逆渲染，并证明这种训练范式可以提高 INR 的数据效率和泛化能力。我们方法的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/Sobolev_INRs} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于 Sobolev 训练的隐式神经表示（INRs）方法，通过近似图像导数提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统 INR 训练仅利用输入输出对，忽略了可获取的目标输出对输入的导数信息，导致数据效率和泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 采用有限差分法近似图像导数，并将其纳入 INR 的训练目标，改进图像回归和逆向渲染任务的优化过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在数据效率和模型泛化能力上优于现有 INR 方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入图像导数信息，Sobolev 训练有效提升了隐式神经表示的学习效果和适用性。

ai_content_json.method: 采用有限差分法近似图像导数，并将其纳入 INR 的训练目标，改进图像回归和逆向渲染任务的优化过程。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法在数据效率和模型泛化能力上优于现有 INR 方法，代码已开源。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过引入图像导数信息，Sobolev 训练有效提升了隐式神经表示的学习效果和适用性。

search_text: Sobolev Training for Implicit Neural Representations with Approximated Image Derivatives 使用近似图像导数进行隐式神经表示的 Sobolev 训练 Recently, Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) parameterized by neural networks have emerged as a powerful and promising tool to represent different kinds of signals due to its continuous, differentiable properties, showing superiorities to classical discretized representations. However, the training of neural networks for INRs only utilizes input-output pairs, and the derivatives of the target output with respect to the input, which can be accessed in some cases, are usually ignored. In this paper, we propose a training paradigm for INRs whose target output is image pixels, to encode image derivatives in addition to image values in the neural network. Specifically, we use finite differences to approximate image derivatives. We show how the training paradigm can be leveraged to solve typical INRs problems, i.e., image regression and inverse rendering, and demonstrate this training paradigm can improve the data-efficiency and generalization capabilities of INRs. The code of our method is available at \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/Sobolev_INRs}. 最近，由神经网络参数化的隐式神经表示（INR）因其连续、可微的特性而成为表示不同类型信号的强大且有前途的工具，显示出相对于经典离散表示的优越性。然而，针对 INR 的神经网络训练仅利用输入输出对，并且在某些情况下可以访问的目标输出相对于输入的导数通常被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了一种 INR 的训练范例，其目标输出是图像像素，除了神经网络中的图像值之外，还对图像导数进行编码。具体来说，我们使用有限差分来近似图像导数。我们展示了如何利用训练范式来解决典型的 INR 问题，即图像回归和逆渲染，并证明这种训练范式可以提高 INR 的数据效率和泛化能力。我们方法的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/megvii-research/Sobolev_INRs} 获取。 本文提出了一种基于 Sobolev 训练的隐式神经表示（INRs）方法，通过近似图像导数提升模型性能。 Wentao Yuan,Qingtian Zhu,Xiangyue Liu,Yikang Ding,Haotian Zhang,Chi Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Lu,Wenze Liu,Hongtao Fu,Zhiguo Cao
title: FADE: Fusing the Assets of Decoder and Encoder for Task-Agnostic Upsampling
title_zh: FADE：融合解码器和编码器的资源以实现与任务无关的上采样
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at http://lnkiy.in/fade_in
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Code is available at http://lnkiy.in/fade_in
abstract: We consider the problem of task-agnostic feature upsampling in dense prediction where an upsampling operator is required to facilitate both region-sensitive tasks like semantic segmentation and detail-sensitive tasks such as image matting. Existing upsampling operators often can work well in either type of the tasks, but not both. In this work, we present FADE, a novel, plug-and-play, and task-agnostic upsampling operator. FADE benefits from three design choices: i) considering encoder and decoder features jointly in upsampling kernel generation; ii) an efficient semi-shift convolutional operator that enables granular control over how each feature point contributes to upsampling kernels; iii) a decoder-dependent gating mechanism for enhanced detail delineation. We first study the upsampling properties of FADE on toy data and then evaluate it on large-scale semantic segmentation and image matting. In particular, FADE reveals its effectiveness and task-agnostic characteristic by consistently outperforming recent dynamic upsampling operators in different tasks. It also generalizes well across convolutional and transformer architectures with little computational overhead. Our work additionally provides thoughtful insights on what makes for task-agnostic upsampling. Code is available at: http://lnkiy.in/fade_in
summary: We consider the problem of task-agnostic feature upsampling in dense prediction where an upsampling operator is required to facilitate both region-sensitive tasks like semantic segmentation and detail-sensitive tasks such as image matting. Existing upsampling operators often can work well in either type of the tasks, but not both. In this work, we present FADE, a novel, plug-and-play, and task-agnostic upsampling operator. FADE benefits from three design choices: i) considering encoder and decoder features jointly in upsampling kernel generation; ii) an efficient semi-shift convolutional operator that enables granular control over how each feature point contributes to upsampling kernels; iii) a decoder-dependent gating mechanism for enhanced detail delineation. We first study the upsampling properties of FADE on toy data and then evaluate it on large-scale semantic segmentation and image matting. In particular, FADE reveals its effectiveness and task-agnostic characteristic by consistently outperforming recent dynamic upsampling operators in different tasks. It also generalizes well across convolutional and transformer architectures with little computational overhead. Our work additionally provides thoughtful insights on what makes for task-agnostic upsampling. Code is available at: http://lnkiy.in/fade_in
abstract_zh: 我们考虑密集预测中与任务无关的特征上采样问题，其中需要上采样算子来促进语义分割等区域敏感任务和图像抠图等细节敏感任务。现有的上采样算子通常可以很好地处理任一类型的任务，但不能同时处理这两种任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FADE，一种新颖的、即插即用且与任务无关的上采样算子。 FADE 受益于三种设计选择：i) 在上采样内核生成中联合考虑编码器和解码器功能； ii) 高效的半移位卷积算子，可以精细控制每个特征点对上采样内核的贡献； iii) 依赖于解码器的门控机制，用于增强细节描绘。我们首先研究 FADE 在玩具数据上的上采样特性，然后在大规模语义分割和图像抠图方面对其进行评估。特别是，FADE 通过在不同任务中始终优于最新的动态上采样算子，揭示了其有效性和任务无关的特征。它还可以很好地推广到卷积和变压器架构，而计算开销很小。我们的工作还提供了关于任务无关上采样的深思熟虑的见解。代码可访问：http://lnkiy.in/fade_in

AI.tldr: 设计一种任务无关的上采样操作符，用于密集预测任务，如语义分割和图像抠图。
AI.motivation: 现有上采样操作符难以同时满足区域敏感任务和细节敏感任务的需求，需提出统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过结合编码器与解码器特征生成上采样核，采用半移卷积控制特征点贡献，并引入解码器依赖的门控机制。
AI.result: 在语义分割和图像抠图任务中均优于最新动态上采样方法，且适用于不同架构且计算开销小。
AI.conclusion: 提出有效且通用的上采样方法，并提供任务无关上采样的关键设计见解。

authors_text: Jaeyeon Kang,Seoung Wug Oh,Seon Joo Kim
title: Error Compensation Framework for Flow-Guided Video Inpainting
title_zh: 流引导视频修复的误差补偿框架
abstract: The key to video inpainting is to use correlation information from as many reference frames as possible. Existing flow-based propagation methods split the video synthesis process into multiple steps: flow completion -> pixel propagation -> synthesis. However, there is a significant drawback that the errors in each step continue to accumulate and amplify in the next step. To this end, we propose an Error Compensation Framework for Flow-guided Video Inpainting (ECFVI), which takes advantage of the flow-based method and offsets its weaknesses. We address the weakness with the newly designed flow completion module and the error compensation network that exploits the error guidance map. Our approach greatly improves the temporal consistency and the visual quality of the completed videos. Experimental results show the superior performance of our proposed method with the speed up of x6, compared to the state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we present a new benchmark dataset for evaluation by supplementing the weaknesses of existing test datasets.
summary: The key to video inpainting is to use correlation information from as many reference frames as possible. Existing flow-based propagation methods split the video synthesis process into multiple steps: flow completion -> pixel propagation -> synthesis. However, there is a significant drawback that the errors in each step continue to accumulate and amplify in the next step. To this end, we propose an Error Compensation Framework for Flow-guided Video Inpainting (ECFVI), which takes advantage of the flow-based method and offsets its weaknesses. We address the weakness with the newly designed flow completion module and the error compensation network that exploits the error guidance map. Our approach greatly improves the temporal consistency and the visual quality of the completed videos. Experimental results show the superior performance of our proposed method with the speed up of x6, compared to the state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we present a new benchmark dataset for evaluation by supplementing the weaknesses of existing test datasets.
abstract_zh: 视频修复的关键是使用来自尽可能多的参考帧的相关信息。现有的基于流的传播方法将视频合成过程分为多个步骤：流完成->像素传播->合成。然而，它有一个显着的缺点，即每一步的错误都会在下一步中不断累积和放大。为此，我们提出了一种流引导视频修复的误差补偿框架（ECFVI），该框架利用了基于流的方法并弥补了其弱点。我们通过新设计的流程完成模块和利用误差引导图的误差补偿网络来解决这个弱点。我们的方法极大地提高了已完成视频的时间一致性和视觉质量。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的方法具有 6 倍加速的优越性能。此外，我们通过补充现有测试数据集的弱点，提出了一个新的评估基准数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于流引导视频修复的错误补偿框架（ECFVI），旨在解决现有方法中误差累积导致的视频修复质量下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的视频修复方法在多个步骤（流完成、像素传播、合成）中存在误差累积和放大的问题，导致修复结果的时间一致性和视觉质量下降。
AI.method: 设计了新的流完成模块和错误补偿网络，利用错误引导图来抵消误差传播，从而提升修复效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法相比现有最佳方法速度提升6倍，并在新构建的基准数据集上验证了优越性能。
AI.conclusion: ECFVI框架通过有效补偿误差显著提升了视频修复的时序一致性和视觉质量，同时为评估提供了新的基准数据集。

authors_text: Boyang Xia,Wenhao Wu,Haoran Wang,Rui Su,Dongliang He,Haosen Yang,Xiaoran Fan,Wanli Ouyang
title: NSNet: Non-saliency Suppression Sampler for Efficient Video Recognition
title_zh: NSNet：用于高效视频识别的非显着性抑制采样器
abstract: It is challenging for artificial intelligence systems to achieve accurate video recognition under the scenario of low computation costs. Adaptive inference based efficient video recognition methods typically preview videos and focus on salient parts to reduce computation costs. Most existing works focus on complex networks learning with video classification based objectives. Taking all frames as positive samples, few of them pay attention to the discrimination between positive samples (salient frames) and negative samples (non-salient frames) in supervisions. To fill this gap, in this paper, we propose a novel Non-saliency Suppression Network (NSNet), which effectively suppresses the responses of non-salient frames. Specifically, on the frame level, effective pseudo labels that can distinguish between salient and non-salient frames are generated to guide the frame saliency learning. On the video level, a temporal attention module is learned under dual video-level supervisions on both the salient and the non-salient representations. Saliency measurements from both two levels are combined for exploitation of multi-granularity complementary information. Extensive experiments conducted on four well-known benchmarks verify our NSNet not only achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy-efficiency trade-off but also present a significantly faster (2.4~4.3x) practical inference speed than state-of-the-art methods. Our project page is at https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/nsnet .
summary: It is challenging for artificial intelligence systems to achieve accurate video recognition under the scenario of low computation costs. Adaptive inference based efficient video recognition methods typically preview videos and focus on salient parts to reduce computation costs. Most existing works focus on complex networks learning with video classification based objectives. Taking all frames as positive samples, few of them pay attention to the discrimination between positive samples (salient frames) and negative samples (non-salient frames) in supervisions. To fill this gap, in this paper, we propose a novel Non-saliency Suppression Network (NSNet), which effectively suppresses the responses of non-salient frames. Specifically, on the frame level, effective pseudo labels that can distinguish between salient and non-salient frames are generated to guide the frame saliency learning. On the video level, a temporal attention module is learned under dual video-level supervisions on both the salient and the non-salient representations. Saliency measurements from both two levels are combined for exploitation of multi-granularity complementary information. Extensive experiments conducted on four well-known benchmarks verify our NSNet not only achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy-efficiency trade-off but also present a significantly faster (2.4~4.3x) practical inference speed than state-of-the-art methods. Our project page is at https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/nsnet .
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统在低计算成本的场景下实现准确的视频识别具有挑战性。基于自适应推理的高效视频识别方法通常会预览视频并关注显着部分以降低计算成本。大多数现有的工作都集中于具有基于视频分类目标的复杂网络学习。将所有帧作为正样本，很少有人关注监督中正样本（显着帧）和负样本（非显着帧）的区分。为了填补这一空白，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的非显着性抑制网络（NSNet），它有效地抑制了非显着帧的响应。具体来说，在帧级别上，生成可以区分显着性帧和非显着性帧的有效伪标签来指导帧显着性学习。在视频级别上，在显着性表示和非显着性表示的双重视频级监督下学习时间注意力模块。来自两个级别的显着性测量被组合起来以利用多粒度互补信息。在四个著名基准上进行的大量实验验证了我们的 NSNet 不仅实现了最先进的精度-效率权衡，而且还提供了比最先进的方法快得多（2.4~4.3 倍）的实际推理速度。我们的项目页面位于 https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/nsnet 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NSNet，一种通过抑制非显著帧来提升视频识别效率的非显著抑制采样器。
AI.motivation: 现有高效视频识别方法多关注显著帧以降低计算成本，但缺乏对显著帧与非显著帧判别的监督，导致效率与准确率难以平衡。
AI.method: 在帧级生成伪标签区分显著与非显著帧，在视频级设计双监督时序注意力模块，融合多粒度显著性信息实现非显著帧抑制。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上达到最先进精度-效率平衡，推理速度较现有方法快2.4~4.3倍。
AI.conclusion: NSNet通过多粒度显著性建模有效提升视频识别效率，为低计算成本场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Lumin Xu,Sheng Jin,Wang Zeng,Wentao Liu,Chen Qian,Wanli Ouyang,Ping Luo,Xiaogang Wang
title: Pose for Everything: Towards Category-Agnostic Pose Estimation
title_zh: 一切姿势：迈向与类别无关的姿势估计
abstract: Existing works on 2D pose estimation mainly focus on a certain category, e.g. human, animal, and vehicle. However, there are lots of application scenarios that require detecting the poses/keypoints of the unseen class of objects. In this paper, we introduce the task of Category-Agnostic Pose Estimation (CAPE), which aims to create a pose estimation model capable of detecting the pose of any class of object given only a few samples with keypoint definition. To achieve this goal, we formulate the pose estimation problem as a keypoint matching problem and design a novel CAPE framework, termed POse Matching Network (POMNet). A transformer-based Keypoint Interaction Module (KIM) is proposed to capture both the interactions among different keypoints and the relationship between the support and query images. We also introduce Multi-category Pose (MP-100) dataset, which is a 2D pose dataset of 100 object categories containing over 20K instances and is well-designed for developing CAPE algorithms. Experiments show that our method outperforms other baseline approaches by a large margin. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/luminxu/Pose-for-Everything.
summary: Existing works on 2D pose estimation mainly focus on a certain category, e.g. human, animal, and vehicle. However, there are lots of application scenarios that require detecting the poses/keypoints of the unseen class of objects. In this paper, we introduce the task of Category-Agnostic Pose Estimation (CAPE), which aims to create a pose estimation model capable of detecting the pose of any class of object given only a few samples with keypoint definition. To achieve this goal, we formulate the pose estimation problem as a keypoint matching problem and design a novel CAPE framework, termed POse Matching Network (POMNet). A transformer-based Keypoint Interaction Module (KIM) is proposed to capture both the interactions among different keypoints and the relationship between the support and query images. We also introduce Multi-category Pose (MP-100) dataset, which is a 2D pose dataset of 100 object categories containing over 20K instances and is well-designed for developing CAPE algorithms. Experiments show that our method outperforms other baseline approaches by a large margin. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/luminxu/Pose-for-Everything.
abstract_zh: 现有的 2D 位姿估计工作主要集中在某个类别，例如人类、动物和车辆。然而，有很多应用场景需要检测未见过的物体类别的姿势/关键点。在本文中，我们介绍了类别无关姿势估计（CAPE）的任务，其目的是创建一个姿势估计模型，能够在仅给定几个具有关键点定义的样本的情况下检测任何类别对象的姿势。为了实现这一目标，我们将姿态估计问题表述为关键点匹配问题，并设计了一种新颖的 CAPE 框架，称为 POse 匹配网络 (POMNet)。提出了一种基于变压器的关键点交互模块（KIM）来捕获不同关键点之间的交互以及支持图像和查询图像之间的关系。我们还引入了多类别姿势 (MP-100) 数据集，它是包含 100 个对象类别的 2D 姿势数据集，包含超过 20K 个实例，专为开发 CAPE 算法而设计。实验表明，我们的方法大大优于其他基线方法。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/luminxu/Pose-for-Everything 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需预先知道对象类别的姿态估计方法，能够基于少量样本检测任意类别的物体姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有姿态估计方法局限于特定类别（如人、动物、车辆），但实际场景中需检测未见过的类别物体姿态，亟需通用解决方案。
AI.method: 提出类别无关姿态估计任务（CAPE），设计基于Transformer的POMNet框架，包含关键点交互模块（KIM）以捕捉关键点间关系及支持图像与查询图像的关联，并构建包含100类20K实例的MP-100数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准测试中显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新框架与数据集设计，实现了跨类别姿态估计的突破，为通用姿态检测提供了有效途径。

authors_text: Boyang Xia,Zhihao Wang,Wenhao Wu,Haoran Wang,Jungong Han
title: Temporal Saliency Query Network for Efficient Video Recognition
title_zh: 用于高效视频识别的时间显着性查询网络
abstract: Efficient video recognition is a hot-spot research topic with the explosive growth of multimedia data on the Internet and mobile devices. Most existing methods select the salient frames without awareness of the class-specific saliency scores, which neglect the implicit association between the saliency of frames and its belonging category. To alleviate this issue, we devise a novel Temporal Saliency Query (TSQ) mechanism, which introduces class-specific information to provide fine-grained cues for saliency measurement. Specifically, we model the class-specific saliency measuring process as a query-response task. For each category, the common pattern of it is employed as a query and the most salient frames are responded to it. Then, the calculated similarities are adopted as the frame saliency scores. To achieve it, we propose a Temporal Saliency Query Network (TSQNet) that includes two instantiations of the TSQ mechanism based on visual appearance similarities and textual event-object relations. Afterward, cross-modality interactions are imposed to promote the information exchange between them. Finally, we use the class-specific saliencies of the most confident categories generated by two modalities to perform the selection of salient frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by achieving state-of-the-art results on ActivityNet, FCVID and Mini-Kinetics datasets. Our project page is at https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/tsqnet .
summary: Efficient video recognition is a hot-spot research topic with the explosive growth of multimedia data on the Internet and mobile devices. Most existing methods select the salient frames without awareness of the class-specific saliency scores, which neglect the implicit association between the saliency of frames and its belonging category. To alleviate this issue, we devise a novel Temporal Saliency Query (TSQ) mechanism, which introduces class-specific information to provide fine-grained cues for saliency measurement. Specifically, we model the class-specific saliency measuring process as a query-response task. For each category, the common pattern of it is employed as a query and the most salient frames are responded to it. Then, the calculated similarities are adopted as the frame saliency scores. To achieve it, we propose a Temporal Saliency Query Network (TSQNet) that includes two instantiations of the TSQ mechanism based on visual appearance similarities and textual event-object relations. Afterward, cross-modality interactions are imposed to promote the information exchange between them. Finally, we use the class-specific saliencies of the most confident categories generated by two modalities to perform the selection of salient frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by achieving state-of-the-art results on ActivityNet, FCVID and Mini-Kinetics datasets. Our project page is at https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/tsqnet .
abstract_zh: 随着互联网和移动设备上多媒体数据的爆炸式增长，高效视频识别成为一个热点研究课题。大多数现有方法在不了解特定于类的显着性分数的情况下选择显着帧，从而忽略了帧的显着性与其所属类别之间的隐式关联。为了缓解这个问题，我们设计了一种新颖的时间显着性查询（TSQ）机制，它引入了特定于类的信息，为显着性测量提供细粒度的线索。具体来说，我们将特定于类的显着性测量过程建模为查询响应任务。对于每个类别，采用其常见模式作为查询，并响应最显着的帧。然后，采用计算出的相似度作为帧显着性得分。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种时间显着性查询网络（TSQNet），其中包括基于视觉外观相似性和文本事件-对象关系的 TSQ 机制的两个实例。然后，进行跨模态交互以促进它们之间的信息交换。最后，我们使用两种模式生成的最置信类别的特定于类的显着性来执行显着帧的选择。大量实验通过在 ActivityNet、FCVID 和 Mini-Kinetics 数据集上取得最先进的结果证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的项目页面位于 https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/tsqnet 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TSQNet的时序显著性查询网络，用于高效视频识别，通过引入类别特定的显著性信息来优化关键帧选择。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在选择显著帧时未考虑类别特定的显著性分数，忽略了帧显著性与其所属类别的隐含关联，导致识别效率不足。
AI.method: 设计了时序显著性查询（TSQ）机制，将类别特定的显著性测量建模为查询-响应任务，并通过视觉外观相似性和文本事件-物体关系两种模态的跨模态交互提升信息融合效果。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet、FCVID和Mini-Kinetics数据集上取得了最先进的结果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合类别先验信息与多模态交互，TSQNet显著提升了视频识别的效率和准确性。

search_text: Temporal Saliency Query Network for Efficient Video Recognition 用于高效视频识别的时间显着性查询网络 Efficient video recognition is a hot-spot research topic with the explosive growth of multimedia data on the Internet and mobile devices. Most existing methods select the salient frames without awareness of the class-specific saliency scores, which neglect the implicit association between the saliency of frames and its belonging category. To alleviate this issue, we devise a novel Temporal Saliency Query (TSQ) mechanism, which introduces class-specific information to provide fine-grained cues for saliency measurement. Specifically, we model the class-specific saliency measuring process as a query-response task. For each category, the common pattern of it is employed as a query and the most salient frames are responded to it. Then, the calculated similarities are adopted as the frame saliency scores. To achieve it, we propose a Temporal Saliency Query Network (TSQNet) that includes two instantiations of the TSQ mechanism based on visual appearance similarities and textual event-object relations. Afterward, cross-modality interactions are imposed to promote the information exchange between them. Finally, we use the class-specific saliencies of the most confident categories generated by two modalities to perform the selection of salient frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method by achieving state-of-the-art results on ActivityNet, FCVID and Mini-Kinetics datasets. Our project page is at https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/tsqnet . 随着互联网和移动设备上多媒体数据的爆炸式增长，高效视频识别成为一个热点研究课题。大多数现有方法在不了解特定于类的显着性分数的情况下选择显着帧，从而忽略了帧的显着性与其所属类别之间的隐式关联。为了缓解这个问题，我们设计了一种新颖的时间显着性查询（TSQ）机制，它引入了特定于类的信息，为显着性测量提供细粒度的线索。具体来说，我们将特定于类的显着性测量过程建模为查询响应任务。对于每个类别，采用其常见模式作为查询，并响应最显着的帧。然后，采用计算出的相似度作为帧显着性得分。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种时间显着性查询网络（TSQNet），其中包括基于视觉外观相似性和文本事件-对象关系的 TSQ 机制的两个实例。然后，进行跨模态交互以促进它们之间的信息交换。最后，我们使用两种模式生成的最置信类别的特定于类的显着性来执行显着帧的选择。大量实验通过在 ActivityNet、FCVID 和 Mini-Kinetics 数据集上取得最先进的结果证明了我们方法的有效性。我们的项目页面位于 https://lawrencexia2008.github.io/projects/tsqnet 。 本文提出了一种名为TSQNet的时序显著性查询网络，用于高效视频识别，通过引入类别特定的显著性信息来优化关键帧选择。 Boyang Xia,Zhihao Wang,Wenhao Wu,Haoran Wang,Jungong Han cs.CV

authors_text: Yusuf Nasir,Louis J. Durlofsky
title: Multi-Asset Closed-Loop Reservoir Management Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的多资产闭环油藏管理
abstract: Closed-loop reservoir management (CLRM), in which history matching and production optimization are performed multiple times over the life of an asset, can provide significant improvement in the specified objective. These procedures are computationally expensive due to the large number of flow simulations required for data assimilation and optimization. Existing CLRM procedures are applied asset by asset, without utilizing information that could be useful over a range assets. Here, we develop a CLRM framework for multiple assets with varying numbers of wells. We use deep reinforcement learning to train a single global control policy that is applicable for all assets considered. The new framework is an extension of a recently introduced control policy methodology for individual assets. Embedding layers are incorporated into the representation to handle the different numbers of decision variables that arise for the different assets. Because the global control policy learns a unified representation of useful features from multiple assets, it is less expensive to construct than asset-by-asset training (we observe about 3x speedup in our examples). The production optimization problem includes a relative-change constraint on the well settings, which renders the results suitable for practical use. We apply the multi-asset CLRM framework to 2D and 3D water-flooding examples. In both cases, four assets with different well counts, well configurations, and geostatistical descriptions are considered. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the global control policy provides objective function values, for both the 2D and 3D cases, that are nearly identical to those from control policies trained individually for each asset. This promising finding suggests that multi-asset CLRM may indeed represent a viable practical strategy.
summary: Closed-loop reservoir management (CLRM), in which history matching and production optimization are performed multiple times over the life of an asset, can provide significant improvement in the specified objective. These procedures are computationally expensive due to the large number of flow simulations required for data assimilation and optimization. Existing CLRM procedures are applied asset by asset, without utilizing information that could be useful over a range assets. Here, we develop a CLRM framework for multiple assets with varying numbers of wells. We use deep reinforcement learning to train a single global control policy that is applicable for all assets considered. The new framework is an extension of a recently introduced control policy methodology for individual assets. Embedding layers are incorporated into the representation to handle the different numbers of decision variables that arise for the different assets. Because the global control policy learns a unified representation of useful features from multiple assets, it is less expensive to construct than asset-by-asset training (we observe about 3x speedup in our examples). The production optimization problem includes a relative-change constraint on the well settings, which renders the results suitable for practical use. We apply the multi-asset CLRM framework to 2D and 3D water-flooding examples. In both cases, four assets with different well counts, well configurations, and geostatistical descriptions are considered. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the global control policy provides objective function values, for both the 2D and 3D cases, that are nearly identical to those from control policies trained individually for each asset. This promising finding suggests that multi-asset CLRM may indeed represent a viable practical strategy.
abstract_zh: 闭环油藏管理 (CLRM) 在资产的生命周期内多次执行历史匹配和生产优化，可以显着改善指定目标。由于数据同化和优化需要大量的流动模拟，这些过程的计算成本很高。现有的 CLRM 程序逐个资产应用，而没有利用对一系列资产有用的信息。在这里，我们为具有不同井数的多个资产开发了一个 CLRM 框架。我们使用深度强化学习来训练适用于所有考虑的资产的单一全局控制策略。新框架是最近推出的个人资产控制政策方法的延伸。嵌入层被合并到表示中，以处理不同资产出现的不同数量的决策变量。由于全局控制策略从多个资产中学习有用特征的统一表示，因此构建起来比逐个资产训练更便宜（我们在示例中观察到大约 3 倍的加速）。生产优化问题包括井设置的相对变化约束，这使得结果适合实际使用。我们将多资产 CLRM 框架应用于 2D 和 3D 注水示例。在这两种情况下，都会考虑具有不同井数、井配置和地质统计描述的四种资产。数值实验表明，对于 2D 和 3D 情况，全局控制策略提供的目标函数值几乎与针对每个资产单独训练的控制策略的目标函数值相同。这一有希望的发现表明，多资产 CLRM 可能确实代表了一种可行的实用策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的多资产闭环油藏管理框架，通过训练全局控制策略实现多资产协同优化，降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统闭环油藏管理逐个资产独立处理，计算成本高且无法跨资产共享信息，难以满足实际工程需求。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习构建全局控制策略，引入嵌入层处理不同资产的决策变量差异，实现多资产特征统一表示与联合优化。
AI.result: 在2D/3D水驱案例中，全局策略性能与单资产策略相当，计算速度提升约3倍，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多资产CLRM框架可显著降低计算成本且保持优化效果，为实际工程应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Mehmet Cagri Aksoy,Beril Sirmacek,Cem Unsalan
title: Land Classification in Satellite Images by Injecting Traditional Features to CNN Models
title_zh: 通过将传统特征注入 CNN 模型来进行卫星图像中的土地分类
abstract: Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to remote sensing problems for several years. Among these methods, CNN based models have high accuracy in solving the land classification problem using satellite or aerial images. Although these models have high accuracy, this generally comes with large memory size requirements. On the other hand, it is desirable to have small-sized models for applications, such as the ones implemented on unmanned aerial vehicles, with low memory space. Unfortunately, small-sized CNN models do not provide high accuracy as with their large-sized versions. In this study, we propose a novel method to improve the accuracy of CNN models, especially the ones with small size, by injecting traditional features to them. To test the effectiveness of the proposed method, we applied it to the CNN models SqueezeNet, MobileNetV2, ShuffleNetV2, VGG16, and ResNet50V2 having size 0.5 MB to 528 MB. We used the sample mean, gray level co-occurrence matrix features, Hu moments, local binary patterns, histogram of oriented gradients, and color invariants as traditional features for injection. We tested the proposed method on the EuroSAT dataset to perform land classification. Our experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves the land classification accuracy especially when applied to small-sized CNN models.
summary: Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to remote sensing problems for several years. Among these methods, CNN based models have high accuracy in solving the land classification problem using satellite or aerial images. Although these models have high accuracy, this generally comes with large memory size requirements. On the other hand, it is desirable to have small-sized models for applications, such as the ones implemented on unmanned aerial vehicles, with low memory space. Unfortunately, small-sized CNN models do not provide high accuracy as with their large-sized versions. In this study, we propose a novel method to improve the accuracy of CNN models, especially the ones with small size, by injecting traditional features to them. To test the effectiveness of the proposed method, we applied it to the CNN models SqueezeNet, MobileNetV2, ShuffleNetV2, VGG16, and ResNet50V2 having size 0.5 MB to 528 MB. We used the sample mean, gray level co-occurrence matrix features, Hu moments, local binary patterns, histogram of oriented gradients, and color invariants as traditional features for injection. We tested the proposed method on the EuroSAT dataset to perform land classification. Our experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves the land classification accuracy especially when applied to small-sized CNN models.
abstract_zh: 多年来，深度学习方法已成功应用于遥感问题。在这些方法中，基于 CNN 的模型在使用卫星或航空图像解决土地分类问题时具有很高的准确性。尽管这些模型具有较高的精度，但这通常需要较大的内存大小。另一方面，希望有适合应用的小尺寸模型，例如在无人机上实现的具有低存储空间的模型。不幸的是，小型 CNN 模型无法提供大型版本那样的高精度。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新方法，通过向 CNN 模型注入传统特征来提高 CNN 模型的准确性，特别是小尺寸模型。为了测试所提出方法的有效性，我们将其应用于大小为 0.5 MB 至 528 MB 的 CNN 模型 SqueezeNet、MobileNetV2、ShuffleNetV2、VGG16 和 ResNet50V2。我们使用样本均值、灰度共生矩阵特征、Hu矩、局部二值模式、定向梯度直方图和颜色不变量作为传统的注入特征。我们在 EuroSAT 数据集上测试了所提出的方法来执行土地分类。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法显着提高了土地分类精度，尤其是应用于小型 CNN 模型时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过向卷积神经网络（CNN）模型注入传统特征以提高土地分类准确率的方法。
AI.motivation: 虽然大型CNN模型在土地分类任务中具有高准确率，但它们需要较大的内存，而小型CNN模型虽然内存占用小，但准确率较低，因此需要一种方法来提升小型模型的性能。
AI.method: 本文通过向小型CNN模型（如SqueezeNet、MobileNetV2等）注入传统特征（如灰度共生矩阵、Hu矩、局部二值模式等）来提升其分类性能，并在EuroSAT数据集上进行了测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著提高了土地分类的准确率，尤其是在小型CNN模型上效果更为明显。
AI.conclusion: 通过向小型CNN模型注入传统特征，可以在不显著增加模型复杂度的情况下有效提升其在土地分类任务中的性能。

search_text: Land Classification in Satellite Images by Injecting Traditional Features to CNN Models 通过将传统特征注入 CNN 模型来进行卫星图像中的土地分类 Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to remote sensing problems for several years. Among these methods, CNN based models have high accuracy in solving the land classification problem using satellite or aerial images. Although these models have high accuracy, this generally comes with large memory size requirements. On the other hand, it is desirable to have small-sized models for applications, such as the ones implemented on unmanned aerial vehicles, with low memory space. Unfortunately, small-sized CNN models do not provide high accuracy as with their large-sized versions. In this study, we propose a novel method to improve the accuracy of CNN models, especially the ones with small size, by injecting traditional features to them. To test the effectiveness of the proposed method, we applied it to the CNN models SqueezeNet, MobileNetV2, ShuffleNetV2, VGG16, and ResNet50V2 having size 0.5 MB to 528 MB. We used the sample mean, gray level co-occurrence matrix features, Hu moments, local binary patterns, histogram of oriented gradients, and color invariants as traditional features for injection. We tested the proposed method on the EuroSAT dataset to perform land classification. Our experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves the land classification accuracy especially when applied to small-sized CNN models. 多年来，深度学习方法已成功应用于遥感问题。在这些方法中，基于 CNN 的模型在使用卫星或航空图像解决土地分类问题时具有很高的准确性。尽管这些模型具有较高的精度，但这通常需要较大的内存大小。另一方面，希望有适合应用的小尺寸模型，例如在无人机上实现的具有低存储空间的模型。不幸的是，小型 CNN 模型无法提供大型版本那样的高精度。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新方法，通过向 CNN 模型注入传统特征来提高 CNN 模型的准确性，特别是小尺寸模型。为了测试所提出方法的有效性，我们将其应用于大小为 0.5 MB 至 528 MB 的 CNN 模型 SqueezeNet、MobileNetV2、ShuffleNetV2、VGG16 和 ResNet50V2。我们使用样本均值、灰度共生矩阵特征、Hu矩、局部二值模式、定向梯度直方图和颜色不变量作为传统的注入特征。我们在 EuroSAT 数据集上测试了所提出的方法来执行土地分类。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法显着提高了土地分类精度，尤其是应用于小型 CNN 模型时。 本文提出了一种通过向卷积神经网络（CNN）模型注入传统特征以提高土地分类准确率的方法。 Mehmet Cagri Aksoy,Beril Sirmacek,Cem Unsalan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Moshe Sipper,Tomer Halperin,Itai Tzruia,Achiya Elyasaf
title: EC-KitY: Evolutionary Computation Tool Kit in Python with Seamless Machine Learning Integration
title_zh: EC-KitY：Python 中的进化计算工具套件，具有无缝机器学习集成
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Published in Elsevier SoftwareX
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Published in Elsevier SoftwareX
abstract: EC-KitY is a comprehensive Python library for doing evolutionary computation (EC), licensed under the BSD 3-Clause License, and compatible with scikit-learn. Designed with modern software engineering and machine learning integration in mind, EC-KitY can support all popular EC paradigms, including genetic algorithms, genetic programming, coevolution, evolutionary multi-objective optimization, and more. This paper provides an overview of the package, including the ease of setting up an EC experiment, the architecture, the main features, and a comparison with other libraries.
summary: EC-KitY is a comprehensive Python library for doing evolutionary computation (EC), licensed under the BSD 3-Clause License, and compatible with scikit-learn. Designed with modern software engineering and machine learning integration in mind, EC-KitY can support all popular EC paradigms, including genetic algorithms, genetic programming, coevolution, evolutionary multi-objective optimization, and more. This paper provides an overview of the package, including the ease of setting up an EC experiment, the architecture, the main features, and a comparison with other libraries.
abstract_zh: EC-KitY 是一个用于进行进化计算 (EC) 的综合 Python 库，根据 BSD 3-Clause License 获得许可，并与 scikit-learn 兼容。 EC-KitY 的设计考虑了现代软件工程和机器学习集成，可以支持所有流行的 EC 范式，包括遗传算法、遗传编程、协同进化、进化多目标优化等。本文概述了该软件包，包括设置 EC 实验的难易程度、架构、主要功能以及与其他库的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为EC-KitY的Python进化计算工具包，强调其与机器学习的无缝集成及对多种进化计算范式的支持。
AI.motivation: 现有进化计算库缺乏现代软件工程设计和机器学习兼容性，需开发一个功能全面、易用且支持主流机器学习框架的工具包。
AI.method: 通过模块化架构设计实现多种进化计算范式（如遗传算法、多目标优化等），并深度集成scikit-learn接口，提供简洁的API和实验配置流程。
AI.result: EC-KitY支持主流EC方法，实验设置便捷，与scikit-learn兼容性良好，在功能完备性与易用性上优于其他同类库。
AI.conclusion: EC-KitY为进化计算研究提供了高效工具，促进了与机器学习的结合，未来将扩展更多算法和优化性能。

authors_text: Meng Cao,Tianyu Yang,Junwu Weng,Can Zhang,Jue Wang,Yuexian Zou
title: LocVTP: Video-Text Pre-training for Temporal Localization
title_zh: LocVTP：用于时间定位的视频文本预训练
abstract: Video-Text Pre-training (VTP) aims to learn transferable representations for various downstream tasks from large-scale web videos. To date, almost all existing VTP methods are limited to retrieval-based downstream tasks, e.g., video retrieval, whereas their transfer potentials on localization-based tasks, e.g., temporal grounding, are under-explored. In this paper, we experimentally analyze and demonstrate the incompatibility of current VTP methods with localization tasks, and propose a novel Localization-oriented Video-Text Pre-training framework, dubbed as LocVTP. Specifically, we perform the fine-grained contrastive alignment as a complement to the coarse-grained one by a clip-word correspondence discovery scheme. To further enhance the temporal reasoning ability of the learned feature, we propose a context projection head and a temporal aware contrastive loss to perceive the contextual relationships. Extensive experiments on four downstream tasks across six datasets demonstrate that our LocVTP achieves state-of-the-art performance on both retrieval-based and localization-based tasks. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies and thorough analyses to explore the optimum model designs and training strategies.
summary: Video-Text Pre-training (VTP) aims to learn transferable representations for various downstream tasks from large-scale web videos. To date, almost all existing VTP methods are limited to retrieval-based downstream tasks, e.g., video retrieval, whereas their transfer potentials on localization-based tasks, e.g., temporal grounding, are under-explored. In this paper, we experimentally analyze and demonstrate the incompatibility of current VTP methods with localization tasks, and propose a novel Localization-oriented Video-Text Pre-training framework, dubbed as LocVTP. Specifically, we perform the fine-grained contrastive alignment as a complement to the coarse-grained one by a clip-word correspondence discovery scheme. To further enhance the temporal reasoning ability of the learned feature, we propose a context projection head and a temporal aware contrastive loss to perceive the contextual relationships. Extensive experiments on four downstream tasks across six datasets demonstrate that our LocVTP achieves state-of-the-art performance on both retrieval-based and localization-based tasks. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies and thorough analyses to explore the optimum model designs and training strategies.
abstract_zh: 视频文本预训练（VTP）旨在从大规模网络视频中学习各种下游任务的可转移表示。迄今为止，几乎所有现有的 VTP 方法都仅限于基于检索的下游任务，例如视频检索，而它们在基于本地化的任务（例如时间接地）上的迁移潜力尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们通过实验分析和证明了当前 VTP 方法与本地化任务的不兼容性，并提出了一种新颖的面向本地化的视频文本预训练框架，称为 LocVTP。具体来说，我们通过剪辑词对应发现方案执行细粒度对比对齐，作为粗粒度对比对齐的补充。为了进一步增强学习特征的时间推理能力，我们提出了上下文投影头和时间感知对比损失来感知上下文关系。对六个数据集的四个下游任务进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 LocVTP 在基于检索和基于本地化的任务上均实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们进行全面的消融研究和彻底的分析，以探索最佳的模型设计和训练策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LocVTP框架，通过改进视频-文本预训练方法，提升时间定位任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-文本预训练方法主要针对检索任务，其在时间定位等任务上的潜力未被充分挖掘，存在方法不兼容的问题。
AI.method: 提出细粒度对比对齐（clip-word对应方案）与上下文投影头结合时间感知对比损失，增强时序推理能力。
AI.result: 在六个数据集的四个下游任务中均达到SOTA性能，消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: LocVTP通过定位导向的预训练设计，显著提升了视频-文本模型在时间定位任务中的表现，为相关研究提供新方向。

To further enhance the temporal reasoning ability of the learned feature, we propose a context projection head and a temporal aware contrastive loss to perceive the contextual relationships. Extensive experiments on four downstream tasks across six datasets demonstrate that our LocVTP achieves state-of-the-art performance on both retrieval-based and localization-based tasks. Furthermore, we conduct comprehensive ablation studies and thorough analyses to explore the optimum model designs and training strategies. 视频文本预训练（VTP）旨在从大规模网络视频中学习各种下游任务的可转移表示。迄今为止，几乎所有现有的 VTP 方法都仅限于基于检索的下游任务，例如视频检索，而它们在基于本地化的任务（例如时间接地）上的迁移潜力尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们通过实验分析和证明了当前 VTP 方法与本地化任务的不兼容性，并提出了一种新颖的面向本地化的视频文本预训练框架，称为 LocVTP。具体来说，我们通过剪辑词对应发现方案执行细粒度对比对齐，作为粗粒度对比对齐的补充。为了进一步增强学习特征的时间推理能力，我们提出了上下文投影头和时间感知对比损失来感知上下文关系。对六个数据集的四个下游任务进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 LocVTP 在基于检索和基于本地化的任务上均实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们进行全面的消融研究和彻底的分析，以探索最佳的模型设计和训练策略。 本文提出LocVTP框架，通过改进视频-文本预训练方法，提升时间定位任务的性能。 Meng Cao,Tianyu Yang,Junwu Weng,Can Zhang,Jue Wang,Yuexian Zou cs.CV

authors_text: Mariya Hendriksen,Viggo Overes
title: Unimodal vs. Multimodal Siamese Networks for Outfit Completion
title_zh: 用于服装完成的单模态与多模态连体网络
abstract: The popularity of online fashion shopping continues to grow. The ability to offer an effective recommendation to customers is becoming increasingly important. In this work, we focus on Fashion Outfits Challenge, part of SIGIR 2022 Workshop on eCommerce. The challenge is centered around Fill in the Blank (FITB) task that implies predicting the missing outfit, given an incomplete outfit and a list of candidates. In this paper, we focus on applying siamese networks on the task. More specifically, we explore how combining information from multiple modalities (textual and visual modality) impacts the performance of the model on the task. We evaluate our model on the test split provided by the challenge organizers and the test split with gold assignments that we created during the development phase. We discover that using both visual, and visual and textual data demonstrates promising results on the task. We conclude by suggesting directions for further improvement of our method.
summary: The popularity of online fashion shopping continues to grow. The ability to offer an effective recommendation to customers is becoming increasingly important. In this work, we focus on Fashion Outfits Challenge, part of SIGIR 2022 Workshop on eCommerce. The challenge is centered around Fill in the Blank (FITB) task that implies predicting the missing outfit, given an incomplete outfit and a list of candidates. In this paper, we focus on applying siamese networks on the task. More specifically, we explore how combining information from multiple modalities (textual and visual modality) impacts the performance of the model on the task. We evaluate our model on the test split provided by the challenge organizers and the test split with gold assignments that we created during the development phase. We discover that using both visual, and visual and textual data demonstrates promising results on the task. We conclude by suggesting directions for further improvement of our method.
abstract_zh: 网上时装购物的受欢迎程度持续增长。向客户提供有效推荐的能力变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们重点关注时尚服装挑战赛，这是 SIGIR 2022 电子商务研讨会的一部分。挑战以填空 (FITB) 任务为中心，该任务意味着在给定不完整的服装和候选列表的情况下预测缺失的服装。在本文中，我们重点关注在该任务中应用暹罗网络。更具体地说，我们探索组合来自多种模态（文本和视觉模态）的信息如何影响模型在任务中的性能。我们根据挑战组织者提供的测试分割以及我们在开发阶段创建的黄金分配测试分割来评估我们的模型。我们发现，使用视觉数据以及视觉和文本数据在该任务上展示了有希望的结果。最后，我们提出了进一步改进我们的方法的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单模态与多模态Siamese网络在服装搭配补全任务中的效果，通过比较视觉模态、文本模态及两者的结合对模型性能的影响，探索更优的推荐方法。
AI.motivation: 随着在线时尚购物的发展，精准的服装搭配推荐需求增加。现有方法可能未充分利用多模态信息，需验证多模态数据对任务性能的提升效果。
AI.method: 基于Siamese网络框架，分别训练单模态（视觉或文本）和多模态（视觉+文本）模型，在挑战赛提供的测试集及自建的黄金标注测试集上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合视觉与文本信息的多模态模型在服装补全任务中表现优于单一模态方法，验证了多模态数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合能提升模型性能，未来可进一步优化特征融合策略或引入更多模态信息以改进方法。
