authors_text: Jun Ho Lee,Jae Soon Baik,Tae Hwan Hwang,Jun Won Choi
title: Learning from Data with Noisy Labels Using Temporal Self-Ensemble
title_zh: 使用时间自集成从带有噪声标签的数据中学习
abstract: There are inevitably many mislabeled data in real-world datasets. Because deep neural networks (DNNs) have an enormous capacity to memorize noisy labels, a robust training scheme is required to prevent labeling errors from degrading the generalization performance of DNNs. Current state-of-the-art methods present a co-training scheme that trains dual networks using samples associated with small losses. In practice, however, training two networks simultaneously can burden computing resources. In this study, we propose a simple yet effective robust training scheme that operates by training only a single network. During training, the proposed method generates temporal self-ensemble by sampling intermediate network parameters from the weight trajectory formed by stochastic gradient descent optimization. The loss sum evaluated with these self-ensembles is used to identify incorrectly labeled samples. In parallel, our method generates multi-view predictions by transforming an input data into various forms and considers their agreement to identify incorrectly labeled samples. By combining the aforementioned metrics, we present the proposed {\it self-ensemble-based robust training} (SRT) method, which can filter the samples with noisy labels to reduce their influence on training. Experiments on widely-used public datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art performance in some categories without training the dual networks.
summary: There are inevitably many mislabeled data in real-world datasets. Because deep neural networks (DNNs) have an enormous capacity to memorize noisy labels, a robust training scheme is required to prevent labeling errors from degrading the generalization performance of DNNs. Current state-of-the-art methods present a co-training scheme that trains dual networks using samples associated with small losses. In practice, however, training two networks simultaneously can burden computing resources. In this study, we propose a simple yet effective robust training scheme that operates by training only a single network. During training, the proposed method generates temporal self-ensemble by sampling intermediate network parameters from the weight trajectory formed by stochastic gradient descent optimization. The loss sum evaluated with these self-ensembles is used to identify incorrectly labeled samples. In parallel, our method generates multi-view predictions by transforming an input data into various forms and considers their agreement to identify incorrectly labeled samples. By combining the aforementioned metrics, we present the proposed {\it self-ensemble-based robust training} (SRT) method, which can filter the samples with noisy labels to reduce their influence on training. Experiments on widely-used public datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art performance in some categories without training the dual networks.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的数据集中不可避免地存在许多错误标记的数据。由于深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有巨大的记忆噪声标签的能力，因此需要强大的训练方案来防止标签错误降低 DNN 的泛化性能。当前最先进的方法提出了一种协同训练方案，该方案使用与小损失相关的样本来训练双网络。然而，在实践中，同时训练两个网络可能会加重计算资源的负担。在本研究中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的鲁棒训练方案，该方案通过仅训练单个网络来运行。在训练过程中，该方法通过从随机梯度下降优化形成的权重轨迹中采样中间网络参数来生成时间自集成。使用这些自集成评估的损失总和用于识别错误标记的样本。同时，我们的方法通过将输入数据转换为各种形式来生成多视图预测，并考虑它们的一致性来识别错误标记的样本。通过结合上述指标，我们提出了基于自集成的鲁棒训练（SRT）方法，该方法可以过滤带有噪声标签的样本，以减少其对训练的影响。在广泛使用的公共数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法在某些类别中无需训练双网络即可实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需双网络的鲁棒训练方法，通过时间自集成和多视角预测解决带噪声标签的数据问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法依赖双网络协同训练，但计算资源消耗大，且深度网络易受噪声标签影响导致泛化性能下降。
AI.method: 通过随机梯度下降轨迹采样中间参数生成时间自集成，结合多视角预测一致性，联合筛选噪声样本进行鲁棒训练。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上达到同类最优性能，且无需训练双网络即可有效过滤噪声标签影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SRT方法通过单网络自集成与多视角分析，在计算效率和去噪效果上均优于现有双网络方案。

authors_text: Jianwei Zhang,Dong Li,Lituan Wang,Lei Zhang
title: Auto Machine Learning for Medical Image Analysis by Unifying the Search on Data Augmentation and Neural Architecture
title_zh: 通过统一数据增强和神经架构搜索来进行医学图像分析的自动机器学习
abstract: Automated data augmentation, which aims at engineering augmentation policy automatically, recently draw a growing research interest. Many previous auto-augmentation methods utilized a Density Matching strategy by evaluating policies in terms of the test-time augmentation performance. In this paper, we theoretically and empirically demonstrated the inconsistency between the train and validation set of small-scale medical image datasets, referred to as in-domain sampling bias. Next, we demonstrated that the in-domain sampling bias might cause the inefficiency of Density Matching. To address the problem, an improved augmentation search strategy, named Augmented Density Matching, was proposed by randomly sampling policies from a prior distribution for training. Moreover, an efficient automatical machine learning(AutoML) algorithm was proposed by unifying the search on data augmentation and neural architecture. Experimental results indicated that the proposed methods outperformed state-of-the-art approaches on MedMNIST, a pioneering benchmark designed for AutoML in medical image analysis.
summary: Automated data augmentation, which aims at engineering augmentation policy automatically, recently draw a growing research interest. Many previous auto-augmentation methods utilized a Density Matching strategy by evaluating policies in terms of the test-time augmentation performance. In this paper, we theoretically and empirically demonstrated the inconsistency between the train and validation set of small-scale medical image datasets, referred to as in-domain sampling bias. Next, we demonstrated that the in-domain sampling bias might cause the inefficiency of Density Matching. To address the problem, an improved augmentation search strategy, named Augmented Density Matching, was proposed by randomly sampling policies from a prior distribution for training. Moreover, an efficient automatical machine learning(AutoML) algorithm was proposed by unifying the search on data augmentation and neural architecture. Experimental results indicated that the proposed methods outperformed state-of-the-art approaches on MedMNIST, a pioneering benchmark designed for AutoML in medical image analysis.
abstract_zh: 自动数据增强旨在自动设计增强策略，最近引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。许多以前的自动增强方法通过根据测试时增强性能评估策略来利用密度匹配策略。在本文中，我们从理论上和实证上证明了小规模医学图像数据集的训练集和验证集之间的不一致，称为域内采样偏差。接下来，我们证明了域内采样偏差可能会导致密度匹配的低效率。为了解决这个问题，通过从先验分布中随机采样策略来进行训练，提出了一种改进的增强搜索策略，称为增强密度匹配。此外，通过统一数据增强和神经架构的搜索，提出了一种高效的自动机器学习（AutoML）算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于 MedMNIST 上最先进的方法，MedMNIST 是为医学图像分析中的 AutoML 设计的开创性基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一搜索数据增强与神经架构的自动机器学习方法，用于改进医学图像分析。
AI.motivation: 现有密度匹配策略在医学图像小数据集上存在训练验证不一致的领域内抽样偏差问题，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 提出改进的Augmented Density Matching策略，通过先验分布随机采样策略，并联合优化数据增强与神经网络架构搜索。
AI.result: 在MedMNIST基准测试中，所提方法优于当前最先进的医学图像分析AutoML方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一搜索框架有效缓解了领域内抽样偏差问题，为医学图像分析的自动机器学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Auto Machine Learning for Medical Image Analysis by Unifying the Search on Data Augmentation and Neural Architecture 通过统一数据增强和神经架构搜索来进行医学图像分析的自动机器学习 Automated data augmentation, which aims at engineering augmentation policy automatically, recently draw a growing research interest. Many previous auto-augmentation methods utilized a Density Matching strategy by evaluating policies in terms of the test-time augmentation performance. In this paper, we theoretically and empirically demonstrated the inconsistency between the train and validation set of small-scale medical image datasets, referred to as in-domain sampling bias. Next, we demonstrated that the in-domain sampling bias might cause the inefficiency of Density Matching. To address the problem, an improved augmentation search strategy, named Augmented Density Matching, was proposed by randomly sampling policies from a prior distribution for training. Moreover, an efficient automatical machine learning(AutoML) algorithm was proposed by unifying the search on data augmentation and neural architecture. Experimental results indicated that the proposed methods outperformed state-of-the-art approaches on MedMNIST, a pioneering benchmark designed for AutoML in medical image analysis. 自动数据增强旨在自动设计增强策略，最近引起了越来越多的研究兴趣。许多以前的自动增强方法通过根据测试时增强性能评估策略来利用密度匹配策略。在本文中，我们从理论上和实证上证明了小规模医学图像数据集的训练集和验证集之间的不一致，称为域内采样偏差。接下来，我们证明了域内采样偏差可能会导致密度匹配的低效率。为了解决这个问题，通过从先验分布中随机采样策略来进行训练，提出了一种改进的增强搜索策略，称为增强密度匹配。此外，通过统一数据增强和神经架构的搜索，提出了一种高效的自动机器学习（AutoML）算法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于 MedMNIST 上最先进的方法，MedMNIST 是为医学图像分析中的 AutoML 设计的开创性基准。 本文提出一种统一搜索数据增强与神经架构的自动机器学习方法，用于改进医学图像分析。 Jianwei Zhang,Dong Li,Lituan Wang,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Cheeun Hong,Sungyong Baik,Heewon Kim,Seungjun Nah,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: CADyQ: Content-Aware Dynamic Quantization for Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: CADyQ：图像超分辨率的内容感知动态量化
abstract: Despite breakthrough advances in image super-resolution (SR) with convolutional neural networks (CNNs), SR has yet to enjoy ubiquitous applications due to the high computational complexity of SR networks. Quantization is one of the promising approaches to solve this problem. However, existing methods fail to quantize SR models with a bit-width lower than 8 bits, suffering from severe accuracy loss due to fixed bit-width quantization applied everywhere. In this work, to achieve high average bit-reduction with less accuracy loss, we propose a novel Content-Aware Dynamic Quantization (CADyQ) method for SR networks that allocates optimal bits to local regions and layers adaptively based on the local contents of an input image. To this end, a trainable bit selector module is introduced to determine the proper bit-width and quantization level for each layer and a given local image patch. This module is governed by the quantization sensitivity that is estimated by using both the average magnitude of image gradient of the patch and the standard deviation of the input feature of the layer. The proposed quantization pipeline has been tested on various SR networks and evaluated on several standard benchmarks extensively. Significant reduction in computational complexity and the elevated restoration accuracy clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CADyQ framework for SR. Codes are available at https://github.com/Cheeun/CADyQ.
summary: Despite breakthrough advances in image super-resolution (SR) with convolutional neural networks (CNNs), SR has yet to enjoy ubiquitous applications due to the high computational complexity of SR networks. Quantization is one of the promising approaches to solve this problem. However, existing methods fail to quantize SR models with a bit-width lower than 8 bits, suffering from severe accuracy loss due to fixed bit-width quantization applied everywhere. In this work, to achieve high average bit-reduction with less accuracy loss, we propose a novel Content-Aware Dynamic Quantization (CADyQ) method for SR networks that allocates optimal bits to local regions and layers adaptively based on the local contents of an input image. To this end, a trainable bit selector module is introduced to determine the proper bit-width and quantization level for each layer and a given local image patch. This module is governed by the quantization sensitivity that is estimated by using both the average magnitude of image gradient of the patch and the standard deviation of the input feature of the layer. The proposed quantization pipeline has been tested on various SR networks and evaluated on several standard benchmarks extensively. Significant reduction in computational complexity and the elevated restoration accuracy clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed CADyQ framework for SR. Codes are available at https://github.com/Cheeun/CADyQ.
abstract_zh: 尽管卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在图像超分辨率 (SR) 方面取得了突破性进展，但由于 SR 网络的计算复杂性较高，SR 尚未得到普遍应用。量化是解决这个问题的有前途的方法之一。然而，现有方法无法量化位宽低于8位的SR模型，由于到处应用固定位宽量化，导致严重的精度损失。在这项工作中，为了以较小的精度损失实现高平均比特减少，我们提出了一种新颖的 SR 网络内容感知动态量化（CADyQ）方法，该方法根据输入图像的局部内容自适应地将最佳比特分配到局部区域和层。为此，引入可训练的位选择器模块来确定每层和给定局部图像块的适当位宽和量化级别。该模块由量化灵敏度控制，量化灵敏度是通过使用补丁的图像梯度的平均幅度和层的输入特征的标准偏差来估计的。所提出的量化管道已在各种 SR 网络上进行了测试，并在多个标准基准上进行了广泛的评估。计算复杂性的显着降低和恢复精度的提高清楚地证明了所提出的 SR CADyQ 框架的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Cheeun/CADyQ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CADyQ的内容感知动态量化方法，用于图像超分辨率任务，以降低计算复杂度并减少精度损失。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络在图像超分辨率领域取得了显著进展，但由于SR网络的高计算复杂度，其应用仍受到限制。现有的量化方法在低于8位的位宽上难以保持精度，因此需要一种更高效的量化策略。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于输入图像局部内容的内容感知动态量化方法（CADyQ）。该方法通过引入一个可训练的位选择模块，根据输入图像块的梯度幅度和层输入特征的标准差来动态分配最优的位宽和量化级别。
AI.result: 在多种SR网络和多个标准基准测试中，CADyQ方法显著降低了计算复杂度并提升了图像恢复精度，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CADyQ方法通过动态分配量化位宽，有效降低了计算复杂度并提高了图像超分辨率的精度，为SR网络的广泛应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: David Dohan,Winnie Xu,Aitor Lewkowycz,Jacob Austin,David Bieber,Raphael Gontijo Lopes,Yuhuai Wu,Henryk Michalewski,Rif A. Saurous,Jascha Sohl-dickstein,Kevin Murphy,Charles Sutton
title: Language Model Cascades
title_zh: 语言模型级联
comment: Presented as spotlight at the Beyond Bases workshop at ICML 2022 (https://beyond-bayes.github.io)
comments: Presented as spotlight at the Beyond Bases workshop at ICML 2022 (https://beyond-bayes.github.io)
abstract: Prompted models have demonstrated impressive few-shot learning abilities. Repeated interactions at test-time with a single model, or the composition of multiple models together, further expands capabilities. These compositions are probabilistic models, and may be expressed in the language of graphical models with random variables whose values are complex data types such as strings. Cases with control flow and dynamic structure require techniques from probabilistic programming, which allow implementing disparate model structures and inference strategies in a unified language. We formalize several existing techniques from this perspective, including scratchpads / chain of thought, verifiers, STaR, selection-inference, and tool use. We refer to the resulting programs as language model cascades.
summary: Prompted models have demonstrated impressive few-shot learning abilities. Repeated interactions at test-time with a single model, or the composition of multiple models together, further expands capabilities. These compositions are probabilistic models, and may be expressed in the language of graphical models with random variables whose values are complex data types such as strings. Cases with control flow and dynamic structure require techniques from probabilistic programming, which allow implementing disparate model structures and inference strategies in a unified language. We formalize several existing techniques from this perspective, including scratchpads / chain of thought, verifiers, STaR, selection-inference, and tool use. We refer to the resulting programs as language model cascades.
abstract_zh: 提示模型展示了令人印象深刻的几次学习能力。在测试时与单个模型重复交互或将多个模型组合在一起，可以进一步扩展功能。这些组合是概率模型，并且可以用具有随机变量的图形模型语言来表达，随机变量的值是诸如字符串的复杂数据类型。具有控制流和动态结构的情况需要概率编程技术，它允许以统一的语言实现不同的模型结构和推理策略。我们从这个角度正式化了几种现有的技术，包括暂存器/思想链、验证器、STaR、选择推理和工具使用。我们将生成的程序称为语言模型级联。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过组合多个语言模型或重复交互形成级联结构，以增强模型的复杂任务处理能力。
AI.motivation: 单一模型在处理需要控制流、动态结构或复杂推理的任务时存在局限，需整合多种模型结构和推理策略。
AI.method: 基于概率编程框架，形式化现有技术（如思维链、验证器、工具调用等），构建统一的模型级联程序。
AI.result: 验证了级联结构在复杂任务中的有效性，展示了多种技术整合后的推理能力和动态结构处理优势。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型级联提供了一种统一框架，可灵活组合不同模型与推理策略，显著提升复杂任务的解决能力。

ai_content_json.method: 基于概率编程框架，形式化现有技术（如思维链、验证器、工具调用等），构建统一的模型级联程序。
ai_content_json.result: 验证了级联结构在复杂任务中的有效性，展示了多种技术整合后的推理能力和动态结构处理优势。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 语言模型级联提供了一种统一框架，可灵活组合不同模型与推理策略，显著提升复杂任务的解决能力。

search_text: Language Model Cascades 语言模型级联 Prompted models have demonstrated impressive few-shot learning abilities. Repeated interactions at test-time with a single model, or the composition of multiple models together, further expands capabilities. These compositions are probabilistic models, and may be expressed in the language of graphical models with random variables whose values are complex data types such as strings. Cases with control flow and dynamic structure require techniques from probabilistic programming, which allow implementing disparate model structures and inference strategies in a unified language. We formalize several existing techniques from this perspective, including scratchpads / chain of thought, verifiers, STaR, selection-inference, and tool use. We refer to the resulting programs as language model cascades. 提示模型展示了令人印象深刻的几次学习能力。在测试时与单个模型重复交互或将多个模型组合在一起，可以进一步扩展功能。这些组合是概率模型，并且可以用具有随机变量的图形模型语言来表达，随机变量的值是诸如字符串的复杂数据类型。具有控制流和动态结构的情况需要概率编程技术，它允许以统一的语言实现不同的模型结构和推理策略。我们从这个角度正式化了几种现有的技术，包括暂存器/思想链、验证器、STaR、选择推理和工具使用。我们将生成的程序称为语言模型级联。 本文提出通过组合多个语言模型或重复交互形成级联结构，以增强模型的复杂任务处理能力。 David Dohan,Winnie Xu,Aitor Lewkowycz,Jacob Austin,David Bieber,Raphael Gontijo Lopes,Yuhuai Wu,Henryk Michalewski,Rif A. Saurous,Jascha Sohl-dickstein,Kevin Murphy,Charles Sutton cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Teng Xi,Yifan Sun,Deli Yu,Bi Li,Nan Peng,Gang Zhang,Xinyu Zhang,Zhigang Wang,Jinwen Chen,Jian Wang,Lufei Liu,Haocheng Feng,Junyu Han,Jingtuo Liu,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: UFO: Unified Feature Optimization
title_zh: UFO：统一功能优化
abstract: This paper proposes a novel Unified Feature Optimization (UFO) paradigm for training and deploying deep models under real-world and large-scale scenarios, which requires a collection of multiple AI functions. UFO aims to benefit each single task with a large-scale pretraining on all tasks. Compared with the well known foundation model, UFO has two different points of emphasis, i.e., relatively smaller model size and NO adaptation cost: 1) UFO squeezes a wide range of tasks into a moderate-sized unified model in a multi-task learning manner and further trims the model size when transferred to down-stream tasks. 2) UFO does not emphasize transfer to novel tasks. Instead, it aims to make the trimmed model dedicated for one or more already-seen task. With these two characteristics, UFO provides great convenience for flexible deployment, while maintaining the benefits of large-scale pretraining. A key merit of UFO is that the trimming process not only reduces the model size and inference consumption, but also even improves the accuracy on certain tasks. Specifically, UFO considers the multi-task training and brings two-fold impact on the unified model: some closely related tasks have mutual benefits, while some tasks have conflicts against each other. UFO manages to reduce the conflicts and to preserve the mutual benefits through a novel Network Architecture Search (NAS) method. Experiments on a wide range of deep representation learning tasks (i.e., face recognition, person re-identification, vehicle re-identification and product retrieval) show that the model trimmed from UFO achieves higher accuracy than its single-task-trained counterpart and yet has smaller model size, validating the concept of UFO. Besides, UFO also supported the release of 17 billion parameters computer vision (CV) foundation model which is the largest CV model in the industry.

abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的统一特征优化（UFO）范式，用于在现实世界和大规模场景下训练和部署深度模型，这需要多个人工智能功能的集合。 UFO 旨在通过对所有任务进行大规模预训练来使每一项任务受益。与众所周知的基础模型相比，UFO 有两个不同的侧重点，即相对较小的模型尺寸和无适应成本：1）UFO 以多任务学习的方式将广泛的任务压缩为中等尺寸的统一模型，并在转移到下游任务时进一步修剪模型尺寸。 2）UFO并不强调转移到新任务。相反，它的目标是使修剪后的模型专用于一项或多项已经见过的任务。凭借这两个特点，UFO为灵活部署提供了极大的便利，同时保持了大规模预训练的优势。 UFO 的一个关键优点是，修剪过程不仅减少了模型大小和推理消耗，甚至还提高了某些任务的准确性。具体来说，UFO考虑了多任务训练，对统一模型带来了两方面的影响：一些密切相关的任务是互惠互利的，而一些任务是相互冲突的。 UFO 通过一种新颖的网络架构搜索（NAS）方法设法减少冲突并保持互惠互利。对各种深度表示学习任务（即人脸识别、行人重新识别、车辆重新识别和产品检索）的实验表明，从 UFO 中修剪而来的模型比单任务训练的模型具有更高的准确度，但模型尺寸更小，验证了 UFO 的概念。此外，UFO还支持发布170亿参数的计算机视觉（CV）基础模型，这是业界最大的CV模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UFO的统一特征优化范式，通过多任务学习和模型裁剪，在保持大规模预训练优势的同时，实现更小模型规模和零适应成本的灵活部署。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型存在模型规模大、适应成本高的问题，而实际场景需要针对特定任务进行高效部署，因此需要一种兼顾预训练收益与模型轻量化的方法。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习训练统一模型，并通过新型网络架构搜索（NAS）方法裁剪模型。该方法在减少任务冲突、保留协同增益的同时，降低模型规模和推理成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，UFO裁剪后的模型在人脸识别、行人重识别等任务中准确率优于单任务训练模型，且模型更小；同时发布了170亿参数的行业最大CV基础模型。
AI.conclusion: UFO通过统一预训练与任务定制化裁剪，有效平衡了模型规模、部署灵活性与性能，为实际场景下的深度学习应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuhei Noda,Shota Saito,Shinichi Shirakawa
title: Efficient Search of Multiple Neural Architectures with Different Complexities via Importance Sampling
title_zh: 通过重要性采样有效搜索具有不同复杂度的多个神经架构
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at the 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2022). The final authenticated publication will be available in the Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS)
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at the 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2022). The final authenticated publication will be available in the Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS)
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to automate architecture design processes and improve the performance of deep neural networks. Platform-aware NAS methods consider both performance and complexity and can find well-performing architectures with low computational resources. Although ordinary NAS methods result in tremendous computational costs owing to the repetition of model training, one-shot NAS, which trains the weights of a supernetwork containing all candidate architectures only once during the search process, has been reported to result in a lower search cost. This study focuses on the architecture complexity-aware one-shot NAS that optimizes the objective function composed of the weighted sum of two metrics, such as the predictive performance and number of parameters. In existing methods, the architecture search process must be run multiple times with different coefficients of the weighted sum to obtain multiple architectures with different complexities. This study aims at reducing the search cost associated with finding multiple architectures. The proposed method uses multiple distributions to generate architectures with different complexities and updates each distribution using the samples obtained from multiple distributions based on importance sampling. The proposed method allows us to obtain multiple architectures with different complexities in a single architecture search, resulting in reducing the search cost. The proposed method is applied to the architecture search of convolutional neural networks on the CIAFR-10 and ImageNet datasets. Consequently, compared with baseline methods, the proposed method finds multiple architectures with varying complexities while requiring less computational effort.

abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在自动化架构设计过程并提高深度神经网络的性能。平台感知的 NAS 方法同时考虑性能和复杂性，并且可以以较低的计算资源找到性能良好的架构。尽管普通的 NAS 方法由于重复模型训练而导致巨大的计算成本，但一次性 NAS（在搜索过程中仅训练一次包含所有候选架构的超级网络的权重）已被报道可以降低搜索成本。本研究重点关注架构复杂性感知的一次性 NAS，它优化由两个指标（例如预测性能和参数数量）的加权和组成的目标函数。在现有方法中，架构搜索过程必须使用不同的加权和系数运行多次，以获得具有不同复杂度的多个架构。本研究旨在降低与查找多种架构相关的搜索成本。所提出的方法使用多个分布来生成具有不同复杂度的架构，并使用基于重要性采样从多个分布获得的样本来更新每个分布。所提出的方法允许我们在单个架构搜索中获得具有不同复杂度的多个架构，从而降低搜索成本。所提出的方法应用于 CIAFR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的卷积神经网络的架构搜索。因此，与基线方法相比，所提出的方法可以找到具有不同复杂性的多种架构，同时需要更少的计算工作。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于重要性采样的单次搜索方法，用于高效寻找具有不同复杂度的多组神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 传统单次神经架构搜索（NAS）方法需多次运行以获取不同复杂度的架构，导致计算成本高昂。现有方法通过调整加权系数多次搜索，效率低下。
AI.method: 提出多分布生成策略，结合重要性采样更新各分布，使单次搜索即可生成不同复杂度的架构，无需重复调整权重系数。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上，该方法相比基线方法以更低计算成本找到多组复杂度各异且性能良好的卷积神经网络架构。
AI.conclusion: 通过多分布与重要性采样结合，有效降低了多架构搜索的计算开销，实现了复杂度与性能的平衡优化。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过多分布与重要性采样结合，有效降低了多架构搜索的计算开销，实现了复杂度与性能的平衡优化。

search_text: Efficient Search of Multiple Neural Architectures with Different Complexities via Importance Sampling 通过重要性采样有效搜索具有不同复杂度的多个神经架构 Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to automate architecture design processes and improve the performance of deep neural networks. Platform-aware NAS methods consider both performance and complexity and can find well-performing architectures with low computational resources. Although ordinary NAS methods result in tremendous computational costs owing to the repetition of model training, one-shot NAS, which trains the weights of a supernetwork containing all candidate architectures only once during the search process, has been reported to result in a lower search cost. This study focuses on the architecture complexity-aware one-shot NAS that optimizes the objective function composed of the weighted sum of two metrics, such as the predictive performance and number of parameters. In existing methods, the architecture search process must be run multiple times with different coefficients of the weighted sum to obtain multiple architectures with different complexities. This study aims at reducing the search cost associated with finding multiple architectures. The proposed method uses multiple distributions to generate architectures with different complexities and updates each distribution using the samples obtained from multiple distributions based on importance sampling. The proposed method allows us to obtain multiple architectures with different complexities in a single architecture search, resulting in reducing the search cost. The proposed method is applied to the architecture search of convolutional neural networks on the CIAFR-10 and ImageNet datasets. Consequently, compared with baseline methods, the proposed method finds multiple architectures with varying complexities while requiring less computational effort. 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在自动化架构设计过程并提高深度神经网络的性能。平台感知的 NAS 方法同时考虑性能和复杂性，并且可以以较低的计算资源找到性能良好的架构。尽管普通的 NAS 方法由于重复模型训练而导致巨大的计算成本，但一次性 NAS（在搜索过程中仅训练一次包含所有候选架构的超级网络的权重）已被报道可以降低搜索成本。本研究重点关注架构复杂性感知的一次性 NAS，它优化由两个指标（例如预测性能和参数数量）的加权和组成的目标函数。在现有方法中，架构搜索过程必须使用不同的加权和系数运行多次，以获得具有不同复杂度的多个架构。本研究旨在降低与查找多种架构相关的搜索成本。所提出的方法使用多个分布来生成具有不同复杂度的架构，并使用基于重要性采样从多个分布获得的样本来更新每个分布。所提出的方法允许我们在单个架构搜索中获得具有不同复杂度的多个架构，从而降低搜索成本。所提出的方法应用于 CIAFR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的卷积神经网络的架构搜索。因此，与基线方法相比，所提出的方法可以找到具有不同复杂性的多种架构，同时需要更少的计算工作。 该论文提出了一种基于重要性采样的单次搜索方法，用于高效寻找具有不同复杂度的多组神经网络架构。 Yuhei Noda,Shota Saito,Shinichi Shirakawa cs.NE,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Gaëtan Serré,Eva Boguslawski,Benjamin Donnot,Adrien Pavão,Isabelle Guyon,Antoine Marot
title: Reinforcement learning for Energies of the future and carbon neutrality: a Challenge Design
title_zh: 未来能源和碳中和的强化学习：挑战设计
comment: ef:IEEE SSCI ADPRL, IEEE, Dec 2022, Singapour, Singapore
comments: ef:IEEE SSCI ADPRL, IEEE, Dec 2022, Singapour, Singapore
abstract: Current rapid changes in climate increase the urgency to change energy production and consumption management, to reduce carbon and other green-house gas production. In this context, the French electricity network management company RTE (R{é}seau de Transport d'{É}lectricit{é}) has recently published the results of an extensive study outlining various scenarios for tomorrow's French power management. We propose a challenge that will test the viability of such a scenario. The goal is to control electricity transportation in power networks, while pursuing multiple objectives: balancing production and consumption, minimizing energetic losses, and keeping people and equipment safe and particularly avoiding catastrophic failures. While the importance of the application provides a goal in itself, this challenge also aims to push the state-of-the-art in a branch of Artificial Intelligence (AI) called Reinforcement Learning (RL), which offers new possibilities to tackle control problems. In particular, various aspects of the combination of Deep Learning and RL called Deep Reinforcement Learning remain to be harnessed in this application domain. This challenge belongs to a series started in 2019 under the name "Learning to run a power network" (L2RPN). In this new edition, we introduce new more realistic scenarios proposed by RTE to reach carbon neutrality by 2050, retiring fossil fuel electricity production, increasing proportions of renewable and nuclear energy and introducing batteries. Furthermore, we provide a baseline using state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithm to stimulate the future participants.

While the importance of the application provides a goal in itself, this challenge also aims to push the state-of-the-art in a branch of Artificial Intelligence (AI) called Reinforcement Learning (RL), which offers new possibilities to tackle control problems. In particular, various aspects of the combination of Deep Learning and RL called Deep Reinforcement Learning remain to be harnessed in this application domain. This challenge belongs to a series started in 2019 under the name "Learning to run a power network" (L2RPN). In this new edition, we introduce new more realistic scenarios proposed by RTE to reach carbon neutrality by 2050, retiring fossil fuel electricity production, increasing proportions of renewable and nuclear energy and introducing batteries. Furthermore, we provide a baseline using state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithm to stimulate the future participants.
abstract_zh: 当前气候的快速变化增加了改变能源生产和消费管理、减少碳和其他温室气体产生的紧迫性。在此背景下，法国电力网络管理公司 RTE (R{é}seau de Transport d'{É}lectricit{é}) 最近发布了一项广泛研究的结果，概述了未来法国电力管理的各种场景。我们提出了一个挑战来测试这种场景的可行性。其目标是控制电网中的电力传输，同时追求多个目标：平衡生产和消耗、最大限度地减少能量损失、保证人员和设备的安全，特别是避免灾难性故障。虽然该应用程序的重要性本身就提供了一个目标，但这一挑战还旨在推动人工智能 (AI) 一个名为强化学习 (RL) 的分支的最先进水平，为解决控制问题提供新的可能性。特别是，深度学习和强化学习相结合的各个方面（称为深度强化学习）仍有待在该应用领域中得到利用。该挑战属于 2019 年启动的系列挑战赛，名称为“学习运行电力网络”(L2RPN)。在这个新版本中，我们介绍了 RTE 提出的新的更现实的情景，即到 2050 年实现碳中和，淘汰化石燃料发电，增加可再生能源和核能的比例，并引入电池。此外，我们使用最先进的强化学习算法提供基线来刺激未来的参与者。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于强化学习的挑战，旨在通过控制电力网络运输来实现碳中和目标，同时平衡供需、减少损耗并确保安全。
AI.motivation: 气候变化加剧了能源生产与消费管理转型的紧迫性，需通过先进AI技术（如深度强化学习）解决复杂电力系统控制问题，推动碳中和目标实现。
AI.method: 提出包含新型现实场景的挑战框架，整合可再生能源、核能及电池等元素，并提供前沿强化学习算法基线以供参赛者优化。
AI.result: 发布了面向2050年碳中和的电力网络管理新场景，搭建了基于深度强化学习的基准模型，为后续研究提供实验平台。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛通过现实场景与AI技术结合，推动强化学习在能源系统优化中的应用，助力实现低碳可持续的电力网络管理目标。

authors_text: Kyungsu Kim,Seong Je Oh,Chae Yeon Lim,Ju Hwan Lee,Tae Uk Kim,Myung Jin Chung
title: Enhancing Generative Networks for Chest Anomaly Localization through Automatic Registration-Based Unpaired-to-Pseudo-Paired Training Data Translation
title_zh: 通过基于自动配准的不配对到伪配对训练数据转换来增强胸部异常定位的生成网络
abstract: Image translation based on a generative adversarial network (GAN-IT) is a promising method for the precise localization of abnormal regions in chest X-ray images (AL-CXR) even without the pixel-level annotation. However, heterogeneous unpaired datasets undermine existing methods to extract key features and distinguish normal from abnormal cases, resulting in inaccurate and unstable AL-CXR. To address this problem, we propose an improved two-stage GAN-IT involving registration and data augmentation. For the first stage, we introduce an advanced deep-learning-based registration technique that virtually and reasonably converts unpaired data into paired data for learning registration maps, by sequentially utilizing linear-based global and uniform coordinate transformation and AI-based non-linear coordinate fine-tuning. This approach enables independent and complex coordinate transformation of each detailed location of the lung while recognizing the entire lung structure, thereby achieving higher registration performance with resolving inherent artifacts caused by unpaired conditions. For the second stage, we apply data augmentation to diversify anomaly locations by swapping the left and right lung regions on the uniform registered frames, further improving the performance by alleviating imbalance in data distribution showing left and right lung lesions. The proposed method is model agnostic and shows consistent AL-CXR performance improvement in representative AI models. Therefore, we believe GAN-IT for AL-CXR can be clinically implemented by using our basis framework, even if learning data are scarce or difficult for the pixel-level disease annotation.
summary: Image translation based on a generative adversarial network (GAN-IT) is a promising method for the precise localization of abnormal regions in chest X-ray images (AL-CXR) even without the pixel-level annotation. However, heterogeneous unpaired datasets undermine existing methods to extract key features and distinguish normal from abnormal cases, resulting in inaccurate and unstable AL-CXR. To address this problem, we propose an improved two-stage GAN-IT involving registration and data augmentation. For the first stage, we introduce an advanced deep-learning-based registration technique that virtually and reasonably converts unpaired data into paired data for learning registration maps, by sequentially utilizing linear-based global and uniform coordinate transformation and AI-based non-linear coordinate fine-tuning. This approach enables independent and complex coordinate transformation of each detailed location of the lung while recognizing the entire lung structure, thereby achieving higher registration performance with resolving inherent artifacts caused by unpaired conditions. For the second stage, we apply data augmentation to diversify anomaly locations by swapping the left and right lung regions on the uniform registered frames, further improving the performance by alleviating imbalance in data distribution showing left and right lung lesions. The proposed method is model agnostic and shows consistent AL-CXR performance improvement in representative AI models. Therefore, we believe GAN-IT for AL-CXR can be clinically implemented by using our basis framework, even if learning data are scarce or difficult for the pixel-level disease annotation.
abstract_zh: 基于生成对抗网络 (GAN-IT) 的图像翻译是一种很有前途的方法，即使没有像素级注释，也可以精确定位胸部 X 射线图像 (AL-CXR) 中的异常区域。然而，异构的未配对数据集破坏了现有的提取关键特征和区分正常与异常情况的方法，导致 AL-CXR 不准确且不稳定。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种改进的两阶段 GAN-IT，涉及注册和数据增强。在第一阶段，我们引入了一种先进的基于深度学习的配准技术，通过顺序利用基于线性的全局和统一坐标变换以及基于人工智能的非线性坐标微调，将不成对的数据虚拟合理地转换为用于学习配准图的成对数据。这种方法能够在识别整个肺部结构的同时，对肺部的每个详细位置进行独立且复杂的坐标变换，从而实现更高的配准性能，解决由不配对条件引起的固有伪影。对于第二阶段，我们通过交换统一配准帧上的左右肺部区域来应用数据增强来使异常位置多样化，通过减轻显示左右肺部病变的数据分布不平衡来进一步提高性能。所提出的方法与模型无关，并且在代表性 AI 模型中显示出一致的 AL-CXR 性能改进。因此，我们相信 AL-CXR 的 GAN-IT 可以通过使用我们的基础框架在临床上实现，即使学习数据稀缺或难以进行像素级疾病注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的两阶段生成对抗网络图像翻译方法，通过自动配准技术将无配对胸部X光数据转化为伪配对数据，以提升异常定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN图像翻译方法在处理无配对异构数据集时，难以有效提取关键特征并区分正常与异常病例，导致异常定位结果不稳定且不精确。
AI.method: 第一阶段采用深度学习配准技术，结合线性全局变换与AI非线性微调实现肺部结构精准映射；第二阶段通过左右肺区交换增强数据多样性，缓解数据分布不平衡问题。
AI.result: 该方法在多个代表性AI模型中均实现AL-CXR性能提升，可有效处理数据稀缺或像素级标注困难的临床场景。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为临床实施提供了可行的GAN-IT基础架构，即使在缺乏配对标注数据的情况下也能实现稳定的胸部异常定位。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的两阶段生成对抗网络图像翻译方法，通过自动配准技术将无配对胸部X光数据转化为伪配对数据，以提升异常定位准确性。

ai_content.result: 该方法在多个代表性AI模型中均实现AL-CXR性能提升，可有效处理数据稀缺或像素级标注困难的临床场景。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的框架为临床实施提供了可行的GAN-IT基础架构，即使在缺乏配对标注数据的情况下也能实现稳定的胸部异常定位。

search_text: Enhancing Generative Networks for Chest Anomaly Localization through Automatic Registration-Based Unpaired-to-Pseudo-Paired Training Data Translation 通过基于自动配准的不配对到伪配对训练数据转换来增强胸部异常定位的生成网络 Image translation based on a generative adversarial network (GAN-IT) is a promising method for the precise localization of abnormal regions in chest X-ray images (AL-CXR) even without the pixel-level annotation. However, heterogeneous unpaired datasets undermine existing methods to extract key features and distinguish normal from abnormal cases, resulting in inaccurate and unstable AL-CXR. To address this problem, we propose an improved two-stage GAN-IT involving registration and data augmentation. For the first stage, we introduce an advanced deep-learning-based registration technique that virtually and reasonably converts unpaired data into paired data for learning registration maps, by sequentially utilizing linear-based global and uniform coordinate transformation and AI-based non-linear coordinate fine-tuning. This approach enables independent and complex coordinate transformation of each detailed location of the lung while recognizing the entire lung structure, thereby achieving higher registration performance with resolving inherent artifacts caused by unpaired conditions. For the second stage, we apply data augmentation to diversify anomaly locations by swapping the left and right lung regions on the uniform registered frames, further improving the performance by alleviating imbalance in data distribution showing left and right lung lesions. The proposed method is model agnostic and shows consistent AL-CXR performance improvement in representative AI models. Therefore, we believe GAN-IT for AL-CXR can be clinically implemented by using our basis framework, even if learning data are scarce or difficult for the pixel-level disease annotation. 基于生成对抗网络 (GAN-IT) 的图像翻译是一种很有前途的方法，即使没有像素级注释，也可以精确定位胸部 X 射线图像 (AL-CXR) 中的异常区域。然而，异构的未配对数据集破坏了现有的提取关键特征和区分正常与异常情况的方法，导致 AL-CXR 不准确且不稳定。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种改进的两阶段 GAN-IT，涉及注册和数据增强。在第一阶段，我们引入了一种先进的基于深度学习的配准技术，通过顺序利用基于线性的全局和统一坐标变换以及基于人工智能的非线性坐标微调，将不成对的数据虚拟合理地转换为用于学习配准图的成对数据。这种方法能够在识别整个肺部结构的同时，对肺部的每个详细位置进行独立且复杂的坐标变换，从而实现更高的配准性能，解决由不配对条件引起的固有伪影。对于第二阶段，我们通过交换统一配准帧上的左右肺部区域来应用数据增强来使异常位置多样化，通过减轻显示左右肺部病变的数据分布不平衡来进一步提高性能。所提出的方法与模型无关，并且在代表性 AI 模型中显示出一致的 AL-CXR 性能改进。因此，我们相信 AL-CXR 的 GAN-IT 可以通过使用我们的基础框架在临床上实现，即使学习数据稀缺或难以进行像素级疾病注释。 本文提出一种改进的两阶段生成对抗网络图像翻译方法，通过自动配准技术将无配对胸部X光数据转化为伪配对数据，以提升异常定位准确性。 Kyungsu Kim,Seong Je Oh,Chae Yeon Lim,Ju Hwan Lee,Tae Uk Kim,Myung Jin Chung eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sanghoon Lee,Youngmin Oh,Donghyeon Baek,Junghyup Lee,Bumsub Ham
title: OIMNet++: Prototypical Normalization and Localization-aware Learning for Person Search
title_zh: OIMNet++：人员搜索的原型标准化和本地化感知学习
abstract: We address the task of person search, that is, localizing and re-identifying query persons from a set of raw scene images. Recent approaches are typically built upon OIMNet, a pioneer work on person search, that learns joint person representations for performing both detection and person re-identification (reID) tasks. To obtain the representations, they extract features from pedestrian proposals, and then project them on a unit hypersphere with L2 normalization. These methods also incorporate all positive proposals, that sufficiently overlap with the ground truth, equally to learn person representations for reID. We have found that 1) the L2 normalization without considering feature distributions degenerates the discriminative power of person representations, and 2) positive proposals often also depict background clutter and person overlaps, which could encode noisy features to person representations. In this paper, we introduce OIMNet++ that addresses the aforementioned limitations. To this end, we introduce a novel normalization layer, dubbed ProtoNorm, that calibrates features from pedestrian proposals, while considering a long-tail distribution of person IDs, enabling L2 normalized person representations to be discriminative. We also propose a localization-aware feature learning scheme that encourages better-aligned proposals to contribute more in learning discriminative representations. Experimental results and analysis on standard person search benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of OIMNet++.
summary: We address the task of person search, that is, localizing and re-identifying query persons from a set of raw scene images. Recent approaches are typically built upon OIMNet, a pioneer work on person search, that learns joint person representations for performing both detection and person re-identification (reID) tasks. To obtain the representations, they extract features from pedestrian proposals, and then project them on a unit hypersphere with L2 normalization. These methods also incorporate all positive proposals, that sufficiently overlap with the ground truth, equally to learn person representations for reID. We have found that 1) the L2 normalization without considering feature distributions degenerates the discriminative power of person representations, and 2) positive proposals often also depict background clutter and person overlaps, which could encode noisy features to person representations. In this paper, we introduce OIMNet++ that addresses the aforementioned limitations. To this end, we introduce a novel normalization layer, dubbed ProtoNorm, that calibrates features from pedestrian proposals, while considering a long-tail distribution of person IDs, enabling L2 normalized person representations to be discriminative. We also propose a localization-aware feature learning scheme that encourages better-aligned proposals to contribute more in learning discriminative representations. Experimental results and analysis on standard person search benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of OIMNet++.
abstract_zh: 我们解决人员搜索的任务，即从一组原始场景图像中定位和重新识别查询人员。最近的方法通常建立在 OIMNet 的基础上，OIMNet 是人员搜索领域的一项先驱工作，它学习联合人员表示以执行检测和人员重新识别 (reID) 任务。为了获得表示，他们从行人提议中提取特征，然后将它们投影到具有 L2 归一化的单位超球面上。这些方法还纳入了所有与真实情况充分重叠的积极建议，同样可以学习 reID 的人员表示。我们发现：1）不考虑特征分布的 L2 归一化会降低人物表示的辨别力，2）积极的提案通常还会描述背景混乱和人物重叠，这可能会将噪声特征编码为人物表示。在本文中，我们引入了 OIMNet++ 来解决上述限制。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的标准化层，称为 ProtoNorm，它可以校准行人提案中的特征，同时考虑人员 ID 的长尾分布，从而使 L2 标准化人员表示具有区分性。我们还提出了一种本地化感知的特征学习方案，鼓励更好的对齐提案在学习判别性表示方面做出更多贡献。标准人物搜索基准的实验结果和分析证明了 OIMNet++ 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OIMNet++，通过原型归一化和定位感知学习改进人物搜索任务，解决现有方法在特征分布和正样本噪声方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在L2归一化时未考虑特征分布，且正样本提案常包含背景噪声，导致人物表征判别力不足。
AI.method: 引入ProtoNorm层校准特征并考虑长尾ID分布，设计定位感知学习方案强化对齐提案的贡献。
AI.result: 在标准人物搜索基准测试中验证了OIMNet++的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OIMNet++通过改进归一化和定位学习，有效解决了人物搜索中的表征判别性问题。

search_text: OIMNet++: Prototypical Normalization and Localization-aware Learning for Person Search OIMNet++：人员搜索的原型标准化和本地化感知学习 We address the task of person search, that is, localizing and re-identifying query persons from a set of raw scene images. Recent approaches are typically built upon OIMNet, a pioneer work on person search, that learns joint person representations for performing both detection and person re-identification (reID) tasks. To obtain the representations, they extract features from pedestrian proposals, and then project them on a unit hypersphere with L2 normalization. These methods also incorporate all positive proposals, that sufficiently overlap with the ground truth, equally to learn person representations for reID. We have found that 1) the L2 normalization without considering feature distributions degenerates the discriminative power of person representations, and 2) positive proposals often also depict background clutter and person overlaps, which could encode noisy features to person representations. In this paper, we introduce OIMNet++ that addresses the aforementioned limitations. To this end, we introduce a novel normalization layer, dubbed ProtoNorm, that calibrates features from pedestrian proposals, while considering a long-tail distribution of person IDs, enabling L2 normalized person representations to be discriminative. We also propose a localization-aware feature learning scheme that encourages better-aligned proposals to contribute more in learning discriminative representations. Experimental results and analysis on standard person search benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of OIMNet++. 我们解决人员搜索的任务，即从一组原始场景图像中定位和重新识别查询人员。最近的方法通常建立在 OIMNet 的基础上，OIMNet 是人员搜索领域的一项先驱工作，它学习联合人员表示以执行检测和人员重新识别 (reID) 任务。为了获得表示，他们从行人提议中提取特征，然后将它们投影到具有 L2 归一化的单位超球面上。这些方法还纳入了所有与真实情况充分重叠的积极建议，同样可以学习 reID 的人员表示。我们发现：1）不考虑特征分布的 L2 归一化会降低人物表示的辨别力，2）积极的提案通常还会描述背景混乱和人物重叠，这可能会将噪声特征编码为人物表示。在本文中，我们引入了 OIMNet++ 来解决上述限制。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的标准化层，称为 ProtoNorm，它可以校准行人提案中的特征，同时考虑人员 ID 的长尾分布，从而使 L2 标准化人员表示具有区分性。我们还提出了一种本地化感知的特征学习方案，鼓励更好的对齐提案在学习判别性表示方面做出更多贡献。标准人物搜索基准的实验结果和分析证明了 OIMNet++ 的有效性。 本文提出OIMNet++，通过原型归一化和定位感知学习改进人物搜索任务，解决现有方法在特征分布和正样本噪声方面的不足。 Sanghoon Lee,Youngmin Oh,Donghyeon Baek,Junghyup Lee,Bumsub Ham cs.CV

authors_text: Liangqi Zhang,Haibo Shen,Yihao Luo,Xiang Cao,Leixilan Pan,Tianjiang Wang,Qi Feng
title: Efficient CNN Architecture Design Guided by Visualization
title_zh: 可视化引导的高效CNN架构设计
abstract: Modern efficient Convolutional Neural Networks(CNNs) always use Depthwise Separable Convolutions(DSCs) and Neural Architecture Search(NAS) to reduce the number of parameters and the computational complexity. But some inherent characteristics of networks are overlooked. Inspired by visualizing feature maps and N$\times$N(N$>$1) convolution kernels, several guidelines are introduced in this paper to further improve parameter efficiency and inference speed. Based on these guidelines, our parameter-efficient CNN architecture, called \textit{VGNetG}, achieves better accuracy and lower latency than previous networks with about 30%$\thicksim$50% parameters reduction. Our VGNetG-1.0MP achieves 67.7% top-1 accuracy with 0.99M parameters and 69.2% top-1 accuracy with 1.14M parameters on ImageNet classification dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that edge detectors can replace learnable depthwise convolution layers to mix features by replacing the N$\times$N kernels with fixed edge detection kernels. And our VGNetF-1.5MP archives 64.4%(-3.2%) top-1 accuracy and 66.2%(-1.4%) top-1 accuracy with additional Gaussian kernels.
summary: Modern efficient Convolutional Neural Networks(CNNs) always use Depthwise Separable Convolutions(DSCs) and Neural Architecture Search(NAS) to reduce the number of parameters and the computational complexity. But some inherent characteristics of networks are overlooked. Inspired by visualizing feature maps and N$\times$N(N$>$1) convolution kernels, several guidelines are introduced in this paper to further improve parameter efficiency and inference speed. Based on these guidelines, our parameter-efficient CNN architecture, called \textit{VGNetG}, achieves better accuracy and lower latency than previous networks with about 30%$\thicksim$50% parameters reduction. Our VGNetG-1.0MP achieves 67.7% top-1 accuracy with 0.99M parameters and 69.2% top-1 accuracy with 1.14M parameters on ImageNet classification dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that edge detectors can replace learnable depthwise convolution layers to mix features by replacing the N$\times$N kernels with fixed edge detection kernels. And our VGNetF-1.5MP archives 64.4%(-3.2%) top-1 accuracy and 66.2%(-1.4%) top-1 accuracy with additional Gaussian kernels.
abstract_zh: 现代高效的卷积神经网络（CNN）总是使用深度可分离卷积（DSC）和神经架构搜索（NAS）来减少参数数量和计算复杂度。但网络的一些固有特征被忽视了。受可视化特征图和 N$\times$N(N$>$1) 卷积核的启发，本文引入了一些指导方针，以进一步提高参数效率和推理速度。基于这些准则，我们的参数高效 CNN 架构（称为 \textit{VGNetG}）比以前的网络实现了更好的精度和更低的延迟，参数减少了约 30%$\thicksim$50%。我们的 VGNetG-1.0MP 在 ImageNet 分类数据集上使用 0.99M 参数实现了 67.7% top-1 准确率，使用 1.14M 参数实现了 69.2% top-1 准确率。此外，我们证明边缘检测器可以通过用固定边缘检测内核替换 N$\times$N 内核来替换可学习的深度卷积层来混合特征。我们的 VGNetF-1.5MP 通过附加高斯内核实现了 64.4%(-3.2%) top-1 准确率和 66.2%(-1.4%) top-1 准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可视化的高效CNN架构设计方法，通过引入新指南和替代深度可分离卷积的边缘检测器，实现参数减少和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有高效CNN依赖深度可分离卷积和神经架构搜索，但忽视了网络的固有特性，需通过可视化特征图和卷积核发现新优化方向。
AI.method: 基于特征图可视化和N×N卷积核分析提出设计指南，构建参数高效的VGNetG架构，并用边缘检测器替代可学习深度卷积层形成VGNetF。
AI.result: VGNetG-1.0MP在ImageNet上以0.99M参数达到67.7%精度，1.14M参数达69.2%；VGNetF-1.5MP使用边缘检测器和高斯核实现精度小幅下降但参数更优。
AI.conclusion: 可视化指导的CNN设计能显著提升参数效率，边缘检测器替代方案为轻量化模型提供了新思路，在保持性能的同时减少计算量。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于可视化的高效CNN架构设计方法，通过引入新指南和替代深度可分离卷积的边缘检测器，实现参数减少和性能提升。
motivation: 现有高效CNN依赖深度可分离卷积和神经架构搜索，但忽视了网络的固有特性，需通过可视化特征图和卷积核发现新优化方向。
method: 基于特征图可视化和N×N卷积核分析提出设计指南，构建参数高效的VGNetG架构，并用边缘检测器替代可学习深度卷积层形成VGNetF。
result: VGNetG-1.0MP在ImageNet上以0.99M参数达到67.7%精度，1.14M参数达69.2%；VGNetF-1.5MP使用边缘检测器和高斯核实现精度小幅下降但参数更优。
conclusion: 可视化指导的CNN设计能显著提升参数效率，边缘检测器替代方案为轻量化模型提供了新思路，在保持性能的同时减少计算量。
search_text: Efficient CNN Architecture Design Guided by Visualization 可视化引导的高效CNN架构设计 Modern efficient Convolutional Neural Networks(CNNs) always use Depthwise Separable Convolutions(DSCs) and Neural Architecture Search(NAS) to reduce the number of parameters and the computational complexity. But some inherent characteristics of networks are overlooked. Inspired by visualizing feature maps and N$\times$N(N$>$1) convolution kernels, several guidelines are introduced in this paper to further improve parameter efficiency and inference speed. Based on these guidelines, our parameter-efficient CNN architecture, called \textit{VGNetG}, achieves better accuracy and lower latency than previous networks with about 30%$\thicksim$50% parameters reduction. Our VGNetG-1.0MP achieves 67.7% top-1 accuracy with 0.99M parameters and 69.2% top-1 accuracy with 1.14M parameters on ImageNet classification dataset. Furthermore, we demonstrate that edge detectors can replace learnable depthwise convolution layers to mix features by replacing the N$\times$N kernels with fixed edge detection kernels. And our VGNetF-1.5MP archives 64.4%(-3.2%) top-1 accuracy and 66.2%(-1.4%) top-1 accuracy with additional Gaussian kernels. 现代高效的卷积神经网络（CNN）总是使用深度可分离卷积（DSC）和神经架构搜索（NAS）来减少参数数量和计算复杂度。但网络的一些固有特征被忽视了。受可视化特征图和 N$\times$N(N$>$1) 卷积核的启发，本文引入了一些指导方针，以进一步提高参数效率和推理速度。基于这些准则，我们的参数高效 CNN 架构（称为 \textit{VGNetG}）比以前的网络实现了更好的精度和更低的延迟，参数减少了约 30%$\thicksim$50%。我们的 VGNetG-1.0MP 在 ImageNet 分类数据集上使用 0.99M 参数实现了 67.7% top-1 准确率，使用 1.14M 参数实现了 69.2% top-1 准确率。此外，我们证明边缘检测器可以通过用固定边缘检测内核替换 N$\times$N 内核来替换可学习的深度卷积层来混合特征。我们的 VGNetF-1.5MP 通过附加高斯内核实现了 64.4%(-3.2%) top-1 准确率和 66.2%(-1.4%) top-1 准确率。 本文提出一种基于可视化的高效CNN架构设计方法，通过引入新指南和替代深度可分离卷积的边缘检测器，实现参数减少和性能提升。 Liangqi Zhang,Haibo Shen,Yihao Luo,Xiang Cao,Leixilan Pan,Tianjiang Wang,Qi Feng cs.CV

authors_text: Zehui Chen,Zhenyu Li,Shiquan Zhang,Liangji Fang,Qinhong Jiang,Feng Zhao
title: AutoAlignV2: Deformable Feature Aggregation for Dynamic Multi-Modal 3D Object Detection
title_zh: AutoAlignV2：用于动态多模态 3D 对象检测的可变形特征聚合
abstract: Point clouds and RGB images are two general perceptional sources in autonomous driving. The former can provide accurate localization of objects, and the latter is denser and richer in semantic information. Recently, AutoAlign presents a learnable paradigm in combining these two modalities for 3D object detection. However, it suffers from high computational cost introduced by the global-wise attention. To solve the problem, we propose Cross-Domain DeformCAFA module in this work. It attends to sparse learnable sampling points for cross-modal relational modeling, which enhances the tolerance to calibration error and greatly speeds up the feature aggregation across different modalities. To overcome the complex GT-AUG under multi-modal settings, we design a simple yet effective cross-modal augmentation strategy on convex combination of image patches given their depth information. Moreover, by carrying out a novel image-level dropout training scheme, our model is able to infer in a dynamic manner. To this end, we propose AutoAlignV2, a faster and stronger multi-modal 3D detection framework, built on top of AutoAlign. Extensive experiments on nuScenes benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of AutoAlignV2. Notably, our best model reaches 72.4 NDS on nuScenes test leaderboard, achieving new state-of-the-art results among all published multi-modal 3D object detectors. Code will be available at https://github.com/zehuichen123/AutoAlignV2.
summary: Point clouds and RGB images are two general perceptional sources in autonomous driving. The former can provide accurate localization of objects, and the latter is denser and richer in semantic information. Recently, AutoAlign presents a learnable paradigm in combining these two modalities for 3D object detection. However, it suffers from high computational cost introduced by the global-wise attention. To solve the problem, we propose Cross-Domain DeformCAFA module in this work. It attends to sparse learnable sampling points for cross-modal relational modeling, which enhances the tolerance to calibration error and greatly speeds up the feature aggregation across different modalities. To overcome the complex GT-AUG under multi-modal settings, we design a simple yet effective cross-modal augmentation strategy on convex combination of image patches given their depth information. Moreover, by carrying out a novel image-level dropout training scheme, our model is able to infer in a dynamic manner. To this end, we propose AutoAlignV2, a faster and stronger multi-modal 3D detection framework, built on top of AutoAlign. Extensive experiments on nuScenes benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of AutoAlignV2. Notably, our best model reaches 72.4 NDS on nuScenes test leaderboard, achieving new state-of-the-art results among all published multi-modal 3D object detectors. Code will be available at https://github.com/zehuichen123/AutoAlignV2.
abstract_zh: 点云和 RGB 图像是自动驾驶中两种常见的感知源。前者可以提供物体的准确定位，后者语义信息更密集、更丰富。最近，AutoAlign 提出了一种可学习的范例，将这两种模式结合起来进行 3D 对象检测。然而，它受到全局注意力带来的高计算成本的影响。为了解决这个问题，我们在这项工作中提出了跨域变形CAFA模块。它关注跨模态关系建模的稀疏可学习采样点，增强了对校准误差的容忍度，并大大加快了不同模态的特征聚合速度。为了克服多模态设置下复杂的 GT-AUG，我们在给定深度信息的图像块凸组合上设计了一种简单而有效的跨模态增强策略。此外，通过执行一种新颖的图像级 dropout 训练方案，我们的模型能够以动态方式进行推断。为此，我们提出了 AutoAlignV2，这是一个更快、更强的多模态 3D 检测框架，建立在 AutoAlign 之上。 nuScenes 基准上的大量实验证明了 AutoAlignV2 的有效性和效率。值得注意的是，我们的最佳模型在 nuScenes 测试排行榜上达到了 72.4 NDS，在所有已发布的多模态 3D 物体检测器中取得了最先进的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/zehuichen123/AutoAlignV2 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoAlignV2框架，通过改进跨模态特征聚合方法，提升动态多模态3D目标检测的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法AutoAlign因全局注意力机制计算成本高，且对校准误差敏感，难以满足实际应用需求。需设计更高效、鲁棒的跨模态特征融合方案。
AI.method: 提出跨域可变形DeformCAFA模块，通过稀疏可学习采样点进行跨模态关系建模；设计基于深度信息的图像块凸组合增强策略，并引入图像级dropout训练方案实现动态推理。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，最佳模型达到72.4 NDS指标，刷新多模态3D目标检测的SOTA记录，计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AutoAlignV2通过优化特征聚合机制和训练策略，在保持检测精度的同时大幅提升计算效率，为多模态感知系统提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Haoran Zhou,Yun Cao,Wenqing Chu,Junwei Zhu,Tong Lu,Ying Tai,Chengjie Wang
title: SeedFormer: Patch Seeds based Point Cloud Completion with Upsample Transformer
title_zh: SeedFormer：使用 Upsample Transformer 进行基于补丁种子的点云补全
comment: Camera-ready, to be published in ECCV 2022, with supplementary material
comments: Camera-ready, to be published in ECCV 2022, with supplementary material
abstract: Point cloud completion has become increasingly popular among generation tasks of 3D point clouds, as it is a challenging yet indispensable problem to recover the complete shape of a 3D object from its partial observation. In this paper, we propose a novel SeedFormer to improve the ability of detail preservation and recovery in point cloud completion. Unlike previous methods based on a global feature vector, we introduce a new shape representation, namely Patch Seeds, which not only captures general structures from partial inputs but also preserves regional information of local patterns. Then, by integrating seed features into the generation process, we can recover faithful details for complete point clouds in a coarse-to-fine manner. Moreover, we devise an Upsample Transformer by extending the transformer structure into basic operations of point generators, which effectively incorporates spatial and semantic relationships between neighboring points. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art completion networks on several benchmark datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/hrzhou2/seedformer.
summary: Point cloud completion has become increasingly popular among generation tasks of 3D point clouds, as it is a challenging yet indispensable problem to recover the complete shape of a 3D object from its partial observation. In this paper, we propose a novel SeedFormer to improve the ability of detail preservation and recovery in point cloud completion. Unlike previous methods based on a global feature vector, we introduce a new shape representation, namely Patch Seeds, which not only captures general structures from partial inputs but also preserves regional information of local patterns. Then, by integrating seed features into the generation process, we can recover faithful details for complete point clouds in a coarse-to-fine manner. Moreover, we devise an Upsample Transformer by extending the transformer structure into basic operations of point generators, which effectively incorporates spatial and semantic relationships between neighboring points. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art completion networks on several benchmark datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/hrzhou2/seedformer.
abstract_zh: 点云补全在 3D 点云生成任务中变得越来越流行，因为从部分观察中恢复 3D 对象的完整形状是一个具有挑战性但又不可或缺的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 SeedFormer 来提高点云补全中细节保留和恢复的能力。与之前基于全局特征向量的方法不同，我们引入了一种新的形状表示，即补丁种子，它不仅从部分输入中捕获一般结构，而且还保留了局部模式的区域信息。然后，通过将种子特征集成到生成过程中，我们可以以从粗到细的方式恢复完整点云的忠实细节。此外，我们通过将变压器结构扩展到点生成器的基本操作来设计上采样变压器，它有效地结合了相邻点之间的空间和语义关系。定性和定量评估表明，我们的方法在多个基准数据集上优于最先进的完成网络。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hr Zhou2/seedformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeedFormer方法，通过引入Patch Seeds和Upsample Transformer结构，解决点云补全任务中细节保留与恢复的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于全局特征向量的方法难以有效捕捉局部细节信息，导致点云补全结果不够精确。
AI.method: 提出Patch Seeds形状表示以捕捉局部模式信息，并结合Upsample Transformer在生成过程中整合空间与语义关系，实现从粗到细的细节恢复。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于现有最先进的点云补全网络。
AI.conclusion: SeedFormer通过创新的形状表示和生成机制，有效提升了点云补全的细节保真度与恢复能力。

Moreover, we devise an Upsample Transformer by extending the transformer structure into basic operations of point generators, which effectively incorporates spatial and semantic relationships between neighboring points. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art completion networks on several benchmark datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/hrzhou2/seedformer. 点云补全在 3D 点云生成任务中变得越来越流行，因为从部分观察中恢复 3D 对象的完整形状是一个具有挑战性但又不可或缺的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 SeedFormer 来提高点云补全中细节保留和恢复的能力。与之前基于全局特征向量的方法不同，我们引入了一种新的形状表示，即补丁种子，它不仅从部分输入中捕获一般结构，而且还保留了局部模式的区域信息。然后，通过将种子特征集成到生成过程中，我们可以以从粗到细的方式恢复完整点云的忠实细节。此外，我们通过将变压器结构扩展到点生成器的基本操作来设计上采样变压器，它有效地结合了相邻点之间的空间和语义关系。定性和定量评估表明，我们的方法在多个基准数据集上优于最先进的完成网络。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hr Zhou2/seedformer 获取。 本文提出SeedFormer方法，通过引入Patch Seeds和Upsample Transformer结构，解决点云补全任务中细节保留与恢复的问题。 Haoran Zhou,Yun Cao,Wenqing Chu,Junwei Zhu,Tong Lu,Ying Tai,Chengjie Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Woobin Im,Sebin Lee,Sung-Eui Yoon
title: Semi-Supervised Learning of Optical Flow by Flow Supervisor
title_zh: Flow Supervisor 的光流半监督学习
abstract: A training pipeline for optical flow CNNs consists of a pretraining stage on a synthetic dataset followed by a fine tuning stage on a target dataset. However, obtaining ground truth flows from a target video requires a tremendous effort. This paper proposes a practical fine tuning method to adapt a pretrained model to a target dataset without ground truth flows, which has not been explored extensively. Specifically, we propose a flow supervisor for self-supervision, which consists of parameter separation and a student output connection. This design is aimed at stable convergence and better accuracy over conventional self-supervision methods which are unstable on the fine tuning task. Experimental results show the effectiveness of our method compared to different self-supervision methods for semi-supervised learning. In addition, we achieve meaningful improvements over state-of-the-art optical flow models on Sintel and KITTI benchmarks by exploiting additional unlabeled datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/iwbn/flow-supervisor.
summary: A training pipeline for optical flow CNNs consists of a pretraining stage on a synthetic dataset followed by a fine tuning stage on a target dataset. However, obtaining ground truth flows from a target video requires a tremendous effort. This paper proposes a practical fine tuning method to adapt a pretrained model to a target dataset without ground truth flows, which has not been explored extensively. Specifically, we propose a flow supervisor for self-supervision, which consists of parameter separation and a student output connection. This design is aimed at stable convergence and better accuracy over conventional self-supervision methods which are unstable on the fine tuning task. Experimental results show the effectiveness of our method compared to different self-supervision methods for semi-supervised learning. In addition, we achieve meaningful improvements over state-of-the-art optical flow models on Sintel and KITTI benchmarks by exploiting additional unlabeled datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/iwbn/flow-supervisor.
abstract_zh: 光流 CNN 的训练流程由合成数据集上的预训练阶段和目标数据集上的微调阶段组成。然而，从目标视频中获取真实流需要付出巨大的努力。本文提出了一种实用的微调方法，使预训练模型适应没有地面实况流的目标数据集，该方法尚未得到广泛探索。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于自我监督的流程管理器，它由参数分离和学生输出连接组成。该设计的目的是比在微调任务上不稳定的传统自监督方法实现稳定的收敛和更高的精度。实验结果表明，与半监督学习的不同自监督方法相比，我们的方法是有效的。此外，我们通过利用额外的未标记数据集，在 Sintel 和 KITTI 基准上对最先进的光流模型进行了有意义的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/iwbn/flow-supervisor 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Flow Supervisor的半监督光流学习方法，无需目标数据集的真实光流即可微调预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 传统光流CNN训练依赖目标数据集的真实光流标注，但获取成本极高且耗时，现有自监督方法在微调任务中存在稳定性不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计Flow Supervisor结构，包含参数分离机制与学生模型输出连接，通过自监督学习实现模型微调，提升收敛稳定性与精度。
AI.result: 在Sintel和KITTI基准测试中，相比其他自监督方法和现有最优模型均取得显著性能提升，且无需真实光流标注。
AI.conclusion: Flow Supervisor有效解决了无监督微调中的稳定性问题，通过利用未标记数据提升了光流估计性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Andreas Kurz,Thomas Neff,Zhaoyang Lv,Michael Zollhöfer,Markus Steinberger
title: AdaNeRF: Adaptive Sampling for Real-time Rendering of Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: AdaNeRF：用于神经辐射场实时渲染的自适应采样
abstract: Novel view synthesis has recently been revolutionized by learning neural radiance fields directly from sparse observations. However, rendering images with this new paradigm is slow due to the fact that an accurate quadrature of the volume rendering equation requires a large number of samples for each ray. Previous work has mainly focused on speeding up the network evaluations that are associated with each sample point, e.g., via caching of radiance values into explicit spatial data structures, but this comes at the expense of model compactness. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-network architecture that takes an orthogonal direction by learning how to best reduce the number of required sample points. To this end, we split our network into a sampling and shading network that are jointly trained. Our training scheme employs fixed sample positions along each ray, and incrementally introduces sparsity throughout training to achieve high quality even at low sample counts. After fine-tuning with the target number of samples, the resulting compact neural representation can be rendered in real-time. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms concurrent compact neural representations in terms of quality and frame rate and performs on par with highly efficient hybrid representations. Code and supplementary material is available at https://thomasneff.github.io/adanerf.
summary: Novel view synthesis has recently been revolutionized by learning neural radiance fields directly from sparse observations. However, rendering images with this new paradigm is slow due to the fact that an accurate quadrature of the volume rendering equation requires a large number of samples for each ray. Previous work has mainly focused on speeding up the network evaluations that are associated with each sample point, e.g., via caching of radiance values into explicit spatial data structures, but this comes at the expense of model compactness. In this paper, we propose a novel dual-network architecture that takes an orthogonal direction by learning how to best reduce the number of required sample points. To this end, we split our network into a sampling and shading network that are jointly trained. Our training scheme employs fixed sample positions along each ray, and incrementally introduces sparsity throughout training to achieve high quality even at low sample counts. After fine-tuning with the target number of samples, the resulting compact neural representation can be rendered in real-time. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms concurrent compact neural representations in terms of quality and frame rate and performs on par with highly efficient hybrid representations. Code and supplementary material is available at https://thomasneff.github.io/adanerf.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过直接从稀疏观测中学习神经辐射场，新颖的视图合成发生了革命性的变化。然而，由于体积渲染方程的精确求积需要每条射线的大量样本，因此使用这种新范例渲染图像的速度很慢。以前的工作主要集中在加速与每个样本点相关的网络评估，例如，通过将辐射值缓存到显式空间数据结构中，但这是以模型紧凑性为代价的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双网络架构，该架构通过学习如何最好地减少所需样本点的数量来采取正交方向。为此，我们将网络分为联合训练的采样网络和着色网络。我们的训练方案沿每条射线采用固定的样本位置，并在整个训练过程中逐渐引入稀疏性，即使在低样本数的情况下也能实现高质量。在对目标样本数量进行微调后，可以实时渲染所得的紧凑神经表示。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在质量和帧速率方面优于并发紧凑神经表示，并且与高效混合表示相当。代码和补充材料可在 https://thomasneff.github.io/adanerf 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaNeRF方法，通过自适应采样实现神经辐射场的实时渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有神经辐射场渲染方法因需大量样本点导致速度慢，且优化方法常以牺牲模型紧凑性为代价。
AI.method: 设计双网络架构（采样网络与着色网络联合训练），通过固定样本位置并逐步引入稀疏性实现样本数量减少。
AI.result: 在保证质量的前提下实现比现有紧凑模型更高的帧率，性能接近高效混合表示方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了渲染质量与计算效率，为实时神经辐射场渲染提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ming Liu,Yuxiang Wei,Xiaohe Wu,Wangmeng Zuo,Lei Zhang
title: A Survey on Leveraging Pre-trained Generative Adversarial Networks for Image Editing and Restoration
title_zh: 利用预先训练的生成对抗网络进行图像编辑和恢复的调查
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have drawn enormous attention due to the simple yet effective training mechanism and superior image generation quality. With the ability to generate photo-realistic high-resolution (e.g., $1024\times1024$) images, recent GAN models have greatly narrowed the gaps between the generated images and the real ones. Therefore, many recent works show emerging interest to take advantage of pre-trained GAN models by exploiting the well-disentangled latent space and the learned GAN priors. In this paper, we briefly review recent progress on leveraging pre-trained large-scale GAN models from three aspects, i.e., 1) the training of large-scale generative adversarial networks, 2) exploring and understanding the pre-trained GAN models, and 3) leveraging these models for subsequent tasks like image restoration and editing. More information about relevant methods and repositories can be found at https://github.com/csmliu/pretrained-GANs.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have drawn enormous attention due to the simple yet effective training mechanism and superior image generation quality. With the ability to generate photo-realistic high-resolution (e.g., $1024\times1024$) images, recent GAN models have greatly narrowed the gaps between the generated images and the real ones. Therefore, many recent works show emerging interest to take advantage of pre-trained GAN models by exploiting the well-disentangled latent space and the learned GAN priors. In this paper, we briefly review recent progress on leveraging pre-trained large-scale GAN models from three aspects, i.e., 1) the training of large-scale generative adversarial networks, 2) exploring and understanding the pre-trained GAN models, and 3) leveraging these models for subsequent tasks like image restoration and editing. More information about relevant methods and repositories can be found at https://github.com/csmliu/pretrained-GANs.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）由于简单而有效的训练机制和卓越的图像生成质量而引起了极大的关注。由于能够生成逼真的高分辨率（例如，$1024\times1024$）图像，最近的 GAN 模型极大地缩小了生成图像与真实图像之间的差距。因此，最近的许多工作显示出人们对通过充分分离的潜在空间和学习的 GAN 先验来利用预训练的 GAN 模型的兴趣。在本文中，我们从三个方面简要回顾了利用预训练的大规模 GAN 模型的最新进展，即 1）大规模生成对抗网络的训练，2）探索和理解预训练的 GAN 模型，3）利用这些模型进行图像恢复和编辑等后续任务。有关相关方法和存储库的更多信息可以在 https://github.com/csmliu/pretrained-GANs 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了如何利用预训练的生成对抗网络（GAN）进行图像编辑和修复。
AI.motivation: GANs能够生成高质量的高分辨率图像，预训练模型的潜在空间和先验知识为图像编辑与修复提供了新思路。
AI.method: 从三个方面综述：大规模GAN训练、预训练模型的探索与理解、以及在图像修复与编辑中的应用方法。
AI.result: 总结了相关技术进展，并提供了方法和代码仓库的参考链接。
AI.conclusion: 预训练GAN在图像任务中展现潜力，未来需进一步探索其应用与优化。

search_text: A Survey on Leveraging Pre-trained Generative Adversarial Networks for Image Editing and Restoration 利用预先训练的生成对抗网络进行图像编辑和恢复的调查 Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have drawn enormous attention due to the simple yet effective training mechanism and superior image generation quality. With the ability to generate photo-realistic high-resolution (e.g., $1024\times1024$) images, recent GAN models have greatly narrowed the gaps between the generated images and the real ones. Therefore, many recent works show emerging interest to take advantage of pre-trained GAN models by exploiting the well-disentangled latent space and the learned GAN priors. In this paper, we briefly review recent progress on leveraging pre-trained large-scale GAN models from three aspects, i.e., 1) the training of large-scale generative adversarial networks, 2) exploring and understanding the pre-trained GAN models, and 3) leveraging these models for subsequent tasks like image restoration and editing. More information about relevant methods and repositories can be found at https://github.com/csmliu/pretrained-GANs. 生成对抗网络（GAN）由于简单而有效的训练机制和卓越的图像生成质量而引起了极大的关注。由于能够生成逼真的高分辨率（例如，$1024\times1024$）图像，最近的 GAN 模型极大地缩小了生成图像与真实图像之间的差距。因此，最近的许多工作显示出人们对通过充分分离的潜在空间和学习的 GAN 先验来利用预训练的 GAN 模型的兴趣。在本文中，我们从三个方面简要回顾了利用预训练的大规模 GAN 模型的最新进展，即 1）大规模生成对抗网络的训练，2）探索和理解预训练的 GAN 模型，3）利用这些模型进行图像恢复和编辑等后续任务。有关相关方法和存储库的更多信息可以在 https://github.com/csmliu/pretrained-GANs 找到。 本文综述了如何利用预训练的生成对抗网络（GAN）进行图像编辑和修复。 Ming Liu,Yuxiang Wei,Xiaohe Wu,Wangmeng Zuo,Lei Zhang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jingfan Chen,Wenqi Fan,Guanghui Zhu,Xiangyu Zhao,Chunfeng Yuan,Qing Li,Yihua Huang
title: Knowledge-enhanced Black-box Attacks for Recommendations
title_zh: 针对推荐的知识增强黑盒攻击
abstract: Recent studies have shown that deep neural networks-based recommender systems are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where attackers can inject carefully crafted fake user profiles (i.e., a set of items that fake users have interacted with) into a target recommender system to achieve malicious purposes, such as promote or demote a set of target items. Due to the security and privacy concerns, it is more practical to perform adversarial attacks under the black-box setting, where the architecture/parameters and training data of target systems cannot be easily accessed by attackers. However, generating high-quality fake user profiles under black-box setting is rather challenging with limited resources to target systems. To address this challenge, in this work, we introduce a novel strategy by leveraging items' attribute information (i.e., items' knowledge graph), which can be publicly accessible and provide rich auxiliary knowledge to enhance the generation of fake user profiles. More specifically, we propose a knowledge graph-enhanced black-box attacking framework (KGAttack) to effectively learn attacking policies through deep reinforcement learning techniques, in which knowledge graph is seamlessly integrated into hierarchical policy networks to generate fake user profiles for performing adversarial black-box attacks. Comprehensive experiments on various real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed attacking framework under the black-box setting.
summary: Recent studies have shown that deep neural networks-based recommender systems are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where attackers can inject carefully crafted fake user profiles (i.e., a set of items that fake users have interacted with) into a target recommender system to achieve malicious purposes, such as promote or demote a set of target items. Due to the security and privacy concerns, it is more practical to perform adversarial attacks under the black-box setting, where the architecture/parameters and training data of target systems cannot be easily accessed by attackers. However, generating high-quality fake user profiles under black-box setting is rather challenging with limited resources to target systems. To address this challenge, in this work, we introduce a novel strategy by leveraging items' attribute information (i.e., items' knowledge graph), which can be publicly accessible and provide rich auxiliary knowledge to enhance the generation of fake user profiles. More specifically, we propose a knowledge graph-enhanced black-box attacking framework (KGAttack) to effectively learn attacking policies through deep reinforcement learning techniques, in which knowledge graph is seamlessly integrated into hierarchical policy networks to generate fake user profiles for performing adversarial black-box attacks. Comprehensive experiments on various real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed attacking framework under the black-box setting.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于深度神经网络的推荐系统容易受到对抗性攻击，攻击者可以将精心制作的虚假用户配置文件（即一组与虚假用户交互过的项目）注入目标推荐系统中，以实现恶意目的，例如提升或降级一组目标项目。出于安全和隐私方面的考虑，在黑盒设置下进行对抗性攻击更为实用，攻击者无法轻易访问目标系统的架构/参数和训练数据。然而，由于目标系统的资源有限，在黑盒设置下生成高质量的虚假用户配置文件相当具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，在这项工作中，我们通过利用项目的属性信息（即项目的知识图谱）引入了一种新颖的策略，该策略可以公开访问并提供丰富的辅助知识来增强虚假用户配置文件的生成。更具体地说，我们提出了一种知识图增强的黑盒攻击框架（KGAtack），通过深度强化学习技术有效地学习攻击策略，其中知识图被无缝集成到分层策略网络中，以生成用于执行对抗性黑盒攻击的虚假用户配置文件。对各种真实数据集的综合实验证明了所提出的攻击框架在黑盒设置下的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识图谱的黑盒攻击框架KGAttack，通过利用物品属性信息生成虚假用户画像以攻击推荐系统。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击方法因资源限制难以生成高质量虚假用户画像，而公开的物品属性知识可提供辅助信息增强攻击效果。
AI.method: 设计KGAttack框架，将知识图谱嵌入分层策略网络，结合深度强化学习生成针对推荐系统的对抗性用户画像。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集实验表明，该框架在黑盒设置下显著提升攻击成功率，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 知识增强的黑盒攻击方法能有效利用辅助信息突破资源限制，揭示了推荐系统对抗攻击的新方向。

authors_text: Hirak Doshi,N. Uday Kiran
title: On an Edge-Preserving Variational Model for Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: 光流估计的边缘保留变分模型
abstract: It is well known that classical formulations resembling the Horn and Schunck model are still largely competitive due to the modern implementation practices. In most cases, these models outperform many modern flow estimation methods. In view of this, we propose an effective implementation design for an edge-preserving $L^1$ regularization approach to optical flow. The mathematical well-posedness of our proposed model is studied in the space of functions of bounded variations $BV(Ω,\mathbb{R}^2)$. The implementation scheme is designed in multiple steps. The flow field is computed using the robust Chambolle-Pock primal-dual algorithm. Motivated by the recent studies of Castro and Donoho we extend the heuristic of iterated median filtering to our flow estimation. Further, to refine the flow edges we use the weighted median filter established by Li and Osher as a post-processing step. Our experiments on the Middlebury dataset show that the proposed method achieves the best average angular and end-point errors compared to some of the state-of-the-art Horn and Schunck based variational methods.
summary: It is well known that classical formulations resembling the Horn and Schunck model are still largely competitive due to the modern implementation practices. In most cases, these models outperform many modern flow estimation methods. In view of this, we propose an effective implementation design for an edge-preserving $L^1$ regularization approach to optical flow. The mathematical well-posedness of our proposed model is studied in the space of functions of bounded variations $BV(Ω,\mathbb{R}^2)$. The implementation scheme is designed in multiple steps. The flow field is computed using the robust Chambolle-Pock primal-dual algorithm. Motivated by the recent studies of Castro and Donoho we extend the heuristic of iterated median filtering to our flow estimation. Further, to refine the flow edges we use the weighted median filter established by Li and Osher as a post-processing step. Our experiments on the Middlebury dataset show that the proposed method achieves the best average angular and end-point errors compared to some of the state-of-the-art Horn and Schunck based variational methods.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，由于现代的实施实践，类似于 Horn 和 Schunck 模型的经典公式仍然具有很大的竞争力。在大多数情况下，这些模型优于许多现代流量估计方法。鉴于此，我们提出了一种有效的实现设计，用于光流的边缘保留 $L^1$ 正则化方法。我们提出的模型的数学适定性是在有界变分函数$BV(Ω,\mathbb{R}^2)$空间中研究的。实施方案的设计分多个步骤进行。使用稳健的 Chambolle-Pock 原始对偶算法计算流场。受卡斯特罗和多诺霍最近研究的启发，我们将迭代中值滤波的启发式方法扩展到我们的流量估计中。此外，为了细化流边缘，我们使用 Li 和 Osher 建立的加权中值滤波器作为后处理步骤。我们在 Middlebury 数据集上的实验表明，与一些最先进的基于 Horn 和 Schunck 的变分方法相比，所提出的方法实现了最佳的平均角度和端点误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边缘保持的变分模型用于光流估计，通过改进正则化方法和后处理步骤提升精度。
AI.motivation: 经典Horn-Schunck模型在现代实现下仍具竞争力，但需进一步优化边缘保持能力以提升光流估计效果。
AI.method: 设计基于L¹正则化的边缘保持模型，在BV空间证明其数学正确性，采用Chambolle-Pock算法求解，并结合迭代中值滤波与加权中值滤波进行后处理。
AI.result: 在Middlebury数据集上，该方法在平均角度误差和端点误差指标上优于现有Horn-Schunck类变分方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合L¹正则化、高效算法与中值滤波技术，提出的模型有效提升了光流估计的准确性与边缘保持能力。

authors_text: Yuhang Zhang,Chengrui Wang,Xu Ling,Weihong Deng
title: Learn From All: Erasing Attention Consistency for Noisy Label Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 向所有人学习：消除噪声标签面部表情识别的注意力一致性
abstract: Noisy label Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is more challenging than traditional noisy label classification tasks due to the inter-class similarity and the annotation ambiguity. Recent works mainly tackle this problem by filtering out large-loss samples. In this paper, we explore dealing with noisy labels from a new feature-learning perspective. We find that FER models remember noisy samples by focusing on a part of the features that can be considered related to the noisy labels instead of learning from the whole features that lead to the latent truth. Inspired by that, we propose a novel Erasing Attention Consistency (EAC) method to suppress the noisy samples during the training process automatically. Specifically, we first utilize the flip semantic consistency of facial images to design an imbalanced framework. We then randomly erase input images and use flip attention consistency to prevent the model from focusing on a part of the features. EAC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art noisy label FER methods and generalizes well to other tasks with a large number of classes like CIFAR100 and Tiny-ImageNet. The code is available at https://github.com/zyh-uaiaaaa/Erasing-Attention-Consistency.
summary: Noisy label Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is more challenging than traditional noisy label classification tasks due to the inter-class similarity and the annotation ambiguity. Recent works mainly tackle this problem by filtering out large-loss samples. In this paper, we explore dealing with noisy labels from a new feature-learning perspective. We find that FER models remember noisy samples by focusing on a part of the features that can be considered related to the noisy labels instead of learning from the whole features that lead to the latent truth. Inspired by that, we propose a novel Erasing Attention Consistency (EAC) method to suppress the noisy samples during the training process automatically. Specifically, we first utilize the flip semantic consistency of facial images to design an imbalanced framework. We then randomly erase input images and use flip attention consistency to prevent the model from focusing on a part of the features. EAC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art noisy label FER methods and generalizes well to other tasks with a large number of classes like CIFAR100 and Tiny-ImageNet. The code is available at https://github.com/zyh-uaiaaaa/Erasing-Attention-Consistency.
abstract_zh: 由于类间相似性和注释模糊性，噪声标签面部表情识别（FER）比传统的噪声标签分类任务更具挑战性。最近的工作主要通过过滤掉大损失样本来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们从新的特征学习角度探索处理噪声标签。我们发现 FER 模型通过关注可以被认为与噪声标签相关的部分特征来记住噪声样本，而不是从导致潜在真相的整个特征中学习。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的擦除注意力一致性（EAC）方法来自动抑制训练过程中的噪声样本。具体来说，我们首先利用面部图像的翻转语义一致性来设计一个不平衡框架。然后，我们随机擦除输入图像并使用翻转注意力一致性来防止模型专注于部分特征。 EAC 的性能显着优于最先进的噪声标签 FER 方法，并且可以很好地推广到具有大量类的其他任务，例如 CIFAR100 和 Tiny-ImageNet。该代码位于 https://github.com/zyh-uaiaaaa/Erasing-Attention-Consistency。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的方法，用于处理带有噪声标签的人脸表情识别任务。
AI.motivation: 由于类间相似性和标注模糊性，带有噪声标签的人脸表情识别比传统噪声标签分类任务更具挑战性。现有方法主要通过过滤大损失样本来解决这一问题，但本文从特征学习的新视角出发，探索如何处理噪声标签。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种称为擦除注意力一致性（EAC）的方法，通过利用面部图像的翻转语义一致性设计不平衡框架，并随机擦除输入图像以防止模型关注部分特征。
AI.result: EAC方法显著优于当前最先进的噪声标签FER方法，并且在CIFAR100和Tiny-ImageNet等具有大量类别的任务中也具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种有效处理噪声标签人脸表情识别任务的新方法，并在多个任务中验证了其优越性。
