authors_text: Xian Tao,Xinyi Gong,Xin Zhang,Shaohua Yan,Chandranath Adak
title: Deep Learning for Unsupervised Anomaly Localization in Industrial Images: A Survey
title_zh: 工业图像中无监督异常定位的深度学习：一项调查
abstract: Currently, deep learning-based visual inspection has been highly successful with the help of supervised learning methods. However, in real industrial scenarios, the scarcity of defect samples, the cost of annotation, and the lack of a priori knowledge of defects may render supervised-based methods ineffective. In recent years, unsupervised anomaly localization algorithms have become more widely used in industrial inspection tasks. This paper aims to help researchers in this field by comprehensively surveying recent achievements in unsupervised anomaly localization in industrial images using deep learning. The survey reviews more than 120 significant publications covering different aspects of anomaly localization, mainly covering various concepts, challenges, taxonomies, benchmark datasets, and quantitative performance comparisons of the methods reviewed. In reviewing the achievements to date, this paper provides detailed predictions and analysis of several future research directions. This review provides detailed technical information for researchers interested in industrial anomaly localization and who wish to apply it to the localization of anomalies in other fields.
summary: Currently, deep learning-based visual inspection has been highly successful with the help of supervised learning methods. However, in real industrial scenarios, the scarcity of defect samples, the cost of annotation, and the lack of a priori knowledge of defects may render supervised-based methods ineffective. In recent years, unsupervised anomaly localization algorithms have become more widely used in industrial inspection tasks. This paper aims to help researchers in this field by comprehensively surveying recent achievements in unsupervised anomaly localization in industrial images using deep learning. The survey reviews more than 120 significant publications covering different aspects of anomaly localization, mainly covering various concepts, challenges, taxonomies, benchmark datasets, and quantitative performance comparisons of the methods reviewed. In reviewing the achievements to date, this paper provides detailed predictions and analysis of several future research directions. This review provides detailed technical information for researchers interested in industrial anomaly localization and who wish to apply it to the localization of anomalies in other fields.
abstract_zh: 目前，在监督学习方法的帮助下，基于深度学习的视觉检测已经取得了巨大成功。然而，在实际工业场景中，缺陷样本的稀缺、注释的成本以及缺乏缺陷先验知识可能会使基于监督的方法失效。近年来，无监督异常定位算法在工业检测任务中得到了越来越广泛的应用。本文旨在通过全面调查利用深度学习在工业图像无监督异常定位方面取得的最新成就来帮助该领域的研究人员。该调查回顾了 120 多篇涵盖异常定位不同方面的重要出版物，主要涵盖各种概念、挑战、分类法、基准数据集以及所审查方法的定量性能比较。在回顾迄今为止的成果的同时，本文对未来的几个研究方向进行了详细的预测和分析。该综述为对工业异常定位感兴趣并希望将其应用于其他领域异常定位的研究人员提供了详细的技术信息。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在工业图像无监督异常定位领域的研究进展，旨在为相关研究人员提供技术参考。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中缺陷样本稀缺、标注成本高及先验知识缺乏导致监督学习方法效果受限，亟需探索无监督异常定位技术。
AI.method: 系统回顾了120余篇重要文献，从概念、挑战、分类、基准数据集及定量性能对比等维度进行综合分析。
AI.result: 总结了当前方法的技术特点，对比了不同算法的性能，并预测了未来研究方向如多模态融合与可解释性提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文为工业异常定位及跨领域应用提供了详尽的技术洞察，推动无监督学习在工业质检中的实际落地。

However, in real industrial scenarios, the scarcity of defect samples, the cost of annotation, and the lack of a priori knowledge of defects may render supervised-based methods ineffective. authors_text: Adam Villaflor,Zhe Huang,Swapnil Pande,John Dolan,Jeff Schneider
title: Addressing Optimism Bias in Sequence Modeling for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 解决强化学习序列建模中的乐观偏差
abstract: Impressive results in natural language processing (NLP) based on the Transformer neural network architecture have inspired researchers to explore viewing offline reinforcement learning (RL) as a generic sequence modeling problem. Recent works based on this paradigm have achieved state-of-the-art results in several of the mostly deterministic offline Atari and D4RL benchmarks. However, because these methods jointly model the states and actions as a single sequencing problem, they struggle to disentangle the effects of the policy and world dynamics on the return. Thus, in adversarial or stochastic environments, these methods lead to overly optimistic behavior that can be dangerous in safety-critical systems like autonomous driving. In this work, we propose a method that addresses this optimism bias by explicitly disentangling the policy and world models, which allows us at test time to search for policies that are robust to multiple possible futures in the environment. We demonstrate our method's superior performance on a variety of autonomous driving tasks in simulation.
summary: Impressive results in natural language processing (NLP) based on the Transformer neural network architecture have inspired researchers to explore viewing offline reinforcement learning (RL) as a generic sequence modeling problem. Recent works based on this paradigm have achieved state-of-the-art results in several of the mostly deterministic offline Atari and D4RL benchmarks. However, because these methods jointly model the states and actions as a single sequencing problem, they struggle to disentangle the effects of the policy and world dynamics on the return. Thus, in adversarial or stochastic environments, these methods lead to overly optimistic behavior that can be dangerous in safety-critical systems like autonomous driving. In this work, we propose a method that addresses this optimism bias by explicitly disentangling the policy and world models, which allows us at test time to search for policies that are robust to multiple possible futures in the environment. We demonstrate our method's superior performance on a variety of autonomous driving tasks in simulation.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 神经网络架构的自然语言处理 (NLP) 令人印象深刻的结果激发了研究人员探索将离线强化学习 (RL) 视为通用序列建模问题。最近基于此范式的工作在几个大多数确定性的离线 Atari 和 D4RL 基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。然而，由于这些方法将状态和行动联合建模为单个排序问题，因此它们很难理清政策和世界动态对回报的影响。因此，在对抗性或随机环境中，这些方法会导致过度乐观的行为，这在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中可能是危险的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，通过明确地解开政策和世界模型来解决这种乐观偏见，这使我们能够在测试时寻找对环境中多种可能的未来稳健的政策。我们在模拟中展示了我们的方法在各种自动驾驶任务中的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决强化学习中序列建模的乐观偏差问题，提升自动驾驶等安全关键系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理对抗性或随机环境时容易产生过度乐观行为，导致在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中存在风险，需解耦策略与环境动态以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过显式解耦策略模型与环境动态模型，使测试时能够搜索应对多种潜在未来情况的鲁棒策略。
AI.result: 方法在多种自动驾驶模拟任务中展现出优越性能，有效缓解了乐观偏差问题。
AI.conclusion: 解耦策略与环境模型的方法能有效减少乐观偏差，提高强化学习在安全关键场景下的可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在解决强化学习中序列建模的乐观偏差问题，提升自动驾驶等安全关键系统的鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在处理对抗性或随机环境时容易产生过度乐观行为，导致在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中存在风险，需解耦策略与环境动态以提高鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 通过显式解耦策略模型与环境动态模型，使测试时能够搜索应对多种潜在未来情况的鲁棒策略。
ai_content.result: 方法在多种自动驾驶模拟任务中展现出优越性能，有效缓解了乐观偏差问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 解耦策略与环境模型的方法能有效减少乐观偏差，提高强化学习在安全关键场景下的可靠性。

search_text: Addressing Optimism Bias in Sequence Modeling for Reinforcement Learning 解决强化学习序列建模中的乐观偏差 Impressive results in natural language processing (NLP) based on the Transformer neural network architecture have inspired researchers to explore viewing offline reinforcement learning (RL) as a generic sequence modeling problem. Recent works based on this paradigm have achieved state-of-the-art results in several of the mostly deterministic offline Atari and D4RL benchmarks. However, because these methods jointly model the states and actions as a single sequencing problem, they struggle to disentangle the effects of the policy and world dynamics on the return. Thus, in adversarial or stochastic environments, these methods lead to overly optimistic behavior that can be dangerous in safety-critical systems like autonomous driving. In this work, we propose a method that addresses this optimism bias by explicitly disentangling the policy and world models, which allows us at test time to search for policies that are robust to multiple possible futures in the environment. We demonstrate our method's superior performance on a variety of autonomous driving tasks in simulation. 基于 Transformer 神经网络架构的自然语言处理 (NLP) 令人印象深刻的结果激发了研究人员探索将离线强化学习 (RL) 视为通用序列建模问题。最近基于此范式的工作在几个大多数确定性的离线 Atari 和 D4RL 基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。然而，由于这些方法将状态和行动联合建模为单个排序问题，因此它们很难理清政策和世界动态对回报的影响。因此，在对抗性或随机环境中，这些方法会导致过度乐观的行为，这在自动驾驶等安全关键系统中可能是危险的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，通过明确地解开政策和世界模型来解决这种乐观偏见，这使我们能够在测试时寻找对环境中多种可能的未来稳健的政策。我们在模拟中展示了我们的方法在各种自动驾驶任务中的卓越性能。 本文旨在解决强化学习中序列建模的乐观偏差问题，提升自动驾驶等安全关键系统的鲁棒性。 Adam Villaflor,Zhe Huang,Swapnil Pande,John Dolan,Jeff Schneider cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Dang-Khanh Nguyen,Sudarshan Pant,Ngoc-Huynh Ho,Guee-Sang Lee,Soo-Huyng Kim,Hyung-Jeong Yang
title: Affective Behavior Analysis using Action Unit Relation Graph and Multi-task Cross Attention
title_zh: 使用动作单元关系图和多任务交叉注意力进行情感行为分析
abstract: Facial behavior analysis is a broad topic with various categories such as facial emotion recognition, age, and gender recognition. Many studies focus on individual tasks while the multi-task learning approach is still an open research issue and requires more research. In this paper, we present our solution and experiment result for the Multi-Task Learning challenge of the Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild competition. The challenge is a combination of three tasks: action unit detection, facial expression recognition, and valance-arousal estimation. To address this challenge, we introduce a cross-attentive module to improve multi-task learning performance. Additionally, a facial graph is applied to capture the association among action units. As a result, we achieve the evaluation measure of 128.8 on the validation data provided by the organizers, which outperforms the baseline result of 30.
summary: Facial behavior analysis is a broad topic with various categories such as facial emotion recognition, age, and gender recognition. Many studies focus on individual tasks while the multi-task learning approach is still an open research issue and requires more research. In this paper, we present our solution and experiment result for the Multi-Task Learning challenge of the Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild competition. The challenge is a combination of three tasks: action unit detection, facial expression recognition, and valance-arousal estimation. To address this challenge, we introduce a cross-attentive module to improve multi-task learning performance. Additionally, a facial graph is applied to capture the association among action units. As a result, we achieve the evaluation measure of 128.8 on the validation data provided by the organizers, which outperforms the baseline result of 30.
abstract_zh: 面部行为分析是一个广泛的话题，有多种类别，例如面部情绪识别、年龄和性别识别。许多研究侧重于单个任务，而多任务学习方法仍然是一个开放的研究问题，需要更多的研究。在本文中，我们介绍了针对野外情感行为分析竞赛的多任务学习挑战的解决方案和实验结果。该挑战是三个任务的组合：动作单元检测、面部表情识别和效价唤醒估计。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了交叉注意力模块来提高多任务学习性能。此外，还应用面部图来捕获动作单元之间的关联。结果，我们在组织者提供的验证数据上获得了 128.8 的评估指标，优于 30 的基线结果。

AI.tldr: 提出结合动作单元关系图和多任务交叉注意力机制的方法，解决多任务学习挑战，提升情感行为分析的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于单任务，多任务学习方法效果不佳，需更有效的方法整合多任务信息。
AI.method: 设计交叉注意力模块增强多任务学习，结合动作单元关系图建模面部区域间关联。
AI.result: 验证集得分128.8，优于基线30，显示方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 方法有效提升多任务性能，未来可探索更复杂模型或扩展更多任务。

ai_content.conclusion: 方法有效提升多任务性能，未来可探索更复杂模型或扩展更多任务。

authors_text: Zhengxin You,Qichao Ying,Sheng Li,Zhenxing Qian,Xinpeng Zhang
title: Image Generation Network for Covert Transmission in Online Social Network
title_zh: 在线社交网络中隐蔽传输的图像生成网络
abstract: Online social networks have stimulated communications over the Internet more than ever, making it possible for secret message transmission over such noisy channels. In this paper, we propose a Coverless Image Steganography Network, called CIS-Net, that synthesizes a high-quality image directly conditioned on the secret message to transfer. CIS-Net is composed of four modules, namely, the Generation, Adversarial, Extraction, and Noise Module. The receiver can extract the hidden message without any loss even the images have been distorted by JPEG compression attacks. To disguise the behaviour of steganography, we collected images in the context of profile photos and stickers and train our network accordingly. As such, the generated images are more inclined to escape from malicious detection and attack. The distinctions from previous image steganography methods are majorly the robustness and losslessness against diverse attacks. Experiments over diverse public datasets have manifested the superior ability of anti-steganalysis.
summary: Online social networks have stimulated communications over the Internet more than ever, making it possible for secret message transmission over such noisy channels. In this paper, we propose a Coverless Image Steganography Network, called CIS-Net, that synthesizes a high-quality image directly conditioned on the secret message to transfer. CIS-Net is composed of four modules, namely, the Generation, Adversarial, Extraction, and Noise Module. The receiver can extract the hidden message without any loss even the images have been distorted by JPEG compression attacks. To disguise the behaviour of steganography, we collected images in the context of profile photos and stickers and train our network accordingly. As such, the generated images are more inclined to escape from malicious detection and attack. The distinctions from previous image steganography methods are majorly the robustness and losslessness against diverse attacks. Experiments over diverse public datasets have manifested the superior ability of anti-steganalysis.
abstract_zh: 在线社交网络比以往任何时候都更加刺激了互联网上的通信，使得通过这种嘈杂的渠道传输秘密消息成为可能。在本文中，我们提出了一种无覆盖图像隐写网络，称为 CIS-Net，它直接以要传输的秘密消息为条件合成高质量图像。 CIS-Net由四个模块组成，即生成模块、对抗模块、提取模块和噪声模块。即使图像因 JPEG 压缩攻击而失真，接收者也可以毫无损失地提取隐藏消息。为了掩盖隐写术的行为，我们收集了个人资料照片和贴纸背景下的图像，并相应地训练我们的网络。因此，生成的图像更容易逃脱恶意检测和攻击。与以往的图像隐写方法的区别主要在于针对各种攻击的鲁棒性和无损性。在不同公共数据集上的实验证明了反隐写分析的卓越能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无载体图像隐写网络CIS-Net，通过生成高质量图像实现在线社交网络中的隐蔽信息传输。
AI.motivation: 在线社交网络需隐蔽传输秘密信息，但传统方法易受攻击且存在信息丢失风险，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含生成、对抗、提取和噪声模块的CIS-Net，直接以秘密消息为条件生成图像，并通过对抗训练和特定场景（如头像、贴纸）数据增强隐蔽性。
AI.result: 实验表明CIS-Net在多个数据集上实现无损信息提取，即使图像经JPEG压缩攻击仍保持高隐蔽性，抗隐写分析能力优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CIS-Net通过生成式对抗网络和场景适配训练，为在线社交网络提供了更安全、鲁棒的隐蔽通信方案。

authors_text: Xiaoliang Liu,Furao Shen,Jian Zhao,Changhai Nie
title: AugRmixAT: A Data Processing and Training Method for Improving Multiple Robustness and Generalization Performance
title_zh: AugRmixAT：一种提高多重鲁棒性和泛化性能的数据处理和训练方法
abstract: Deep neural networks are powerful, but they also have shortcomings such as their sensitivity to adversarial examples, noise, blur, occlusion, etc. Moreover, ensuring the reliability and robustness of deep neural network models is crucial for their application in safety-critical areas. Much previous work has been proposed to improve specific robustness. However, we find that the specific robustness is often improved at the sacrifice of the additional robustness or generalization ability of the neural network model. In particular, adversarial training methods significantly hurt the generalization performance on unperturbed data when improving adversarial robustness. In this paper, we propose a new data processing and training method, called AugRmixAT, which can simultaneously improve the generalization ability and multiple robustness of neural network models. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of AugRmixAT on the CIFAR-10/100 and Tiny-ImageNet datasets. The experiments demonstrate that AugRmixAT can improve the model's generalization performance while enhancing the white-box robustness, black-box robustness, common corruption robustness, and partial occlusion robustness.
summary: Deep neural networks are powerful, but they also have shortcomings such as their sensitivity to adversarial examples, noise, blur, occlusion, etc. Moreover, ensuring the reliability and robustness of deep neural network models is crucial for their application in safety-critical areas. Much previous work has been proposed to improve specific robustness. However, we find that the specific robustness is often improved at the sacrifice of the additional robustness or generalization ability of the neural network model. In particular, adversarial training methods significantly hurt the generalization performance on unperturbed data when improving adversarial robustness. In this paper, we propose a new data processing and training method, called AugRmixAT, which can simultaneously improve the generalization ability and multiple robustness of neural network models. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of AugRmixAT on the CIFAR-10/100 and Tiny-ImageNet datasets. The experiments demonstrate that AugRmixAT can improve the model's generalization performance while enhancing the white-box robustness, black-box robustness, common corruption robustness, and partial occlusion robustness.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络功能强大，但也存在对对抗样本、噪声、模糊、遮挡等敏感的缺点。此外，确保深度神经网络模型的可靠性和鲁棒性对于其在安全关键领域的应用至关重要。之前的许多工作已经被提出来提高特定的鲁棒性。然而，我们发现特定鲁棒性的提高往往是以牺牲神经网络模型的额外鲁棒性或泛化能力为代价的。特别是，在提高对抗性鲁棒性时，对抗性训练方法会显着损害未受干扰数据的泛化性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的数据处理和训练方法，称为AugRmixAT，它可以同时提高神经网络模型的泛化能力和多重鲁棒性。最后，我们在 CIFAR-10/100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 数据集上验证了 AugRmixAT 的有效性。实验表明，AugRmixAT可以提高模型的泛化性能，同时增强白盒鲁棒性、黑盒鲁棒性、常见损坏鲁棒性和部分遮挡鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AugRmixAT的数据处理与训练方法，旨在同时提升神经网络模型的泛化能力和多种鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提升特定鲁棒性（如对抗鲁棒性）时，往往以牺牲模型的其他鲁棒性或泛化能力为代价，而实际应用中需要兼顾多方面的鲁棒性与性能。
AI.method: AugRmixAT结合数据增强、Mixup技术和对抗训练，通过设计新的数据处理流程和训练策略，实现对白盒/黑盒对抗、常见干扰及部分遮挡等多场景鲁棒性的联合提升。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上验证，AugRmixAT在保持模型泛化性能的同时，显著提升了白盒对抗鲁棒性、黑盒对抗鲁棒性、常见干扰鲁棒性和部分遮挡鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AugRmixAT通过协同优化数据处理与训练过程，有效解决了单一鲁棒性提升与模型泛化能力之间的矛盾，为安全关键领域的模型应用提供了更可靠的技术方案。

search_text: AugRmixAT: A Data Processing and Training Method for Improving Multiple Robustness and Generalization Performance AugRmixAT：一种提高多重鲁棒性和泛化性能的数据处理和训练方法 Deep neural networks are powerful, but they also have shortcomings such as their sensitivity to adversarial examples, noise, blur, occlusion, etc. Moreover, ensuring the reliability and robustness of deep neural network models is crucial for their application in safety-critical areas. Much previous work has been proposed to improve specific robustness. However, we find that the specific robustness is often improved at the sacrifice of the additional robustness or generalization ability of the neural network model. In particular, adversarial training methods significantly hurt the generalization performance on unperturbed data when improving adversarial robustness. In this paper, we propose a new data processing and training method, called AugRmixAT, which can simultaneously improve the generalization ability and multiple robustness of neural network models. Finally, we validate the effectiveness of AugRmixAT on the CIFAR-10/100 and Tiny-ImageNet datasets. The experiments demonstrate that AugRmixAT can improve the model's generalization performance while enhancing the white-box robustness, black-box robustness, common corruption robustness, and partial occlusion robustness. 深度神经网络功能强大，但也存在对对抗样本、噪声、模糊、遮挡等敏感的缺点。此外，确保深度神经网络模型的可靠性和鲁棒性对于其在安全关键领域的应用至关重要。之前的许多工作已经被提出来提高特定的鲁棒性。然而，我们发现特定鲁棒性的提高往往是以牺牲神经网络模型的额外鲁棒性或泛化能力为代价的。特别是，在提高对抗性鲁棒性时，对抗性训练方法会显着损害未受干扰数据的泛化性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的数据处理和训练方法，称为AugRmixAT，它可以同时提高神经网络模型的泛化能力和多重鲁棒性。最后，我们在 CIFAR-10/100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 数据集上验证了 AugRmixAT 的有效性。实验表明，AugRmixAT可以提高模型的泛化性能，同时增强白盒鲁棒性、黑盒鲁棒性、常见损坏鲁棒性和部分遮挡鲁棒性。 本文提出一种名为AugRmixAT的数据处理与训练方法，旨在同时提升神经网络模型的泛化能力和多种鲁棒性。 Xiaoliang Liu,Furao Shen,Jian Zhao,Changhai Nie cs.CV
